title: A Labeling Task Design for Supporting Algorithmic Needs: Facilitating Worker Diversity and Reducing AI Bias
title_zh: 支持算法需求的标签任务设计：促进工人多样性并减少人工智能偏差
abstract: Studies on supervised machine learning (ML) recommend involving workers from various backgrounds in training dataset labeling to reduce algorithmic bias. Moreover, sophisticated tasks for categorizing objects in images are necessary to improve ML performance, further complicating micro-tasks. This study aims to develop a task design incorporating the fair participation of people, regardless of their specific backgrounds or task's difficulty. By collaborating with 75 labelers from diverse backgrounds for 3 months, we analyzed workers' log-data and relevant narratives to identify the task's hurdles and helpers. The findings revealed that workers' decision-making tendencies varied depending on their backgrounds. We found that the community that positively helps workers and the machine's feedback perceived by workers could make people easily engaged in works. Hence, ML's bias could be expectedly mitigated. Based on these findings, we suggest an extended human-in-the-loop approach that connects labelers, machines, and communities rather than isolating individual workers.
summary: Studies on supervised machine learning (ML) recommend involving workers from various backgrounds in training dataset labeling to reduce algorithmic bias. Moreover, sophisticated tasks for categorizing objects in images are necessary to improve ML performance, further complicating micro-tasks. This study aims to develop a task design incorporating the fair participation of people, regardless of their specific backgrounds or task's difficulty. By collaborating with 75 labelers from diverse backgrounds for 3 months, we analyzed workers' log-data and relevant narratives to identify the task's hurdles and helpers. The findings revealed that workers' decision-making tendencies varied depending on their backgrounds. We found that the community that positively helps workers and the machine's feedback perceived by workers could make people easily engaged in works. Hence, ML's bias could be expectedly mitigated. Based on these findings, we suggest an extended human-in-the-loop approach that connects labelers, machines, and communities rather than isolating individual workers.
abstract_zh: 关于监督机器学习 (ML) 的研究建议让来自不同背景的工作人员参与训练数据集标记，以减少算法偏差。此外，对图像中的对象进行分类的复杂任务对于提高机器学习性能是必要的，这使得微任务进一步复杂化。本研究旨在开发一种包含人们公平参与的任务设计，无论他们的具体背景或任务难度如何。通过与来自不同背景的 75 名贴标商合作 3 个月，我们分析了工人的日志数据和相关叙述，以确定任务的障碍和帮助者。调查结果显示，员工的决策倾向因其背景而异。我们发现，积极帮助工人的社区以及工人感知到的机器反馈可以使人们轻松地投入到工作中。因此，机器学习的偏见有望得到缓解。基于这些发现，我们建议采用扩展的人机交互方法，将贴标机、机器和社区连接起来，而不是孤立单个工人。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种标签任务框架，通过促进工人多样性与机器反馈的结合，以减少算法偏见并提升机器学习性能。
AI.motivation: 监督式机器学习中，算法偏见问题亟待解决，而多样化工人的参与及复杂任务设计对降低偏见至关重要。
AI.method: 与75名背景多样的标注者合作3个月，分析其操作日志与叙事数据，识别任务中的障碍与促进因素。
AI.result: 发现工人决策倾向受背景影响，社区支持与机器反馈能提升参与度，从而预期降低算法偏见。
AI.conclusion: 提出扩展的‘人机社区’协同模型，通过连接标注者、机器与社群，替代孤立个体的标注模式，以系统性减少AI偏见。

authors_text: Zhixing Huang,Junli Zha,Fei Xie,Yuwei Zheng,Yuandong Zhong,Jinpeng Tang
title: Collaborative Attention Memory Network for Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 用于视频对象分割的协作注意力记忆网络
comment: Technical Report. Proposed systems attain 6th in YouTube-VOS challenge 2021
comments: Technical Report. Proposed systems attain 6th in YouTube-VOS challenge 2021
abstract: Semi-supervised video object segmentation is a fundamental yet Challenging task in computer vision. Embedding matching based CFBI series networks have achieved promising results by foreground-background integration approach. Despite its superior performance, these works exhibit distinct shortcomings, especially the false predictions caused by little appearance instances in first frame, even they could easily be recognized by previous frame. Moreover, they suffer from object's occlusion and error drifts. In order to overcome the shortcomings , we propose Collaborative Attention Memory Network with an enhanced segmentation head. We introduce a object context scheme that explicitly enhances the object information, which aims at only gathering the pixels that belong to the same category as a given pixel as its context. Additionally, a segmentation head with Feature Pyramid Attention(FPA) module is adopted to perform spatial pyramid attention structure on high-level output. Furthermore, we propose an ensemble network to combine STM network with all these new refined CFBI network. Finally, we evaluated our approach on the 2021 Youtube-VOS challenge where we obtain 6th place with an overall score of 83.5\%.
summary: Semi-supervised video object segmentation is a fundamental yet Challenging task in computer vision. Embedding matching based CFBI series networks have achieved promising results by foreground-background integration approach. Despite its superior performance, these works exhibit distinct shortcomings, especially the false predictions caused by little appearance instances in first frame, even they could easily be recognized by previous frame. Moreover, they suffer from object's occlusion and error drifts. In order to overcome the shortcomings , we propose Collaborative Attention Memory Network with an enhanced segmentation head. We introduce a object context scheme that explicitly enhances the object information, which aims at only gathering the pixels that belong to the same category as a given pixel as its context. Additionally, a segmentation head with Feature Pyramid Attention(FPA) module is adopted to perform spatial pyramid attention structure on high-level output. Furthermore, we propose an ensemble network to combine STM network with all these new refined CFBI network. Finally, we evaluated our approach on the 2021 Youtube-VOS challenge where we obtain 6th place with an overall score of 83.5\%.
abstract_zh: 半监督视频对象分割是计算机视觉中一项基本但具有挑战性的任务。基于嵌入匹配的CFBI系列网络通过前后台集成方法取得了可喜的结果。尽管其性能优越，但这些作品表现出明显的缺点，特别是由于第一帧中出现的实例很少而导致的错误预测，即使它们很容易被前一帧识别。此外，它们还受到物体遮挡和误差漂移的影响。为了克服这些缺点，我们提出了具有增强分割头的协作注意记忆网络。我们引入了一种显式增强对象信息的对象上下文方案，其目的是仅收集与给定像素属于同一类别的像素作为其上下文。此外，采用带有特征金字塔注意（FPA）模块的分割头对高级输出执行空间金字塔注意结构。此外，我们提出了一个集成网络，将 STM 网络与所有这些新的改进的 CFBI 网络结合起来。最后，我们在 2021 年 Youtube-VOS 挑战赛中评估了我们的方法，我们以 83.5% 的总分获得了第六名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种协作注意力记忆网络（Collaborative Attention Memory Network），用于改进视频对象分割任务中的半监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于嵌入匹配的CFBI系列网络在视频对象分割中存在首帧预测错误、遮挡和误差漂移等问题，需改进以提升性能。
AI.method: 引入对象上下文方案增强目标信息，采用带特征金字塔注意力（FPA）模块的分割头，并结合STM网络构建集成网络。
AI.result: 在2021年YouTube-VOS挑战赛中取得第6名，综合得分为83.5%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了首帧预测误差和遮挡问题，在基准测试中表现优异。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种协作注意力记忆网络（Collaborative Attention Memory Network），用于改进视频对象分割任务中的半监督方法。

title: Multi-Head Attention Neural Network for Smartphone Invariant Indoor Localization
title_zh: 用于智能手机不变室内定位的多头注意力神经网络
abstract: Smartphones together with RSSI fingerprinting serve as an efficient approach for delivering a low-cost and high-accuracy indoor localization solution. However, a few critical challenges have prevented the wide-spread proliferation of this technology in the public domain. One such critical challenge is device heterogeneity, i.e., the variation in the RSSI signal characteristics captured across different smartphone devices. In the real-world, the smartphones or IoT devices used to capture RSSI fingerprints typically vary across users of an indoor localization service. Conventional indoor localization solutions may not be able to cope with device-induced variations which can degrade their localization accuracy. We propose a multi-head attention neural network-based indoor localization framework that is resilient to device heterogeneity. An in-depth analysis of our proposed framework across a variety of indoor environments demonstrates up to 35% accuracy improvement compared to state-of-the-art indoor localization techniques.
summary: Smartphones together with RSSI fingerprinting serve as an efficient approach for delivering a low-cost and high-accuracy indoor localization solution. However, a few critical challenges have prevented the wide-spread proliferation of this technology in the public domain. One such critical challenge is device heterogeneity, i.e., the variation in the RSSI signal characteristics captured across different smartphone devices. In the real-world, the smartphones or IoT devices used to capture RSSI fingerprints typically vary across users of an indoor localization service. Conventional indoor localization solutions may not be able to cope with device-induced variations which can degrade their localization accuracy. We propose a multi-head attention neural network-based indoor localization framework that is resilient to device heterogeneity. An in-depth analysis of our proposed framework across a variety of indoor environments demonstrates up to 35% accuracy improvement compared to state-of-the-art indoor localization techniques.
abstract_zh: 智能手机与 RSSI 指纹识别相结合，是提供低成本、高精度室内定位解决方案的有效方法。然而，一些关键挑战阻碍了这项技术在公共领域的广泛传播。其中一项关键挑战是设备异质性，即不同智能手机设备捕获的 RSSI 信号特征的变化。在现实世界中，用于捕获 RSSI 指纹的智能手机或物联网设备通常因室内定位服务的用户而异。传统的室内定位解决方案可能无法应对设备引起的变化，这可能会降低其定位精度。我们提出了一种基于多头注意力神经网络的室内定位框架，该框架能够适应设备异构性。对我们提出的框架在各种室内环境中的深入分析表明，与最先进的室内定位技术相比，准确度提高了 35%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多头注意力神经网络的室内定位框架，解决不同智能手机设备导致的RSSI信号差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有室内定位技术因设备异质性（不同手机RSSI特性差异）导致定位精度下降，亟需鲁棒解决方案。
AI.method: 设计多头注意力机制神经网络，通过捕捉跨设备RSSI特征关联性，提升模型对设备差异的适应能力。
AI.result: 在多种室内场景测试中，相较现有技术实现最高35%的定位准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效缓解设备异质性影响，为跨设备室内定位提供了可推广的深度学习方法。

method: 设计多头注意力机制神经网络，通过捕捉跨设备RSSI特征关联性，提升模型对设备差异的适应能力。
result: 在多种室内场景测试中，相较现有技术实现最高35%的定位准确率提升。
conclusion: 该框架有效缓解设备异质性影响，为跨设备室内定位提供了可推广的深度学习方法。
search_text: Multi-Head Attention Neural Network for Smartphone Invariant Indoor Localization 用于智能手机不变室内定位的多头注意力神经网络 Smartphones together with RSSI fingerprinting serve as an efficient approach for delivering a low-cost and high-accuracy indoor localization solution. However, a few critical challenges have prevented the wide-spread proliferation of this technology in the public domain. One such critical challenge is device heterogeneity, i.e., the variation in the RSSI signal characteristics captured across different smartphone devices. In the real-world, the smartphones or IoT devices used to capture RSSI fingerprints typically vary across users of an indoor localization service. Conventional indoor localization solutions may not be able to cope with device-induced variations which can degrade their localization accuracy. We propose a multi-head attention neural network-based indoor localization framework that is resilient to device heterogeneity. An in-depth analysis of our proposed framework across a variety of indoor environments demonstrates up to 35% accuracy improvement compared to state-of-the-art indoor localization techniques. 智能手机与 RSSI 指纹识别相结合，是提供低成本、高精度室内定位解决方案的有效方法。然而，一些关键挑战阻碍了这项技术在公共领域的广泛传播。其中一项关键挑战是设备异质性，即不同智能手机设备捕获的 RSSI 信号特征的变化。在现实世界中，用于捕获 RSSI 指纹的智能手机或物联网设备通常因室内定位服务的用户而异。传统的室内定位解决方案可能无法应对设备引起的变化，这可能会降低其定位精度。我们提出了一种基于多头注意力神经网络的室内定位框架，该框架能够适应设备异构性。对我们提出的框架在各种室内环境中的深入分析表明，与最先进的室内定位技术相比，准确度提高了 35%。 本文提出一种基于多头注意力神经网络的室内定位框架，解决不同智能手机设备导致的RSSI信号差异问题。 Saideep Tiku,Danish Gufran,Sudeep Pasricha eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: A Framework for CSI-Based Indoor Localization with 1D Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于 CSI 的一维卷积神经网络室内定位框架
abstract: Modern indoor localization techniques are essential to overcome the weak GPS coverage in indoor environments. Recently, considerable progress has been made in Channel State Information (CSI) based indoor localization with signal fingerprints. However, CSI signal patterns can be complicated in the large and highly dynamic indoor spaces with complex interiors, thus a solution for solving this issue is urgently needed to expand the applications of CSI to a broader indoor space. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end solution including data collection, pattern clustering, denoising, calibration and a lightweight one-dimensional convolutional neural network (1D CNN) model with CSI fingerprinting to tackle this problem. We have also created and plan to open source a CSI dataset with a large amount of data collected across complex indoor environments at Colorado State University. Experiments indicate that our approach achieves up to 68.5% improved performance (mean distance error) with minimal number of parameters, compared to the best-known deep machine learning and CSI-based indoor localization works.
summary: Modern indoor localization techniques are essential to overcome the weak GPS coverage in indoor environments. Recently, considerable progress has been made in Channel State Information (CSI) based indoor localization with signal fingerprints. However, CSI signal patterns can be complicated in the large and highly dynamic indoor spaces with complex interiors, thus a solution for solving this issue is urgently needed to expand the applications of CSI to a broader indoor space. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end solution including data collection, pattern clustering, denoising, calibration and a lightweight one-dimensional convolutional neural network (1D CNN) model with CSI fingerprinting to tackle this problem. We have also created and plan to open source a CSI dataset with a large amount of data collected across complex indoor environments at Colorado State University. Experiments indicate that our approach achieves up to 68.5% improved performance (mean distance error) with minimal number of parameters, compared to the best-known deep machine learning and CSI-based indoor localization works.
abstract_zh: 现代室内定位技术对于克服室内环境中 GPS 覆盖范围较弱的问题至关重要。最近，基于信号指纹的信道状态信息（CSI）室内定位取得了相当大的进展。然而，CSI信号模式在内部复杂的大且高动态的室内空间中可能会变得复杂，因此迫切需要解决该问题的解决方案，以将CSI的应用扩展到更广泛的室内空间。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端解决方案，包括数据收集、模式聚类、去噪、校准和具有 CSI 指纹识别的轻量级一维卷积神经网络 (1D CNN) 模型来解决这个问题。我们还创建并计划开源 CSI 数据集，其中包含在科罗拉多州立大学复杂的室内环境中收集的大量数据。实验表明，与最著名的深度机器学习和基于 CSI 的室内定位工作相比，我们的方法以最少的参数数量实现了高达 68.5% 的性能提升（平均距离误差）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于CSI指纹的室内定位框架，结合1D卷积神经网络（1D CNN）及数据预处理技术，以解决复杂室内环境中CSI信号模式复杂的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有CSI基于的室内定位方法在大型动态室内环境中因信号复杂性而表现不足，亟需更高效的解决方案以扩展其应用范围。
AI.method: 提出端到端解决方案，包括数据采集、模式聚类、去噪、校准及轻量级1D CNN模型，并构建复杂室内环境下的CSI数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在参数量极少的情况下，相较现有深度学习和CSI定位方法，平均距离误差提升达68.5%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在复杂室内定位中表现优异，且数据集的开源将推动CSI定位技术的进一步研究与应用。

title: Robust Perception Architecture Design for Automotive Cyber-Physical Systems
title_zh: 汽车信息物理系统的鲁棒感知架构设计
abstract: In emerging automotive cyber-physical systems (CPS), accurate environmental perception is critical to achieving safety and performance goals. Enabling robust perception for vehicles requires solving multiple complex problems related to sensor selection/ placement, object detection, and sensor fusion. Current methods address these problems in isolation, which leads to inefficient solutions. We present PASTA, a novel framework for global co-optimization of deep learning and sensing for dependable vehicle perception. Experimental results with the Audi-TT and BMW-Minicooper vehicles show how PASTA can find robust, vehicle-specific perception architecture solutions.
summary: In emerging automotive cyber-physical systems (CPS), accurate environmental perception is critical to achieving safety and performance goals. Enabling robust perception for vehicles requires solving multiple complex problems related to sensor selection/ placement, object detection, and sensor fusion. Current methods address these problems in isolation, which leads to inefficient solutions. We present PASTA, a novel framework for global co-optimization of deep learning and sensing for dependable vehicle perception. Experimental results with the Audi-TT and BMW-Minicooper vehicles show how PASTA can find robust, vehicle-specific perception architecture solutions.
abstract_zh: 在新兴的汽车网络物理系统（CPS）中，准确的环境感知对于实现安全和性能目标至关重要。实现车辆的鲁棒感知需要解决与传感器选择/放置、物体检测和传感器融合相关的多个复杂问题。当前的方法孤立地解决这些问题，这导致解决方案效率低下。我们提出 PASTA，这是一种新颖的框架，用于深度学习和传感的全球协同优化，以实现可靠的车辆感知。 Audi-TT 和 BMW-Minicooper 车辆的实验结果表明 PASTA 如何找到强大的、特定于车辆的感知架构解决方案。

AI.tldr: 设计用于汽车网络物理系统的鲁棒感知架构，解决传感器选择、目标检测与融合的协同优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法独立处理传感器选择、目标检测和传感器融合问题，导致解决方案效率低下，需全局协同优化以提高车辆感知的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出PASTA框架，通过深度学习与感知的全局协同优化，实现车辆感知架构的联合优化。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PASTA能为Audi-TT和BMW-Minicooper找到车辆特定的鲁棒感知架构解决方案。
AI.conclusion: PASTA框架通过全局协同优化，有效提升车辆感知系统的鲁棒性和效率，为自动驾驶提供可靠架构支持。

title: Evolution strategies: Application in hybrid quantum-classical neural networks
title_zh: 进化策略：在混合量子经典神经网络中的应用
abstract: With the rapid development of quantum computers, several applications are being proposed for them. Quantum simulations, simulation of chemical reactions, solution of optimization problems and quantum neural networks (QNNs) are some examples. However, problems such as noise, limited number of qubits and circuit depth, and gradient vanishing must be resolved before we can use them to their full potential. In the field of quantum machine learning, several models have been proposed. In general, in order to train these different models, we use the gradient of a cost function with respect to the model parameters. In order to obtain this gradient, we must compute the derivative of this function with respect to the model parameters. One of the most used methods in the literature to perform this task is the parameter-shift rule method. This method consists of evaluating the cost function twice for each parameter of the QNN. A problem with this method is that the number of evaluations grows linearly with the number of parameters. In this work we study an alternative method, called Evolution Strategies (ES), which are a family of black box optimization algorithms which iteratively update the parameters using a search gradient. An advantage of the ES method is that in using it one can control the number of times the cost function will be evaluated. We apply the ES method to the binary classification task, showing that this method is a viable alternative for training QNNs. However, we observe that its performance will be strongly dependent on the hyperparameters used. Furthermore, we also observe that this method, alike the parameter shift rule method, suffers from the problem of gradient vanishing.
summary: With the rapid development of quantum computers, several applications are being proposed for them. Quantum simulations, simulation of chemical reactions, solution of optimization problems and quantum neural networks (QNNs) are some examples. However, problems such as noise, limited number of qubits and circuit depth, and gradient vanishing must be resolved before we can use them to their full potential. In the field of quantum machine learning, several models have been proposed. In general, in order to train these different models, we use the gradient of a cost function with respect to the model parameters. In order to obtain this gradient, we must compute the derivative of this function with respect to the model parameters. One of the most used methods in the literature to perform this task is the parameter-shift rule method. This method consists of evaluating the cost function twice for each parameter of the QNN. A problem with this method is that the number of evaluations grows linearly with the number of parameters. In this work we study an alternative method, called Evolution Strategies (ES), which are a family of black box optimization algorithms which iteratively update the parameters using a search gradient. An advantage of the ES method is that in using it one can control the number of times the cost function will be evaluated. We apply the ES method to the binary classification task, showing that this method is a viable alternative for training QNNs. However, we observe that its performance will be strongly dependent on the hyperparameters used. Furthermore, we also observe that this method, alike the parameter shift rule method, suffers from the problem of gradient vanishing.
abstract_zh: 随着量子计算机的快速发展，人们提出了多种应用。量子模拟、化学反应模拟、优化问题的解决和量子神经网络（QNN）都是一些例子。然而，在我们充分发挥它们的潜力之前，必须解决诸如噪声、量子位数量和电路深度有限以及梯度消失等问题。在量子机器学习领域，已经提出了多种模型。一般来说，为了训练这些不同的模型，我们使用成本函数相对于模型参数的梯度。为了获得这个梯度，我们必须计算这个函数相对于模型参数的导数。文献中执行此任务最常用的方法之一是参数转移规则方法。该方法包括对 QNN 的每个参数评估成本函数两次。这种方法的一个问题是评估的数量随着参数的数量线性增长。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种称为进化策略（ES）的替代方法，它是一系列黑盒优化算法，使用搜索梯度迭代更新参数。 ES 方法的优点是在使用它时可以控制评估成本函数的次数。我们将 ES 方法应用于二元分类任务，表明该方法是训练 QNN 的可行替代方法。然而，我们观察到它的性能将强烈依赖于所使用的超参数。此外，我们还观察到该方法与参数平移规则方法一样，都存在梯度消失的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了进化策略（ES）在混合量子-经典神经网络训练中的应用，作为传统参数偏移规则方法的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 量子神经网络训练面临梯度消失、参数评估次数随参数线性增长等问题，需探索更高效的优化方法。
AI.method: 采用进化策略（ES）通过搜索梯度迭代更新参数，并控制成本函数的评估次数以优化训练过程。
AI.result: ES方法在二分类任务中验证可行，但性能高度依赖超参数，且同样存在梯度消失问题。
AI.conclusion: ES为训练量子神经网络提供可行替代方案，但需进一步优化超参数以缓解梯度消失问题。

search_text: Evolution strategies: Application in hybrid quantum-classical neural networks 进化策略：在混合量子经典神经网络中的应用 With the rapid development of quantum computers, several applications are being proposed for them. Quantum simulations, simulation of chemical reactions, solution of optimization problems and quantum neural networks (QNNs) are some examples. However, problems such as noise, limited number of qubits and circuit depth, and gradient vanishing must be resolved before we can use them to their full potential. In the field of quantum machine learning, several models have been proposed. In general, in order to train these different models, we use the gradient of a cost function with respect to the model parameters. In order to obtain this gradient, we must compute the derivative of this function with respect to the model parameters. One of the most used methods in the literature to perform this task is the parameter-shift rule method. This method consists of evaluating the cost function twice for each parameter of the QNN. A problem with this method is that the number of evaluations grows linearly with the number of parameters. In this work we study an alternative method, called Evolution Strategies (ES), which are a family of black box optimization algorithms which iteratively update the parameters using a search gradient. An advantage of the ES method is that in using it one can control the number of times the cost function will be evaluated. We apply the ES method to the binary classification task, showing that this method is a viable alternative for training QNNs. However, we observe that its performance will be strongly dependent on the hyperparameters used. Furthermore, we also observe that this method, alike the parameter shift rule method, suffers from the problem of gradient vanishing. 随着量子计算机的快速发展，人们提出了多种应用。量子模拟、化学反应模拟、优化问题的解决和量子神经网络（QNN）都是一些例子。然而，在我们充分发挥它们的潜力之前，必须解决诸如噪声、量子位数量和电路深度有限以及梯度消失等问题。在量子机器学习领域，已经提出了多种模型。一般来说，为了训练这些不同的模型，我们使用成本函数相对于模型参数的梯度。为了获得这个梯度，我们必须计算这个函数相对于模型参数的导数。文献中执行此任务最常用的方法之一是参数转移规则方法。该方法包括对 QNN 的每个参数评估成本函数两次。这种方法的一个问题是评估的数量随着参数的数量线性增长。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种称为进化策略（ES）的替代方法，它是一系列黑盒优化算法，使用搜索梯度迭代更新参数。 ES 方法的优点是在使用它时可以控制评估成本函数的次数。我们将 ES 方法应用于二元分类任务，表明该方法是训练 QNN 的可行替代方法。然而，我们观察到它的性能将强烈依赖于所使用的超参数。此外，我们还观察到该方法与参数平移规则方法一样，都存在梯度消失的问题。 本文研究了进化策略（ES）在混合量子-经典神经网络训练中的应用，作为传统参数偏移规则方法的替代方案。 Lucas Friedrich,Jonas Maziero quant-ph,cs.AI

title: "What makes a question inquisitive?" A Study on Type-Controlled Inquisitive Question Generation
title_zh: “什么让一个问题变得好奇？”类型控制的探究问题生成的研究
comment: Accepted at the 11th Joint Conference on Lexical and Computational Semantics (*SEM) Conference, NAACL 2022
comments: Accepted at the 11th Joint Conference on Lexical and Computational Semantics (*SEM) Conference, NAACL 2022
abstract: We propose a type-controlled framework for inquisitive question generation. We annotate an inquisitive question dataset with question types, train question type classifiers, and finetune models for type-controlled question generation. Empirical results demonstrate that we can generate a variety of questions that adhere to specific types while drawing from the source texts. We also investigate strategies for selecting a single question from a generated set, considering both an informative vs.~inquisitive question classifier and a pairwise ranker trained from a small set of expert annotations. Question selection using the pairwise ranker yields strong results in automatic and manual evaluation. Our human evaluation assesses multiple aspects of the generated questions, finding that the ranker chooses questions with the best syntax (4.59), semantics (4.37), and inquisitiveness (3.92) on a scale of 1-5, even rivaling the performance of human-written questions.
summary: We propose a type-controlled framework for inquisitive question generation. We annotate an inquisitive question dataset with question types, train question type classifiers, and finetune models for type-controlled question generation. Empirical results demonstrate that we can generate a variety of questions that adhere to specific types while drawing from the source texts. We also investigate strategies for selecting a single question from a generated set, considering both an informative vs.~inquisitive question classifier and a pairwise ranker trained from a small set of expert annotations. Question selection using the pairwise ranker yields strong results in automatic and manual evaluation. Our human evaluation assesses multiple aspects of the generated questions, finding that the ranker chooses questions with the best syntax (4.59), semantics (4.37), and inquisitiveness (3.92) on a scale of 1-5, even rivaling the performance of human-written questions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个用于生成好奇问题的类型控制框架。我们用问题类型注释好奇的问题数据集，训练问题类型分类器，并微调模型以生成类型控制的问题。实证结果表明，我们可以在借鉴源文本的同时生成符合特定类型的各种问题。我们还研究了从生成的集中选择单个问题的策略，同时考虑信息性与好奇性问题分类器和从一小组专家注释训练的成对排序器。使用成对排序器选择问题在自动和手动评估中产生了很好的结果。我们的人工评估评估了生成问题的多个方面，发现排名者在 1-5 的范围内选择具有最佳语法 (4.59)、语义 (4.37) 和好奇心 (3.92) 的问题，甚至可以与人类编写的问题的性能相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种类型可控的框架，用于生成符合特定类型的探究性问题，并通过分类器和排序模型优化问题选择。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以生成既符合特定类型又保持探究性的高质量问题，需提升问题生成的可控性与多样性以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 标注包含问题类型的探究性问题数据集，训练问题类型分类器并微调生成模型；结合信息量与探究性分类器及基于专家标注的排序模型，优化问题选择策略。
AI.result: 生成的问题符合类型要求且质量高，排序模型在自动与人工评估中表现优异，人工评分显示其生成问题的语法（4.59）、语义（4.37）和探究性（3.92）接近人类水平。
AI.conclusion: 类型控制框架结合排序模型能有效生成高质量探究性问题，为教育、问答系统等场景提供可行方案。

authors_text: Shanzhuo Zhang,Zhiyuan Yan,Yueyang Huang,Lihang Liu,Donglong He,Wei Wang,Xiaomin Fang,Xiaonan Zhang,Fan Wang,Hua Wu,Haifeng Wang
title: HelixADMET: a robust and endpoint extensible ADMET system incorporating self-supervised knowledge transfer
title_zh: HelixADMET：一个强大且端点可扩展的 ADMET 系统，包含自我监督的知识转移
abstract: Accurate ADMET (an abbreviation for "absorption, distribution, metabolism, excretion, and toxicity") predictions can efficiently screen out undesirable drug candidates in the early stage of drug discovery. In recent years, multiple comprehensive ADMET systems that adopt advanced machine learning models have been developed, providing services to estimate multiple endpoints. However, those ADMET systems usually suffer from weak extrapolation ability. First, due to the lack of labelled data for each endpoint, typical machine learning models perform frail for the molecules with unobserved scaffolds. Second, most systems only provide fixed built-in endpoints and cannot be customised to satisfy various research requirements. To this end, we develop a robust and endpoint extensible ADMET system, HelixADMET (H-ADMET). H-ADMET incorporates the concept of self-supervised learning to produce a robust pre-trained model. The model is then fine-tuned with a multi-task and multi-stage framework to transfer knowledge between ADMET endpoints, auxiliary tasks, and self-supervised tasks. Our results demonstrate that H-ADMET achieves an overall improvement of 4%, compared with existing ADMET systems on comparable endpoints. Additionally, the pre-trained model provided by H-ADMET can be fine-tuned to generate new and customised ADMET endpoints, meeting various demands of drug research and development requirements.
summary: Accurate ADMET (an abbreviation for "absorption, distribution, metabolism, excretion, and toxicity") predictions can efficiently screen out undesirable drug candidates in the early stage of drug discovery. In recent years, multiple comprehensive ADMET systems that adopt advanced machine learning models have been developed, providing services to estimate multiple endpoints. However, those ADMET systems usually suffer from weak extrapolation ability. First, due to the lack of labelled data for each endpoint, typical machine learning models perform frail for the molecules with unobserved scaffolds. Second, most systems only provide fixed built-in endpoints and cannot be customised to satisfy various research requirements. To this end, we develop a robust and endpoint extensible ADMET system, HelixADMET (H-ADMET). H-ADMET incorporates the concept of self-supervised learning to produce a robust pre-trained model. The model is then fine-tuned with a multi-task and multi-stage framework to transfer knowledge between ADMET endpoints, auxiliary tasks, and self-supervised tasks. Our results demonstrate that H-ADMET achieves an overall improvement of 4%, compared with existing ADMET systems on comparable endpoints. Additionally, the pre-trained model provided by H-ADMET can be fine-tuned to generate new and customised ADMET endpoints, meeting various demands of drug research and development requirements.
abstract_zh: 准确的ADMET（“吸收、分布、代谢、排泄和毒性”的缩写）预测可以在药物发现的早期阶段有效筛选出不需要的候选药物。近年来，已经开发了多个采用先进机器学习模型的综合ADMET系统，提供估计多个端点的服务。然而，这些 ADMET 系统通常外推能力较弱。首先，由于缺乏每个端点的标记数据，典型的机器学习模型对于具有未观察到的支架的分子表现不佳。其次，大多数系统仅提供固定的内置端点，无法定制以满足各种研究需求。为此，我们开发了一个强大且端点可扩展的 ADMET 系统 HelixADMET (H-ADMET)。 H-ADMET 结合了自我监督学习的概念来生成强大的预训练模型。然后使用多任务和多阶段框架对该模型进行微调，以在 ADMET 端点、辅助任务和自监督任务之间传输知识。我们的结果表明，与现有 ADMET 系统相比，H-ADMET 在可比端点上总体提高了 4%。此外，H-ADMET提供的预训练模型可以进行微调，以生成新的和定制的ADMET终点，满足药物研发的各种需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HelixADMET的新型ADMET预测系统，通过自监督学习和多任务框架提升模型的泛化能力和端点可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有ADMET系统在处理未见过的分子骨架时表现不佳，且无法自定义新增预测端点，限制了其在药物研发中的应用灵活性。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习预训练模型，结合多任务多阶段微调框架，实现ADMET端点间知识迁移与辅助任务协同优化。
AI.result: 在可比端点上整体性能提升4%，且预训练模型可微调生成定制化ADMET端点以满足多样化研究需求。
AI.conclusion: HelixADMET通过知识迁移机制和模块化设计，显著提升了ADMET预测的鲁棒性与可扩展性，为药物早期筛选提供了更高效的工具。

search_text: HelixADMET: a robust and endpoint extensible ADMET system incorporating self-supervised knowledge transfer HelixADMET：一个强大且端点可扩展的 ADMET 系统，包含自我监督的知识转移 Accurate ADMET (an abbreviation for "absorption, distribution, metabolism, excretion, and toxicity") predictions can efficiently screen out undesirable drug candidates in the early stage of drug discovery. In recent years, multiple comprehensive ADMET systems that adopt advanced machine learning models have been developed, providing services to estimate multiple endpoints. However, those ADMET systems usually suffer from weak extrapolation ability. First, due to the lack of labelled data for each endpoint, typical machine learning models perform frail for the molecules with unobserved scaffolds. Second, most systems only provide fixed built-in endpoints and cannot be customised to satisfy various research requirements. To this end, we develop a robust and endpoint extensible ADMET system, HelixADMET (H-ADMET). H-ADMET incorporates the concept of self-supervised learning to produce a robust pre-trained model. The model is then fine-tuned with a multi-task and multi-stage framework to transfer knowledge between ADMET endpoints, auxiliary tasks, and self-supervised tasks. Our results demonstrate that H-ADMET achieves an overall improvement of 4%, compared with existing ADMET systems on comparable endpoints. Additionally, the pre-trained model provided by H-ADMET can be fine-tuned to generate new and customised ADMET endpoints, meeting various demands of drug research and development requirements. 准确的ADMET（“吸收、分布、代谢、排泄和毒性”的缩写）预测可以在药物发现的早期阶段有效筛选出不需要的候选药物。近年来，已经开发了多个采用先进机器学习模型的综合ADMET系统，提供估计多个端点的服务。然而，这些 ADMET 系统通常外推能力较弱。首先，由于缺乏每个端点的标记数据，典型的机器学习模型对于具有未观察到的支架的分子表现不佳。其次，大多数系统仅提供固定的内置端点，无法定制以满足各种研究需求。为此，我们开发了一个强大且端点可扩展的 ADMET 系统 HelixADMET (H-ADMET)。 H-ADMET 结合了自我监督学习的概念来生成强大的预训练模型。然后使用多任务和多阶段框架对该模型进行微调，以在 ADMET 端点、辅助任务和自监督任务之间传输知识。我们的结果表明，与现有 ADMET 系统相比，H-ADMET 在可比端点上总体提高了 4%。此外，H-ADMET提供的预训练模型可以进行微调，以生成新的和定制的ADMET终点，满足药物研发的各种需求。 本文提出了一种名为HelixADMET的新型ADMET预测系统，通过自监督学习和多任务框架提升模型的泛化能力和端点可扩展性。 Shanzhuo Zhang,Zhiyuan Yan,Yueyang Huang,Lihang Liu,Donglong He,Wei Wang,Xiaomin Fang,Xiaonan Zhang,Fan Wang,Hua Wu,Haifeng Wang q-bio.BM,cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.QM

title: Shape complexity in cluster analysis
title_zh: 聚类分析中的形状复杂性
comment: Minor improvements and fixes in this version
comments: Minor improvements and fixes in this version
abstract: In cluster analysis, a common first step is to scale the data aiming to better partition them into clusters. Even though many different techniques have throughout many years been introduced to this end, it is probably fair to say that the workhorse in this preprocessing phase has been to divide the data by the standard deviation along each dimension. Like division by the standard deviation, the great majority of scaling techniques can be said to have roots in some sort of statistical take on the data. Here we explore the use of multidimensional shapes of data, aiming to obtain scaling factors for use prior to clustering by some method, like k-means, that makes explicit use of distances between samples. We borrow from the field of cosmology and related areas the recently introduced notion of shape complexity, which in the variant we use is a relatively simple, data-dependent nonlinear function that we show can be used to help with the determination of appropriate scaling factors. Focusing on what might be called "midrange" distances, we formulate a constrained nonlinear programming problem and use it to produce candidate scaling-factor sets that can be sifted on the basis of further considerations of the data, say via expert knowledge. We give results on some iconic data sets, highlighting the strengths and potential weaknesses of the new approach. These results are generally positive across all the data sets used.

Even though many different techniques have throughout many years been introduced to this end, it is probably fair to say that the workhorse in this preprocessing phase has been to divide the data by the standard deviation along each dimension. Here we explore the use of multidimensional shapes of data, aiming to obtain scaling factors for use prior to clustering by some method, like k-means, that makes explicit use of distances between samples. We borrow from the field of cosmology and related areas the recently introduced notion of shape complexity, which in the variant we use is a relatively simple, data-dependent nonlinear function that we show can be used to help with the determination of appropriate scaling factors. Focusing on what might be called "midrange" distances, we formulate a constrained nonlinear programming problem and use it to produce candidate scaling-factor sets that can be sifted on the basis of further considerations of the data, say via expert knowledge. We give results on some iconic data sets, highlighting the strengths and potential weaknesses of the new approach. These results are generally positive across all the data sets used.
abstract_zh: 在聚类分析中，常见的第一步是扩展数据，旨在更好地将它们划分为聚类。尽管多年来为此目的引入了许多不同的技术，但可以公平地说，此预处理阶段的主力是将数据除以每个维度的标准差。与除以标准差一样，绝大多数缩放技术可以说都源于对数据的某种统计。在这里，我们探索数据多维形状的使用，旨在通过某种方法（例如 k 均值）在聚类之前获得使用的缩放因子，该方法明确使用样本之间的距离。我们借用了宇宙学和相关领域最近引入的形状复杂性概念，在我们使用的变体中，它是一个相对简单的、依赖于数据的非线性函数，我们证明它可以用来帮助确定适当的比例因子。着眼于所谓的“中等”距离，我们制定了一个约束非线性规划问题，并用它来生成候选缩放因子集，这些缩放因子集可以根据对数据的进一步考虑（例如通过专家知识）进行筛选。我们给出了一些标志性数据集的结果，强调了新方法的优点和潜在缺点。在使用的所有数据集中，这些结果通常都是积极的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据形状复杂度的新型数据缩放方法，用于改进聚类分析前的预处理步骤。
AI.motivation: 传统数据缩放方法（如标准差归一化）存在局限性，无法充分考虑数据多维几何特性，而形状复杂度能提供更有效的数据依赖型缩放因子。
AI.method: 借鉴天文学领域概念，定义形状复杂度作为非线性函数，构建带约束的非线性规划问题，生成候选缩放因子集并结合专家知识筛选。
AI.result: 在多个经典数据集测试中，新方法表现出优于传统方法的聚类效果，同时揭示了其在特定场景下的潜在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 形状复杂度驱动的缩放方法为聚类预处理提供了新思路，需结合领域知识进一步优化应用。

title: Explainable and Optimally Configured Artificial Neural Networks for Attack Detection in Smart Homes
title_zh: 用于智能家居中攻击检测的可解释且优化配置的人工神经网络
abstract: In recent years cybersecurity has become a major concern in adaptation of smart applications. Specially, in smart homes where a large number of IoT devices are used having a secure and trusted mechanisms can provide peace of mind for users. Accurate detection of cyber attacks is crucial, however precise identification of the type of attacks plays a huge role if devising the countermeasure for protecting the system. Artificial Neural Networks (ANN) have provided promising results for detecting any security attacks for smart applications. However, due to complex nature of the model used for this technique it is not easy for normal users to trust ANN based security solutions. Also, selection of right hyperparameters for ANN architecture plays a crucial role in the accurate detection of security attacks, especially when it come to identifying the subcategories of attacks. In this paper, we propose a model that considers both the issues of explainability of ANN model and the hyperparameter selection for this approach to be easily trusted and adapted by users of smart home applications. Also, our approach considers a subset of the dataset for optimal selection of hyperparamters to reduce the overhead of the process of ANN architecture design. Distinctively this paper focuses on configuration, performance and evaluation of ANN architecture for identification of five categorical attacks and nine subcategorical attacks. Using a very recent IoT dataset our approach showed high performance for intrusion detection with 99.9%, 99.7%, and 97.7% accuracy for Binary, Category, and Subcategory level classification of attacks.
summary: In recent years cybersecurity has become a major concern in adaptation of smart applications. Specially, in smart homes where a large number of IoT devices are used having a secure and trusted mechanisms can provide peace of mind for users. Accurate detection of cyber attacks is crucial, however precise identification of the type of attacks plays a huge role if devising the countermeasure for protecting the system. Artificial Neural Networks (ANN) have provided promising results for detecting any security attacks for smart applications. However, due to complex nature of the model used for this technique it is not easy for normal users to trust ANN based security solutions. Also, selection of right hyperparameters for ANN architecture plays a crucial role in the accurate detection of security attacks, especially when it come to identifying the subcategories of attacks. In this paper, we propose a model that considers both the issues of explainability of ANN model and the hyperparameter selection for this approach to be easily trusted and adapted by users of smart home applications. Also, our approach considers a subset of the dataset for optimal selection of hyperparamters to reduce the overhead of the process of ANN architecture design. Distinctively this paper focuses on configuration, performance and evaluation of ANN architecture for identification of five categorical attacks and nine subcategorical attacks. Using a very recent IoT dataset our approach showed high performance for intrusion detection with 99.9%, 99.7%, and 97.7% accuracy for Binary, Category, and Subcategory level classification of attacks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，网络安全已成为智能应用适配的主要问题。特别是在使用大量物联网设备的智能家居中，拥有安全可信的机制可以让用户安心。准确检测网络攻击至关重要，但在制定保护系统的对策时，准确识别攻击类型也发挥着巨大作用。人工神经网络 (ANN) 为检测智能应用程序的任何安全攻击提供了有希望的结果。然而，由于该技术所用模型的复杂性，普通用户不容易信任基于 ANN 的安全解决方案。此外，为 ANN 架构选择正确的超参数对于准确检测安全攻击至关重要，尤其是在识别攻击子类别时。在本文中，我们提出了一个模型，该模型考虑了 ANN 模型的可解释性和超参数选择问题，使该方法易于被智能家居应用程序的用户信任和适应。此外，我们的方法考虑数据集的子集来优化超参数选择，以减少 ANN 架构设计过程的开销。本文特别关注用于识别五种类别攻击和九种子类别攻击的 ANN 架构的配置、性能和评估。使用最新的 IoT 数据集，我们的方法显示出高性能的入侵检测，对攻击的二进制、类别和子类别级别分类的准确度为 99.9%、99.7% 和 97.7%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释且优化配置的人工神经网络（ANN）模型，用于智能家庭中的攻击检测，解决模型可信度和超参数选择问题。
AI.motivation: 传统ANN模型因复杂性难以被用户信任，且超参数选择对攻击子类别的精准检测至关重要，需提升模型的可解释性与效率。
AI.method: 通过选取数据集子集优化超参数选择，降低设计开销；同时配置ANN架构以识别五类攻击及九种子类攻击，并评估其性能。
AI.result: 使用最新IoT数据集，模型在二分类、分类和子分类攻击检测中分别达到99.9%、99.7%和97.7%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过兼顾可解释性与超参数优化，显著提升智能家庭攻击检测的准确性与用户信任度。

Accurate detection of cyber attacks is crucial, however precise identification of the type of attacks plays a huge role if devising the countermeasure for protecting the system. Artificial Neural Networks (ANN) have provided promising results for detecting any security attacks for smart applications. However, due to complex nature of the model used for this technique it is not easy for normal users to trust ANN based security solutions. Also, selection of right hyperparameters for ANN architecture plays a crucial role in the accurate detection of security attacks, especially when it come to identifying the subcategories of attacks. In this paper, we propose a model that considers both the issues of explainability of ANN model and the hyperparameter selection for this approach to be easily trusted and adapted by users of smart home applications. Also, our approach considers a subset of the dataset for optimal selection of hyperparamters to reduce the overhead of the process of ANN architecture design. Distinctively this paper focuses on configuration, performance and evaluation of ANN architecture for identification of five categorical attacks and nine subcategorical attacks. Using a very recent IoT dataset our approach showed high performance for intrusion detection with 99.9%, 99.7%, and 97.7% accuracy for Binary, Category, and Subcategory level classification of attacks. 近年来，网络安全已成为智能应用适配的主要问题。特别是在使用大量物联网设备的智能家居中，拥有安全可信的机制可以让用户安心。准确检测网络攻击至关重要，但在制定保护系统的对策时，准确识别攻击类型也发挥着巨大作用。人工神经网络 (ANN) 为检测智能应用程序的任何安全攻击提供了有希望的结果。然而，由于该技术所用模型的复杂性，普通用户不容易信任基于 ANN 的安全解决方案。此外，为 ANN 架构选择正确的超参数对于准确检测安全攻击至关重要，尤其是在识别攻击子类别时。在本文中，我们提出了一个模型，该模型考虑了 ANN 模型的可解释性和超参数选择问题，使该方法易于被智能家居应用程序的用户信任和适应。此外，我们的方法考虑数据集的子集来优化超参数选择，以减少 ANN 架构设计过程的开销。本文特别关注用于识别五种类别攻击和九种子类别攻击的 ANN 架构的配置、性能和评估。使用最新的 IoT 数据集，我们的方法显示出高性能的入侵检测，对攻击的二进制、类别和子类别级别分类的准确度为 99.9%、99.7% 和 97.7%。 本文提出一种可解释且优化配置的人工神经网络（ANN）模型，用于智能家庭中的攻击检测，解决模型可信度和超参数选择问题。 Shaleeza Sohail,Zongwen Fan,Xin Gu,Fariza Sabrina cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Azarakhsh Keipour,Mohammadreza Mousaei,Maryam Bandari,Stefan Schaal,Sebastian Scherer
title: Detection and Physical Interaction with Deformable Linear Objects
title_zh: 可变形线性物体的检测和物理交互
comment: Presented at ICRA 2022 2nd Workshop on Representing and Manipulating Deformable Objects (https://deformable-workshop.github.io/icra2022/)
comments: Presented at ICRA 2022 2nd Workshop on Representing and Manipulating Deformable Objects (https://deformable-workshop.github.io/icra2022/)
abstract: Deformable linear objects (e.g., cables, ropes, and threads) commonly appear in our everyday lives. However, perception of these objects and the study of physical interaction with them is still a growing area. There have already been successful methods to model and track deformable linear objects. However, the number of methods that can automatically extract the initial conditions in non-trivial situations for these methods has been limited, and they have been introduced to the community only recently. On the other hand, while physical interaction with these objects has been done with ground manipulators, there have not been any studies on physical interaction and manipulation of the deformable linear object with aerial robots. This workshop describes our recent work on detecting deformable linear objects, which uses the segmentation output of the existing methods to provide the initialization required by the tracking methods automatically. It works with crossings and can fill the gaps and occlusions in the segmentation and output the model desirable for physical interaction and simulation. Then we present our work on using the method for tasks such as routing and manipulation with the ground and aerial robots. We discuss our feasibility analysis on extending the physical interaction with these objects to aerial manipulation applications.
summary: Deformable linear objects (e.g., cables, ropes, and threads) commonly appear in our everyday lives. However, perception of these objects and the study of physical interaction with them is still a growing area. There have already been successful methods to model and track deformable linear objects. However, the number of methods that can automatically extract the initial conditions in non-trivial situations for these methods has been limited, and they have been introduced to the community only recently. On the other hand, while physical interaction with these objects has been done with ground manipulators, there have not been any studies on physical interaction and manipulation of the deformable linear object with aerial robots. This workshop describes our recent work on detecting deformable linear objects, which uses the segmentation output of the existing methods to provide the initialization required by the tracking methods automatically. It works with crossings and can fill the gaps and occlusions in the segmentation and output the model desirable for physical interaction and simulation. Then we present our work on using the method for tasks such as routing and manipulation with the ground and aerial robots. We discuss our feasibility analysis on extending the physical interaction with these objects to aerial manipulation applications.
abstract_zh: 可变形的线性物体（例如电缆、绳索和线）常见于我们的日常生活中。然而，对这些物体的感知以及与它们的物理相互作用的研究仍然是一个不断发展的领域。已经有成功的方法来建模和跟踪可变形线性物体。然而，能够在重要情况下自动提取初始条件的方法数量有限，并且最近才被引入社区。另一方面，虽然已经通过地面操纵器与这些物体进行物理交互，但还没有任何关于与空中机器人对可变形线性物体进行物理交互和操纵的研究。本次研讨会介绍了我们最近在检测可变形线性物体方面的工作，该工作使用现有方法的分割输出来自动提供跟踪方法所需的初始化。它适用于交叉点，可以填充分割中的间隙和遮挡，并输出物理交互和模拟所需的模型。然后，我们介绍了使用该方法执行地面和空中机器人等任务的工作。我们讨论了将与这些物体的物理交互扩展到空中操纵应用的可行性分析。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究可变形线性物体（如电缆、绳索）的检测与物理交互方法，并探索其在地面和空中机器人中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂场景下难以自动提取初始条件，且缺乏针对空中机器人与可变形线性物体交互的研究。
AI.method: 利用现有分割方法的输出自动初始化跟踪算法，处理交叉、遮挡和间隙问题，以生成适用于物理交互和模拟的模型。
AI.result: 实现了地面和空中机器人对可变形线性物体的路由与操作任务，并验证了该方法在空中交互中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提升了可变形物体的检测能力，并为未来空中机器人操作提供了新方向，后续需进一步扩展应用场景。

authors_text: Woong Gyu La,Lingjie Kong,Sunil Muralidhara,Pratik Nichat
title: DeepSim: A Reinforcement Learning Environment Build Toolkit for ROS and Gazebo
title_zh: DeepSim：用于 ROS 和 Gazebo 的强化学习环境构建工具包
abstract: We propose DeepSim, a reinforcement learning environment build toolkit for ROS and Gazebo. It allows machine learning or reinforcement learning researchers to access the robotics domain and create complex and challenging custom tasks in ROS and Gazebo simulation environments. This toolkit provides building blocks of advanced features such as collision detection, behaviour control, domain randomization, spawner, and many more. DeepSim is designed to reduce the boundary between robotics and machine learning communities by providing Python interface. In this paper, we discuss the components and design decisions of DeepSim Toolkit.
summary: We propose DeepSim, a reinforcement learning environment build toolkit for ROS and Gazebo. It allows machine learning or reinforcement learning researchers to access the robotics domain and create complex and challenging custom tasks in ROS and Gazebo simulation environments. This toolkit provides building blocks of advanced features such as collision detection, behaviour control, domain randomization, spawner, and many more. DeepSim is designed to reduce the boundary between robotics and machine learning communities by providing Python interface. In this paper, we discuss the components and design decisions of DeepSim Toolkit.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 DeepSim，一个用于 ROS 和 Gazebo 的强化学习环境构建工具包。它允许机器学习或强化学习研究人员访问机器人领域，并在 ROS 和 Gazebo 模拟环境中创建复杂且具有挑战性的自定义任务。该工具包提供了高级功能的构建块，例如碰撞检测、行为控制、域随机化、生成器等等。 DeepSim 旨在通过提供 Python 接口来缩小机器人技术和机器学习社区之间的界限。在本文中，我们讨论 DeepSim Toolkit 的组件和设计决策。

AI.tldr: 提出DeepSim工具包，用于在ROS和Gazebo中构建强化学习环境，促进机器人领域与机器学习研究的结合。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在机器人仿真环境中构建强化学习任务存在门槛高、定制化复杂的问题，需简化流程促进跨领域协作。
AI.method: 通过提供碰撞检测、行为控制、领域随机化等模块及Python接口，构建可定制的强化学习环境。
AI.result: 实现了DeepSim工具包，展示了其在ROS和Gazebo中的应用案例，验证了模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DeepSim有效降低了机器人与机器学习领域的协作门槛，为复杂任务研究提供了灵活工具。

title: On Algebraic Constructions of Neural Networks with Small Weights
title_zh: 小权值神经网络的代数构造
abstract: Neural gates compute functions based on weighted sums of the input variables. The expressive power of neural gates (number of distinct functions it can compute) depends on the weight sizes and, in general, large weights (exponential in the number of inputs) are required. Studying the trade-offs among the weight sizes, circuit size and depth is a well-studied topic both in circuit complexity theory and the practice of neural computation. We propose a new approach for studying these complexity trade-offs by considering a related algebraic framework. Specifically, given a single linear equation with arbitrary coefficients, we would like to express it using a system of linear equations with smaller (even constant) coefficients. The techniques we developed are based on Siegel's Lemma for the bounds, anti-concentration inequalities for the existential results and extensions of Sylvester-type Hadamard matrices for the constructions. We explicitly construct a constant weight, optimal size matrix to compute the EQUALITY function (checking if two integers expressed in binary are equal). Computing EQUALITY with a single linear equation requires exponentially large weights. In addition, we prove the existence of the best-known weight size (linear) matrices to compute the COMPARISON function (comparing between two integers expressed in binary). In the context of the circuit complexity theory, our results improve the upper bounds on the weight sizes for the best-known circuit sizes for EQUALITY and COMPARISON.
summary: Neural gates compute functions based on weighted sums of the input variables. The expressive power of neural gates (number of distinct functions it can compute) depends on the weight sizes and, in general, large weights (exponential in the number of inputs) are required. Studying the trade-offs among the weight sizes, circuit size and depth is a well-studied topic both in circuit complexity theory and the practice of neural computation. We propose a new approach for studying these complexity trade-offs by considering a related algebraic framework. Specifically, given a single linear equation with arbitrary coefficients, we would like to express it using a system of linear equations with smaller (even constant) coefficients. The techniques we developed are based on Siegel's Lemma for the bounds, anti-concentration inequalities for the existential results and extensions of Sylvester-type Hadamard matrices for the constructions. We explicitly construct a constant weight, optimal size matrix to compute the EQUALITY function (checking if two integers expressed in binary are equal). Computing EQUALITY with a single linear equation requires exponentially large weights. In addition, we prove the existence of the best-known weight size (linear) matrices to compute the COMPARISON function (comparing between two integers expressed in binary). In the context of the circuit complexity theory, our results improve the upper bounds on the weight sizes for the best-known circuit sizes for EQUALITY and COMPARISON.
abstract_zh: 神经门根据输入变量的加权和计算函数。神经门的表达能力（它可以计算的不同函数的数量）取决于权重的大小，并且通常需要大的权重（输入数量的指数）。研究权重大小、电路大小和深度之间的权衡是电路复杂性理论和神经计算实践中一个经过深入研究的主题。我们提出了一种通过考虑相关代数框架来研究这些复杂性权衡的新方法。具体来说，给定一个具有任意系数的线性方程，我们希望使用具有较小（甚至常数）系数的线性方程组来表达它。我们开发的技术基于用于边界的西格尔引理、用于存在结果的反集中不等式以及用于构造的西尔维斯特型哈达玛矩阵的扩展。我们显式构造一个恒定权重、最佳大小的矩阵来计算 EQUALITY 函数（检查以二进制表示的两个整数是否相等）。使用单个线性方程计算 EQUALITY 需要指数级大的权重。此外，我们证明了最著名的权重大小（线性）矩阵的存在来计算 COMPARISON 函数（比较以二进制表示的两个整数）。在电路复杂性理论的背景下，我们的结果提高了最著名的电路大小的权重大小的上限，以实现平等和比较。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过代数方法构建具有小权重的神经网络，以优化计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络计算复杂函数时需依赖大权重，导致计算效率低下，需探索权重大小、电路规模与深度之间的权衡关系。
AI.method: 基于Siegel引理、反集中不等式及Sylvester型Hadamard矩阵扩展，构建小权重的线性方程组系统。
AI.result: 显式构造了计算EQUALITY函数的常数权重最优矩阵，并证明了计算COMPARISON函数的最佳线性权重矩阵存在性。
AI.conclusion: 改进了EQUALITY和COMPARISON函数在电路复杂度理论中的权重上界，为高效神经网络设计提供理论支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究如何通过代数方法构建具有小权重的神经网络，以优化计算复杂度。

search_text: On Algebraic Constructions of Neural Networks with Small Weights 小权值神经网络的代数构造 Neural gates compute functions based on weighted sums of the input variables. The expressive power of neural gates (number of distinct functions it can compute) depends on the weight sizes and, in general, large weights (exponential in the number of inputs) are required. Studying the trade-offs among the weight sizes, circuit size and depth is a well-studied topic both in circuit complexity theory and the practice of neural computation. We propose a new approach for studying these complexity trade-offs by considering a related algebraic framework. Specifically, given a single linear equation with arbitrary coefficients, we would like to express it using a system of linear equations with smaller (even constant) coefficients. The techniques we developed are based on Siegel's Lemma for the bounds, anti-concentration inequalities for the existential results and extensions of Sylvester-type Hadamard matrices for the constructions. We explicitly construct a constant weight, optimal size matrix to compute the EQUALITY function (checking if two integers expressed in binary are equal). Computing EQUALITY with a single linear equation requires exponentially large weights. In addition, we prove the existence of the best-known weight size (linear) matrices to compute the COMPARISON function (comparing between two integers expressed in binary). In the context of the circuit complexity theory, our results improve the upper bounds on the weight sizes for the best-known circuit sizes for EQUALITY and COMPARISON. 神经门根据输入变量的加权和计算函数。神经门的表达能力（它可以计算的不同函数的数量）取决于权重的大小，并且通常需要大的权重（输入数量的指数）。研究权重大小、电路大小和深度之间的权衡是电路复杂性理论和神经计算实践中一个经过深入研究的主题。我们提出了一种通过考虑相关代数框架来研究这些复杂性权衡的新方法。具体来说，给定一个具有任意系数的线性方程，我们希望使用具有较小（甚至常数）系数的线性方程组来表达它。我们开发的技术基于用于边界的西格尔引理、用于存在结果的反集中不等式以及用于构造的西尔维斯特型哈达玛矩阵的扩展。我们显式构造一个恒定权重、最佳大小的矩阵来计算 EQUALITY 函数（检查以二进制表示的两个整数是否相等）。使用单个线性方程计算 EQUALITY 需要指数级大的权重。此外，我们证明了最著名的权重大小（线性）矩阵的存在来计算 COMPARISON 函数（比较以二进制表示的两个整数）。在电路复杂性理论的背景下，我们的结果提高了最著名的电路大小的权重大小的上限，以实现平等和比较。 本文研究如何通过代数方法构建具有小权重的神经网络，以优化计算复杂度。 Kordag Mehmet Kilic,Jin Sima,Jehoshua Bruck cs.CC,cs.DM,cs.IT,cs.LG,cs.NE

title: A faster algorithm for Vertex Cover parameterized by solution size
title_zh: 一种更快的按解大小参数化的顶点覆盖算法
abstract: We describe a new algorithm for vertex cover with runtime $O^*(1.25284^k)$, where $k$ is the size of the desired solution and $O^*$ hides polynomial factors in the input size. This improves over previous runtime of $O^*(1.2738^k)$ due to Chen, Kanj, & Xia (2010) standing for more than a decade. The key to our algorithm is to use a potential function which simultaneously tracks $k$ as well as the optimal value $λ$ of the vertex cover LP relaxation. This approach also allows us to make use of prior algorithms for Maximum Independent Set in bounded-degree graphs and Above-Guarantee Vertex Cover. The main step in the algorithm is to branch on high-degree vertices, while ensuring that both $k$ and $μ= k - λ$ are decreased at each step. There can be local obstructions in the graph that prevent $μ$ from decreasing in this process; we develop a number of novel branching steps to handle these situations.
summary: We describe a new algorithm for vertex cover with runtime $O^*(1.25284^k)$, where $k$ is the size of the desired solution and $O^*$ hides polynomial factors in the input size. This improves over previous runtime of $O^*(1.2738^k)$ due to Chen, Kanj, & Xia (2010) standing for more than a decade. The key to our algorithm is to use a potential function which simultaneously tracks $k$ as well as the optimal value $λ$ of the vertex cover LP relaxation. This approach also allows us to make use of prior algorithms for Maximum Independent Set in bounded-degree graphs and Above-Guarantee Vertex Cover. The main step in the algorithm is to branch on high-degree vertices, while ensuring that both $k$ and $μ= k - λ$ are decreased at each step. There can be local obstructions in the graph that prevent $μ$ from decreasing in this process; we develop a number of novel branching steps to handle these situations.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种新的顶点覆盖算法，运行时为 $O^*(1.25284^k)$，其中 $k$ 是所需解决方案的大小，$O^*$ 隐藏输入大小中的多项式因子。这比之前的 $O^*(1.2738^k)$ 运行时间有所改善，因为 Chen、Kanj 和 Xia (2010) 已经站了十多年。我们算法的关键是使用一个势函数，它同时跟踪 $k$ 以及顶点覆盖 LP 松弛的最优值 $λ$。这种方法还允许我们利用现有算法来实现有界度图中的最大独立集和高于保证的顶点覆盖。该算法的主要步骤是在高度顶点上进行分支，同时确保 $k$ 和 $μ= k - λ$ 在每一步都减少。图中可能存在局部障碍物，阻止 $μ$ 在此过程中减少；我们开发了许多新颖的分支步骤来处理这些情况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种更高效的顶点覆盖问题参数化算法，通过改进运行时间。
AI.motivation: 现有顶点覆盖算法的运行时间较高，需更优解决方案以提升计算效率。
AI.method: 利用潜在函数同步跟踪解大小k与线性规划松弛值λ，结合高次顶点分支策略及新分支步骤处理局部障碍。
AI.result: 将算法时间复杂度从O*(1.2738^k)优化至O*(1.25284^k)，并提出处理局部障碍的新方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新分支策略与潜在函数方法，成功提升了顶点覆盖问题参数化算法的效率。

title: A Survey on Semantics in Automated Data Science
title_zh: 自动化数据科学中的语义调查
abstract: Data Scientists leverage common sense reasoning and domain knowledge to understand and enrich data for building predictive models. In recent years, we have witnessed a surge in tools and techniques for {\em automated machine learning}. While data scientists can employ various such tools to help with model building, many other aspects such as {\em feature engineering} that require semantic understanding of concepts, remain manual to a large extent. In this paper we discuss important shortcomings of current automated data science solutions and machine learning. We discuss how leveraging basic semantic reasoning on data in combination with novel tools for data science automation can help with consistent and explainable data augmentation and transformation. Moreover, semantics can assist data scientists in a new manner by helping with challenges related to {\em trust}, {\em bias}, and {\em explainability}.
summary: Data Scientists leverage common sense reasoning and domain knowledge to understand and enrich data for building predictive models. In recent years, we have witnessed a surge in tools and techniques for {\em automated machine learning}. While data scientists can employ various such tools to help with model building, many other aspects such as {\em feature engineering} that require semantic understanding of concepts, remain manual to a large extent. In this paper we discuss important shortcomings of current automated data science solutions and machine learning. We discuss how leveraging basic semantic reasoning on data in combination with novel tools for data science automation can help with consistent and explainable data augmentation and transformation. Moreover, semantics can assist data scientists in a new manner by helping with challenges related to {\em trust}, {\em bias}, and {\em explainability}.
abstract_zh: 数据科学家利用常识推理和领域知识来理解和丰富数据以构建预测模型。近年来，我们目睹了{\em自动化机器学习}工具和技术的激增。虽然数据科学家可以使用各种此类工具来帮助构建模型，但许多其他方面（例如需要对概念进行语义理解的特征工程）在很大程度上仍然是手动的。在本文中，我们讨论了当前自动化数据科学解决方案和机器学习的重要缺点。我们讨论如何利用数据的基本语义推理与数据科学自动化的新颖工具相结合，帮助实现一致且可解释的数据增强和转换。此外，语义可以以一种新的方式帮助数据科学家解决与{\em信任}、{​​\em偏见}和{\em可解释性}相关的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了语义在自动化数据科学中的应用，分析了当前工具的不足，并探讨了结合语义推理提升数据处理与模型可解释性的方法。
AI.motivation: 当前自动化机器学习工具在特征工程等环节仍依赖人工，缺乏语义理解导致模型可解释性、信任度和偏差控制不足，需通过语义推理改进。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析现有自动化数据科学工具的不足，提出结合语义推理与自动化技术的方法，用于数据增强、转换及解决信任、偏差问题。
AI.result: 指出现有工具在语义理解上的局限性，验证了语义驱动的方法在提升数据处理一致性、模型可解释性及减少偏差方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 语义推理是提升自动化数据科学关键环节的重要方向，未来需进一步融合语义技术与自动化工具以增强模型可靠性与可解释性。

title: Addressable Superconductor Integrated Circuit Memory from Delay Lines
title_zh: 来自延迟线的可寻址超导集成电路存储器
abstract: Recent advances in logic schemes and fabrication processes have renewed interest in using superconductor electronics for energy-efficient computing and quantum control processors. However, scalable superconducting memory still poses a challenge. To address this issue, we present an alternative to approaches that solely emphasize storage cell miniaturization by exploiting the minimal attenuation and dispersion properties of superconducting passive transmission lines to develop a delay-line memory system. This fully superconducting design operates at speeds between 20 GHz and 100 GHz, with $\pm$24\% and $\pm$13\% bias margins, respectively, and demonstrates data densities in the 10s of Mbit/cm$^2$ with the MIT Lincoln Laboratory SC2 fabrication process. Additionally, the circulating nature of this design allows for minimal control circuitry, eliminates the need for data splitting and merging, and enables inexpensive implementations of sequential access and content-addressable memories. Further advances in fabrication processes suggest data densities of 100s of Mbit/cm$^2$ and beyond

Additionally, the circulating nature of this design allows for minimal control circuitry, eliminates the need for data splitting and merging, and enables inexpensive implementations of sequential access and content-addressable memories. Further advances in fabrication processes suggest data densities of 100s of Mbit/cm$^2$ and beyond
abstract_zh: 逻辑方案和制造工艺的最新进展重新燃起了人们对使用超导电子器件进行节能计算和量子控制处理器的兴趣。然而，可扩展的超导存储器仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种替代方法，通过利用超导无源传输线的最小衰减和色散特性来开发延迟线存储系统，从而替代仅强调存储单元小型化的方法。这种全超导设计的运行速度在 20 GHz 至 100 GHz 之间，偏差裕度分别为 $\pm$24\% 和 $\pm$13\%，并通过麻省理工学院林肯实验室 SC2 制造工艺展示了 10Mbit/cm$^2$ 的数据密度。此外，这种设计的循环特性允许最少的控制电路，消除了数据分割和合并的需要，并能够以廉价的方式实现顺序存取和内容可寻址存储器。制造工艺的进一步进步表明数据密度可达数百 Mbit/cm$^2$ 甚至更高

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于延迟线的全超导集成电路存储器设计，解决可扩展超导存储器的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有超导存储器面临可扩展性瓶颈，传统存储单元微型化方案难以兼顾性能与密度，需探索新型存储架构。
AI.method: 利用超导传输线低衰减特性构建延迟线存储系统，采用MIT Lincoln Laboratory SC2工艺实现高速度与高数据密度设计。
AI.result: 实现20-100GHz运行速度，数据密度达10s Mbit/cm²，支持顺序访问与内容寻址存储，未来工艺改进可突破百Mbit/cm²。
AI.conclusion: 延迟线存储架构通过简化控制电路与提升数据密度，为超导存储器提供了可扩展的解决方案，具备显著能效优势。

search_text: Addressable Superconductor Integrated Circuit Memory from Delay Lines 来自延迟线的可寻址超导集成电路存储器 Recent advances in logic schemes and fabrication processes have renewed interest in using superconductor electronics for energy-efficient computing and quantum control processors. However, scalable superconducting memory still poses a challenge. To address this issue, we present an alternative to approaches that solely emphasize storage cell miniaturization by exploiting the minimal attenuation and dispersion properties of superconducting passive transmission lines to develop a delay-line memory system. This fully superconducting design operates at speeds between 20 GHz and 100 GHz, with $\pm$24\% and $\pm$13\% bias margins, respectively, and demonstrates data densities in the 10s of Mbit/cm$^2$ with the MIT Lincoln Laboratory SC2 fabrication process. Additionally, the circulating nature of this design allows for minimal control circuitry, eliminates the need for data splitting and merging, and enables inexpensive implementations of sequential access and content-addressable memories. Further advances in fabrication processes suggest data densities of 100s of Mbit/cm$^2$ and beyond 逻辑方案和制造工艺的最新进展重新燃起了人们对使用超导电子器件进行节能计算和量子控制处理器的兴趣。然而，可扩展的超导存储器仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种替代方法，通过利用超导无源传输线的最小衰减和色散特性来开发延迟线存储系统，从而替代仅强调存储单元小型化的方法。这种全超导设计的运行速度在 20 GHz 至 100 GHz 之间，偏差裕度分别为 $\pm$24\% 和 $\pm$13\%，并通过麻省理工学院林肯实验室 SC2 制造工艺展示了 10Mbit/cm$^2$ 的数据密度。此外，这种设计的循环特性允许最少的控制电路，消除了数据分割和合并的需要，并能够以廉价的方式实现顺序存取和内容可寻址存储器。制造工艺的进一步进步表明数据密度可达数百 Mbit/cm$^2$ 甚至更高 本文提出一种基于延迟线的全超导集成电路存储器设计，解决可扩展超导存储器的挑战。 Jennifer Volk,Alex Wynn,Timothy Sherwood,Georgios Tzimpragos cs.ET,cs.AR

authors_text: Alëna Aksënova,Zhehuai Chen,Chung-Cheng Chiu,Daan van Esch,Pavel Golik,Wei Han,Levi King,Bhuvana Ramabhadran,Andrew Rosenberg,Suzan Schwartz,Gary Wang
title: Accented Speech Recognition: Benchmarking, Pre-training, and Diverse Data
title_zh: 重音语音识别：基准测试、预训练和多样化数据
abstract: Building inclusive speech recognition systems is a crucial step towards developing technologies that speakers of all language varieties can use. Therefore, ASR systems must work for everybody independently of the way they speak. To accomplish this goal, there should be available data sets representing language varieties, and also an understanding of model configuration that is the most helpful in achieving robust understanding of all types of speech. However, there are not enough data sets for accented speech, and for the ones that are already available, more training approaches need to be explored to improve the quality of accented speech recognition. In this paper, we discuss recent progress towards developing more inclusive ASR systems, namely, the importance of building new data sets representing linguistic diversity, and exploring novel training approaches to improve performance for all users. We address recent directions within benchmarking ASR systems for accented speech, measure the effects of wav2vec 2.0 pre-training on accented speech recognition, and highlight corpora relevant for diverse ASR evaluations.
summary: Building inclusive speech recognition systems is a crucial step towards developing technologies that speakers of all language varieties can use. Therefore, ASR systems must work for everybody independently of the way they speak. To accomplish this goal, there should be available data sets representing language varieties, and also an understanding of model configuration that is the most helpful in achieving robust understanding of all types of speech. However, there are not enough data sets for accented speech, and for the ones that are already available, more training approaches need to be explored to improve the quality of accented speech recognition. In this paper, we discuss recent progress towards developing more inclusive ASR systems, namely, the importance of building new data sets representing linguistic diversity, and exploring novel training approaches to improve performance for all users. We address recent directions within benchmarking ASR systems for accented speech, measure the effects of wav2vec 2.0 pre-training on accented speech recognition, and highlight corpora relevant for diverse ASR evaluations.
abstract_zh: 构建包容性语音识别系统是开发所有语言使用者都可以使用的技术的关键一步。因此，ASR 系统必须为每个人服务，无论他们说话的方式如何。为了实现这一目标，应该有代表语言种类的可用数据集，并且还应该了解模型配置，这对于实现对所有类型语音的稳健理解最有帮助。然而，目前还没有足够的重音语音数据集，对于已经可用的数据集，需要探索更多的训练方法来提高重音语音识别的质量。在本文中，我们讨论了开发更具包容性的 ASR 系统的最新进展，即构建代表语言多样性的新数据集的重要性，以及探索新的训练方法以提高所有用户的性能的重要性。我们讨论了重音语音基准 ASR 系统的最新方向，测量 wav2vec 2.0 预训练对重音语音识别的影响，并重点介绍与各种 ASR 评估相关的语料库。

AI.tldr: 探讨构建包容性语音识别系统，通过创建多样化数据集和探索新训练方法提升口音语音识别性能
AI.motivation: 现有数据集不足且训练方法有限，需提升ASR对各类口音的适应性
AI.method: 利用wav2vec 2.0预训练模型，结合基准测试和多样化语料库评估不同训练方法的效果
AI.result: 验证了预训练模型对口音语音识别的提升，并指出多样化数据的重要性
AI.conclusion: 构建多样化数据集和优化预训练方法是提升包容性ASR的关键，需进一步探索

authors_text: Maciej Zamorski,Michał Stypułkowski,Konrad Karanowski,Tomasz Trzciński,Maciej Zięba
title: Continual learning on 3D point clouds with random compressed rehearsal
title_zh: 通过随机压缩排练持续学习 3D 点云
abstract: Contemporary deep neural networks offer state-of-the-art results when applied to visual reasoning, e.g., in the context of 3D point cloud data. Point clouds are important datatype for precise modeling of three-dimensional environments, but effective processing of this type of data proves to be challenging. In the world of large, heavily-parameterized network architectures and continuously-streamed data, there is an increasing need for machine learning models that can be trained on additional data. Unfortunately, currently available models cannot fully leverage training on additional data without losing their past knowledge. Combating this phenomenon, called catastrophic forgetting, is one of the main objectives of continual learning. Continual learning for deep neural networks has been an active field of research, primarily in 2D computer vision, natural language processing, reinforcement learning, and robotics. However, in 3D computer vision, there are hardly any continual learning solutions specifically designed to take advantage of point cloud structure. This work proposes a novel neural network architecture capable of continual learning on 3D point cloud data. We utilize point cloud structure properties for preserving a heavily compressed set of past data. By using rehearsal and reconstruction as regularization methods of the learning process, our approach achieves a significant decrease of catastrophic forgetting compared to the existing solutions on several most popular point cloud datasets considering two continual learning settings: when a task is known beforehand, and in the challenging scenario of when task information is unknown to the model.
summary: Contemporary deep neural networks offer state-of-the-art results when applied to visual reasoning, e.g., in the context of 3D point cloud data. Point clouds are important datatype for precise modeling of three-dimensional environments, but effective processing of this type of data proves to be challenging. In the world of large, heavily-parameterized network architectures and continuously-streamed data, there is an increasing need for machine learning models that can be trained on additional data. Unfortunately, currently available models cannot fully leverage training on additional data without losing their past knowledge. Combating this phenomenon, called catastrophic forgetting, is one of the main objectives of continual learning. Continual learning for deep neural networks has been an active field of research, primarily in 2D computer vision, natural language processing, reinforcement learning, and robotics. However, in 3D computer vision, there are hardly any continual learning solutions specifically designed to take advantage of point cloud structure. This work proposes a novel neural network architecture capable of continual learning on 3D point cloud data. We utilize point cloud structure properties for preserving a heavily compressed set of past data. By using rehearsal and reconstruction as regularization methods of the learning process, our approach achieves a significant decrease of catastrophic forgetting compared to the existing solutions on several most popular point cloud datasets considering two continual learning settings: when a task is known beforehand, and in the challenging scenario of when task information is unknown to the model.
abstract_zh: 当代深度神经网络在应用于视觉推理时（例如在 3D 点云数据的背景下）可提供最先进的结果。点云是三维环境精确建模的重要数据类型，但有效处理此类数据具有挑战性。在大型、高度参数化的网络架构和连续流数据的世界中，对可以根据附加数据进行训练的机器学习模型的需求日益增长。不幸的是，当前可用的模型无法在不丢失过去知识的情况下充分利用额外数据的训练。对抗这种被称为灾难性遗忘的现象是持续学习的主要目标之一。深度神经网络的持续学习一直是一个活跃的研究领域，主要涉及 2D 计算机视觉、自然语言处理、强化学习和机器人技术。然而，在 3D 计算机视觉中，几乎没有专门为利用点云结构而设计的持续学习解决方案。这项工作提出了一种新颖的神经网络架构，能够持续学习 3D 点云数据。我们利用点云结构属性来保存一组高度压缩的过去数据。通过使用排练和重建作为学习过程的正则化方法，与几个最流行的点云数据集上的现有解决方案相比，我们的方法实现了灾难性遗忘的显着减少，考虑到两种连续学习设置：当任务事先已知时，以及当任务信息对模型未知时的挑战性场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型神经网络架构，通过随机压缩回放和重建方法，在3D点云数据上实现持续学习，以解决灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在处理3D点云数据时存在灾难性遗忘问题，且缺乏针对点云结构设计的持续学习方案，难以在新增数据训练时保留历史知识。
AI.method: 利用点云结构特性压缩存储历史数据，结合回放（rehearsal）和重建（reconstruction）作为正则化手段，构建持续学习框架。
AI.result: 在多个主流点云数据集上，两种持续学习场景（已知任务和未知任务）下均显著降低灾难性遗忘，优于现有解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过点云结构特性与正则化技术结合，有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题，为3D点云的持续学习提供了可行方案。

motivation: 现有深度学习模型在处理3D点云数据时存在灾难性遗忘问题，且缺乏针对点云结构设计的持续学习方案，难以在新增数据训练时保留历史知识。
method: 利用点云结构特性压缩存储历史数据，结合回放（rehearsal）和重建（reconstruction）作为正则化手段，构建持续学习框架。
result: 在多个主流点云数据集上，两种持续学习场景（已知任务和未知任务）下均显著降低灾难性遗忘，优于现有解决方案。
conclusion: 该方法通过点云结构特性与正则化技术结合，有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题，为3D点云的持续学习提供了可行方案。
search_text: Continual learning on 3D point clouds with random compressed rehearsal 通过随机压缩排练持续学习 3D 点云 Contemporary deep neural networks offer state-of-the-art results when applied to visual reasoning, e.g., in the context of 3D point cloud data. Point clouds are important datatype for precise modeling of three-dimensional environments, but effective processing of this type of data proves to be challenging. In the world of large, heavily-parameterized network architectures and continuously-streamed data, there is an increasing need for machine learning models that can be trained on additional data. Unfortunately, currently available models cannot fully leverage training on additional data without losing their past knowledge. Combating this phenomenon, called catastrophic forgetting, is one of the main objectives of continual learning. Continual learning for deep neural networks has been an active field of research, primarily in 2D computer vision, natural language processing, reinforcement learning, and robotics. However, in 3D computer vision, there are hardly any continual learning solutions specifically designed to take advantage of point cloud structure. This work proposes a novel neural network architecture capable of continual learning on 3D point cloud data. We utilize point cloud structure properties for preserving a heavily compressed set of past data. By using rehearsal and reconstruction as regularization methods of the learning process, our approach achieves a significant decrease of catastrophic forgetting compared to the existing solutions on several most popular point cloud datasets considering two continual learning settings: when a task is known beforehand, and in the challenging scenario of when task information is unknown to the model. 当代深度神经网络在应用于视觉推理时（例如在 3D 点云数据的背景下）可提供最先进的结果。点云是三维环境精确建模的重要数据类型，但有效处理此类数据具有挑战性。在大型、高度参数化的网络架构和连续流数据的世界中，对可以根据附加数据进行训练的机器学习模型的需求日益增长。不幸的是，当前可用的模型无法在不丢失过去知识的情况下充分利用额外数据的训练。对抗这种被称为灾难性遗忘的现象是持续学习的主要目标之一。深度神经网络的持续学习一直是一个活跃的研究领域，主要涉及 2D 计算机视觉、自然语言处理、强化学习和机器人技术。然而，在 3D 计算机视觉中，几乎没有专门为利用点云结构而设计的持续学习解决方案。这项工作提出了一种新颖的神经网络架构，能够持续学习 3D 点云数据。我们利用点云结构属性来保存一组高度压缩的过去数据。通过使用排练和重建作为学习过程的正则化方法，与几个最流行的点云数据集上的现有解决方案相比，我们的方法实现了灾难性遗忘的显着减少，考虑到两种连续学习设置：当任务事先已知时，以及当任务信息对模型未知时的挑战性场景。 本文提出一种新型神经网络架构，通过随机压缩回放和重建方法，在3D点云数据上实现持续学习，以解决灾难性遗忘问题。 Maciej Zamorski,Michał Stypułkowski,Konrad Karanowski,Tomasz Trzciński,Maciej Zięba cs.LG,cs.CV

title: CascadER: Cross-Modal Cascading for Knowledge Graph Link Prediction
title_zh: CascadER：用于知识图链接预测的跨模态级联
abstract: Knowledge graph (KG) link prediction is a fundamental task in artificial intelligence, with applications in natural language processing, information retrieval, and biomedicine. Recently, promising results have been achieved by leveraging cross-modal information in KGs, using ensembles that combine knowledge graph embeddings (KGEs) and contextual language models (LMs). However, existing ensembles are either (1) not consistently effective in terms of ranking accuracy gains or (2) impractically inefficient on larger datasets due to the combinatorial explosion problem of pairwise ranking with deep language models. In this paper, we propose a novel tiered ranking architecture CascadER to maintain the ranking accuracy of full ensembling while improving efficiency considerably. CascadER uses LMs to rerank the outputs of more efficient base KGEs, relying on an adaptive subset selection scheme aimed at invoking the LMs minimally while maximizing accuracy gain over the KGE. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CascadER improves MRR by up to 9 points over KGE baselines, setting new state-of-the-art performance on four benchmarks while improving efficiency by one or more orders of magnitude over competitive cross-modal baselines. Our empirical analyses reveal that diversity of models across modalities and preservation of individual models' confidence signals help explain the effectiveness of CascadER, and suggest promising directions for cross-modal cascaded architectures. Code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/tsafavi/cascader.
summary: Knowledge graph (KG) link prediction is a fundamental task in artificial intelligence, with applications in natural language processing, information retrieval, and biomedicine. Recently, promising results have been achieved by leveraging cross-modal information in KGs, using ensembles that combine knowledge graph embeddings (KGEs) and contextual language models (LMs). However, existing ensembles are either (1) not consistently effective in terms of ranking accuracy gains or (2) impractically inefficient on larger datasets due to the combinatorial explosion problem of pairwise ranking with deep language models. In this paper, we propose a novel tiered ranking architecture CascadER to maintain the ranking accuracy of full ensembling while improving efficiency considerably. CascadER uses LMs to rerank the outputs of more efficient base KGEs, relying on an adaptive subset selection scheme aimed at invoking the LMs minimally while maximizing accuracy gain over the KGE. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CascadER improves MRR by up to 9 points over KGE baselines, setting new state-of-the-art performance on four benchmarks while improving efficiency by one or more orders of magnitude over competitive cross-modal baselines. Our empirical analyses reveal that diversity of models across modalities and preservation of individual models' confidence signals help explain the effectiveness of CascadER, and suggest promising directions for cross-modal cascaded architectures. Code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/tsafavi/cascader.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）链接预测是人工智能的一项基本任务，在自然语言处理、信息检索和生物医学中都有应用。最近，通过利用知识图谱中的跨模态信息，使用结合知识图嵌入（KGE）和上下文语言模型（LM）的集成，取得了有希望的结果。然而，现有的集成要么（1）在排名精度增益方面始终有效，要么（2）由于深度语言模型的成对排名的组合爆炸问题，在较大数据集上效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的分层排名架构 CascadER，以保持完全集成的排名准确性，同时显着提高效率。 CascadER 使用 LM 对更高效的基础 KGE 的输出进行重新排序，依靠自适应子集选择方案，旨在最小化调用 LM，同时最大化 KGE 的准确度增益。大量实验表明，CascadER 与 KGE 基线相比，MRR 提高了 9 个百分点，在四个基准上创造了新的最先进性能，同时比竞争性跨模式基线提高了一个或多个数量级的效率。我们的实证分析表明，跨模式的模型多样性和单个模型置信信号的保存有助于解释 CascadER 的有效性，并为跨模式级联架构提出了有希望的方向。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/tsafavi/cascader 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CascadER方法，通过跨模态级联架构提升知识图谱链接预测的准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在链接预测中要么排名准确率提升有限，要么因深度语言模型的组合爆炸问题导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计分层排名架构CascadER，利用语言模型对高效基础知识图谱嵌入结果进行重排序，并采用自适应子集选择方案以最小化语言模型调用次数。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上MRR指标提升最高达9点，效率较竞争方法提升一个或多个数量级，达到新SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态模型多样性及置信度信号保留是CascadER有效性的关键，为未来级联架构研究提供方向。
