authors_text: Randy F Fela,Andréas Pastor,Patrick Le Callet,Nick Zacharov,Toinon Vigier,Søren Forchhammer
title: Perceptual Evaluation on Audio-visual Dataset of 360 Content
title_zh: 360度内容视听数据集感知评价
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, International Conference on Multimedia and Expo 2022
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, International Conference on Multimedia and Expo 2022
abstract: To open up new possibilities to assess the multimodal perceptual quality of omnidirectional media formats, we proposed a novel open source 360 audiovisual (AV) quality dataset. The dataset consists of high-quality 360 video clips in equirectangular (ERP) format and higher-order ambisonic (4th order) along with the subjective scores. Three subjective quality experiments were conducted for audio, video, and AV with the procedures detailed in this paper. Using the data from subjective tests, we demonstrated that this dataset can be used to quantify perceived audio, video, and audiovisual quality. The diversity and discriminability of subjective scores were also analyzed. Finally, we investigated how our dataset correlates with various objective quality metrics of audio and video. Evidence from the results of this study implies that the proposed dataset can benefit future studies on multimodal quality evaluation of 360 content.
summary: To open up new possibilities to assess the multimodal perceptual quality of omnidirectional media formats, we proposed a novel open source 360 audiovisual (AV) quality dataset. The dataset consists of high-quality 360 video clips in equirectangular (ERP) format and higher-order ambisonic (4th order) along with the subjective scores. Three subjective quality experiments were conducted for audio, video, and AV with the procedures detailed in this paper. Using the data from subjective tests, we demonstrated that this dataset can be used to quantify perceived audio, video, and audiovisual quality. The diversity and discriminability of subjective scores were also analyzed. Finally, we investigated how our dataset correlates with various objective quality metrics of audio and video. Evidence from the results of this study implies that the proposed dataset can benefit future studies on multimodal quality evaluation of 360 content.
abstract_zh: 为了开辟评估全向媒体格式的多模态感知质量的新可能性，我们提出了一种新颖的开源 360 视听 (AV) 质量数据集。该数据集由等距矩形 (ERP) 格式和高阶 Ambisonics（4 阶）格式的高质量 360 度视频剪辑以及主观分数组成。使用本文详细介绍的程序对音频、视频和 AV 进行了三项主观质量实验。使用主观测试的数据，我们证明该数据集可用于量化感知的音频、视频和视听质量。还分析了主观评分的多样性和可区分性。最后，我们研究了我们的数据集如何与音频和视频的各种客观质量指标相关。本研究结果的证据表明，所提出的数据集可以有益于未来对 360 度内容的多模式质量评估的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个开源的360度音视频质量数据集，并通过主观实验验证其量化感知质量的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对360度媒体多模态感知质量的评估数据集，需建立标准化基准以推动相关研究。
AI.method: 构建包含ERP格式360视频和四阶ambi音的高质量数据集，开展音频、视频及音视频的三类主观质量实验，并分析主观评分与客观指标的相关性。
AI.result: 数据集能有效量化音视频质量，主观评分具有高区分度，且与客观指标存在显著相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为360度内容多模态质量评估提供了可靠基准，可促进未来相关研究的发展。

authors_text: Neelanjan Bhowmik,Jack W. Barker,Yona Falinie A. Gaus,Toby P. Breckon
title: Lost in Compression: the Impact of Lossy Image Compression on Variable Size Object Detection within Infrared Imagery
title_zh: 压缩丢失：有损图像压缩对红外图像中可变尺寸物体检测的影响
abstract: Lossy image compression strategies allow for more efficient storage and transmission of data by encoding data to a reduced form. This is essential enable training with larger datasets on less storage-equipped environments. However, such compression can cause severe decline in performance of deep Convolution Neural Network (CNN) architectures even when mild compression is applied and the resulting compressed imagery is visually identical. In this work, we apply the lossy JPEG compression method with six discrete levels of increasing compression {95, 75, 50, 15, 10, 5} to infrared band (thermal) imagery. Our study quantitatively evaluates the affect that increasing levels of lossy compression has upon the performance of characteristically diverse object detection architectures (Cascade-RCNN, FSAF and Deformable DETR) with respect to varying sizes of objects present in the dataset. When training and evaluating on uncompressed data as a baseline, we achieve maximal mean Average Precision (mAP) of 0.823 with Cascade R-CNN across the FLIR dataset, outperforming prior work. The impact of the lossy compression is more extreme at higher compression levels (15, 10, 5) across all three CNN architectures. However, re-training models on lossy compressed imagery notably ameliorated performances for all three CNN models with an average increment of ~76% (at higher compression level 5). Additionally, we demonstrate the relative sensitivity of differing object areas {tiny, small, medium, large} with respect to the compression level. We show that tiny and small objects are more sensitive to compression than medium and large objects. Overall, Cascade R-CNN attains the maximal mAP across most of the object area categories.

This is essential enable training with larger datasets on less storage-equipped environments. However, such compression can cause severe decline in performance of deep Convolution Neural Network (CNN) architectures even when mild compression is applied and the resulting compressed imagery is visually identical. In this work, we apply the lossy JPEG compression method with six discrete levels of increasing compression {95, 75, 50, 15, 10, 5} to infrared band (thermal) imagery. Our study quantitatively evaluates the affect that increasing levels of lossy compression has upon the performance of characteristically diverse object detection architectures (Cascade-RCNN, FSAF and Deformable DETR) with respect to varying sizes of objects present in the dataset. When training and evaluating on uncompressed data as a baseline, we achieve maximal mean Average Precision (mAP) of 0.823 with Cascade R-CNN across the FLIR dataset, outperforming prior work. The impact of the lossy compression is more extreme at higher compression levels (15, 10, 5) across all three CNN architectures. However, re-training models on lossy compressed imagery notably ameliorated performances for all three CNN models with an average increment of ~76% (at higher compression level 5). Additionally, we demonstrate the relative sensitivity of differing object areas {tiny, small, medium, large} with respect to the compression level. We show that tiny and small objects are more sensitive to compression than medium and large objects. Overall, Cascade R-CNN attains the maximal mAP across most of the object area categories.
abstract_zh: 有损图像压缩策略通过将数据编码为简化形式，允许更有效地存储和传输数据。这对于在存储设备较少的环境中使用更大的数据集进行训练至关重要。然而，即使应用轻度压缩并且生成的压缩图像在视觉上相同，这种压缩也会导致深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构的性能严重下降。在这项工作中，我们将有损 JPEG 压缩方法应用于红外波段（热）图像，该方法具有六个离散级别的递增压缩 {95、75、50、15、10、5}。我们的研究定量评估了有损压缩水平的增加对特征多样的对象检测架构（Cascade-RCNN、FSAF 和 Deformable DETR）性能的影响，涉及数据集中存在的不同大小的对象。当以未压缩数据作为基线进行训练和评估时，我们在 FLIR 数据集上使用 Cascade R-CNN 实现了 0.823 的最大平均精度 (mAP)，优于之前的工作。在所有三种 CNN 架构中，有损压缩的影响在压缩级别较高（15、10、5）时更为严重。然而，在有损压缩图像上重新训练模型显着改善了所有三个 CNN 模型的性能，平均增量约为 76%（在更高的压缩级别 5 下）。此外，我们还展示了不同对象区域（微小、小、中、大）相对于压缩级别的相对敏感性。我们表明，微小物体比中型和大型物体对压缩更敏感。总体而言，Cascade R-CNN 在大多数对象区域类别中获得了最大 mAP。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了有损图像压缩对红外图像中不同尺寸目标检测模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 有损压缩虽能提升数据存储和传输效率，但可能显著降低深度学习模型性能，尤其在红外图像目标检测任务中需明确其影响。
AI.method: 采用JPEG压缩方法对红外图像施加6级压缩（95/75/50/15/10/5），在FLIR数据集上评估Cascade-RCNN、FSAF和Deformable DETR三种模型对不同尺寸目标的检测性能。
AI.result: 基线模型Cascade R-CNN在无压缩数据上达到0.823 mAP；高压缩级别（5/10/15）导致性能显著下降，但通过在压缩图像上重新训练可提升约76%；微型和小型目标比中大型目标更敏感于压缩。
AI.conclusion: 有损压缩对小型目标检测影响更大，但通过针对性重训练可缓解性能损失，Cascade R-CNN在多数目标尺寸类别中表现最优。

title: Generalizable Task Planning through Representation Pretraining
title_zh: 通过表示预训练进行通用任务规划
abstract: The ability to plan for multi-step manipulation tasks in unseen situations is crucial for future home robots. But collecting sufficient experience data for end-to-end learning is often infeasible in the real world, as deploying robots in many environments can be prohibitively expensive. On the other hand, large-scale scene understanding datasets contain diverse and rich semantic and geometric information. But how to leverage such information for manipulation remains an open problem. In this paper, we propose a learning-to-plan method that can generalize to new object instances by leveraging object-level representations extracted from a synthetic scene understanding dataset. We evaluate our method with a suite of challenging multi-step manipulation tasks inspired by household activities and show that our model achieves measurably better success rate than state-of-the-art end-to-end approaches. Additional information can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/gentp
summary: The ability to plan for multi-step manipulation tasks in unseen situations is crucial for future home robots. But collecting sufficient experience data for end-to-end learning is often infeasible in the real world, as deploying robots in many environments can be prohibitively expensive. On the other hand, large-scale scene understanding datasets contain diverse and rich semantic and geometric information. But how to leverage such information for manipulation remains an open problem. In this paper, we propose a learning-to-plan method that can generalize to new object instances by leveraging object-level representations extracted from a synthetic scene understanding dataset. We evaluate our method with a suite of challenging multi-step manipulation tasks inspired by household activities and show that our model achieves measurably better success rate than state-of-the-art end-to-end approaches. Additional information can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/gentp
abstract_zh: 在看不见的情况下规划多步骤操作任务的能力对于未来的家庭机器人至关重要。但在现实世界中，收集足够的经验数据进行端到端学习通常是不可行的，因为在许多环境中部署机器人可能非常昂贵。另一方面，大规模场景理解数据集包含多样且丰富的语义和几何信息。但如何利用这些信息进行操纵仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种学习计划方法，该方法可以通过利用从合成场景理解数据集中提取的对象级表示来推广到新的对象实例。我们通过一系列受家庭活动启发的具有挑战性的多步骤操作任务来评估我们的方法，并表明我们的模型比最先进的端到端方法取得了明显更好的成功率。更多信息请访问 https://sites.google.com/view/gentp

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过表示预训练实现可泛化的任务规划方法，解决家用机器人在未见过环境中执行多步骤操作任务的问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中难以收集足够数据训练端到端模型，而现有场景理解数据集的语义几何信息未能有效用于操作任务规划。
AI.method: 利用合成场景数据集中提取的物体级表示进行预训练，结合学习到的表示实现对新物体实例的任务规划。
AI.result: 在家庭场景多步骤操作任务测试中，模型成功率显著优于现有端到端方法。
AI.conclusion: 预训练表示能有效提升任务规划的泛化能力，为机器人认知与操作的结合提供了新思路。

title: Expert Systems with Logic#. A Novel Modeling Framework for Logic Programming in an Object-Oriented Context of C#
title_zh: 具有逻辑的专家系统#。 C# 面向对象环境中逻辑编程的新型建模框架
abstract: We present a novel approach how logic programming for expert systems can be declared directly in an object-oriented language.
summary: We present a novel approach how logic programming for expert systems can be declared directly in an object-oriented language.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，如何用面向对象的语言直接声明专家系统的逻辑编程。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在C#面向对象环境中直接声明专家系统逻辑编程的新型建模框架。
AI.motivation: 传统逻辑编程语言与面向对象语言的集成存在困难，需一种新方法实现两者的结合。
AI.method: 在C#中构建逻辑编程框架，结合面向对象特性，直接声明逻辑规则。
AI.result: 成功开发出框架，并通过案例验证其在专家系统中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效结合了逻辑编程与面向对象特性，为专家系统开发提供了新方法。

conclusion: 该框架有效结合了逻辑编程与面向对象特性，为专家系统开发提供了新方法。
search_text: Expert Systems with Logic#. A Novel Modeling Framework for Logic Programming in an Object-Oriented Context of C# 具有逻辑的专家系统#。 C# 面向对象环境中逻辑编程的新型建模框架 We present a novel approach how logic programming for expert systems can be declared directly in an object-oriented language. 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，如何用面向对象的语言直接声明专家系统的逻辑编程。 提出一种在C#面向对象环境中直接声明专家系统逻辑编程的新型建模框架。 F. Lorenz,M. Günther cs.AI,cs.PL

title: Test-Time Adaptation with Shape Moments for Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于图像分割的形状矩的测试时间适应
comment: Early Accept at International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2022
comments: Early Accept at International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2022
abstract: Supervised learning is well-known to fail at generalization under distribution shifts. In typical clinical settings, the source data is inaccessible and the target distribution is represented with a handful of samples: adaptation can only happen at test time on a few or even a single subject(s). We investigate test-time single-subject adaptation for segmentation, and propose a Shape-guided Entropy Minimization objective for tackling this task. During inference for a single testing subject, our loss is minimized with respect to the batch normalization's scale and bias parameters. We show the potential of integrating various shape priors to guide adaptation to plausible solutions, and validate our method in two challenging scenarios: MRI-to-CT adaptation of cardiac segmentation and cross-site adaptation of prostate segmentation. Our approach exhibits substantially better performances than the existing test-time adaptation methods. Even more surprisingly, it fares better than state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods, although it forgoes training on additional target data during adaptation. Our results question the usefulness of training on target data in segmentation adaptation, and points to the substantial effect of shape priors on test-time inference. Our framework can be readily used for integrating various priors and for adapting any segmentation network, and our code is available.
summary: Supervised learning is well-known to fail at generalization under distribution shifts. In typical clinical settings, the source data is inaccessible and the target distribution is represented with a handful of samples: adaptation can only happen at test time on a few or even a single subject(s). We investigate test-time single-subject adaptation for segmentation, and propose a Shape-guided Entropy Minimization objective for tackling this task. During inference for a single testing subject, our loss is minimized with respect to the batch normalization's scale and bias parameters. We show the potential of integrating various shape priors to guide adaptation to plausible solutions, and validate our method in two challenging scenarios: MRI-to-CT adaptation of cardiac segmentation and cross-site adaptation of prostate segmentation. Our approach exhibits substantially better performances than the existing test-time adaptation methods. Even more surprisingly, it fares better than state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods, although it forgoes training on additional target data during adaptation. Our results question the usefulness of training on target data in segmentation adaptation, and points to the substantial effect of shape priors on test-time inference. Our framework can be readily used for integrating various priors and for adapting any segmentation network, and our code is available.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，监督学习在分布变化下无法泛化。在典型的临床环境中，源数据无法访问，目标分布由少量样本表示：适应只能在测试时对少数甚至单个受试者进行。我们研究了测试时单受试者适应分割的情况，并提出了形状引导熵最小化目标来解决此任务。在对单个测试对象进行推理期间，我们的损失在批量归一化的规模和偏差参数方面被最小化。我们展示了整合各种形状先验来指导适应合理解决方案的潜力，并在两个具有挑战性的场景中验证我们的方法：心脏分割的 MRI 到 CT 适应和前列腺分割的跨位点适应。我们的方法比现有的测试时间适应方法表现出更好的性能。更令人惊讶的是，它比最先进的域适应方法表现得更好，尽管它在适应过程中放弃了对额外目标数据的训练。我们的结果质疑了分割适应中目标数据训练的有用性，并指出了形状先验对测试时推理的实质性影响。我们的框架可以很容易地用于集成各种先验和适应任何分割网络，并且我们的代码是可用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于形状先验的测试时单样本自适应方法，用于解决图像分割中的分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 在临床场景中，源域数据不可获取且目标域样本稀缺，传统领域自适应方法依赖大量目标数据训练的假设难以适用。
AI.method: 设计形状引导的熵最小化目标函数，通过优化批量归一化层的参数实现单样本自适应，结合形状先验约束分割结果合理性。
AI.result: 在心脏MRI-CT转换和前列腺跨站点分割任务中，该方法性能优于现有测试时自适应方法及需要目标数据训练的领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 形状先验在测试时推断中具有关键作用，无需目标数据训练即可实现有效分割，挑战了传统领域自适应方法的必要性假设。

authors_text: Keyang Zhou,Bharat Lal Bhatnagar,Jan Eric Lenssen,Gerard Pons-Moll
title: TOCH: Spatio-Temporal Object-to-Hand Correspondence for Motion Refinement
title_zh: TOCH：用于运动细化的时空物体与手的对应
abstract: We present TOCH, a method for refining incorrect 3D hand-object interaction sequences using a data prior. Existing hand trackers, especially those that rely on very few cameras, often produce visually unrealistic results with hand-object intersection or missing contacts. Although correcting such errors requires reasoning about temporal aspects of interaction, most previous works focus on static grasps and contacts. The core of our method are TOCH fields, a novel spatio-temporal representation for modeling correspondences between hands and objects during interaction. TOCH fields are a point-wise, object-centric representation, which encode the hand position relative to the object. Leveraging this novel representation, we learn a latent manifold of plausible TOCH fields with a temporal denoising auto-encoder. Experiments demonstrate that TOCH outperforms state-of-the-art 3D hand-object interaction models, which are limited to static grasps and contacts. More importantly, our method produces smooth interactions even before and after contact. Using a single trained TOCH model, we quantitatively and qualitatively demonstrate its usefulness for correcting erroneous sequences from off-the-shelf RGB/RGB-D hand-object reconstruction methods and transferring grasps across objects.
summary: We present TOCH, a method for refining incorrect 3D hand-object interaction sequences using a data prior. Existing hand trackers, especially those that rely on very few cameras, often produce visually unrealistic results with hand-object intersection or missing contacts. Although correcting such errors requires reasoning about temporal aspects of interaction, most previous works focus on static grasps and contacts. The core of our method are TOCH fields, a novel spatio-temporal representation for modeling correspondences between hands and objects during interaction. TOCH fields are a point-wise, object-centric representation, which encode the hand position relative to the object. Leveraging this novel representation, we learn a latent manifold of plausible TOCH fields with a temporal denoising auto-encoder. Experiments demonstrate that TOCH outperforms state-of-the-art 3D hand-object interaction models, which are limited to static grasps and contacts. More importantly, our method produces smooth interactions even before and after contact. Using a single trained TOCH model, we quantitatively and qualitatively demonstrate its usefulness for correcting erroneous sequences from off-the-shelf RGB/RGB-D hand-object reconstruction methods and transferring grasps across objects.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 TOCH，一种使用先验数据改进不正确的 3D 手部物体交互序列的方法。现有的手部追踪器，尤其是那些依赖很少摄像头的手部追踪器，经常会因手部物体交叉或缺失接触而产生视觉上不切实际的结果。尽管纠正此类错误需要对交互的时间方面进行推理，但大多数先前的工作都集中在静态抓取和接触上。我们方法的核心是 TOCH 场，这是一种新颖的时空表示，用于在交互过程中对手和物体之间的对应关系进行建模。 TOCH 字段是一种逐点、以对象为中心的表示形式，它对手相对于对象的位置进行编码。利用这种新颖的表示形式，我们通过时间去噪自动编码器学习了潜在的合理 TOCH 场流形。实验表明，TOCH 的性能优于最先进的 3D 手部物体交互模型，后者仅限于静态抓取和接触。更重要的是，我们的方法即使在接触之前和之后也能产生流畅的交互。使用单个经过训练的 TOCH 模型，我们定量和定性地证明了其在纠正现成的 RGB/RGB-D 手部对象重建方法中的错误序列以及跨对象转移抓握方面的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TOCH方法，通过时空对应关系优化3D手-物体交互序列，修正错误的接触和交叉问题。
AI.motivation: 现有手部追踪方法在动态交互中存在手-物体交叉或接触缺失问题，且多数工作仅关注静态抓取，缺乏对时间维度的动态修正能力。
AI.method: 提出TOCH字段作为点状、以物体为中心的时空表示，编码手相对于物体的位置，并通过时间去噪自编码器学习潜在流形。
AI.result: TOCH在修正错误交互序列和跨物体抓取迁移任务中优于现有方法，且能生成接触前后平滑的交互序列。
AI.conclusion: TOCH通过建模时空对应关系有效优化动态手-物体交互，为复杂场景下的运动修正提供新思路。

title: Many Field Packet Classification with Decomposition and Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过分解和强化学习进行多字段数据包分类
comment: 13 pages, published in IET Netw. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1902.10319 by other authors
comments: 13 pages, published in IET Netw. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1902.10319 by other authors
abstract: Scalable packet classification is a key requirement to support scalable network applications like firewalls, intrusion detection, and differentiated services. With ever increasing in the line-rate in core networks, it becomes a great challenge to design a scalable packet classification solution using hand-tuned heuristics approaches. In this paper, we present a scalable learning-based packet classification engine by building an efficient data structure for different ruleset with many fields. Our method consists of the decomposition of fields into subsets and building separate decision trees on those subsets using a deep reinforcement learning procedure. To decompose given fields of a ruleset, we consider different grouping metrics like standard deviation of individual fields and introduce a novel metric called diversity index (DI). We examine different decomposition schemes and construct decision trees for each scheme using deep reinforcement learning and compare the results. The results show that the SD decomposition metrics results in 11.5% faster than DI metrics, 25% faster than random 2 and 40% faster than random 1. Furthermore, our learning-based selection method can be applied to varying rulesets due to its ruleset independence.
summary: Scalable packet classification is a key requirement to support scalable network applications like firewalls, intrusion detection, and differentiated services. With ever increasing in the line-rate in core networks, it becomes a great challenge to design a scalable packet classification solution using hand-tuned heuristics approaches. In this paper, we present a scalable learning-based packet classification engine by building an efficient data structure for different ruleset with many fields. Our method consists of the decomposition of fields into subsets and building separate decision trees on those subsets using a deep reinforcement learning procedure. To decompose given fields of a ruleset, we consider different grouping metrics like standard deviation of individual fields and introduce a novel metric called diversity index (DI). We examine different decomposition schemes and construct decision trees for each scheme using deep reinforcement learning and compare the results. The results show that the SD decomposition metrics results in 11.5% faster than DI metrics, 25% faster than random 2 and 40% faster than random 1. Furthermore, our learning-based selection method can be applied to varying rulesets due to its ruleset independence.
abstract_zh: 可扩展的数据包分类是支持可扩展网络应用（如防火墙、入侵检测和差异化服务）的关键要求。随着核心网络线速的不断增加，使用手动调整的启发式方法设计可扩展的数据包分类解决方案成为一项巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们通过为多个领域的不同规则集构建有效的数据结构，提出了一种可扩展的基于学习的数据包分类引擎。我们的方法包括将字段分解为子集，并使用深度强化学习过程在这些子集上构建单独的决策树。为了分解规则集的给定字段，我们考虑不同的分组指标，例如各个字段的标准差，并引入一种称为多样性指数（DI）的新颖指标。我们检查不同的分解方案并使用深度强化学习为每个方案构建决策树并比较结果。结果表明，SD 分解指标比 DI 指标快 11.5%，比随机 2 快 25%，比随机 1 快 40%。此外，我们的基于学习的选择方法由于其规则集独立性，可以应用于不同的规则集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分解与强化学习的可扩展多字段数据包分类引擎，通过构建高效数据结构解决网络应用中的分类难题。
AI.motivation: 传统启发式方法难以应对核心网络线速提升带来的可扩展性挑战，需设计独立于规则集的高效分类方案。
AI.method: 将字段分解为子集并构建独立决策树，采用深度强化学习训练模型，引入标准差和多样性指数（DI）作为分解指标进行对比实验。
AI.result: 标准差分解方案比DI指标快11.5%，比随机分组方案快25%-40%，且方法适用于不同规则集。
AI.conclusion: 该学习驱动的分类方法通过字段分解与强化学习实现了高效可扩展的多字段数据包分类，具有规则集无关性优势。

search_text: Many Field Packet Classification with Decomposition and Reinforcement Learning 通过分解和强化学习进行多字段数据包分类 Scalable packet classification is a key requirement to support scalable network applications like firewalls, intrusion detection, and differentiated services. With ever increasing in the line-rate in core networks, it becomes a great challenge to design a scalable packet classification solution using hand-tuned heuristics approaches. In this paper, we present a scalable learning-based packet classification engine by building an efficient data structure for different ruleset with many fields. Our method consists of the decomposition of fields into subsets and building separate decision trees on those subsets using a deep reinforcement learning procedure. To decompose given fields of a ruleset, we consider different grouping metrics like standard deviation of individual fields and introduce a novel metric called diversity index (DI). We examine different decomposition schemes and construct decision trees for each scheme using deep reinforcement learning and compare the results. The results show that the SD decomposition metrics results in 11.5% faster than DI metrics, 25% faster than random 2 and 40% faster than random 1. Furthermore, our learning-based selection method can be applied to varying rulesets due to its ruleset independence. 可扩展的数据包分类是支持可扩展网络应用（如防火墙、入侵检测和差异化服务）的关键要求。随着核心网络线速的不断增加，使用手动调整的启发式方法设计可扩展的数据包分类解决方案成为一项巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们通过为多个领域的不同规则集构建有效的数据结构，提出了一种可扩展的基于学习的数据包分类引擎。我们的方法包括将字段分解为子集，并使用深度强化学习过程在这些子集上构建单独的决策树。为了分解规则集的给定字段，我们考虑不同的分组指标，例如各个字段的标准差，并引入一种称为多样性指数（DI）的新颖指标。我们检查不同的分解方案并使用深度强化学习为每个方案构建决策树并比较结果。结果表明，SD 分解指标比 DI 指标快 11.5%，比随机 2 快 25%，比随机 1 快 40%。此外，我们的基于学习的选择方法由于其规则集独立性，可以应用于不同的规则集。 本文提出一种基于分解与强化学习的可扩展多字段数据包分类引擎，通过构建高效数据结构解决网络应用中的分类难题。 Hasibul Jamil,Ning Yang,Ning Weng cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.PF

authors_text: Valentyn Boreiko,Maximilian Augustin,Francesco Croce,Philipp Berens,Matthias Hein
title: Sparse Visual Counterfactual Explanations in Image Space
title_zh: 图像空间中的稀疏视觉反事实解释
abstract: Visual counterfactual explanations (VCEs) in image space are an important tool to understand decisions of image classifiers as they show under which changes of the image the decision of the classifier would change. Their generation in image space is challenging and requires robust models due to the problem of adversarial examples. Existing techniques to generate VCEs in image space suffer from spurious changes in the background. Our novel perturbation model for VCEs together with its efficient optimization via our novel Auto-Frank-Wolfe scheme yields sparse VCEs which lead to subtle changes specific for the target class. Moreover, we show that VCEs can be used to detect undesired behavior of ImageNet classifiers due to spurious features in the ImageNet dataset.
summary: Visual counterfactual explanations (VCEs) in image space are an important tool to understand decisions of image classifiers as they show under which changes of the image the decision of the classifier would change. Their generation in image space is challenging and requires robust models due to the problem of adversarial examples. Existing techniques to generate VCEs in image space suffer from spurious changes in the background. Our novel perturbation model for VCEs together with its efficient optimization via our novel Auto-Frank-Wolfe scheme yields sparse VCEs which lead to subtle changes specific for the target class. Moreover, we show that VCEs can be used to detect undesired behavior of ImageNet classifiers due to spurious features in the ImageNet dataset.
abstract_zh: 图像空间中的视觉反事实解释（VCE）是理解图像分类器决策的重要工具，因为它们显示了在图像的变化下分类器的决策会发生变化。它们在图像空间中的生成具有挑战性，并且由于对抗性示例的问题需要强大的模型。现有的在图像空间中生成 VCE 的技术会受到背景虚假变化的影响。我们新颖的 VCE 扰动模型及其通过新颖的 Auto-Frank-Wolfe 方案进行的有效优化，产生了稀疏的 VCE，从而导致特定于目标类别的微妙变化。此外，我们还表明，VCE 可用于检测由于 ImageNet 数据集中的虚假特征而导致的 ImageNet 分类器的不良行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成图像空间稀疏视觉反事实解释（VCEs）的新方法，解决现有技术中背景虚假变化的问题，并利用VCEs检测ImageNet分类器的不良行为。
AI.motivation: 现有图像空间VCEs生成方法易产生背景中的虚假变化，导致解释不准确，需更鲁棒的模型与优化方案。
AI.method: 设计新型扰动模型与Auto-Frank-Wolfe优化算法，生成针对目标类别的稀疏、细微图像变化。
AI.result: 生成的稀疏VCEs有效避免背景干扰，成功检测ImageNet分类器因数据集虚假特征导致的异常行为。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过稀疏扰动优化提升了VCEs的准确性，为解释图像分类决策和检测模型缺陷提供了新工具。

title: Deep Apprenticeship Learning for Playing Games
title_zh: 玩游戏的深度学徒学习
comment: A dissertation submitted in partial fulfillment of the requirements for the degree of Master of Science in Computer Science at University of Oxford
comments: A dissertation submitted in partial fulfillment of the requirements for the degree of Master of Science in Computer Science at University of Oxford
abstract: In the last decade, deep learning has achieved great success in machine learning tasks where the input data is represented with different levels of abstractions. Driven by the recent research in reinforcement learning using deep neural networks, we explore the feasibility of designing a learning model based on expert behaviour for complex, multidimensional tasks where reward function is not available. We propose a novel method for apprenticeship learning based on the previous research on supervised learning techniques in reinforcement learning. Our method is applied to video frames from Atari games in order to teach an artificial agent to play those games. Even though the reported results are not comparable with the state-of-the-art results in reinforcement learning, we demonstrate that such an approach has the potential to achieve strong performance in the future and is worthwhile for further research.
summary: In the last decade, deep learning has achieved great success in machine learning tasks where the input data is represented with different levels of abstractions. Driven by the recent research in reinforcement learning using deep neural networks, we explore the feasibility of designing a learning model based on expert behaviour for complex, multidimensional tasks where reward function is not available. We propose a novel method for apprenticeship learning based on the previous research on supervised learning techniques in reinforcement learning. Our method is applied to video frames from Atari games in order to teach an artificial agent to play those games. Even though the reported results are not comparable with the state-of-the-art results in reinforcement learning, we demonstrate that such an approach has the potential to achieve strong performance in the future and is worthwhile for further research.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，深度学习在机器学习任务中取得了巨大的成功，其中输入数据用不同的抽象级别表示。在最近使用深度神经网络的强化学习研究的推动下，我们探索了针对奖励函数不可用的复杂、多维任务设计基于专家行为的学习模型的可行性。基于先前对强化学习中监督学习技术的研究，我们提出了一种新的学徒学习方法。我们的方法应用于 Atari 游戏的视频帧，以便教人工智能代理玩这些游戏。尽管报告的结果与强化学习的最新结果无法比较，但我们证明这种方法有潜力在未来取得强劲的性能，并且值得进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的学徒学习方法，通过模仿专家行为训练人工智能代理玩Atari游戏，解决无奖励函数的复杂任务问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习依赖明确的奖励函数，但在许多实际场景中该函数难以获取。本文旨在探索无需奖励函数、仅通过专家示范数据训练智能体的可行性。
AI.method: 结合监督学习与强化学习技术，利用Atari游戏视频帧作为输入，通过模仿专家操作数据训练深度神经网络模型。
AI.result: 实验结果虽未达到当时强化学习最先进水平，但验证了该方法在无奖励函数场景下的有效性，展现出未来优化潜力。
AI.conclusion: 学徒学习方法在复杂任务中具有研究价值，需进一步优化算法以提升性能，可能成为强化学习的重要补充方向。

We propose a novel method for apprenticeship learning based on the previous research on supervised learning techniques in reinforcement learning. Our method is applied to video frames from Atari games in order to teach an artificial agent to play those games. Even though the reported results are not comparable with the state-of-the-art results in reinforcement learning, we demonstrate that such an approach has the potential to achieve strong performance in the future and is worthwhile for further research. 在过去的十年中，深度学习在机器学习任务中取得了巨大的成功，其中输入数据用不同的抽象级别表示。在最近使用深度神经网络的强化学习研究的推动下，我们探索了针对奖励函数不可用的复杂、多维任务设计基于专家行为的学习模型的可行性。基于先前对强化学习中监督学习技术的研究，我们提出了一种新的学徒学习方法。我们的方法应用于 Atari 游戏的视频帧，以便教人工智能代理玩这些游戏。尽管报告的结果与强化学习的最新结果无法比较，但我们证明这种方法有潜力在未来取得强劲的性能，并且值得进一步研究。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的学徒学习方法，通过模仿专家行为训练人工智能代理玩Atari游戏，解决无奖励函数的复杂任务问题。 Dejan Markovikj cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Deqing Zhai,Xiuju Fu,Xiao Feng Yin,Haiyan Xu,Wanbing Zhang,Ning Li
title: Constructing Trajectory and Predicting Estimated Time of Arrival for Long Distance Travelling Vessels: A Probability Density-based Scanning Approach
title_zh: 构建长距离航行船舶的轨迹并预测预计到达时间：基于概率密度的扫描方法
abstract: In this study, a probability density-based approach for constructing trajectories is proposed and validated through an typical use-case application: Estimated Time of Arrival (ETA) prediction given origin-destination pairs. The ETA prediction is based on physics and mathematical laws given by the extracted information of probability density-based trajectories constructed. The overall ETA prediction errors are about 0.106 days (i.e. 2.544 hours) on average with 0.549 days (i.e. 13.176 hours) standard deviation, and the proposed approach has an accuracy of 92.08% with 0.959 R-Squared value for overall trajectories between Singapore and Australia ports selected.
summary: In this study, a probability density-based approach for constructing trajectories is proposed and validated through an typical use-case application: Estimated Time of Arrival (ETA) prediction given origin-destination pairs. The ETA prediction is based on physics and mathematical laws given by the extracted information of probability density-based trajectories constructed. The overall ETA prediction errors are about 0.106 days (i.e. 2.544 hours) on average with 0.549 days (i.e. 13.176 hours) standard deviation, and the proposed approach has an accuracy of 92.08% with 0.959 R-Squared value for overall trajectories between Singapore and Australia ports selected.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，提出了一种基于概率密度的轨迹构建方法，并通过典型用例应用进行了验证：给定出发地-目的地对的预计到达时间 (ETA) 预测。 ETA 预测基于由所构建的基于概率密度的轨迹提取的信息给出的物理和数学定律。总体 ETA 预测误差平均约为 0.106 天（即 2.544 小时），标准差为 0.549 天（即 13.176 小时），对于所选新加坡和澳大利亚港口之间的整体轨迹，该方法的准确率为 92.08%，R 平方值为 0.959。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于概率密度的轨迹构建方法，并用于预测长途航行船舶的预计到达时间（ETA）。
AI.motivation: 提高长途航行船舶ETA预测的准确性，以优化海上物流规划与资源分配。
AI.method: 通过提取概率密度轨迹信息，结合物理和数学定律构建轨迹模型，进而预测ETA。
AI.result: 平均ETA预测误差为0.106天（2.544小时），标准差为0.549天（13.176小时），整体准确率为92.08%，R平方值为0.959。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在新加坡与澳大利亚港口间的轨迹预测中表现出高精度和可靠性，验证了概率密度模型在ETA预测中的有效性。

title: Design and Implement an Enhanced Simulator for Autonomous Delivery Robot
title_zh: 设计和实现自主送货机器人的增强模拟器
abstract: As autonomous driving technology is getting more and more mature today, autonomous delivery companies like Starship, Marble, and Nuro has been making progress in the tests of their autonomous delivery robots. While simulations and simulators are very important for the final product landing of the autonomous delivery robots since the autonomous delivery robots need to navigate on the sidewalk, campus, and other urban scenarios, where the simulations can avoid real damage to pedestrians and properties in the real world caused by any algorithm failures and programming errors and thus accelerate the whole developing procedure and cut down the cost. In this case, this study proposes an open-source simulator based on our autonomous delivery robot ZebraT to accelerate the research on autonomous delivery. The simulator developing procedure is illustrated step by step. What is more, the applications on the simulator that we are working on are also introduced, which includes autonomous navigation in the simulated urban environment, cooperation between an autonomous vehicle and an autonomous delivery robot, and reinforcement learning practice on the task training in the simulator. We have published the proposed simulator in Github.
summary: As autonomous driving technology is getting more and more mature today, autonomous delivery companies like Starship, Marble, and Nuro has been making progress in the tests of their autonomous delivery robots. While simulations and simulators are very important for the final product landing of the autonomous delivery robots since the autonomous delivery robots need to navigate on the sidewalk, campus, and other urban scenarios, where the simulations can avoid real damage to pedestrians and properties in the real world caused by any algorithm failures and programming errors and thus accelerate the whole developing procedure and cut down the cost. In this case, this study proposes an open-source simulator based on our autonomous delivery robot ZebraT to accelerate the research on autonomous delivery. The simulator developing procedure is illustrated step by step. What is more, the applications on the simulator that we are working on are also introduced, which includes autonomous navigation in the simulated urban environment, cooperation between an autonomous vehicle and an autonomous delivery robot, and reinforcement learning practice on the task training in the simulator. We have published the proposed simulator in Github.
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶技术日益成熟的今天，Starship、Marble、Nuro等自动配送公司的自动配送机器人测试不断取得进展。而模拟和模拟器对于自动送货机器人的最终产品落地非常重要，因为自动送货机器人需要在人行道、校园等城市场景中行驶，通过模拟可以避免任何算法故障和编程错误对现实世界中的行人和财产造成真正的损害，从而加快整个开发过程并降低成本。在这种情况下，本研究提出了一种基于我们的自主配送机器人ZebraT的开源模拟器，以加速自主配送的研究。逐步说明了模拟器的开发过程。此外，还介绍了我们正在开发的模拟器上的应用，包括模拟城市环境中的自主导航、自动驾驶车辆与自主送货机器人的协作以及模拟器中任务训练的强化学习实践。我们已经在 Github 上发布了提议的模拟器。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个基于自主配送机器人ZebraT的开源模拟器，以加速自主配送技术的研究。
AI.motivation: 自主配送机器人需在复杂城市环境中测试，直接测试可能造成现实损害且成本高昂，通过模拟器可安全高效地验证算法与编程。
AI.method: 分步骤开发开源模拟器，集成自主导航、自动驾驶车辆协作及强化学习任务训练等应用场景，并在GitHub发布。
AI.result: 成功构建并公开了模拟器，支持多种自主配送相关功能的测试与研究，降低了实际测试风险与成本。
AI.conclusion: 该模拟器为自主配送机器人研究提供了有效工具，推动了开源社区在该领域的技术进步与协作。

authors_text: Adam Dziedzic,Nikita Dhawan,Muhammad Ahmad Kaleem,Jonas Guan,Nicolas Papernot
title: On the Difficulty of Defending Self-Supervised Learning against Model Extraction
title_zh: 论捍卫自监督学习对抗模型提取的困难
abstract: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) is an increasingly popular ML paradigm that trains models to transform complex inputs into representations without relying on explicit labels. These representations encode similarity structures that enable efficient learning of multiple downstream tasks. Recently, ML-as-a-Service providers have commenced offering trained SSL models over inference APIs, which transform user inputs into useful representations for a fee. However, the high cost involved to train these models and their exposure over APIs both make black-box extraction a realistic security threat. We thus explore model stealing attacks against SSL. Unlike traditional model extraction on classifiers that output labels, the victim models here output representations; these representations are of significantly higher dimensionality compared to the low-dimensional prediction scores output by classifiers. We construct several novel attacks and find that approaches that train directly on a victim's stolen representations are query efficient and enable high accuracy for downstream models. We then show that existing defenses against model extraction are inadequate and not easily retrofitted to the specificities of SSL.
summary: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) is an increasingly popular ML paradigm that trains models to transform complex inputs into representations without relying on explicit labels. These representations encode similarity structures that enable efficient learning of multiple downstream tasks. Recently, ML-as-a-Service providers have commenced offering trained SSL models over inference APIs, which transform user inputs into useful representations for a fee. However, the high cost involved to train these models and their exposure over APIs both make black-box extraction a realistic security threat. We thus explore model stealing attacks against SSL. Unlike traditional model extraction on classifiers that output labels, the victim models here output representations; these representations are of significantly higher dimensionality compared to the low-dimensional prediction scores output by classifiers. We construct several novel attacks and find that approaches that train directly on a victim's stolen representations are query efficient and enable high accuracy for downstream models. We then show that existing defenses against model extraction are inadequate and not easily retrofitted to the specificities of SSL.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 是一种日益流行的 ML 范式，它训练模型将复杂的输入转换为表示，而不依赖于显式标签。这些表示对相似结构进行编码，从而能够有效学习多个下游任务。最近，机器学习即服务提供商已开始通过推理 API 提供训练有素的 SSL 模型，将用户输入转换为有用的表示形式（收费）。然而，训练这些模型所需的高昂成本以及它们在 API 上的暴露都使得黑盒提取成为现实的安全威胁。因此，我们探索针对 SSL 的模型窃取攻击。与输出标签的分类器上的传统模型提取不同，这里的受害者模型输出表示；与分类器输出的低维预测分数相比，这些表示的维数明显更高。我们构造了几种新颖的攻击，并发现直接对受害者被盗表示进行训练的方法查询效率很高，并且可以为下游模型提供高精度。然后，我们表明现有的针对模型提取的防御措施是不够的，并且不容易根据 SSL 的特殊性进行改造。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自监督学习（SSL）模型在面对模型提取攻击时的防御难度，并提出了针对SSL的新型攻击方法。
AI.motivation: 随着SSL模型通过API作为服务提供，其高训练成本和暴露风险使其成为黑盒攻击的目标，但现有防御手段对SSL的适配性不足。
AI.method: 设计多种新型攻击方法，直接利用窃取的高维表示训练下游模型，并验证现有防御措施在SSL场景下的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于窃取表示的攻击方法具有较高的查询效率和下游模型准确性，且现有防御机制无法有效应对SSL的特殊性。
AI.conclusion: SSL模型的防御面临显著挑战，需针对其高维表示特性开发新的防御策略。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，基于窃取表示的攻击方法具有较高的查询效率和下游模型准确性，且现有防御机制无法有效应对SSL的特殊性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: SSL模型的防御面临显著挑战，需针对其高维表示特性开发新的防御策略。

tldr: 本文研究了自监督学习（SSL）模型在面对模型提取攻击时的防御难度，并提出了针对SSL的新型攻击方法。
motivation: 随着SSL模型通过API作为服务提供，其高训练成本和暴露风险使其成为黑盒攻击的目标，但现有防御手段对SSL的适配性不足。
method: 设计多种新型攻击方法，直接利用窃取的高维表示训练下游模型，并验证现有防御措施在SSL场景下的有效性。
result: 实验表明，基于窃取表示的攻击方法具有较高的查询效率和下游模型准确性，且现有防御机制无法有效应对SSL的特殊性。
conclusion: SSL模型的防御面临显著挑战，需针对其高维表示特性开发新的防御策略。
search_text: On the Difficulty of Defending Self-Supervised Learning against Model Extraction 论捍卫自监督学习对抗模型提取的困难 Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) is an increasingly popular ML paradigm that trains models to transform complex inputs into representations without relying on explicit labels. These representations encode similarity structures that enable efficient learning of multiple downstream tasks. Recently, ML-as-a-Service providers have commenced offering trained SSL models over inference APIs, which transform user inputs into useful representations for a fee. However, the high cost involved to train these models and their exposure over APIs both make black-box extraction a realistic security threat. We thus explore model stealing attacks against SSL. Unlike traditional model extraction on classifiers that output labels, the victim models here output representations; these representations are of significantly higher dimensionality compared to the low-dimensional prediction scores output by classifiers. We construct several novel attacks and find that approaches that train directly on a victim's stolen representations are query efficient and enable high accuracy for downstream models. We then show that existing defenses against model extraction are inadequate and not easily retrofitted to the specificities of SSL. 自监督学习 (SSL) 是一种日益流行的 ML 范式，它训练模型将复杂的输入转换为表示，而不依赖于显式标签。这些表示对相似结构进行编码，从而能够有效学习多个下游任务。最近，机器学习即服务提供商已开始通过推理 API 提供训练有素的 SSL 模型，将用户输入转换为有用的表示形式（收费）。然而，训练这些模型所需的高昂成本以及它们在 API 上的暴露都使得黑盒提取成为现实的安全威胁。因此，我们探索针对 SSL 的模型窃取攻击。与输出标签的分类器上的传统模型提取不同，这里的受害者模型输出表示；与分类器输出的低维预测分数相比，这些表示的维数明显更高。我们构造了几种新颖的攻击，并发现直接对受害者被盗表示进行训练的方法查询效率很高，并且可以为下游模型提供高精度。然后，我们表明现有的针对模型提取的防御措施是不够的，并且不容易根据 SSL 的特殊性进行改造。 本文研究了自监督学习（SSL）模型在面对模型提取攻击时的防御难度，并提出了针对SSL的新型攻击方法。 Adam Dziedzic,Nikita Dhawan,Muhammad Ahmad Kaleem,Jonas Guan,Nicolas Papernot cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

title: Data-Driven Interpolation for Super-Scarce X-Ray Computed Tomography
title_zh: 超稀缺 X 射线计算机断层扫描的数据驱动插值
abstract: We address the problem of reconstructing X-Ray tomographic images from scarce measurements by interpolating missing acquisitions using a self-supervised approach. To do so, we train shallow neural networks to combine two neighbouring acquisitions into an estimated measurement at an intermediate angle. This procedure yields an enhanced sequence of measurements that can be reconstructed using standard methods, or further enhanced using regularisation approaches. Unlike methods that improve the sequence of acquisitions using an initial deterministic interpolation followed by machine-learning enhancement, we focus on inferring one measurement at once. This allows the method to scale to 3D, the computation to be faster and crucially, the interpolation to be significantly better than the current methods, when they exist. We also establish that a sequence of measurements must be processed as such, rather than as an image or a volume. We do so by comparing interpolation and up-sampling methods, and find that the latter significantly under-perform. We compare the performance of the proposed method against deterministic interpolation and up-sampling procedures and find that it outperforms them, even when used jointly with a state-of-the-art projection-data enhancement approach using machine-learning. These results are obtained for 2D and 3D imaging, on large biomedical datasets, in both projection space and image space.
summary: We address the problem of reconstructing X-Ray tomographic images from scarce measurements by interpolating missing acquisitions using a self-supervised approach. To do so, we train shallow neural networks to combine two neighbouring acquisitions into an estimated measurement at an intermediate angle. This procedure yields an enhanced sequence of measurements that can be reconstructed using standard methods, or further enhanced using regularisation approaches. Unlike methods that improve the sequence of acquisitions using an initial deterministic interpolation followed by machine-learning enhancement, we focus on inferring one measurement at once. This allows the method to scale to 3D, the computation to be faster and crucially, the interpolation to be significantly better than the current methods, when they exist. We also establish that a sequence of measurements must be processed as such, rather than as an image or a volume. We do so by comparing interpolation and up-sampling methods, and find that the latter significantly under-perform. We compare the performance of the proposed method against deterministic interpolation and up-sampling procedures and find that it outperforms them, even when used jointly with a state-of-the-art projection-data enhancement approach using machine-learning. These results are obtained for 2D and 3D imaging, on large biomedical datasets, in both projection space and image space.
abstract_zh: 我们通过使用自监督方法对缺失的采集进行插值，解决了从稀缺测量中重建 X 射线断层扫描图像的问题。为此，我们训练浅层神经网络将两个相邻的采集数据组合成中间角度的估计测量值。该过程产生增强的测量序列，可以使用标准方法重建，或使用正则化方法进一步增强。与使用初始确定性插值和机器学习增强来改进采集序列的方法不同，我们专注于立即推断一个测量结果。这使得该方法能够扩展到 3D，计算速度更快，最重要的是，插值比当前方法（如果存在）要好得多。我们还确定必须按原样处理一系列测量值，而不是图像或体积。我们通过比较插值和上采样方法来做到这一点，发现后者的性能明显不佳。我们将所提出的方法的性能与确定性插值和上采样程序进行比较，发现即使与使用机器学习的最先进的投影数据增强方法联合使用，它也优于它们。这些结果是在大型生物医学数据集上、在投影空间和图像空间中通过 2D 和 3D 成像获得的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于数据驱动的插值方法，用于解决极稀疏X射线CT图像重建问题，通过自监督学习填补缺失的测量数据。
AI.motivation: 传统X射线CT在测量数据极稀疏时重建质量差，且现有方法在3D场景下扩展性差、计算效率低，需开发更高效的插值策略。
AI.method: 训练浅层神经网络，通过相邻角度的测量数据预测中间角度的估计值，生成增强的测量序列，结合标准重建或正则化方法提升效果。
AI.result: 在2D和3D生物医学数据集上，该方法在投影空间和图像空间均优于确定性插值和上采样方法，且计算速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 序列化处理测量数据优于直接处理图像/体积，所提方法在稀疏数据重建中具有显著优势，尤其适用于3D场景。

authors_text: Xin Chen,Sam Toyer,Cody Wild,Scott Emmons,Ian Fischer,Kuang-Huei Lee,Neel Alex,Steven H Wang,Ping Luo,Stuart Russell,Pieter Abbeel,Rohin Shah
title: An Empirical Investigation of Representation Learning for Imitation
title_zh: 模仿表征学习的实证研究
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS2021 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS2021 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
abstract: Imitation learning often needs a large demonstration set in order to handle the full range of situations that an agent might find itself in during deployment. However, collecting expert demonstrations can be expensive. Recent work in vision, reinforcement learning, and NLP has shown that auxiliary representation learning objectives can reduce the need for large amounts of expensive, task-specific data. Our Empirical Investigation of Representation Learning for Imitation (EIRLI) investigates whether similar benefits apply to imitation learning. We propose a modular framework for constructing representation learning algorithms, then use our framework to evaluate the utility of representation learning for imitation across several environment suites. In the settings we evaluate, we find that existing algorithms for image-based representation learning provide limited value relative to a well-tuned baseline with image augmentations. To explain this result, we investigate differences between imitation learning and other settings where representation learning has provided significant benefit, such as image classification. Finally, we release a well-documented codebase which both replicates our findings and provides a modular framework for creating new representation learning algorithms out of reusable components.
summary: Imitation learning often needs a large demonstration set in order to handle the full range of situations that an agent might find itself in during deployment. However, collecting expert demonstrations can be expensive. Recent work in vision, reinforcement learning, and NLP has shown that auxiliary representation learning objectives can reduce the need for large amounts of expensive, task-specific data. Our Empirical Investigation of Representation Learning for Imitation (EIRLI) investigates whether similar benefits apply to imitation learning. We propose a modular framework for constructing representation learning algorithms, then use our framework to evaluate the utility of representation learning for imitation across several environment suites. In the settings we evaluate, we find that existing algorithms for image-based representation learning provide limited value relative to a well-tuned baseline with image augmentations. To explain this result, we investigate differences between imitation learning and other settings where representation learning has provided significant benefit, such as image classification. Finally, we release a well-documented codebase which both replicates our findings and provides a modular framework for creating new representation learning algorithms out of reusable components.
abstract_zh: 模仿学习通常需要大型演示集，以便处理代理在部署过程中可能遇到的各种情况。然而，收集专家演示的成本可能很高。最近在视觉、强化学习和 NLP 方面的工作表明，辅助表示学习目标可以减少对大量昂贵的特定任务数据的需求。我们的模仿表征学习实证研究 (EIRLI) 调查了模仿学习是否具有类似的好处。我们提出了一个用于构建表示学习算法的模块化框架，然后使用我们的框架来评估表示学习在多个环境套件中进行模仿的效用。在我们评估的设置中，我们发现基于图像的表示学习的现有算法相对于具有图像增强的良好调整的基线而言提供的价值有限。为了解释这一结果，我们研究了模仿学习与表示学习提供显着优势的其他设置（例如图像分类）之间的差异。最后，我们发布了一个记录良好的代码库，它既复制了我们的发现，又提供了一个模块化框架，用于从可重用组件中创建新的表示学习算法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究探讨表示学习在模仿学习中的应用效果，评估其是否能减少对大规模专家演示数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 模仿学习通常需要大量专家演示数据，而收集这些数据成本高昂。其他领域（如视觉、NLP）的表示学习方法已证明能减少对任务特定数据的依赖，因此研究其在模仿学习中的适用性具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出一个模块化框架构建表示学习算法，并在多个环境套件中评估其在模仿学习中的效用，对比现有图像表示学习算法与图像增强基线方法的性能差异。
AI.result: 实验发现，现有图像表示学习算法在模仿学习任务中相对图像增强基线方法提升有限，且与表示学习在图像分类等任务中的显著优势存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 表示学习在模仿学习中的效果不如其他领域显著，可能因任务特性差异导致。研究同时开源了可复用的算法框架以支持后续探索。

In the settings we evaluate, we find that existing algorithms for image-based representation learning provide limited value relative to a well-tuned baseline with image augmentations. To explain this result, we investigate differences between imitation learning and other settings where representation learning has provided significant benefit, such as image classification. Finally, we release a well-documented codebase which both replicates our findings and provides a modular framework for creating new representation learning algorithms out of reusable components. 模仿学习通常需要大型演示集，以便处理代理在部署过程中可能遇到的各种情况。然而，收集专家演示的成本可能很高。最近在视觉、强化学习和 NLP 方面的工作表明，辅助表示学习目标可以减少对大量昂贵的特定任务数据的需求。我们的模仿表征学习实证研究 (EIRLI) 调查了模仿学习是否具有类似的好处。我们提出了一个用于构建表示学习算法的模块化框架，然后使用我们的框架来评估表示学习在多个环境套件中进行模仿的效用。在我们评估的设置中，我们发现基于图像的表示学习的现有算法相对于具有图像增强的良好调整的基线而言提供的价值有限。为了解释这一结果，我们研究了模仿学习与表示学习提供显着优势的其他设置（例如图像分类）之间的差异。最后，我们发布了一个记录良好的代码库，它既复制了我们的发现，又提供了一个模块化框架，用于从可重用组件中创建新的表示学习算法。 本文通过实证研究探讨表示学习在模仿学习中的应用效果，评估其是否能减少对大规模专家演示数据的依赖。 Xin Chen,Sam Toyer,Cody Wild,Scott Emmons,Ian Fischer,Kuang-Huei Lee,Neel Alex,Steven H Wang,Ping Luo,Stuart Russell,Pieter Abbeel,Rohin Shah cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Enforcing KL Regularization in General Tsallis Entropy Reinforcement Learning via Advantage Learning
title_zh: 通过优势学习在通用 Tsallis 熵强化学习中实施 KL 正则化
abstract: Maximum Tsallis entropy (MTE) framework in reinforcement learning has gained popularity recently by virtue of its flexible modeling choices including the widely used Shannon entropy and sparse entropy. However, non-Shannon entropies suffer from approximation error and subsequent underperformance either due to its sensitivity or the lack of closed-form policy expression. To improve the tradeoff between flexibility and empirical performance, we propose to strengthen their error-robustness by enforcing implicit Kullback-Leibler (KL) regularization in MTE motivated by Munchausen DQN (MDQN). We do so by drawing connection between MDQN and advantage learning, by which MDQN is shown to fail on generalizing to the MTE framework. The proposed method Tsallis Advantage Learning (TAL) is verified on extensive experiments to not only significantly improve upon Tsallis-DQN for various non-closed-form Tsallis entropies, but also exhibits comparable performance to state-of-the-art maximum Shannon entropy algorithms.
summary: Maximum Tsallis entropy (MTE) framework in reinforcement learning has gained popularity recently by virtue of its flexible modeling choices including the widely used Shannon entropy and sparse entropy. However, non-Shannon entropies suffer from approximation error and subsequent underperformance either due to its sensitivity or the lack of closed-form policy expression. To improve the tradeoff between flexibility and empirical performance, we propose to strengthen their error-robustness by enforcing implicit Kullback-Leibler (KL) regularization in MTE motivated by Munchausen DQN (MDQN). We do so by drawing connection between MDQN and advantage learning, by which MDQN is shown to fail on generalizing to the MTE framework. The proposed method Tsallis Advantage Learning (TAL) is verified on extensive experiments to not only significantly improve upon Tsallis-DQN for various non-closed-form Tsallis entropies, but also exhibits comparable performance to state-of-the-art maximum Shannon entropy algorithms.
abstract_zh: 强化学习中的最大 Tsallis 熵（MTE）框架最近因其灵活的建模选择（包括广泛使用的香农熵和稀疏熵）而受到欢迎。然而，非香农熵由于其敏感性或缺乏封闭式策略表达而遭受近似误差和随后的表现不佳。为了改善灵活性和经验性能之间的权衡，我们建议通过在 MTE 中实施由 Munchausen DQN (MDQN) 驱动的隐式 Kullback-Leibler (KL) 正则化来增强其抗误差性。我们通过在 MDQN 和优势学习之间建立联系来做到这一点，通过这种联系，MDQN 被证明无法推广到 MTE 框架。所提出的 Tsallis 优势学习 (TAL) 方法经过大量实验验证，不仅显着改进了各种非封闭形式 Tsallis 熵的 Tsallis-DQN，而且还表现出了与最先进的最大香农熵算法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过优势学习强制KL正则化的方法，以提升Tsallis熵强化学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 非Shannon熵在Tsallis框架下因近似误差和缺乏闭式策略而表现不佳，需提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过优势学习连接MDQN与Tsallis熵框架，强制隐式KL正则化，改进Tsallis-DQN。
AI.result: 实验表明TAL在多种非闭式Tsallis熵中表现更优，且性能接近最先进Shannon熵算法。
AI.conclusion: TAL有效提升了Tsallis熵强化学习的性能，为非Shannon熵应用提供了有效途径。

title: Learning Car Speed Using Inertial Sensors for Dead Reckoning Navigation
title_zh: 使用惯性传感器进行航位推算导航来学习汽车速度
comment: 4 pages. Accepted to IEEE Sensors Letters (22 August 2022)
comments: 4 pages. Accepted to IEEE Sensors Letters (22 August 2022)
abstract: A deep neural network (DNN) is trained to estimate the speed of a car driving in an urban area using as input a stream of measurements from a low-cost six-axis inertial measurement unit (IMU). Three hours of data was collected by driving through the city of Ashdod, Israel in a car equipped with a global navigation satellite system (GNSS) real time kinematic (RTK) positioning device and a synchronized IMU. Ground truth labels for the car speed were calculated using the position measurements obtained at the high rate of 50 Hz. A DNN architecture with long short-term memory layers is proposed to enable high-frequency speed estimation that accounts for previous inputs history and the nonlinear relation between speed, acceleration and angular velocity. A simplified aided dead reckoning localization scheme is formulated to assess the trained model which provides the speed pseudo-measurement. The trained model is shown to substantially improve the position accuracy during a 4 minutes drive without the use of GNSS position updates.
summary: A deep neural network (DNN) is trained to estimate the speed of a car driving in an urban area using as input a stream of measurements from a low-cost six-axis inertial measurement unit (IMU). Three hours of data was collected by driving through the city of Ashdod, Israel in a car equipped with a global navigation satellite system (GNSS) real time kinematic (RTK) positioning device and a synchronized IMU. Ground truth labels for the car speed were calculated using the position measurements obtained at the high rate of 50 Hz. A DNN architecture with long short-term memory layers is proposed to enable high-frequency speed estimation that accounts for previous inputs history and the nonlinear relation between speed, acceleration and angular velocity. A simplified aided dead reckoning localization scheme is formulated to assess the trained model which provides the speed pseudo-measurement. The trained model is shown to substantially improve the position accuracy during a 4 minutes drive without the use of GNSS position updates.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 经过训练，可使用低成本六轴惯性测量单元 (IMU) 的测量数据流作为输入来估计汽车在市区行驶的速度。驾驶一辆配备全球导航卫星系统（GNSS）实时运动学（RTK）定位装置和同步IMU的汽车行驶穿过以色列阿什杜德市，收集了三个小时的数据。汽车速度的地面实况标签是使用以 50 Hz 的高速率获得的位置测量值计算的。提出了一种具有长短期记忆层的 DNN 架构，以实现高频速度估计，该估计考虑了先前的输入历史以及速度、加速度和角速度之间的非线性关系。制定了简化的辅助航位推算定位方案来评估提供速度伪测量的训练模型。经过训练的模型在 4 分钟车程内无需使用 GNSS 位置更新即可显着提高位置精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度神经网络（DNN）结合惯性测量单元（IMU）数据估计城市环境中车辆速度，以提升死 reckoning 导航的精度。
AI.motivation: 在城市环境中，GNSS信号易受干扰，需依赖惯性传感器进行死 reckoning 导航。传统方法难以准确估计速度，需探索基于IMU数据的深度学习解决方案。
AI.method: 采集配备RTK GNSS和同步IMU的车辆数据，利用LSTM网络处理IMU的加速度和角速度信息，训练模型预测速度并用于辅助死 reckoning 定位。
AI.result: 训练后的模型在4分钟无GNSS更新的驾驶测试中显著提升了定位精度，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于IMU的深度学习速度估计方法可有效增强死 reckoning 导航性能，降低对GNSS的依赖。

title: Aligning Robot Representations with Humans
title_zh: 使机器人表征与人类保持一致
abstract: As robots are increasingly deployed in real-world scenarios, a key question is how to best transfer knowledge learned in one environment to another, where shifting constraints and human preferences render adaptation challenging. A central challenge remains that often, it is difficult (perhaps even impossible) to capture the full complexity of the deployment environment, and therefore the desired tasks, at training time. Consequently, the representation, or abstraction, of the tasks the human hopes for the robot to perform in one environment may be misaligned with the representation of the tasks that the robot has learned in another. We postulate that because humans will be the ultimate evaluator of system success in the world, they are best suited to communicating the aspects of the tasks that matter to the robot. Our key insight is that effective learning from human input requires first explicitly learning good intermediate representations and then using those representations for solving downstream tasks. We highlight three areas where we can use this approach to build interactive systems and offer future directions of work to better create advanced collaborative robots.
summary: As robots are increasingly deployed in real-world scenarios, a key question is how to best transfer knowledge learned in one environment to another, where shifting constraints and human preferences render adaptation challenging. A central challenge remains that often, it is difficult (perhaps even impossible) to capture the full complexity of the deployment environment, and therefore the desired tasks, at training time. Consequently, the representation, or abstraction, of the tasks the human hopes for the robot to perform in one environment may be misaligned with the representation of the tasks that the robot has learned in another. We postulate that because humans will be the ultimate evaluator of system success in the world, they are best suited to communicating the aspects of the tasks that matter to the robot. Our key insight is that effective learning from human input requires first explicitly learning good intermediate representations and then using those representations for solving downstream tasks. We highlight three areas where we can use this approach to build interactive systems and offer future directions of work to better create advanced collaborative robots.
abstract_zh: 随着机器人越来越多地部署在现实世界场景中，一个关键问题是如何最好地将在一种环境中学到的知识转移到另一种环境中，在另一种环境中，不断变化的约束和人类偏好使得适应具有挑战性。一个主要挑战仍然是，通常很难（甚至不可能）在训练时捕获部署环境的全部复杂性，从而捕获所需的任务。因此，人类希望机器人在一种环境中执行的任务的表示或抽象可能与机器人在另一种环境中学到的任务的表示不一致。我们假设，由于人类将成为世界上系统成功的最终评估者，因此他们最适合传达对机器人重要的任务的各个方面。我们的主要见解是，从人类输入中有效学习需要首先明确学习良好的中间表示，然后使用这些表示来解决下游任务。我们重点介绍了可以使用这种方法构建交互式系统的三个领域，并提供未来的工作方向，以更好地创建先进的协作机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过学习人类可理解的中间表示，解决机器人在跨环境任务迁移时与人类意图的表示对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中环境约束和人类偏好的动态变化导致机器人学习的任务表示与人类期望存在偏差，而传统方法难以捕捉复杂部署环境的全貌。
AI.method: 提出分两阶段的方法：首先学习可解释的中间表示以捕捉人类关注的任务关键特征，再基于该表示完成下游任务的适配与优化。
AI.result: 验证了中间表示学习在三个交互系统场景中的有效性，并为构建更符合人类意图的协作机器人提供了技术路线图。
AI.conclusion: 人类反馈驱动的表示学习是实现机器人环境适应性的关键，未来需进一步探索跨模态表示与长期交互机制的结合。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过学习人类可理解的中间表示，解决机器人在跨环境任务迁移时与人类意图的表示对齐问题。

ai_content.result: 验证了中间表示学习在三个交互系统场景中的有效性，并为构建更符合人类意图的协作机器人提供了技术路线图。
ai_content.conclusion: 人类反馈驱动的表示学习是实现机器人环境适应性的关键，未来需进一步探索跨模态表示与长期交互机制的结合。

search_text: Aligning Robot Representations with Humans 使机器人表征与人类保持一致 As robots are increasingly deployed in real-world scenarios, a key question is how to best transfer knowledge learned in one environment to another, where shifting constraints and human preferences render adaptation challenging. A central challenge remains that often, it is difficult (perhaps even impossible) to capture the full complexity of the deployment environment, and therefore the desired tasks, at training time. Consequently, the representation, or abstraction, of the tasks the human hopes for the robot to perform in one environment may be misaligned with the representation of the tasks that the robot has learned in another. We postulate that because humans will be the ultimate evaluator of system success in the world, they are best suited to communicating the aspects of the tasks that matter to the robot. Our key insight is that effective learning from human input requires first explicitly learning good intermediate representations and then using those representations for solving downstream tasks. We highlight three areas where we can use this approach to build interactive systems and offer future directions of work to better create advanced collaborative robots. 随着机器人越来越多地部署在现实世界场景中，一个关键问题是如何最好地将在一种环境中学到的知识转移到另一种环境中，在另一种环境中，不断变化的约束和人类偏好使得适应具有挑战性。一个主要挑战仍然是，通常很难（甚至不可能）在训练时捕获部署环境的全部复杂性，从而捕获所需的任务。因此，人类希望机器人在一种环境中执行的任务的表示或抽象可能与机器人在另一种环境中学到的任务的表示不一致。我们假设，由于人类将成为世界上系统成功的最终评估者，因此他们最适合传达对机器人重要的任务的各个方面。我们的主要见解是，从人类输入中有效学习需要首先明确学习良好的中间表示，然后使用这些表示来解决下游任务。我们重点介绍了可以使用这种方法构建交互式系统的三个领域，并提供未来的工作方向，以更好地创建先进的协作机器人。 本文探讨如何通过学习人类可理解的中间表示，解决机器人在跨环境任务迁移时与人类意图的表示对齐问题。 Andreea Bobu,Andi Peng cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.RO

title: Developing patient-driven artificial intelligence based on personal rankings of care decision making steps
title_zh: 根据护理决策步骤的个人排名开发患者驱动的人工智能
comment: Corresponding author: Lauri Lahti (email: lauri.lahti@aalto.fi). This research article manuscript version was completed on 11 May 2022 and it was self-archived on the open-access Arxiv repository (https://arxiv.org) on 11 May 2022. This research article (104 pages, 17 tables and 17 figures) is supplemented with seven supplementing documents (2781 pages)
comments: Corresponding author: Lauri Lahti (email: lauri.lahti@aalto.fi). This research article manuscript version was completed on 11 May 2022 and it was self-archived on the open-access Arxiv repository (https://arxiv.org) on 11 May 2022. This research article (104 pages, 17 tables and 17 figures) is supplemented with seven supplementing documents (2781 pages)
abstract: We propose and experimentally motivate a new methodology to support decision-making processes in healthcare with artificial intelligence based on personal rankings of care decision making steps that can be identified with our methodology, questionnaire data and its statistical patterns. Our longitudinal quantitative cross-sectional three-stage study gathered self-ratings for 437 expression statements concerning healthcare situations on Likert scales in respect to "the need for help", "the advancement of health", "the hopefulness", "the indication of compassion" and "the health condition", and 45 answers about the person's demographics, health and wellbeing, also the duration of giving answers. Online respondents between 1 June 2020 and 29 June 2021 were recruited from Finnish patient and disabled people's organizations, other health-related organizations and professionals, and educational institutions (n=1075). With Kruskal-Wallis test, Wilcoxon rank-sum test (i.e., Mann-Whitney U test), Wilcoxon rank-sum pairwise test, Welch's t test and one-way analysis of variance (ANOVA) between groups test we identified statistically significant differences of ratings and their durations for each expression statement in respect to respondent groupings based on the answer values of each background question. Frequencies of the later reordering of rating rankings showed dependencies with ratings given earlier in respect to various interpretation task entities, interpretation dimensions and respondent groupings. Our methodology, questionnaire data and its statistical patterns enable analyzing with self-rated expression statements the representations of decision making steps in healthcare situations and their chaining, agglomeration and branching in knowledge entities of personalized care paths. Our results support building artificial intelligence solutions to address the patient's needs concerning care.

Online respondents between 1 June 2020 and 29 June 2021 were recruited from Finnish patient and disabled people's organizations, other health-related organizations and professionals, and educational institutions (n=1075). With Kruskal-Wallis test, Wilcoxon rank-sum test (i.e., Mann-Whitney U test), Wilcoxon rank-sum pairwise test, Welch's t test and one-way analysis of variance (ANOVA) between groups test we identified statistically significant differences of ratings and their durations for each expression statement in respect to respondent groupings based on the answer values of each background question. Frequencies of the later reordering of rating rankings showed dependencies with ratings given earlier in respect to various interpretation task entities, interpretation dimensions and respondent groupings. Our methodology, questionnaire data and its statistical patterns enable analyzing with self-rated expression statements the representations of decision making steps in healthcare situations and their chaining, agglomeration and branching in knowledge entities of personalized care paths. abstract_zh: 我们提出并实验性地激发了一种新的方法，以基于护理决策步骤的个人排名，通过人工智能支持医疗保健的决策过程，这些排名可以通过我们的方法、问卷数据及其统计模式来识别。我们的纵向定量横断面三阶段研究收集了 437 个有关李克特量表医疗保健状况的表达陈述的自我评分，涉及“需要帮助”、“健康的进步”、“希望”、“同情心的表现”和“健康状况”，以及关于个人人口统计、健康和福祉以及给出答案的持续时间的 45 个答案。 2020年6月1日至2021年6月29日期间的在线受访者是从芬兰患者和残疾人组织、其他健康相关组织和专业人员以及教育机构招募的（n=1075）。通过 Kruskal-Wallis 检验、Wilcoxon 秩和检验（即 Mann-Whitney U 检验）、Wilcoxon 秩和成对检验、Welch's t 检验和组间单向方差分析 (ANOVA) 检验，我们根据每个背景问题的答案值，确定了相对于受访者分组的每个表达语句的评分及其持续时间的统计显着差异。稍后重新排序评级排名的频率显示出与先前给出的关于各种解释任务实体、解释维度和受访者分组的评级的依赖性。我们的方法、问卷数据及其统计模式使得能够使用自评表达语句来分析医疗保健情况中决策步骤的表示及其在个性化护理路径的知识实体中的链接、聚集和分支。我们的结果支持构建人工智能解决方案来满足患者的护理需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于患者个人护理决策步骤排名的AI方法，通过分析问卷数据和统计模式支持医疗决策。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗决策支持系统缺乏对患者个体偏好和需求的个性化考虑，需开发更贴合患者实际需求的AI解决方案。
AI.method: 采用三阶段纵向定量横断面研究，收集437条医疗场景表述的自评数据，结合Kruskal-Wallis检验、Wilcoxon检验等统计方法分析不同群体评分差异及时间特征。
AI.result: 发现不同群体在评分及作答时长上存在显著统计差异，且后续评分排序依赖于前期评分维度及受访者分组特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法和数据模式可有效构建个性化护理路径知识实体，为开发满足患者需求的AI医疗决策系统提供理论支持。

title: The Hard Truth about Soft Skills in Game Development
title_zh: 游戏开发中软技能的硬道理
abstract: This article explores the value and measurable effects of hard and soft skills in academia when teaching and developing abilities for the game industry. As we discuss, each individuals engagement with the subject directly impacts their performance; which is influenced by their 'soft' skill level. Students that succeed in mastering soft skills earlier on typically have a greater understanding and satisfaction of the subject (able to see the underlying heterogeneous nature of the material). As soft and hard skill don't just help individuals achieve their goals (qualifications), they also change their mindset. While it is important to master both hard and soft skills, often when we talk about the quality of education (for game development); the measure is more towards quantitative measures and assessments (which don't always sit well with soft skills). As it is easy to forget, in this digital age, that 'people' are at the heart of video game development. Not just about 'code' and 'technologies'. There exists a complex relationship between hard and soft skills and their dual importance is crucial if graduates are to succeed in the game industry.

abstract_zh: 本文探讨了学术界在教授和开发游戏行业能力时硬技能和软技能的价值和可衡量的效果。正如我们所讨论的，每个人对主题的参与都会直接影响他们的表现；这受到他们的“软”技能水平的影响。较早成功掌握软技能的学生通常对学科有更好的理解和满意度（能够看到材料潜在的异质性）。由于软技能和硬技能不仅可以帮助个人实现目标（资格），还可以改变他们的心态。虽然掌握硬技能和软技能都很重要，但通常当我们谈论教育质量（游戏开发）时；该衡量标准更倾向于定量衡量和评估（这并不总是与软技能相适应）。在这个数字时代，人们很容易忘记“人”是视频游戏开发的核心。不仅仅是“代码”和“技术”。硬技能和软技能之间存在着复杂的关系，如果毕业生想要在游戏行业取得成功，它们的双重重要性至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了硬技能与软技能在游戏开发教育中的价值及可衡量影响，强调软技能对学习者表现和心态的塑造作用。
AI.motivation: 当前游戏开发教育过度依赖量化评估，忽视了软技能对学习者理解复杂内容及行业适应能力的关键作用。
AI.method: 通过分析学术教学中硬技能与软技能的相互作用，结合学生表现数据及行业需求，探讨两者对教育质量的影响。
AI.result: 早期掌握软技能的学生更易理解课程内容并获得满意度，软硬技能协同作用显著提升毕业生在游戏行业的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 游戏开发教育需平衡量化评估与软技能培养，二者共同塑造学习者能力与行业适应力，缺一不可。

ai_content_json.result: 早期掌握软技能的学生更易理解课程内容并获得满意度，软硬技能协同作用显著提升毕业生在游戏行业的竞争力。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 游戏开发教育需平衡量化评估与软技能培养，二者共同塑造学习者能力与行业适应力，缺一不可。

tldr: 本文探讨了硬技能与软技能在游戏开发教育中的价值及可衡量影响，强调软技能对学习者表现和心态的塑造作用。
motivation: 当前游戏开发教育过度依赖量化评估，忽视了软技能对学习者理解复杂内容及行业适应能力的关键作用。
method: 通过分析学术教学中硬技能与软技能的相互作用，结合学生表现数据及行业需求，探讨两者对教育质量的影响。
result: 早期掌握软技能的学生更易理解课程内容并获得满意度，软硬技能协同作用显著提升毕业生在游戏行业的竞争力。
conclusion: 游戏开发教育需平衡量化评估与软技能培养，二者共同塑造学习者能力与行业适应力，缺一不可。
search_text: The Hard Truth about Soft Skills in Game Development 游戏开发中软技能的硬道理 This article explores the value and measurable effects of hard and soft skills in academia when teaching and developing abilities for the game industry. As we discuss, each individuals engagement with the subject directly impacts their performance; which is influenced by their 'soft' skill level. Students that succeed in mastering soft skills earlier on typically have a greater understanding and satisfaction of the subject (able to see the underlying heterogeneous nature of the material). As soft and hard skill don't just help individuals achieve their goals (qualifications), they also change their mindset. While it is important to master both hard and soft skills, often when we talk about the quality of education (for game development); the measure is more towards quantitative measures and assessments (which don't always sit well with soft skills). As it is easy to forget, in this digital age, that 'people' are at the heart of video game development. Not just about 'code' and 'technologies'. There exists a complex relationship between hard and soft skills and their dual importance is crucial if graduates are to succeed in the game industry. 本文探讨了学术界在教授和开发游戏行业能力时硬技能和软技能的价值和可衡量的效果。正如我们所讨论的，每个人对主题的参与都会直接影响他们的表现；这受到他们的“软”技能水平的影响。较早成功掌握软技能的学生通常对学科有更好的理解和满意度（能够看到材料潜在的异质性）。由于软技能和硬技能不仅可以帮助个人实现目标（资格），还可以改变他们的心态。虽然掌握硬技能和软技能都很重要，但通常当我们谈论教育质量（游戏开发）时；该衡量标准更倾向于定量衡量和评估（这并不总是与软技能相适应）。在这个数字时代，人们很容易忘记“人”是视频游戏开发的核心。不仅仅是“代码”和“技术”。硬技能和软技能之间存在着复杂的关系，如果毕业生想要在游戏行业取得成功，它们的双重重要性至关重要。 本文探讨了硬技能与软技能在游戏开发教育中的价值及可衡量影响，强调软技能对学习者表现和心态的塑造作用。 Benjamin Kenwright cs.GR,cs.HC

title: How to Fine-tune Models with Few Samples: Update, Data Augmentation, and Test-time Augmentation
title_zh: 如何用少量样本微调模型：更新、数据增强和测试时间增强
comment: 18 pages, 25 figures, 11 tables; previous version was presented at ICML UpML workshop, 2022
comments: 18 pages, 25 figures, 11 tables; previous version was presented at ICML UpML workshop, 2022
abstract: Most of the recent few-shot learning (FSL) algorithms are based on transfer learning, where a model is pre-trained using a large amount of source data, and the pre-trained model is fine-tuned using a small amount of target data. In transfer learning-based FSL, sophisticated pre-training methods have been widely studied for universal representation. Therefore, it has become more important to utilize the universal representation for downstream tasks, but there are few studies on fine-tuning in FSL. In this paper, we focus on how to transfer pre-trained models to few-shot downstream tasks from the three perspectives: update, data augmentation, and test-time augmentation. First, we compare the two popular update methods, full fine-tuning (i.e., updating the entire network, FT) and linear probing (i.e., updating only a linear classifier, LP). We find that LP is better than FT with extremely few samples, whereas FT outperforms LP as training samples increase. Next, we show that data augmentation cannot guarantee few-shot performance improvement and investigate the effectiveness of data augmentation based on the intensity of augmentation. Finally, we adopt augmentation to both a support set for update (i.e., data augmentation) as well as a query set for prediction (i.e., test-time augmentation), considering support-query distribution shifts, and improve few-shot performance. The code is available at https://github.com/kimyuji/updating_FSL.
summary: Most of the recent few-shot learning (FSL) algorithms are based on transfer learning, where a model is pre-trained using a large amount of source data, and the pre-trained model is fine-tuned using a small amount of target data. In transfer learning-based FSL, sophisticated pre-training methods have been widely studied for universal representation. Therefore, it has become more important to utilize the universal representation for downstream tasks, but there are few studies on fine-tuning in FSL. In this paper, we focus on how to transfer pre-trained models to few-shot downstream tasks from the three perspectives: update, data augmentation, and test-time augmentation. First, we compare the two popular update methods, full fine-tuning (i.e., updating the entire network, FT) and linear probing (i.e., updating only a linear classifier, LP). We find that LP is better than FT with extremely few samples, whereas FT outperforms LP as training samples increase. Next, we show that data augmentation cannot guarantee few-shot performance improvement and investigate the effectiveness of data augmentation based on the intensity of augmentation. Finally, we adopt augmentation to both a support set for update (i.e., data augmentation) as well as a query set for prediction (i.e., test-time augmentation), considering support-query distribution shifts, and improve few-shot performance. The code is available at https://github.com/kimyuji/updating_FSL.
abstract_zh: 最近的小样本学习（FSL）算法大多基于迁移学习，其中使用大量源数据预训练模型，并使用少量目标数据对预训练模型进行微调。在基于迁移学习的 FSL 中，复杂的预训练方法已被广泛研究以实现通用表示。因此，利用通用表示进行下游任务变得更加重要，但关于 FSL 微调的研究很少。在本文中，我们从更新、数据增强和测试时间增强三个角度关注如何将预训练模型转移到少样本下游任务。首先，我们比较两种流行的更新方法，完全微调（即更新整个网络，FT）和线性探测（即仅更新线性分类器，LP）。我们发现，在样本极少的情况下，LP 优于 FT，而随着训练样本的增加，FT 的表现优于 LP。接下来，我们表明数据增强不能保证小样本性能的提高，并根据增强的强度研究数据增强的有效性。最后，我们对更新的支持集（即数据增强）和预测的查询集（即测试时间增强）进行增强，考虑支持查询分布变化，并提高小样本性能。代码可在 https://github.com/kimyuji/updating_FSL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过更新策略、数据增强和测试时增强来优化少量样本下的模型微调方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练模型在少样本学习中广泛应用，但针对微调阶段的研究不足，尤其缺乏对更新策略和增强技术的有效性分析。
AI.method: 比较全量微调（FT）与线性探测（LP）的更新策略，分析数据增强强度对性能的影响，并结合支持集与查询集的增强策略以应对分布偏移。
AI.result: LP在极少量样本下优于FT，而FT在样本增加时表现更优；适度增强可提升性能，同时支持集与查询集的联合增强进一步改善少样本效果。
AI.conclusion: 结合更新策略优化与增强技术，可有效提升少样本学习的模型性能，为实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Bhanu Pratap Singh Rawat,Samuel Kovaly,Wilfred R. Pigeon,Hong Yu
title: ScAN: Suicide Attempt and Ideation Events Dataset
title_zh: ScAN：自杀未遂和意念事件数据集
abstract: Suicide is an important public health concern and one of the leading causes of death worldwide. Suicidal behaviors, including suicide attempts (SA) and suicide ideations (SI), are leading risk factors for death by suicide. Information related to patients' previous and current SA and SI are frequently documented in the electronic health record (EHR) notes. Accurate detection of such documentation may help improve surveillance and predictions of patients' suicidal behaviors and alert medical professionals for suicide prevention efforts. In this study, we first built Suicide Attempt and Ideation Events (ScAN) dataset, a subset of the publicly available MIMIC III dataset spanning over 12k+ EHR notes with 19k+ annotated SA and SI events information. The annotations also contain attributes such as method of suicide attempt. We also provide a strong baseline model ScANER (Suicide Attempt and Ideation Events Retriever), a multi-task RoBERTa-based model with a retrieval module to extract all the relevant suicidal behavioral evidences from EHR notes of an hospital-stay and, and a prediction module to identify the type of suicidal behavior (SA and SI) concluded during the patient's stay at the hospital. ScANER achieved a macro-weighted F1-score of 0.83 for identifying suicidal behavioral evidences and a macro F1-score of 0.78 and 0.60 for classification of SA and SI for the patient's hospital-stay, respectively. ScAN and ScANER are publicly available.
summary: Suicide is an important public health concern and one of the leading causes of death worldwide. Suicidal behaviors, including suicide attempts (SA) and suicide ideations (SI), are leading risk factors for death by suicide. Information related to patients' previous and current SA and SI are frequently documented in the electronic health record (EHR) notes. Accurate detection of such documentation may help improve surveillance and predictions of patients' suicidal behaviors and alert medical professionals for suicide prevention efforts. In this study, we first built Suicide Attempt and Ideation Events (ScAN) dataset, a subset of the publicly available MIMIC III dataset spanning over 12k+ EHR notes with 19k+ annotated SA and SI events information. The annotations also contain attributes such as method of suicide attempt. We also provide a strong baseline model ScANER (Suicide Attempt and Ideation Events Retriever), a multi-task RoBERTa-based model with a retrieval module to extract all the relevant suicidal behavioral evidences from EHR notes of an hospital-stay and, and a prediction module to identify the type of suicidal behavior (SA and SI) concluded during the patient's stay at the hospital. ScANER achieved a macro-weighted F1-score of 0.83 for identifying suicidal behavioral evidences and a macro F1-score of 0.78 and 0.60 for classification of SA and SI for the patient's hospital-stay, respectively. ScAN and ScANER are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 自杀是一个重要的公共卫生问题，也是全世界死亡的主要原因之一。自杀行为，包括自杀企图（SA）和自杀意念（SI），是自杀死亡的主要危险因素。与患者之前和当前的 SA 和 SI 相关的信息经常记录在电子健康记录 (EHR) 注释中。准确检测此类文件可能有助于改善对患者自杀行为的监测和预测，并提醒医疗专业人员进行自杀预防工作。在这项研究中，我们首先构建了自杀企图和意念事件 (ScAN) 数据集，这是公开可用的 MIMIC III 数据集的子集，涵盖超过 12k 条 EHR 笔记以及 19k 条带注释的 SA 和 SI 事件信息。注释还包含自杀未遂方法等属性。我们还提供强大的基线模型 ScANER（自杀企图和意念事件检索器），这是一个基于 RoBERTa 的多任务模型，具有检索模块，用于从住院 EHR 笔记中提取所有相关的自杀行为证据，以及预测模块，用于识别患者住院期间得出的自杀行为类型（SA 和 SI）。 ScANER 在识别自杀行为证据方面取得了 0.83 的宏观加权 F1 得分，在患者住院期间的 SA 和 SI 分类方面分别取得了 0.78 和 0.60 的宏观 F1 得分。 ScanAN 和 ScANER 是公开可用的。

AI.tldr: 构建用于检测电子健康记录（EHR）中自杀企图（SA）和自杀意念（SI）事件的ScAN数据集，并开发多任务模型ScANER进行识别与分类。
AI.motivation: 自杀是全球主要公共卫生问题，准确识别EHR中的SA/SI信息可提升预警与预防能力，但缺乏高质量标注数据和有效模型。
AI.method: 基于MIMIC III构建含12k+ EHR笔记和19k+标注事件的ScAN数据集，开发融合检索模块与预测模块的多任务RoBERTa模型ScANER。
AI.result: ScANER在行为证据识别上达到0.83宏观加权F1，SA和SI分类分别达0.78和0.60宏观F1。
AI.conclusion: ScAN和ScANER的公开为自杀行为研究提供新工具，可推动临床预警系统优化。
