The annotations also contain attributes such as method of suicide attempt. We also provide a strong baseline model ScANER (Suicide Attempt and Ideation Events Retriever), a multi-task RoBERTa-based model with a retrieval module to extract all the relevant suicidal behavioral evidences from EHR notes of an hospital-stay and, and a prediction module to identify the type of suicidal behavior (SA and SI) concluded during the patient's stay at the hospital. ScANER achieved a macro-weighted F1-score of 0.83 for identifying suicidal behavioral evidences and a macro F1-score of 0.78 and 0.60 for classification of SA and SI for the patient's hospital-stay, respectively. ScAN and ScANER are publicly available. 自杀是一个重要的公共卫生问题，也是全世界死亡的主要原因之一。自杀行为，包括自杀企图（SA）和自杀意念（SI），是自杀死亡的主要危险因素。与患者之前和当前的 SA 和 SI 相关的信息经常记录在电子健康记录 (EHR) 注释中。准确检测此类文件可能有助于改善对患者自杀行为的监测和预测，并提醒医疗专业人员进行自杀预防工作。在这项研究中，我们首先构建了自杀企图和意念事件 (ScAN) 数据集，这是公开可用的 MIMIC III 数据集的子集，涵盖超过 12k 条 EHR 笔记以及 19k 条带注释的 SA 和 SI 事件信息。注释还包含自杀未遂方法等属性。我们还提供强大的基线模型 ScANER（自杀企图和意念事件检索器），这是一个基于 RoBERTa 的多任务模型，具有检索模块，用于从住院 EHR 笔记中提取所有相关的自杀行为证据，以及预测模块，用于识别患者住院期间得出的自杀行为类型（SA 和 SI）。 ScANER 在识别自杀行为证据方面取得了 0.83 的宏观加权 F1 得分，在患者住院期间的 SA 和 SI 分类方面分别取得了 0.78 和 0.60 的宏观 F1 得分。 ScanAN 和 ScANER 是公开可用的。 构建用于检测电子健康记录（EHR）中自杀企图（SA）和自杀意念（SI）事件的ScAN数据集，并开发多任务模型ScANER进行识别与分类。 Bhanu Pratap Singh Rawat,Samuel Kovaly,Wilfred R. Pigeon,Hong Yu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Mondrian Forest for Data Stream Classification Under Memory Constraints
title_zh: 内存约束下的蒙德里安森林数据流分类
abstract: Supervised learning algorithms generally assume the availability of enough memory to store their data model during the training and test phases. However, in the Internet of Things, this assumption is unrealistic when data comes in the form of infinite data streams, or when learning algorithms are deployed on devices with reduced amounts of memory. In this paper, we adapt the online Mondrian forest classification algorithm to work with memory constraints on data streams. In particular, we design five out-of-memory strategies to update Mondrian trees with new data points when the memory limit is reached. Moreover, we design trimming mechanisms to make Mondrian trees more robust to concept drifts under memory constraints. We evaluate our algorithms on a variety of real and simulated datasets, and we conclude with recommendations on their use in different situations: the Extend Node strategy appears as the best out-of-memory strategy in all configurations, whereas different trimming mechanisms should be adopted depending on whether a concept drift is expected. All our methods are implemented in the OrpailleCC open-source library and are ready to be used on embedded systems and connected objects.
summary: Supervised learning algorithms generally assume the availability of enough memory to store their data model during the training and test phases. However, in the Internet of Things, this assumption is unrealistic when data comes in the form of infinite data streams, or when learning algorithms are deployed on devices with reduced amounts of memory. In this paper, we adapt the online Mondrian forest classification algorithm to work with memory constraints on data streams. In particular, we design five out-of-memory strategies to update Mondrian trees with new data points when the memory limit is reached. Moreover, we design trimming mechanisms to make Mondrian trees more robust to concept drifts under memory constraints. We evaluate our algorithms on a variety of real and simulated datasets, and we conclude with recommendations on their use in different situations: the Extend Node strategy appears as the best out-of-memory strategy in all configurations, whereas different trimming mechanisms should be adopted depending on whether a concept drift is expected. All our methods are implemented in the OrpailleCC open-source library and are ready to be used on embedded systems and connected objects.
abstract_zh: 监督学习算法通常假设在训练和测试阶段有足够的内存来存储其数据模型。然而，在物联网中，当数据以无限数据流的形式出现时，或者当学习算法部署在内存量减少的设备上时，这种假设是不现实的。在本文中，我们采用在线蒙德里安森林分类算法来处理数据流的内存约束。特别是，我们设计了五种内存不足策略，以便在达到内存限制时用新数据点更新蒙德里安树。此外，我们设计了修剪机制，使蒙德里安树在内存限制下对概念漂移更加鲁棒。我们在各种真实和模拟数据集上评估我们的算法，并得出关于它们在不同情况下使用的建议：扩展节点策略在所有配置中都是最佳的内存不足策略，而应根据是否预期概念漂移而采用不同的修剪机制。我们所有的方法都在 OrpailleCC 开源库中实现，并且可以在嵌入式系统和连接的对象上使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在内存受限条件下适用于数据流分类的Mondrian森林算法。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习算法假设内存充足，但物联网设备在处理无限数据流时面临内存限制，需适应性调整算法。
AI.method: 设计五种内存外更新策略及修剪机制，优化Mondrian树以应对概念漂移，并在开源库中实现。
AI.result: Extend Node策略在所有配置中表现最佳，不同修剪机制需根据是否预期概念漂移选择使用。
AI.conclusion: 提出的内存约束算法适用于嵌入式系统，可根据实际场景选择最优策略与修剪方法。

title: Unsupervised Driving Behavior Analysis using Representation Learning and Exploiting Group-based Training
title_zh: 使用表征学习和利用基于群体的训练进行无监督驾驶行为分析
comment: 7 figures, 8 pages , 7 tables, accepted and presented conference AAAI 2022 AI for Transportation Workshop (Prefinal version)
comments: 7 figures, 8 pages , 7 tables, accepted and presented conference AAAI 2022 AI for Transportation Workshop (Prefinal version)
abstract: Driving behavior monitoring plays a crucial role in managing road safety and decreasing the risk of traffic accidents. Driving behavior is affected by multiple factors like vehicle characteristics, types of roads, traffic, but, most importantly, the pattern of driving of individuals. Current work performs a robust driving pattern analysis by capturing variations in driving patterns. It forms consistent groups by learning compressed representation of time series (Auto Encoded Compact Sequence) using a multi-layer seq-2-seq autoencoder and exploiting hierarchical clustering along with recommending the choice of best distance measure. Consistent groups aid in identifying variations in driving patterns of individuals captured in the dataset. These groups are generated for both train and hidden test data. The consistent groups formed using train data, are exploited for training multiple instances of the classifier. Obtained choice of best distance measure is used to select the best train-test pair of consistent groups. We have experimented on the publicly available UAH-DriveSet dataset considering the signals captured from IMU sensors (accelerometer and gyroscope) for classifying driving behavior. We observe proposed method, significantly outperforms the benchmark performance.
summary: Driving behavior monitoring plays a crucial role in managing road safety and decreasing the risk of traffic accidents. Driving behavior is affected by multiple factors like vehicle characteristics, types of roads, traffic, but, most importantly, the pattern of driving of individuals. Current work performs a robust driving pattern analysis by capturing variations in driving patterns. It forms consistent groups by learning compressed representation of time series (Auto Encoded Compact Sequence) using a multi-layer seq-2-seq autoencoder and exploiting hierarchical clustering along with recommending the choice of best distance measure. Consistent groups aid in identifying variations in driving patterns of individuals captured in the dataset. These groups are generated for both train and hidden test data. The consistent groups formed using train data, are exploited for training multiple instances of the classifier. Obtained choice of best distance measure is used to select the best train-test pair of consistent groups. We have experimented on the publicly available UAH-DriveSet dataset considering the signals captured from IMU sensors (accelerometer and gyroscope) for classifying driving behavior. We observe proposed method, significantly outperforms the benchmark performance.
abstract_zh: 驾驶行为监控在管理道路安全和降低交通事故风险方面发挥着至关重要的作用。驾驶行为受到车辆特性、道路类型、交通等多种因素的影响，但最重要的是个人的驾驶模式。当前的工作通过捕获驾驶模式的变化来执行稳健的驾驶模式分析。它通过使用多层 seq-2-seq 自动编码器学习时间序列的压缩表示（自动编码紧凑序列）并利用分层聚类以及推荐最佳距离度量的选择来形成一致的组。一致的组有助于识别数据集中捕获的个人驾驶模式的变化。这些组是为训练数据和隐藏测试数据生成的。使用训练数据形成的一致组用于训练分类器的多个实例。获得的最佳距离测量选择用于选择一致组的最佳训练-测试对。我们在公开的 UAH-DriveSet 数据集上进行了实验，考虑从 IMU 传感器（加速计和陀螺仪）捕获的信号来对驾驶行为进行分类。我们观察到所提出的方法明显优于基准性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于表示学习和群体训练的无监督驾驶行为分析方法，通过压缩时间序列数据并形成一致群体来识别个体驾驶模式差异。
AI.motivation: 驾驶行为监测对提升道路安全至关重要，但现有方法难以有效捕捉个体驾驶模式的细微差异，需通过无监督学习改进群体划分与分类性能。
AI.method: 采用多层seq-2-seq自编码器生成时间序列的压缩表示（Auto Encoded Compact Sequence），结合分层聚类与最优距离度量选择，利用训练数据形成的群体对分类器进行多实例训练，并匹配最佳训练-测试群体对。
AI.result: 在UAH-DriveSet数据集上，基于IMU传感器信号的驾驶行为分类实验表明，所提方法显著优于基准模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过表示学习与群体训练策略，可有效挖掘驾驶行为模式的内在结构，提升无监督场景下的分类准确性。

authors_text: Martin Bauw,Santiago Velasco-Forero,Jesus Angulo,Claude Adnet,Olivier Airiau
title: Near out-of-distribution detection for low-resolution radar micro-Doppler signatures
title_zh: 低分辨率雷达微多普勒特征的近失分布检测
abstract: Near out-of-distribution detection (OODD) aims at discriminating semantically similar data points without the supervision required for classification. This paper puts forward an OODD use case for radar targets detection extensible to other kinds of sensors and detection scenarios. We emphasize the relevance of OODD and its specific supervision requirements for the detection of a multimodal, diverse targets class among other similar radar targets and clutter in real-life critical systems. We propose a comparison of deep and non-deep OODD methods on simulated low-resolution pulse radar micro-Doppler signatures, considering both a spectral and a covariance matrix input representation. The covariance representation aims at estimating whether dedicated second-order processing is appropriate to discriminate signatures. The potential contributions of labeled anomalies in training, self-supervised learning, contrastive learning insights and innovative training losses are discussed, and the impact of training set contamination caused by mislabelling is investigated.
summary: Near out-of-distribution detection (OODD) aims at discriminating semantically similar data points without the supervision required for classification. This paper puts forward an OODD use case for radar targets detection extensible to other kinds of sensors and detection scenarios. We emphasize the relevance of OODD and its specific supervision requirements for the detection of a multimodal, diverse targets class among other similar radar targets and clutter in real-life critical systems. We propose a comparison of deep and non-deep OODD methods on simulated low-resolution pulse radar micro-Doppler signatures, considering both a spectral and a covariance matrix input representation. The covariance representation aims at estimating whether dedicated second-order processing is appropriate to discriminate signatures. The potential contributions of labeled anomalies in training, self-supervised learning, contrastive learning insights and innovative training losses are discussed, and the impact of training set contamination caused by mislabelling is investigated.
abstract_zh: 近分布外检测（OODD）旨在区分语义相似的数据点，而无需分类所需的监督。本文提出了一个可扩展到其他类型传感器和检测场景的雷达目标检测的 OODD 用例。我们强调 OODD 的相关性及其在现实关键系统中检测其他类似雷达目标中的多模式、多样化目标类别和杂波的具体监督要求。我们提出了对模拟低分辨率脉冲雷达微多普勒特征的深度和非深度 OODD 方法的比较，同时考虑频谱和协方差矩阵输入表示。协方差表示旨在估计专用二阶处理是否适合区分签名。讨论了标记异常在训练、自监督学习、对比学习见解和创新训练损失中的潜在贡献，并调查了错误标记引起的训练集污染的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于雷达目标检测的近域分布外检测（OODD）方法，并扩展至其他传感器场景，通过比较深度与非深度方法处理低分辨率雷达微多普勒信号。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法在处理现实系统中多模态、多样化的雷达目标及杂波时存在不足，需一种无需分类监督的OODD方法以提高检测鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于模拟低分辨率脉冲雷达微多普勒信号，比较深度与非深度OODD方法，采用频谱及协方差矩阵输入表示，并探讨标签异常、自监督学习及训练损失的影响。
AI.result: 分析了协方差表示对二阶处理需求的判断能力，验证了标签异常对训练的影响，并比较了不同方法在OODD任务中的性能差异。
AI.conclusion: OODD在雷达检测中具有重要价值，所提方法通过多表示分析和训练策略优化，为复杂场景下的目标检测提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Near out-of-distribution detection for low-resolution radar micro-Doppler signatures 低分辨率雷达微多普勒特征的近失分布检测 Near out-of-distribution detection (OODD) aims at discriminating semantically similar data points without the supervision required for classification. This paper puts forward an OODD use case for radar targets detection extensible to other kinds of sensors and detection scenarios. We emphasize the relevance of OODD and its specific supervision requirements for the detection of a multimodal, diverse targets class among other similar radar targets and clutter in real-life critical systems. We propose a comparison of deep and non-deep OODD methods on simulated low-resolution pulse radar micro-Doppler signatures, considering both a spectral and a covariance matrix input representation. The covariance representation aims at estimating whether dedicated second-order processing is appropriate to discriminate signatures. The potential contributions of labeled anomalies in training, self-supervised learning, contrastive learning insights and innovative training losses are discussed, and the impact of training set contamination caused by mislabelling is investigated. 近分布外检测（OODD）旨在区分语义相似的数据点，而无需分类所需的监督。本文提出了一个可扩展到其他类型传感器和检测场景的雷达目标检测的 OODD 用例。我们强调 OODD 的相关性及其在现实关键系统中检测其他类似雷达目标中的多模式、多样化目标类别和杂波的具体监督要求。我们提出了对模拟低分辨率脉冲雷达微多普勒特征的深度和非深度 OODD 方法的比较，同时考虑频谱和协方差矩阵输入表示。协方差表示旨在估计专用二阶处理是否适合区分签名。讨论了标记异常在训练、自监督学习、对比学习见解和创新训练损失中的潜在贡献，并调查了错误标记引起的训练集污染的影响。 本文提出一种适用于雷达目标检测的近域分布外检测（OODD）方法，并扩展至其他传感器场景，通过比较深度与非深度方法处理低分辨率雷达微多普勒信号。 Martin Bauw,Santiago Velasco-Forero,Jesus Angulo,Claude Adnet,Olivier Airiau eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Minimal Neural Network Models for Permutation Invariant Agents
title_zh: 排列不变代理的最小神经网络模型
abstract: Organisms in nature have evolved to exhibit flexibility in face of changes to the environment and/or to themselves. Artificial neural networks (ANNs) have proven useful for controlling of artificial agents acting in environments. However, most ANN models used for reinforcement learning-type tasks have a rigid structure that does not allow for varying input sizes. Further, they fail catastrophically if inputs are presented in an ordering unseen during optimization. We find that these two ANN inflexibilities can be mitigated and their solutions are simple and highly related. For permutation invariance, no optimized parameters can be tied to a specific index of the input elements. For size invariance, inputs must be projected onto a common space that does not grow with the number of projections. Based on these restrictions, we construct a conceptually simple model that exhibit flexibility most ANNs lack. We demonstrate the model's properties on multiple control problems, and show that it can cope with even very rapid permutations of input indices, as well as changes in input size. Ablation studies show that is possible to achieve these properties with simple feedforward structures, but that it is much easier to optimize recurrent structures.
summary: Organisms in nature have evolved to exhibit flexibility in face of changes to the environment and/or to themselves. Artificial neural networks (ANNs) have proven useful for controlling of artificial agents acting in environments. However, most ANN models used for reinforcement learning-type tasks have a rigid structure that does not allow for varying input sizes. Further, they fail catastrophically if inputs are presented in an ordering unseen during optimization. We find that these two ANN inflexibilities can be mitigated and their solutions are simple and highly related. For permutation invariance, no optimized parameters can be tied to a specific index of the input elements. For size invariance, inputs must be projected onto a common space that does not grow with the number of projections. Based on these restrictions, we construct a conceptually simple model that exhibit flexibility most ANNs lack. We demonstrate the model's properties on multiple control problems, and show that it can cope with even very rapid permutations of input indices, as well as changes in input size. Ablation studies show that is possible to achieve these properties with simple feedforward structures, but that it is much easier to optimize recurrent structures.
abstract_zh: 自然界的生物体已经进化到在面对环境和/或自身变化时表现出灵活性。人工神经网络 (ANN) 已被证明对于控制在环境中作用的人工代理非常有用。然而，大多数用于强化学习类型任务的 ANN 模型都具有严格的结构，不允许改变输入大小。此外，如果输入以优化过程中未见的顺序呈现，它们会发生灾难性的失败。我们发现这两个人工神经网络的不灵活性可以得到缓解，而且它们的解决方案简单且高度相关。对于排列不变性，没有优化参数可以与输入元素的特定索引相关联。为了保持大小不变​​性，输入必须投影到一个不随投影数量增长的公共空间上。基于这些限制，我们构建了一个概念上简单的模型，该模型表现出大多数人工神经网络所缺乏的灵活性。我们证明了该模型在多个控制问题上的属性，并表明它甚至可以应对输入索引的快速排列以及输入大小的变化。消融研究表明，可以通过简单的前馈结构来实现这些特性，但优化循环结构要容易得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种概念简单的神经网络模型，使智能体在面对输入顺序变化和输入规模变化时保持灵活性。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在处理输入顺序变化或规模变化时表现脆弱，缺乏生物体的环境适应性，需设计更灵活的模型结构。
AI.method: 通过解耦参数与输入索引的绑定关系，并将输入投影到固定维度的共享空间，构建具有排列不变性和规模不变性的神经网络模型。
AI.result: 模型在多个控制任务中验证了其对快速输入排列变化和规模变化的鲁棒性，且实验表明循环结构比前馈结构更易优化。
AI.conclusion: 简单神经网络可通过排列/规模不变性设计实现灵活性，循环结构在优化效率上具有显著优势。

authors_text: Wei Fan,Kunpeng Liu,Hao Liu,Hengshu Zhu,Hui Xiong,Yanjie Fu
title: Feature and Instance Joint Selection: A Reinforcement Learning Perspective
title_zh: 特征和实例联合选择：强化学习的视角
abstract: Feature selection and instance selection are two important techniques of data processing. However, such selections have mostly been studied separately, while existing work towards the joint selection conducts feature/instance selection coarsely; thus neglecting the latent fine-grained interaction between feature space and instance space. To address this challenge, we propose a reinforcement learning solution to accomplish the joint selection task and simultaneously capture the interaction between the selection of each feature and each instance. In particular, a sequential-scanning mechanism is designed as action strategy of agents, and a collaborative-changing environment is used to enhance agent collaboration. In addition, an interactive paradigm introduces prior selection knowledge to help agents for more efficient exploration. Finally, extensive experiments on real-world datasets have demonstrated improved performances.
summary: Feature selection and instance selection are two important techniques of data processing. However, such selections have mostly been studied separately, while existing work towards the joint selection conducts feature/instance selection coarsely; thus neglecting the latent fine-grained interaction between feature space and instance space. To address this challenge, we propose a reinforcement learning solution to accomplish the joint selection task and simultaneously capture the interaction between the selection of each feature and each instance. In particular, a sequential-scanning mechanism is designed as action strategy of agents, and a collaborative-changing environment is used to enhance agent collaboration. In addition, an interactive paradigm introduces prior selection knowledge to help agents for more efficient exploration. Finally, extensive experiments on real-world datasets have demonstrated improved performances.
abstract_zh: 特征选择和实例选择是数据处理的两项重要技术。然而，此类选择大多是单独研究的，而现有的联合选择工作则粗略地进行特征/实例选择；从而忽略了特征空间和实例空间之间潜在的细粒度交互。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种强化学习解决方案来完成联合选择任务，并同时捕获每个特征和每个实例的选择之间的交互。特别是，设计了顺序扫描机制作为智能体的动作策略，并使用协作改变环境来增强智能体协作。此外，交互范式引入了先验选择知识，以帮助智能体进行更有效的探索。最后，对现实数据集的广泛实验证明了性能的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的特征与实例联合选择方法，通过建模特征空间与实例空间的细粒度交互提升数据选择效果。
AI.motivation: 现有特征选择与实例选择方法多独立处理或仅进行粗粒度联合选择，未能有效捕捉特征空间与实例空间间的潜在细粒度交互关系。
AI.method: 设计顺序扫描机制作为智能体动作策略，构建协作变化环境增强智能体合作，并引入交互范式注入先验选择知识以提升探索效率。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上的实验验证了该方法在联合选择任务中的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习框架能有效建模特征-实例交互关系，所提方法在联合选择任务中展现出优于现有方法的性能。

ai_content_json.result: 在多个真实数据集上的实验验证了该方法在联合选择任务中的性能提升。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的特征与实例联合选择方法，通过建模特征空间与实例空间的细粒度交互提升数据选择效果。

method: 设计顺序扫描机制作为智能体动作策略，构建协作变化环境增强智能体合作，并引入交互范式注入先验选择知识以提升探索效率。

search_text: Feature and Instance Joint Selection: A Reinforcement Learning Perspective 特征和实例联合选择：强化学习的视角 Feature selection and instance selection are two important techniques of data processing. However, such selections have mostly been studied separately, while existing work towards the joint selection conducts feature/instance selection coarsely; thus neglecting the latent fine-grained interaction between feature space and instance space. To address this challenge, we propose a reinforcement learning solution to accomplish the joint selection task and simultaneously capture the interaction between the selection of each feature and each instance. In particular, a sequential-scanning mechanism is designed as action strategy of agents, and a collaborative-changing environment is used to enhance agent collaboration. In addition, an interactive paradigm introduces prior selection knowledge to help agents for more efficient exploration. Finally, extensive experiments on real-world datasets have demonstrated improved performances. 特征选择和实例选择是数据处理的两项重要技术。然而，此类选择大多是单独研究的，而现有的联合选择工作则粗略地进行特征/实例选择；从而忽略了特征空间和实例空间之间潜在的细粒度交互。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种强化学习解决方案来完成联合选择任务，并同时捕获每个特征和每个实例的选择之间的交互。特别是，设计了顺序扫描机制作为智能体的动作策略，并使用协作改变环境来增强智能体协作。此外，交互范式引入了先验选择知识，以帮助智能体进行更有效的探索。最后，对现实数据集的广泛实验证明了性能的提高。 本文提出一种基于强化学习的特征与实例联合选择方法，通过建模特征空间与实例空间的细粒度交互提升数据选择效果。 Wei Fan,Kunpeng Liu,Hao Liu,Hengshu Zhu,Hui Xiong,Yanjie Fu cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Primal-Dual UNet for Sparse View Cone Beam Computed Tomography Volume Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于稀疏视图锥形束计算机断层扫描体积重建的原始-双UNet
comment: 3 pages, 1 figure, accepted short paper submission at MIDL 2022
comments: 3 pages, 1 figure, accepted short paper submission at MIDL 2022
abstract: In this paper, the Primal-Dual UNet for sparse view CT reconstruction is modified to be applicable to cone beam projections and perform reconstructions of entire volumes instead of slices. Experiments show that the PSNR of the proposed method is increased by 10dB compared to the direct FDK reconstruction and almost 3dB compared to the modified original Primal-Dual Network when using only 23 projections. The presented network is not optimized wrt. memory consumption or hyperparameters but merely serves as a proof of concept and is limited to low resolution projections and volumes.
summary: In this paper, the Primal-Dual UNet for sparse view CT reconstruction is modified to be applicable to cone beam projections and perform reconstructions of entire volumes instead of slices. Experiments show that the PSNR of the proposed method is increased by 10dB compared to the direct FDK reconstruction and almost 3dB compared to the modified original Primal-Dual Network when using only 23 projections. The presented network is not optimized wrt. memory consumption or hyperparameters but merely serves as a proof of concept and is limited to low resolution projections and volumes.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，用于稀疏视图 CT 重建的 Primal-Dual UNet 被修改为适用于锥束投影并执行整个体积而不是切片的重建。实验表明，当仅使用23个投影时，该方法的PSNR比直接FDK重建提高了10dB，与修改后的原始原始对偶网络相比提高了近3dB。所提出的网络并未优化。内存消耗或超参数，但仅用作概念证明，并且仅限于低分辨率投影和体积。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Primal-Dual UNet的稀疏视角锥束CT体积重建方法，通过改进网络结构实现整体体积重建而非单层切片。
AI.motivation: 解决稀疏视角下锥束CT重建质量差的问题，传统FDK算法在投影数量不足时易产生伪影，现有网络多局限于单层切片重建。
AI.method: 修改原始Primal-Dual UNet结构以适应锥束投影特性，扩展其重建范围至三维体积，但未优化内存占用与超参数配置。
AI.result: 使用23个投影时，PSNR较FDK提升10dB，较改进版原始网络提升3dB，但受限于低分辨率投影与体积。
AI.conclusion: 验证了Primal-Dual UNet在稀疏视角锥束CT重建中的可行性，但存在内存效率与参数优化不足的局限性。

title: Simple Contrastive Graph Clustering
title_zh: 简单对比图聚类
abstract: Contrastive learning has recently attracted plenty of attention in deep graph clustering for its promising performance. However, complicated data augmentations and time-consuming graph convolutional operation undermine the efficiency of these methods. To solve this problem, we propose a Simple Contrastive Graph Clustering (SCGC) algorithm to improve the existing methods from the perspectives of network architecture, data augmentation, and objective function. As to the architecture, our network includes two main parts, i.e., pre-processing and network backbone. A simple low-pass denoising operation conducts neighbor information aggregation as an independent pre-processing, and only two multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) are included as the backbone. For data augmentation, instead of introducing complex operations over graphs, we construct two augmented views of the same vertex by designing parameter un-shared siamese encoders and corrupting the node embeddings directly. Finally, as to the objective function, to further improve the clustering performance, a novel cross-view structural consistency objective function is designed to enhance the discriminative capability of the learned network. Extensive experimental results on seven benchmark datasets validate our proposed algorithm's effectiveness and superiority. Significantly, our algorithm outperforms the recent contrastive deep clustering competitors with at least seven times speedup on average.
summary: Contrastive learning has recently attracted plenty of attention in deep graph clustering for its promising performance. However, complicated data augmentations and time-consuming graph convolutional operation undermine the efficiency of these methods. To solve this problem, we propose a Simple Contrastive Graph Clustering (SCGC) algorithm to improve the existing methods from the perspectives of network architecture, data augmentation, and objective function. As to the architecture, our network includes two main parts, i.e., pre-processing and network backbone. A simple low-pass denoising operation conducts neighbor information aggregation as an independent pre-processing, and only two multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) are included as the backbone. For data augmentation, instead of introducing complex operations over graphs, we construct two augmented views of the same vertex by designing parameter un-shared siamese encoders and corrupting the node embeddings directly. Finally, as to the objective function, to further improve the clustering performance, a novel cross-view structural consistency objective function is designed to enhance the discriminative capability of the learned network. Extensive experimental results on seven benchmark datasets validate our proposed algorithm's effectiveness and superiority. Significantly, our algorithm outperforms the recent contrastive deep clustering competitors with at least seven times speedup on average.
abstract_zh: 对比学习最近因其良好的性能而在深度图聚类领域引起了广泛关注。然而，复杂的数据增强和耗时的图卷积操作降低了这些方法的效率。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单对比图聚类（SCGC）算法，从网络架构、数据增强和目标函数的角度改进现有方法。就架构而言，我们的网络包括两个主要部分，即预处理和网络主干。简单的低通去噪操作将邻居信息聚合作为独立的预处理，并且仅包含两个多层感知器（MLP）作为主干。对于数据增强，我们没有在图上引入复杂的操作，而是通过设计参数非共享暹罗编码器并直接破坏节点嵌入来构造同一顶点的两个增强视图。最后，在目标函数方面，为了进一步提高聚类性能，设计了一种新颖的跨视图结构一致性目标函数，以增强学习网络的判别能力。在七个基准数据集上的广泛实验结果验证了我们提出的算法的有效性和优越性。值得注意的是，我们的算法优于最近的深度聚类竞争对手，平均加速至少七倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SCGC的简单对比图聚类算法，旨在通过简化网络结构和数据增强策略提高图聚类的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法在图聚类中存在数据增强复杂和图卷积运算耗时的问题，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含低通去噪预处理和双MLP主干的简化网络架构，采用参数不共享的暹罗编码器直接破坏节点嵌入生成增强视图，并引入跨视图结构一致性目标函数。
AI.result: 在七个基准数据集上验证了SCGC的有效性，平均速度较最新对比聚类方法提升7倍以上。
AI.conclusion: SCGC通过架构简化和创新目标函数，在保持性能的同时显著提升了图聚类效率，为该领域提供了更优解决方案。

title: Privacy Enhancement for Cloud-Based Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: 基于云的少样本学习的隐私增强
comment: 14 pages, 13 figures, 3 tables. Preprint. Accepted in IEEE WCCI 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN)
comments: 14 pages, 13 figures, 3 tables. Preprint. Accepted in IEEE WCCI 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN)
abstract: Requiring less data for accurate models, few-shot learning has shown robustness and generality in many application domains. However, deploying few-shot models in untrusted environments may inflict privacy concerns, e.g., attacks or adversaries that may breach the privacy of user-supplied data. This paper studies the privacy enhancement for the few-shot learning in an untrusted environment, e.g., the cloud, by establishing a novel privacy-preserved embedding space that preserves the privacy of data and maintains the accuracy of the model. We examine the impact of various image privacy methods such as blurring, pixelization, Gaussian noise, and differentially private pixelization (DP-Pix) on few-shot image classification and propose a method that learns privacy-preserved representation through the joint loss. The empirical results show how privacy-performance trade-off can be negotiated for privacy-enhanced few-shot learning.
summary: Requiring less data for accurate models, few-shot learning has shown robustness and generality in many application domains. However, deploying few-shot models in untrusted environments may inflict privacy concerns, e.g., attacks or adversaries that may breach the privacy of user-supplied data. This paper studies the privacy enhancement for the few-shot learning in an untrusted environment, e.g., the cloud, by establishing a novel privacy-preserved embedding space that preserves the privacy of data and maintains the accuracy of the model. We examine the impact of various image privacy methods such as blurring, pixelization, Gaussian noise, and differentially private pixelization (DP-Pix) on few-shot image classification and propose a method that learns privacy-preserved representation through the joint loss. The empirical results show how privacy-performance trade-off can be negotiated for privacy-enhanced few-shot learning.
abstract_zh: 精确模型所需的数据较少，小样本学习在许多应用领域都表现出了鲁棒性和通用性。然而，在不受信任的环境中部署小样本模型可能会带来隐私问题，例如，攻击或对手可能会侵犯用户提供的数据的隐私。本文通过建立一种新颖的隐私保护嵌入空间来研究云等不可信环境中小样本学习的隐私增强，该空间可以保护数据的隐私并保持模型的准确性。我们研究了各种图像隐私方法（例如模糊、像素化、高斯噪声和差分隐私像素化（DP-Pix））对少镜头图像分类的影响，并提出了一种通过联合损失学习隐私保护表示的方法。实证结果表明如何为隐私增强的小样本学习协商隐私性能权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过构建隐私保护嵌入空间，在云环境中增强少样本学习的隐私性，同时保持模型准确性。
AI.motivation: 在不信任的云环境中部署少样本学习模型可能面临用户数据隐私泄露风险，需解决隐私保护与模型性能的平衡问题。
AI.method: 通过构建隐私保护嵌入空间，结合多种图像隐私方法（如模糊、像素化、高斯噪声及差分隐私像素化），并利用联合损失函数学习隐私保护的特征表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在隐私增强与模型性能之间取得了有效平衡，验证了隐私保护的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法为云环境中的少样本学习提供了隐私保护方案，但在实际应用中需进一步优化隐私与性能的平衡。

search_text: Privacy Enhancement for Cloud-Based Few-Shot Learning 基于云的少样本学习的隐私增强 Requiring less data for accurate models, few-shot learning has shown robustness and generality in many application domains. However, deploying few-shot models in untrusted environments may inflict privacy concerns, e.g., attacks or adversaries that may breach the privacy of user-supplied data. This paper studies the privacy enhancement for the few-shot learning in an untrusted environment, e.g., the cloud, by establishing a novel privacy-preserved embedding space that preserves the privacy of data and maintains the accuracy of the model. We examine the impact of various image privacy methods such as blurring, pixelization, Gaussian noise, and differentially private pixelization (DP-Pix) on few-shot image classification and propose a method that learns privacy-preserved representation through the joint loss. The empirical results show how privacy-performance trade-off can be negotiated for privacy-enhanced few-shot learning. 精确模型所需的数据较少，小样本学习在许多应用领域都表现出了鲁棒性和通用性。然而，在不受信任的环境中部署小样本模型可能会带来隐私问题，例如，攻击或对手可能会侵犯用户提供的数据的隐私。本文通过建立一种新颖的隐私保护嵌入空间来研究云等不可信环境中小样本学习的隐私增强，该空间可以保护数据的隐私并保持模型的准确性。我们研究了各种图像隐私方法（例如模糊、像素化、高斯噪声和差分隐私像素化（DP-Pix））对少镜头图像分类的影响，并提出了一种通过联合损失学习隐私保护表示的方法。实证结果表明如何为隐私增强的小样本学习协商隐私性能权衡。 本文旨在通过构建隐私保护嵌入空间，在云环境中增强少样本学习的隐私性，同时保持模型准确性。 Archit Parnami,Muhammad Usama,Liyue Fan,Minwoo Lee cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Witold Andrzejewski,Jedrzej Potoniec,Maciej Drozdowski,Jerzy Stefanowski,Robert Wrembel,Paweł Stapf
title: Quality versus speed in energy demand prediction for district heating systems
title_zh: 区域供热系统能源需求预测的质量与速度
abstract: In this paper, we consider energy demand prediction in district heating systems. Effective energy demand prediction is essential in combined heat power systems when offering electrical energy in competitive electricity markets. To address this problem, we propose two sets of algorithms: (1) a novel extension to the algorithm proposed by E. Dotzauer and (2) an autoregressive predictor based on hour-of-week adjusted linear regression on moving averages of energy consumption. These two methods are compared against state-of-the-art artificial neural networks. Energy demand predictor algorithms have various computational costs and prediction quality. While prediction quality is a widely used measure of predictor superiority, computational costs are less frequently analyzed and their impact is not so extensively studied. When predictor algorithms are constantly updated using new data, some computationally expensive forecasting methods may become inapplicable. The computational costs can be split into training and execution parts. The execution part is the cost paid when the already trained algorithm is applied to predict something. In this paper, we evaluate the above methods with respect to the quality and computational costs, both in the training and in the execution. The comparison is conducted on a real-world dataset from a district heating system in the northwest part of Poland.

Effective energy demand prediction is essential in combined heat power systems when offering electrical energy in competitive electricity markets. To address this problem, we propose two sets of algorithms: (1) a novel extension to the algorithm proposed by E. Dotzauer and (2) an autoregressive predictor based on hour-of-week adjusted linear regression on moving averages of energy consumption. These two methods are compared against state-of-the-art artificial neural networks. Energy demand predictor algorithms have various computational costs and prediction quality. While prediction quality is a widely used measure of predictor superiority, computational costs are less frequently analyzed and their impact is not so extensively studied. When predictor algorithms are constantly updated using new data, some computationally expensive forecasting methods may become inapplicable. In this paper, we evaluate the above methods with respect to the quality and computational costs, both in the training and in the execution. abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑区域供热系统的能源需求预测。在竞争激烈的电力市场中提供电能时，有效的能源需求预测对于热电联产系统至关重要。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了两组算法：（1）E. Dotzauer 提出的算法的新颖扩展，以及（2）基于能源消耗移动平均值按周调整线性回归的自回归预测器。将这两种方法与最先进的人工神经网络进行比较。能源需求预测算法具有不同的计算成本和预测质量。虽然预测质量是预测变量优越性的广泛使用的衡量标准，但计算成本的分析较少，并且其影响也没有得到广泛研究。当使用新数据不断更新预测算法时，一些计算成本高昂的预测方法可能变得不适用。计算成本可以分为训练和执行部分。执行部分是应用已经训练好的算法来预测某些事物时所付出的成本。在本文中，我们评估了上述方法在训练和执行中的质量和计算成本。该比较是在波兰西北部区域供热系统的真实数据集上进行的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究区域能源需求预测中的质量与速度问题，提出两种算法并对比其与神经网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 能源需求预测需兼顾预测精度与计算成本，但现有研究较少分析计算成本对实时应用的影响。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：Dotzauer算法改进版与基于小时-周调整的线性回归自回归预测器，并与神经网络对比，评估训练和执行阶段的计算成本。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在保证预测质量的同时，计算成本显著低于神经网络，适合频繁更新场景。
AI.conclusion: 需综合考虑预测精度与计算效率，所提方法为区域能源系统提供了更实用的预测方案。

title: A Safety Assurable Human-Inspired Perception Architecture
title_zh: 安全可靠的人性化感知架构
abstract: Although artificial intelligence-based perception (AIP) using deep neural networks (DNN) has achieved near human level performance, its well-known limitations are obstacles to the safety assurance needed in autonomous applications. These include vulnerability to adversarial inputs, inability to handle novel inputs and non-interpretability. While research in addressing these limitations is active, in this paper, we argue that a fundamentally different approach is needed to address them. Inspired by dual process models of human cognition, where Type 1 thinking is fast and non-conscious while Type 2 thinking is slow and based on conscious reasoning, we propose a dual process architecture for safe AIP. We review research on how humans address the simplest non-trivial perception problem, image classification, and sketch a corresponding AIP architecture for this task. We argue that this architecture can provide a systematic way of addressing the limitations of AIP using DNNs and an approach to assurance of human-level performance and beyond. We conclude by discussing what components of the architecture may already be addressed by existing work and what remains future work.
summary: Although artificial intelligence-based perception (AIP) using deep neural networks (DNN) has achieved near human level performance, its well-known limitations are obstacles to the safety assurance needed in autonomous applications. These include vulnerability to adversarial inputs, inability to handle novel inputs and non-interpretability. While research in addressing these limitations is active, in this paper, we argue that a fundamentally different approach is needed to address them. Inspired by dual process models of human cognition, where Type 1 thinking is fast and non-conscious while Type 2 thinking is slow and based on conscious reasoning, we propose a dual process architecture for safe AIP. We review research on how humans address the simplest non-trivial perception problem, image classification, and sketch a corresponding AIP architecture for this task. We argue that this architecture can provide a systematic way of addressing the limitations of AIP using DNNs and an approach to assurance of human-level performance and beyond. We conclude by discussing what components of the architecture may already be addressed by existing work and what remains future work.
abstract_zh: 尽管使用深度神经网络 (DNN) 的基于人工智能的感知 (AIP) 已经实现了接近人类水平的性能，但其众所周知的局限性阻碍了自主应用所需的安全保证。这些包括对抗性输入的脆弱性、无法处理新的输入和不可解释性。虽然解决这些局限性的研究很活跃，但在本文中，我们认为需要一种根本不同的方法来解决这些问题。受人类认知双过程模型的启发，其中第 1 类思维是快速且无意识的，而第 2 类思维是缓慢且基于有意识推理的，我们提出了一种用于安全 AIP 的双过程架构。我们回顾了人类如何解决最简单的非平凡感知问题、图像分类的研究，并为该任务绘制了相应的 AIP 架构。我们认为，这种架构可以提供一种系统的方法来解决使用 DNN 的 AIP 的局限性，并提供一种保证人类水平及更高性能的方法。最后，我们讨论现有工作可能已经解决了架构的哪些组件以及未来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受人类认知双过程模型启发的感知架构，旨在解决深度神经网络在安全关键应用中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度神经网络的感知系统存在对抗性脆弱性、无法处理新输入及不可解释性问题，阻碍其在自动驾驶等安全场景的应用。
AI.method: 借鉴人类Type 1（快速非意识）与Type 2（缓慢有意识）双过程认知模型，设计融合快速感知与显式推理的混合架构，针对图像分类任务构建可验证的感知系统。
AI.result: 该架构为解决AIP局限性提供系统性方案，可实现超越人类水平的安全性保障，同时指出现有技术已部分支持该架构的实现。
AI.conclusion: 双过程架构为安全可验证的人工智能感知提供了新路径，需进一步完善其组件实现与理论验证。

method: 借鉴人类Type 1（快速非意识）与Type 2（缓慢有意识）双过程认知模型，设计融合快速感知与显式推理的混合架构，针对图像分类任务构建可验证的感知系统。
result: 该架构为解决AIP局限性提供系统性方案，可实现超越人类水平的安全性保障，同时指出现有技术已部分支持该架构的实现。
conclusion: 双过程架构为安全可验证的人工智能感知提供了新路径，需进一步完善其组件实现与理论验证。
search_text: A Safety Assurable Human-Inspired Perception Architecture 安全可靠的人性化感知架构 Although artificial intelligence-based perception (AIP) using deep neural networks (DNN) has achieved near human level performance, its well-known limitations are obstacles to the safety assurance needed in autonomous applications. These include vulnerability to adversarial inputs, inability to handle novel inputs and non-interpretability. While research in addressing these limitations is active, in this paper, we argue that a fundamentally different approach is needed to address them. Inspired by dual process models of human cognition, where Type 1 thinking is fast and non-conscious while Type 2 thinking is slow and based on conscious reasoning, we propose a dual process architecture for safe AIP. We review research on how humans address the simplest non-trivial perception problem, image classification, and sketch a corresponding AIP architecture for this task. We argue that this architecture can provide a systematic way of addressing the limitations of AIP using DNNs and an approach to assurance of human-level performance and beyond. We conclude by discussing what components of the architecture may already be addressed by existing work and what remains future work. 尽管使用深度神经网络 (DNN) 的基于人工智能的感知 (AIP) 已经实现了接近人类水平的性能，但其众所周知的局限性阻碍了自主应用所需的安全保证。这些包括对抗性输入的脆弱性、无法处理新的输入和不可解释性。虽然解决这些局限性的研究很活跃，但在本文中，我们认为需要一种根本不同的方法来解决这些问题。受人类认知双过程模型的启发，其中第 1 类思维是快速且无意识的，而第 2 类思维是缓慢且基于有意识推理的，我们提出了一种用于安全 AIP 的双过程架构。我们回顾了人类如何解决最简单的非平凡感知问题、图像分类的研究，并为该任务绘制了相应的 AIP 架构。我们认为，这种架构可以提供一种系统的方法来解决使用 DNN 的 AIP 的局限性，并提供一种保证人类水平及更高性能的方法。最后，我们讨论现有工作可能已经解决了架构的哪些组件以及未来的工作。 本文提出一种受人类认知双过程模型启发的感知架构，旨在解决深度神经网络在安全关键应用中的局限性。 Rick Salay,Krzysztof Czarnecki cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Xiangheng He,Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Alexander Kathan,Manuel Milling,Tianhao Yan,Srividya Tirunellai Rajamani,Ludwig Küster,Mathias Harrer,Elena Heber,Inga Grossmann,David D. Ebert,Björn W. Schuller
title: Depression Diagnosis and Forecast based on Mobile Phone Sensor Data
title_zh: 基于手机传感器数据的抑郁症诊断与预测
abstract: Previous studies have shown the correlation between sensor data collected from mobile phones and human depression states. Compared to the traditional self-assessment questionnaires, the passive data collected from mobile phones is easier to access and less time-consuming. In particular, passive mobile phone data can be collected on a flexible time interval, thus detecting moment-by-moment psychological changes and helping achieve earlier interventions. Moreover, while previous studies mainly focused on depression diagnosis using mobile phone data, depression forecasting has not received sufficient attention. In this work, we extract four types of passive features from mobile phone data, including phone call, phone usage, user activity, and GPS features. We implement a long short-term memory (LSTM) network in a subject-independent 10-fold cross-validation setup to model both a diagnostic and a forecasting tasks. Experimental results show that the forecasting task achieves comparable results with the diagnostic task, which indicates the possibility of forecasting depression from mobile phone sensor data. Our model achieves an accuracy of 77.0 % for major depression forecasting (binary), an accuracy of 53.7 % for depression severity forecasting (5 classes), and a best RMSE score of 4.094 (PHQ-9, range from 0 to 27).
summary: Previous studies have shown the correlation between sensor data collected from mobile phones and human depression states. Compared to the traditional self-assessment questionnaires, the passive data collected from mobile phones is easier to access and less time-consuming. In particular, passive mobile phone data can be collected on a flexible time interval, thus detecting moment-by-moment psychological changes and helping achieve earlier interventions. Moreover, while previous studies mainly focused on depression diagnosis using mobile phone data, depression forecasting has not received sufficient attention. In this work, we extract four types of passive features from mobile phone data, including phone call, phone usage, user activity, and GPS features. We implement a long short-term memory (LSTM) network in a subject-independent 10-fold cross-validation setup to model both a diagnostic and a forecasting tasks. Experimental results show that the forecasting task achieves comparable results with the diagnostic task, which indicates the possibility of forecasting depression from mobile phone sensor data. Our model achieves an accuracy of 77.0 % for major depression forecasting (binary), an accuracy of 53.7 % for depression severity forecasting (5 classes), and a best RMSE score of 4.094 (PHQ-9, range from 0 to 27).
abstract_zh: 先前的研究表明，从手机收集的传感器数据与人类抑郁状态之间存在相关性。与传统的自我评估问卷相比，通过手机收集的被动数据更容易获取且耗时更少。特别是，可以在灵活的时间间隔内收集被动手机数据，从而检测每时每刻的心理变化，有助于实现早期干预。此外，虽然之前的研究主要集中在利用手机数据进行抑郁症诊断，但抑郁症预测并未受到足够的重视。在这项工作中，我们从手机数据中提取了四种类型的被动特征，包括电话呼叫、电话使用、用户活动和 GPS 特征。我们在独立于主题的 10 倍交叉验证设置中实现了长短期记忆 (LSTM) 网络，以对诊断和预测任务进行建模。实验结果表明，预测任务取得了与诊断任务相当的结果，这表明从手机传感器数据预测抑郁症的可能性。我们的模型的重度抑郁症预测（二元）准确率为 77.0%，抑郁症严重程度预测（5 级）准确率为 53.7%，最佳 RMSE 得分为 4.094（PHQ-9，范围从 0 到 27）。

AI.tldr: 本文基于手机传感器数据进行抑郁诊断与预测，提取四类被动特征并采用LSTM模型实现任务建模。
AI.motivation: 传统自评问卷存在耗时且难以捕捉即时心理变化的问题，而手机传感器数据可灵活采集且能实现抑郁状态的早期干预。现有研究多聚焦诊断，缺乏对抑郁预测的探索。
AI.method: 提取通话、使用习惯、用户活动及GPS四类特征，采用LSTM网络在跨被试10折交叉验证框架下同时建模诊断与预测任务。
AI.result: 二分类重大抑郁预测准确率77.0%，五级严重程度预测准确率53.7%，PHQ-9评分预测RMSE为4.094。
AI.conclusion: 手机传感器数据可有效预测抑郁状态，为早期干预提供新途径，模型性能验证了预测任务的可行性。

authors_text: Andrea M. Storås,Anders Åsberg,Pål Halvorsen,Michael A. Riegler,Inga Strümke
title: Predicting tacrolimus exposure in kidney transplanted patients using machine learning
title_zh: 使用机器学习预测肾移植患者的他克莫司暴露量
abstract: Tacrolimus is one of the cornerstone immunosuppressive drugs in most transplantation centers worldwide following solid organ transplantation. Therapeutic drug monitoring of tacrolimus is necessary in order to avoid rejection of the transplanted organ or severe side effects. However, finding the right dose for a given patient is challenging, even for experienced clinicians. Consequently, a tool that can accurately estimate the drug exposure for individual dose adaptions would be of high clinical value. In this work, we propose a new technique using machine learning to estimate the tacrolimus exposure in kidney transplant recipients. Our models achieve predictive errors that are at the same level as an established population pharmacokinetic model, but are faster to develop and require less knowledge about the pharmacokinetic properties of the drug.
summary: Tacrolimus is one of the cornerstone immunosuppressive drugs in most transplantation centers worldwide following solid organ transplantation. Therapeutic drug monitoring of tacrolimus is necessary in order to avoid rejection of the transplanted organ or severe side effects. However, finding the right dose for a given patient is challenging, even for experienced clinicians. Consequently, a tool that can accurately estimate the drug exposure for individual dose adaptions would be of high clinical value. In this work, we propose a new technique using machine learning to estimate the tacrolimus exposure in kidney transplant recipients. Our models achieve predictive errors that are at the same level as an established population pharmacokinetic model, but are faster to develop and require less knowledge about the pharmacokinetic properties of the drug.
abstract_zh: 他克莫司是全球大多数移植中心实体器官移植后的基础免疫抑制药物之一。为了避免移植器官的排斥或严重的副作用，有必要对他克莫司的治疗药物进行监测。然而，即使对于经验丰富的临床医生来说，为特定患者找到合适的剂量也具有挑战性。因此，能够准确估计个体剂量调整的药物暴露量的工具将具有很高的临床价值。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用机器学习来估计肾移植受者中他克莫司暴露量的新技术。我们的模型实现的预测误差与已建立的群体药代动力学模型处于同一水平，但开发速度更快，并且需要更少的关于药物药代动力学特性的知识。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出使用机器学习方法预测肾移植患者他克莫司药物暴露量，以辅助个体化剂量调整。
AI.motivation: 他克莫司剂量调整依赖经验且存在挑战，现有药代动力学模型虽有效但开发复杂且需专业知识，需更高效工具。
AI.method: 采用机器学习技术构建预测模型，利用患者数据估计他克莫司暴露量，无需深入药代动力学知识。
AI.result: 模型预测误差与传统药代动力学模型相当，但开发速度更快且对药代知识依赖更低。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习方法为他克莫司剂量个体化调整提供了快速准确的临床工具，具有应用价值。

authors_text: Di Huang,Rui Zhang,Xing Hu,Xishan Zhang,Pengwei Jin,Nan Li,Zidong Du,Qi Guo,Yunji Chen
title: Neural Program Synthesis with Query
title_zh: 带查询的神经程序综合
abstract: Aiming to find a program satisfying the user intent given input-output examples, program synthesis has attracted increasing interest in the area of machine learning. Despite the promising performance of existing methods, most of their success comes from the privileged information of well-designed input-output examples. However, providing such input-output examples is unrealistic because it requires the users to have the ability to describe the underlying program with a few input-output examples under the training distribution. In this work, we propose a query-based framework that trains a query neural network to generate informative input-output examples automatically and interactively from a large query space. The quality of the query depends on the amount of the mutual information between the query and the corresponding program, which can guide the optimization of the query framework. To estimate the mutual information more accurately, we introduce the functional space (F-space) which models the relevance between the input-output examples and the programs in a differentiable way. We evaluate the effectiveness and generalization of the proposed query-based framework on the Karel task and the list processing task. Experimental results show that the query-based framework can generate informative input-output examples which achieve and even outperform well-designed input-output examples.
summary: Aiming to find a program satisfying the user intent given input-output examples, program synthesis has attracted increasing interest in the area of machine learning. Despite the promising performance of existing methods, most of their success comes from the privileged information of well-designed input-output examples. However, providing such input-output examples is unrealistic because it requires the users to have the ability to describe the underlying program with a few input-output examples under the training distribution. In this work, we propose a query-based framework that trains a query neural network to generate informative input-output examples automatically and interactively from a large query space. The quality of the query depends on the amount of the mutual information between the query and the corresponding program, which can guide the optimization of the query framework. To estimate the mutual information more accurately, we introduce the functional space (F-space) which models the relevance between the input-output examples and the programs in a differentiable way. We evaluate the effectiveness and generalization of the proposed query-based framework on the Karel task and the list processing task. Experimental results show that the query-based framework can generate informative input-output examples which achieve and even outperform well-designed input-output examples.
abstract_zh: 为了在给定输入输出示例的情况下找到满足用户意图的程序，程序合成引起了机器学习领域越来越多的兴趣。尽管现有方法的性能很有希望，但它们的大部分成功都来自精心设计的输入输出示例的特权信息。然而，提供这样的输入输出示例是不现实的，因为它要求用户有能力在训练分布下用一些输入输出示例来描述底层程序。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于查询的框架，该框架训练查询神经网络以从大型查询空间自动且交互式地生成信息丰富的输入输出示例。查询的质量取决于查询与相应程序之间的互信息量，这可以指导查询框架的优化。为了更准确地估计互信息，我们引入了函数空间（F-空间），它以可微分的方式对输入输出示例和程序之间的相关性进行建模。我们评估了所提出的基于查询的框架在卡雷尔任务和列表处理任务上的有效性和泛化性。实验结果表明，基于查询的框架可以生成信息丰富的输入输出示例，其效果甚至优于精心设计的输入输出示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于查询的神经程序合成框架，通过自动生成高质量的输入输出示例来减少对人工设计示例的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有程序合成方法依赖用户提供的精心设计的输入输出示例，但实际中用户难以准确描述程序意图，导致方法实用性受限。
AI.method: 构建查询神经网络从大规模查询空间中交互式生成示例，通过互信息度量查询质量，并引入可微分的函数空间（F-space）建模示例与程序的相关性。
AI.result: 在Karel任务和列表处理任务中，该框架生成的示例在效果上达到甚至超越人工设计的示例。
AI.conclusion: 基于查询的框架有效解决了程序合成对人工示例的依赖问题，展示了自动示例生成的潜力和泛化能力。

title: Impact of Learning Rate on Noise Resistant Property of Deep Learning Models
title_zh: 学习率对深度学习模型抗噪性能的影响
abstract: The interest in analog computation has grown tremendously in recent years due to its fast computation speed and excellent energy efficiency, which is very important for edge and IoT devices in the sub-watt power envelope for deep learning inferencing. However, significant performance degradation suffered by deep learning models due to the inherent noise present in the analog computation can limit their use in mission-critical applications. Hence, there is a need to understand the impact of critical model hyperparameters choice on the resulting model noise-resistant property. This need is critical as the insight obtained can be used to design deep learning models that are robust to analog noise. In this paper, the impact of the learning rate, a critical design choice, on the noise-resistant property is investigated. The study is achieved by first training deep learning models using different learning rates. Thereafter, the models are injected with analog noise and the noise-resistant property of the resulting models is examined by measuring the performance degradation due to the analog noise. The results showed there exists a sweet spot of learning rate values that achieves a good balance between model prediction performance and model noise-resistant property. Furthermore, the theoretical justification of the observed phenomenon is provided.
summary: The interest in analog computation has grown tremendously in recent years due to its fast computation speed and excellent energy efficiency, which is very important for edge and IoT devices in the sub-watt power envelope for deep learning inferencing. However, significant performance degradation suffered by deep learning models due to the inherent noise present in the analog computation can limit their use in mission-critical applications. Hence, there is a need to understand the impact of critical model hyperparameters choice on the resulting model noise-resistant property. This need is critical as the insight obtained can be used to design deep learning models that are robust to analog noise. In this paper, the impact of the learning rate, a critical design choice, on the noise-resistant property is investigated. The study is achieved by first training deep learning models using different learning rates. Thereafter, the models are injected with analog noise and the noise-resistant property of the resulting models is examined by measuring the performance degradation due to the analog noise. The results showed there exists a sweet spot of learning rate values that achieves a good balance between model prediction performance and model noise-resistant property. Furthermore, the theoretical justification of the observed phenomenon is provided.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于模拟计算的快速计算速度和出色的能源效率，人们对模拟计算的兴趣急剧增长，这对于深度学习推理的亚瓦功率范围内的边缘和物联网设备非常重要。然而，由于模拟计算中存在固有噪声，深度学习模型的性能显着下降，这可能会限制其在关键任务应用中的使用。因此，需要了解关键模型超参数选择对所得模型抗噪声性能的影响。这种需求至关重要，因为获得的洞察可用于设计对模拟噪声具有鲁棒性的深度学习模型。在本文中，研究了学习率（一个关键的设计选择）对抗噪声性能的影响。该研究是通过首先使用不同学习率训练深度学习模型来实现的。此后，向模型注入模拟噪声，并通过测量由模拟噪声引起的性能下降来检查所得模型的抗噪声特性。结果表明，存在学习率值的最佳点，可以在模型预测性能和模型抗噪声性能之间实现良好的平衡。此外，还提供了所观察到的现象的理论依据。

AI.tldr: 研究学习率对深度学习模型抗噪声性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 模拟计算在边缘设备中因噪声导致模型性能下降，需寻找提升模型抗噪声能力的超参数配置。
AI.method: 通过训练不同学习率的模型并注入模拟噪声，评估性能退化情况以分析抗噪声特性。
AI.result: 发现存在最佳学习率区间，能在模型预测性能与抗噪声能力间取得平衡。
AI.conclusion: 学习率选择显著影响模型抗噪声特性，理论分析验证了实验现象的合理性。

authors_text: Leon Witt,Mathis Heyer,Kentaroh Toyoda,Wojciech Samek,Dan Li
title: Decentral and Incentivized Federated Learning Frameworks: A Systematic Literature Review
title_zh: 去中心化和激励式联邦学习框架：系统文献综述
abstract: The advent of Federated Learning (FL) has ignited a new paradigm for parallel and confidential decentralized Machine Learning (ML) with the potential of utilizing the computational power of a vast number of IoT, mobile and edge devices without data leaving the respective device, ensuring privacy by design. Yet, in order to scale this new paradigm beyond small groups of already entrusted entities towards mass adoption, the Federated Learning Framework (FLF) has to become (i) truly decentralized and (ii) participants have to be incentivized. This is the first systematic literature review analyzing holistic FLFs in the domain of both, decentralized and incentivized federated learning. 422 publications were retrieved, by querying 12 major scientific databases. Finally, 40 articles remained after a systematic review and filtering process for in-depth examination. Although having massive potential to direct the future of a more distributed and secure AI, none of the analyzed FLF is production-ready. The approaches vary heavily in terms of use-cases, system design, solved issues and thoroughness. We are the first to provide a systematic approach to classify and quantify differences between FLF, exposing limitations of current works and derive future directions for research in this novel domain.
summary: The advent of Federated Learning (FL) has ignited a new paradigm for parallel and confidential decentralized Machine Learning (ML) with the potential of utilizing the computational power of a vast number of IoT, mobile and edge devices without data leaving the respective device, ensuring privacy by design. Yet, in order to scale this new paradigm beyond small groups of already entrusted entities towards mass adoption, the Federated Learning Framework (FLF) has to become (i) truly decentralized and (ii) participants have to be incentivized. This is the first systematic literature review analyzing holistic FLFs in the domain of both, decentralized and incentivized federated learning. 422 publications were retrieved, by querying 12 major scientific databases. Finally, 40 articles remained after a systematic review and filtering process for in-depth examination. Although having massive potential to direct the future of a more distributed and secure AI, none of the analyzed FLF is production-ready. The approaches vary heavily in terms of use-cases, system design, solved issues and thoroughness. We are the first to provide a systematic approach to classify and quantify differences between FLF, exposing limitations of current works and derive future directions for research in this novel domain.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 的出现点燃了并行和保密的去中心化机器学习 (ML) 的新范式，具有利用大量物联网、移动和边缘设备的计算能力的潜力，而无需数据离开各自的设备，从而通过设计确保隐私。然而，为了将这种新范式扩展到已经受托实体的小群体之外并实现大规模采用，联邦学习框架（FLF）必须（i）真正去中心化，（ii）参与者必须受到激励。这是第一篇系统性的文献综述，分析了去中心化和激励式联合学习领域的整体 FLF。通过查询12个主要科学数据库，检索到422篇出版物。经过系统评审和筛选，最终留下40篇文章进行深入审查。尽管具有指导更加分布式和安全的人工智能未来的巨大潜力，但所分析的 FLF 都尚未做好生产准备。这些方法在用例、系统设计、解决的问题和彻底性方面存在很大差异。我们是第一个提供系统方法来分类和量化 FLF 之间差异的人，暴露当前工作的局限性，并得出这个新领域的未来研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对去中心化和激励式联邦学习框架进行了系统性文献综述，分析了现有研究的不足并指明未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习需实现真正的去中心化和参与者激励以推动大规模应用，但现有框架尚未成熟，需系统梳理研究现状。
AI.method: 通过查询12个科学数据库获取422篇文献，经系统筛选后深入分析40篇，分类量化比较不同框架的差异。
AI.result: 现有框架均未达到生产就绪状态，研究在应用场景、系统设计和问题解决方面存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 当前联邦学习框架需进一步解决去中心化与激励机制的融合问题，未来研究应聚焦实际部署可行性和跨领域适用性。

search_text: Decentral and Incentivized Federated Learning Frameworks: A Systematic Literature Review 去中心化和激励式联邦学习框架：系统文献综述 The advent of Federated Learning (FL) has ignited a new paradigm for parallel and confidential decentralized Machine Learning (ML) with the potential of utilizing the computational power of a vast number of IoT, mobile and edge devices without data leaving the respective device, ensuring privacy by design. Yet, in order to scale this new paradigm beyond small groups of already entrusted entities towards mass adoption, the Federated Learning Framework (FLF) has to become (i) truly decentralized and (ii) participants have to be incentivized. This is the first systematic literature review analyzing holistic FLFs in the domain of both, decentralized and incentivized federated learning. 422 publications were retrieved, by querying 12 major scientific databases. Finally, 40 articles remained after a systematic review and filtering process for in-depth examination. Although having massive potential to direct the future of a more distributed and secure AI, none of the analyzed FLF is production-ready. The approaches vary heavily in terms of use-cases, system design, solved issues and thoroughness. We are the first to provide a systematic approach to classify and quantify differences between FLF, exposing limitations of current works and derive future directions for research in this novel domain. 联邦学习 (FL) 的出现点燃了并行和保密的去中心化机器学习 (ML) 的新范式，具有利用大量物联网、移动和边缘设备的计算能力的潜力，而无需数据离开各自的设备，从而通过设计确保隐私。然而，为了将这种新范式扩展到已经受托实体的小群体之外并实现大规模采用，联邦学习框架（FLF）必须（i）真正去中心化，（ii）参与者必须受到激励。这是第一篇系统性的文献综述，分析了去中心化和激励式联合学习领域的整体 FLF。通过查询12个主要科学数据库，检索到422篇出版物。经过系统评审和筛选，最终留下40篇文章进行深入审查。尽管具有指导更加分布式和安全的人工智能未来的巨大潜力，但所分析的 FLF 都尚未做好生产准备。这些方法在用例、系统设计、解决的问题和彻底性方面存在很大差异。我们是第一个提供系统方法来分类和量化 FLF 之间差异的人，暴露当前工作的局限性，并得出这个新领域的未来研究方向。 本文对去中心化和激励式联邦学习框架进行了系统性文献综述，分析了现有研究的不足并指明未来研究方向。 Leon Witt,Mathis Heyer,Kentaroh Toyoda,Wojciech Samek,Dan Li cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Haoteng Tang,Xiyao Fu,Lei Guo,Yalin Wang,Scott Mackin,Olusola Ajilore,Alex Leow,Paul Thompson,Heng Huang,Liang Zhan
title: Functional2Structural: Cross-Modality Brain Networks Representation Learning
title_zh: 功能到结构：跨模态大脑网络表征学习
abstract: MRI-based modeling of brain networks has been widely used to understand functional and structural interactions and connections among brain regions, and factors that affect them, such as brain development and disease. Graph mining on brain networks may facilitate the discovery of novel biomarkers for clinical phenotypes and neurodegenerative diseases. Since brain networks derived from functional and structural MRI describe the brain topology from different perspectives, exploring a representation that combines these cross-modality brain networks is non-trivial. Most current studies aim to extract a fused representation of the two types of brain network by projecting the structural network to the functional counterpart. Since the functional network is dynamic and the structural network is static, mapping a static object to a dynamic object is suboptimal. However, mapping in the opposite direction is not feasible due to the non-negativity requirement of current graph learning techniques. Here, we propose a novel graph learning framework, known as Deep Signed Brain Networks (DSBN), with a signed graph encoder that, from an opposite perspective, learns the cross-modality representations by projecting the functional network to the structural counterpart. We validate our framework on clinical phenotype and neurodegenerative disease prediction tasks using two independent, publicly available datasets (HCP and OASIS). The experimental results clearly demonstrate the advantages of our model compared to several state-of-the-art methods.
summary: MRI-based modeling of brain networks has been widely used to understand functional and structural interactions and connections among brain regions, and factors that affect them, such as brain development and disease. Graph mining on brain networks may facilitate the discovery of novel biomarkers for clinical phenotypes and neurodegenerative diseases. Since brain networks derived from functional and structural MRI describe the brain topology from different perspectives, exploring a representation that combines these cross-modality brain networks is non-trivial. Most current studies aim to extract a fused representation of the two types of brain network by projecting the structural network to the functional counterpart. Since the functional network is dynamic and the structural network is static, mapping a static object to a dynamic object is suboptimal. However, mapping in the opposite direction is not feasible due to the non-negativity requirement of current graph learning techniques. Here, we propose a novel graph learning framework, known as Deep Signed Brain Networks (DSBN), with a signed graph encoder that, from an opposite perspective, learns the cross-modality representations by projecting the functional network to the structural counterpart. We validate our framework on clinical phenotype and neurodegenerative disease prediction tasks using two independent, publicly available datasets (HCP and OASIS). The experimental results clearly demonstrate the advantages of our model compared to several state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 基于 MRI 的大脑网络建模已被广泛用于了解大脑区域之间的功能和结构相互作用和连接，以及影响它们的因素，例如大脑发育和疾病。大脑网络的图挖掘可能有助于发现临床表型和神经退行性疾病的新型生物标志物。由于源自功能性和结构性 MRI 的大脑网络从不同角度描述了大脑拓扑结构，因此探索结合这些跨模态大脑网络的表示并非易事。目前大多数研究的目的是通过将结构网络投影到功能对应网络来提取两种类型大脑网络的融合表示。由于功能网络是动态的而结构网络是静态的，因此将静态对象映射到动态对象并不是最优的。然而，由于当前图学习技术的非负性要求，相反方向的映射是不可行的。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的图学习框架，称为深度签名脑网络（DSBN），带有签名图编码器，从相反的角度，通过将功能网络投影到结构对应物来学习跨模态表示。我们使用两个独立的公开数据集（HCP 和 OASIS）验证了我们的临床表型和神经退行性疾病预测任务框架。实验结果清楚地证明了我们的模型与几种最先进的方法相比的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Deep Signed Brain Networks (DSBN)的新框架，通过将功能网络映射到结构网络，学习跨模态脑网络的表示，以提升临床表型和神经退行性疾病预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将静态结构网络映射到动态功能网络效果不佳，且反向映射因图学习技术的非负性限制不可行，需探索更优的跨模态融合方式。
AI.method: 设计带符号图编码器的DSBN框架，从功能网络向结构网络投影，利用符号图学习解决动态与静态网络映射难题。
AI.result: 在HCP和OASIS数据集上的实验表明，DSBN在临床表型和神经退行性疾病预测任务中优于多种先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DSBN通过功能到结构的跨模态映射有效捕捉脑网络特征，为疾病预测提供了更优的表示学习方案。

authors_text: Mohammadreza Ebrahimi,Yidong Chai,Hao Helen Zhang,Hsinchun Chen
title: Heterogeneous Domain Adaptation with Adversarial Neural Representation Learning: Experiments on E-Commerce and Cybersecurity
title_zh: 对抗性神经表示学习的异构域适应：电子商务和网络安全实验
comment: Forthcoming in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Recognition and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
comments: Forthcoming in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Recognition and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
abstract: Learning predictive models in new domains with scarce training data is a growing challenge in modern supervised learning scenarios. This incentivizes developing domain adaptation methods that leverage the knowledge in known domains (source) and adapt to new domains (target) with a different probability distribution. This becomes more challenging when the source and target domains are in heterogeneous feature spaces, known as heterogeneous domain adaptation (HDA). While most HDA methods utilize mathematical optimization to map source and target data to a common space, they suffer from low transferability. Neural representations have proven to be more transferable; however, they are mainly designed for homogeneous environments. Drawing on the theory of domain adaptation, we propose a novel framework, Heterogeneous Adversarial Neural Domain Adaptation (HANDA), to effectively maximize the transferability in heterogeneous environments. HANDA conducts feature and distribution alignment in a unified neural network architecture and achieves domain invariance through adversarial kernel learning. Three experiments were conducted to evaluate the performance against the state-of-the-art HDA methods on major image and text e-commerce benchmarks. HANDA shows statistically significant improvement in predictive performance. The practical utility of HANDA was shown in real-world dark web online markets. HANDA is an important step towards successful domain adaptation in e-commerce applications.
summary: Learning predictive models in new domains with scarce training data is a growing challenge in modern supervised learning scenarios. This incentivizes developing domain adaptation methods that leverage the knowledge in known domains (source) and adapt to new domains (target) with a different probability distribution. This becomes more challenging when the source and target domains are in heterogeneous feature spaces, known as heterogeneous domain adaptation (HDA). While most HDA methods utilize mathematical optimization to map source and target data to a common space, they suffer from low transferability. Neural representations have proven to be more transferable; however, they are mainly designed for homogeneous environments. Drawing on the theory of domain adaptation, we propose a novel framework, Heterogeneous Adversarial Neural Domain Adaptation (HANDA), to effectively maximize the transferability in heterogeneous environments. HANDA conducts feature and distribution alignment in a unified neural network architecture and achieves domain invariance through adversarial kernel learning. Three experiments were conducted to evaluate the performance against the state-of-the-art HDA methods on major image and text e-commerce benchmarks. HANDA shows statistically significant improvement in predictive performance. The practical utility of HANDA was shown in real-world dark web online markets. HANDA is an important step towards successful domain adaptation in e-commerce applications.
abstract_zh: 在缺乏训练数据的新领域中学习预测模型是现代监督学习场景中日益严峻的挑战。这激励了开发领域适应方法，利用已知领域（源）中的知识并适应具有不同概率分布的新领域（目标）。当源域和目标域位于异构特征空间（称为异构域适应（HDA））时，这变得更具挑战性。虽然大多数 HDA 方法利用数学优化将源数据和目标数据映射到公共空间，但它们的可转移性较低。神经表征已被证明更具可转移性；然而，它们主要是为同质环境而设计的。借鉴域适应理论，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，异构对抗性神经域适应（HANDA），以有效地最大化异构环境中的可迁移性。 HANDA在统一的神经网络架构中进行特征和分布对齐，并通过对抗性核学习实现域不变性。我们进行了三个实验来评估主要图像和文本电子商务基准上最先进的 HDA 方法的性能。 HANDA 在预测性能方面显示出统计上的显着改善。 HANDA 的实用性在现实世界的暗网在线市场中得到了体现。 HANDA 是电子商务应用领域成功适应领域的重要一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种异构领域自适应框架HANDA，通过对抗神经表示学习解决异构特征空间下的领域迁移问题，并在电商和网络安全场景中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有异构领域自适应方法因特征空间差异导致迁移能力不足，且神经表示方法多针对同构环境，难以直接应用于异构领域场景。
AI.method: 设计HANDA框架，在统一神经网络中通过对抗核学习实现特征对齐与分布对齐，利用对抗训练使模型学习领域不变表示以提升迁移能力。
AI.result: 在主流电商图像/文本基准测试中HANDA显著优于现有方法，在暗网市场等实际场景中验证了其预测性能提升的实用性。
AI.conclusion: HANDA通过统一架构实现异构领域对齐，为电商等实际应用中的领域自适应提供了重要技术突破。

motivation: 现有异构领域自适应方法因特征空间差异导致迁移能力不足，且神经表示方法多针对同构环境，难以直接应用于异构领域场景。
method: 设计HANDA框架，在统一神经网络中通过对抗核学习实现特征对齐与分布对齐，利用对抗训练使模型学习领域不变表示以提升迁移能力。
result: 在主流电商图像/文本基准测试中HANDA显著优于现有方法，在暗网市场等实际场景中验证了其预测性能提升的实用性。
conclusion: HANDA通过统一架构实现异构领域对齐，为电商等实际应用中的领域自适应提供了重要技术突破。
search_text: Heterogeneous Domain Adaptation with Adversarial Neural Representation Learning: Experiments on E-Commerce and Cybersecurity 对抗性神经表示学习的异构域适应：电子商务和网络安全实验 Learning predictive models in new domains with scarce training data is a growing challenge in modern supervised learning scenarios. This incentivizes developing domain adaptation methods that leverage the knowledge in known domains (source) and adapt to new domains (target) with a different probability distribution. This becomes more challenging when the source and target domains are in heterogeneous feature spaces, known as heterogeneous domain adaptation (HDA). While most HDA methods utilize mathematical optimization to map source and target data to a common space, they suffer from low transferability. Neural representations have proven to be more transferable; however, they are mainly designed for homogeneous environments. Drawing on the theory of domain adaptation, we propose a novel framework, Heterogeneous Adversarial Neural Domain Adaptation (HANDA), to effectively maximize the transferability in heterogeneous environments. HANDA conducts feature and distribution alignment in a unified neural network architecture and achieves domain invariance through adversarial kernel learning. Three experiments were conducted to evaluate the performance against the state-of-the-art HDA methods on major image and text e-commerce benchmarks. HANDA shows statistically significant improvement in predictive performance. The practical utility of HANDA was shown in real-world dark web online markets. HANDA is an important step towards successful domain adaptation in e-commerce applications. 在缺乏训练数据的新领域中学习预测模型是现代监督学习场景中日益严峻的挑战。这激励了开发领域适应方法，利用已知领域（源）中的知识并适应具有不同概率分布的新领域（目标）。当源域和目标域位于异构特征空间（称为异构域适应（HDA））时，这变得更具挑战性。虽然大多数 HDA 方法利用数学优化将源数据和目标数据映射到公共空间，但它们的可转移性较低。神经表征已被证明更具可转移性；然而，它们主要是为同质环境而设计的。借鉴域适应理论，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，异构对抗性神经域适应（HANDA），以有效地最大化异构环境中的可迁移性。 HANDA在统一的神经网络架构中进行特征和分布对齐，并通过对抗性核学习实现域不变性。我们进行了三个实验来评估主要图像和文本电子商务基准上最先进的 HDA 方法的性能。 HANDA 在预测性能方面显示出统计上的显着改善。 HANDA 的实用性在现实世界的暗网在线市场中得到了体现。 HANDA 是电子商务应用领域成功适应领域的重要一步。 本文提出了一种异构领域自适应框架HANDA，通过对抗神经表示学习解决异构特征空间下的领域迁移问题，并在电商和网络安全场景中验证其有效性。 Mohammadreza Ebrahimi,Yidong Chai,Hao Helen Zhang,Hsinchun Chen cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hongjun Wang,Jiyuan Chen,Zipei Fan,Zhiwen Zhang,Zekun Cai,Xuan Song
title: ST-ExpertNet: A Deep Expert Framework for Traffic Prediction
title_zh: ST-ExpertNet：流量预测的深度专家框架
abstract: Recently, forecasting the crowd flows has become an important research topic, and plentiful technologies have achieved good performances. As we all know, the flow at a citywide level is in a mixed state with several basic patterns (e.g., commuting, working, and commercial) caused by the city area functional distributions (e.g., developed commercial areas, educational areas and parks). However, existing technologies have been criticized for their lack of considering the differences in the flow patterns among regions since they want to build only one comprehensive model to learn the mixed flow tensors. Recognizing this limitation, we present a new perspective on flow prediction and propose an explainable framework named ST-ExpertNet, which can adopt every spatial-temporal model and train a set of functional experts devoted to specific flow patterns. Technically, we train a bunch of experts based on the Mixture of Experts (MoE), which guides each expert to specialize in different kinds of flow patterns in sample spaces by using the gating network. We define several criteria, including comprehensiveness, sparsity, and preciseness, to construct the experts for better interpretability and performances. We conduct experiments on a wide range of real-world taxi and bike datasets in Beijing and NYC. The visualizations of the expert's intermediate results demonstrate that our ST-ExpertNet successfully disentangles the city's mixed flow tensors along with the city layout, e.g., the urban ring road structure. Different network architectures, such as ST-ResNet, ConvLSTM, and CNN, have been adopted into our ST-ExpertNet framework for experiments and the results demonstrates the superiority of our framework in both interpretability and performances.
summary: Recently, forecasting the crowd flows has become an important research topic, and plentiful technologies have achieved good performances. As we all know, the flow at a citywide level is in a mixed state with several basic patterns (e.g., commuting, working, and commercial) caused by the city area functional distributions (e.g., developed commercial areas, educational areas and parks). However, existing technologies have been criticized for their lack of considering the differences in the flow patterns among regions since they want to build only one comprehensive model to learn the mixed flow tensors. Recognizing this limitation, we present a new perspective on flow prediction and propose an explainable framework named ST-ExpertNet, which can adopt every spatial-temporal model and train a set of functional experts devoted to specific flow patterns. Technically, we train a bunch of experts based on the Mixture of Experts (MoE), which guides each expert to specialize in different kinds of flow patterns in sample spaces by using the gating network. We define several criteria, including comprehensiveness, sparsity, and preciseness, to construct the experts for better interpretability and performances. We conduct experiments on a wide range of real-world taxi and bike datasets in Beijing and NYC. The visualizations of the expert's intermediate results demonstrate that our ST-ExpertNet successfully disentangles the city's mixed flow tensors along with the city layout, e.g., the urban ring road structure. Different network architectures, such as ST-ResNet, ConvLSTM, and CNN, have been adopted into our ST-ExpertNet framework for experiments and the results demonstrates the superiority of our framework in both interpretability and performances.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人群流量预测已成为一个重要的研究课题，大量技术取得了良好的效果。众所周知，城市层面的人流由于城市区域功能分布（如发达的商业区、教育区、公园）而呈现出多种基本形态（如通勤、工作、商业）的混合状态。然而，现有技术因缺乏考虑区域间流动模式的差异而受到批评，因为它们只想建立一个综合模型来学习混合流动张量。认识到这一局限性，我们提出了流量预测的新视角，并提出了一个名为 ST-ExpertNet 的可解释框架，该框架可以采用每种时空模型并训练一组致力于特定流量模式的功能专家。从技术上讲，我们基于专家混合（MoE）训练了一批专家，通过使用门控网络引导每个专家专门研究样本空间中的不同类型的流动模式。我们定义了几个标准，包括全面性、稀疏性和精确性，以构建专家以获得更好的可解释性和性能。我们在北京和纽约的各种现实世界出租车和自行车数据集上进行了实验。专家中间结果的可视化表明，我们的 ST-ExpertNet 成功地将城市的混合流张量与城市布局（例如城市环路结构）分开。我们的 ST-ExpertNet 框架已采用不同的网络架构（例如 ST-ResNet、ConvLSTM 和 CNN）进行实验，结果证明了我们的框架在可解释性和性能方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ST-ExpertNet框架，通过分解城市交通流的混合模式提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有交通预测模型未考虑城市不同区域流量模式的差异，导致预测效果受限。
AI.method: 基于专家混合（MoE）架构，训练多个专注特定流量模式的专家网络，并通过门控机制动态组合预测结果。
AI.result: 在北京市和纽约市的真实出租车/自行车数据集上，ST-ExpertNet在可解释性和预测精度上均优于对比模型。
AI.conclusion: ST-ExpertNet通过解耦城市交通流的时空特征，为复杂城市交通预测提供了更有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Mike Heddes,Igor Nunes,Tony Givargis,Alexandru Nicolau,Alex Veidenbaum
title: Hyperdimensional Hashing: A Robust and Efficient Dynamic Hash Table
title_zh: 超维哈希：鲁棒高效的动态哈希表
abstract: Most cloud services and distributed applications rely on hashing algorithms that allow dynamic scaling of a robust and efficient hash table. Examples include AWS, Google Cloud and BitTorrent. Consistent and rendezvous hashing are algorithms that minimize key remapping as the hash table resizes. While memory errors in large-scale cloud deployments are common, neither algorithm offers both efficiency and robustness. Hyperdimensional Computing is an emerging computational model that has inherent efficiency, robustness and is well suited for vector or hardware acceleration. We propose Hyperdimensional (HD) hashing and show that it has the efficiency to be deployed in large systems. Moreover, a realistic level of memory errors causes more than 20% mismatches for consistent hashing while HD hashing remains unaffected.
summary: Most cloud services and distributed applications rely on hashing algorithms that allow dynamic scaling of a robust and efficient hash table. Examples include AWS, Google Cloud and BitTorrent. Consistent and rendezvous hashing are algorithms that minimize key remapping as the hash table resizes. While memory errors in large-scale cloud deployments are common, neither algorithm offers both efficiency and robustness. Hyperdimensional Computing is an emerging computational model that has inherent efficiency, robustness and is well suited for vector or hardware acceleration. We propose Hyperdimensional (HD) hashing and show that it has the efficiency to be deployed in large systems. Moreover, a realistic level of memory errors causes more than 20% mismatches for consistent hashing while HD hashing remains unaffected.
abstract_zh: 大多数云服务和分布式应用程序都依赖于哈希算法，该算法允许动态扩展健壮且高效的哈希表。示例包括 AWS、Google Cloud 和 BitTorrent。一致哈希和会合哈希是在哈希表大小调整时最小化键重新映射的算法。虽然大规模云部署中的内存错误很常见，但这两种算法都无法同时提供效率和稳健性。超维计算是一种新兴的计算模型，具有固有的效率、鲁棒性，非常适合矢量或硬件加速。我们提出超维（HD）哈希，并证明它具有在大型系统中部署的效率。此外，现实水平的内存错误会导致一致性哈希超过 20% 的不匹配，而 HD 哈希不受影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高维计算的哈希算法，用于解决动态哈希表在大规模云服务中的效率与鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有哈希算法（如一致性哈希）在动态扩容时存在内存错误导致的高不匹配率问题，无法同时满足效率与鲁棒性需求。
AI.method: 结合高维计算模型设计Hyperdimensional哈希，利用其内在的高效性与抗干扰能力，通过向量运算实现动态哈希表的稳定映射。
AI.result: 实验表明，在现实内存错误场景下，HD哈希保持0%不匹配率，而一致性哈希出现超20%的键值错位。
AI.conclusion: Hyperdimensional哈希在动态哈希表场景中展现出显著优势，可为云服务和分布式系统提供更可靠的扩展方案。

title: Power and limitations of single-qubit native quantum neural networks
title_zh: 单量子位原生量子神经网络的能力和局限性
comment: 22 pages including appendix. To appear at NeurIPS 2022
comments: 22 pages including appendix. To appear at NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Quantum neural networks (QNNs) have emerged as a leading strategy to establish applications in machine learning, chemistry, and optimization. While the applications of QNN have been widely investigated, its theoretical foundation remains less understood. In this paper, we formulate a theoretical framework for the expressive ability of data re-uploading quantum neural networks that consist of interleaved encoding circuit blocks and trainable circuit blocks. First, we prove that single-qubit quantum neural networks can approximate any univariate function by mapping the model to a partial Fourier series. We in particular establish the exact correlations between the parameters of the trainable gates and the Fourier coefficients, resolving an open problem on the universal approximation property of QNN. Second, we discuss the limitations of single-qubit native QNNs on approximating multivariate functions by analyzing the frequency spectrum and the flexibility of Fourier coefficients. We further demonstrate the expressivity and limitations of single-qubit native QNNs via numerical experiments. We believe these results would improve our understanding of QNNs and provide a helpful guideline for designing powerful QNNs for machine learning tasks.
summary: Quantum neural networks (QNNs) have emerged as a leading strategy to establish applications in machine learning, chemistry, and optimization. While the applications of QNN have been widely investigated, its theoretical foundation remains less understood. In this paper, we formulate a theoretical framework for the expressive ability of data re-uploading quantum neural networks that consist of interleaved encoding circuit blocks and trainable circuit blocks. First, we prove that single-qubit quantum neural networks can approximate any univariate function by mapping the model to a partial Fourier series. We in particular establish the exact correlations between the parameters of the trainable gates and the Fourier coefficients, resolving an open problem on the universal approximation property of QNN. Second, we discuss the limitations of single-qubit native QNNs on approximating multivariate functions by analyzing the frequency spectrum and the flexibility of Fourier coefficients. We further demonstrate the expressivity and limitations of single-qubit native QNNs via numerical experiments. We believe these results would improve our understanding of QNNs and provide a helpful guideline for designing powerful QNNs for machine learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 量子神经网络 (QNN) 已成为在机器学习、化学和优化领域建立应用的领先策略。虽然 QNN 的应用已被广泛研究，但其理论基础仍知之甚少。在本文中，我们为数据重新上传量子神经网络的表达能力制定了一个理论框架，该网络由交错编码电路块和可训练电路块组成。首先，我们证明单量子位量子神经网络可以通过将模型映射到部分傅里叶级数来逼近任何单变量函数。我们特别建立了可训练门的参数和傅里叶系数之间的精确相关性，解决了 QNN 通用逼近性质的开放问题。其次，我们通过分析频谱和傅里叶系数的灵活性，讨论了单量子位原生 QNN 在逼近多元函数方面的局限性。我们通过数值实验进一步证明了单量子位原生 QNN 的表达能力和局限性。我们相信这些结果将增进我们对 QNN 的理解，并为设计用于机器学习任务的强大 QNN 提供有用的指导。

AI.tldr: 本文研究单量子比特原生量子神经网络（QNN）的表达能力及其在逼近单变量和多变量函数时的局限性，并通过理论分析和数值实验验证其性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管量子神经网络在多个领域有广泛应用，但其理论基础（如逼近能力与限制）尚未明确，需建立系统性理论框架以指导实际应用。
AI.method: 通过构建数据重上传量子神经网络的理论框架，将模型映射为傅里叶级数，分析可训练门参数与傅里叶系数的关系，并结合数值实验验证理论结论。
AI.result: 证明单量子比特QNN可逼近任意单变量函数并解决逼近性开放问题；揭示其在多变量函数逼近中的频谱限制与系数灵活性不足；数值实验验证了理论分析的正确性。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果深化了对QNN理论能力的理解，为设计高效量子神经网络提供了理论依据与实践指导。
