authors_text: Subhabrata Choudhury,Laurynas Karazija,Iro Laina,Andrea Vedaldi,Christian Rupprecht
title: Guess What Moves: Unsupervised Video and Image Segmentation by Anticipating Motion
title_zh: 猜猜什么在移动：通过预测运动进行无监督视频和图像分割
abstract: Motion, measured via optical flow, provides a powerful cue to discover and learn objects in images and videos. However, compared to using appearance, it has some blind spots, such as the fact that objects become invisible if they do not move. In this work, we propose an approach that combines the strengths of motion-based and appearance-based segmentation. We propose to supervise an image segmentation network with the pretext task of predicting regions that are likely to contain simple motion patterns, and thus likely to correspond to objects. As the model only uses a single image as input, we can apply it in two settings: unsupervised video segmentation, and unsupervised image segmentation. We achieve state-of-the-art results for videos, and demonstrate the viability of our approach on still images containing novel objects. Additionally we experiment with different motion models and optical flow backbones and find the method to be robust to these change. Project page and code available at https://www.robots.ox.ac.uk/~vgg/research/gwm.
summary: Motion, measured via optical flow, provides a powerful cue to discover and learn objects in images and videos. However, compared to using appearance, it has some blind spots, such as the fact that objects become invisible if they do not move. In this work, we propose an approach that combines the strengths of motion-based and appearance-based segmentation. We propose to supervise an image segmentation network with the pretext task of predicting regions that are likely to contain simple motion patterns, and thus likely to correspond to objects. As the model only uses a single image as input, we can apply it in two settings: unsupervised video segmentation, and unsupervised image segmentation. We achieve state-of-the-art results for videos, and demonstrate the viability of our approach on still images containing novel objects. Additionally we experiment with different motion models and optical flow backbones and find the method to be robust to these change. Project page and code available at https://www.robots.ox.ac.uk/~vgg/research/gwm.
abstract_zh: 通过光流测量的运动为发现和学习图像和视频中的对象提供了强大的提示。然而，与使用外观相比，它存在一些盲点，例如物体不移动就看不见。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种结合了基于运动和基于外观的分割的优点的方法。我们建议以预测可能包含简单运动模式并因此可能对应于对象的区域为借口任务来监督图像分割网络。由于该模型仅使用单个图像作为输入，因此我们可以将其应用于两种设置：无监督视频分割和无监督图像分割。我们在视频方面取得了最先进的结果，并证明了我们的方法在包含新物体的静态图像上的可行性。此外，我们尝试了不同的运动模型和光流主干，并找到了对这些变化具有鲁棒性的方法。项目页面和代码可在 https://www.robots.ox.ac.uk/~vgg/research/gwm 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过预测简单运动模式来实现无监督视频和图像分割的方法，结合运动和外观信息以提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 传统运动信息（如光流）在分割静态或无运动物体时存在盲区，而单纯依赖外观信息可能不够准确，因此需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 设计预训练任务，通过预测可能包含简单运动模式的区域来指导图像分割网络，仅使用单张图像输入，适用于视频和图像分割两种场景。
AI.result: 在视频分割任务中达到最先进水平，并在包含新物体的静态图像上验证了方法的有效性，同时证明方法对不同运动模型和光流骨干的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 结合运动预测与外观信息的无监督分割方法有效，且具有良好的模型适应性和泛化能力。

title: Deep Spectral Methods: A Surprisingly Strong Baseline for Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation and Localization
title_zh: 深谱方法：无监督语义分割和定位的令人惊讶的强大基线
abstract: Unsupervised localization and segmentation are long-standing computer vision challenges that involve decomposing an image into semantically-meaningful segments without any labeled data. These tasks are particularly interesting in an unsupervised setting due to the difficulty and cost of obtaining dense image annotations, but existing unsupervised approaches struggle with complex scenes containing multiple objects. Differently from existing methods, which are purely based on deep learning, we take inspiration from traditional spectral segmentation methods by reframing image decomposition as a graph partitioning problem. Specifically, we examine the eigenvectors of the Laplacian of a feature affinity matrix from self-supervised networks. We find that these eigenvectors already decompose an image into meaningful segments, and can be readily used to localize objects in a scene. Furthermore, by clustering the features associated with these segments across a dataset, we can obtain well-delineated, nameable regions, i.e. semantic segmentations. Experiments on complex datasets (Pascal VOC, MS-COCO) demonstrate that our simple spectral method outperforms the state-of-the-art in unsupervised localization and segmentation by a significant margin. Furthermore, our method can be readily used for a variety of complex image editing tasks, such as background removal and compositing.
summary: Unsupervised localization and segmentation are long-standing computer vision challenges that involve decomposing an image into semantically-meaningful segments without any labeled data. These tasks are particularly interesting in an unsupervised setting due to the difficulty and cost of obtaining dense image annotations, but existing unsupervised approaches struggle with complex scenes containing multiple objects. Differently from existing methods, which are purely based on deep learning, we take inspiration from traditional spectral segmentation methods by reframing image decomposition as a graph partitioning problem. Specifically, we examine the eigenvectors of the Laplacian of a feature affinity matrix from self-supervised networks. We find that these eigenvectors already decompose an image into meaningful segments, and can be readily used to localize objects in a scene. Furthermore, by clustering the features associated with these segments across a dataset, we can obtain well-delineated, nameable regions, i.e. semantic segmentations. Experiments on complex datasets (Pascal VOC, MS-COCO) demonstrate that our simple spectral method outperforms the state-of-the-art in unsupervised localization and segmentation by a significant margin. Furthermore, our method can be readily used for a variety of complex image editing tasks, such as background removal and compositing.
abstract_zh: 无监督定位和分割是长期存在的计算机视觉挑战，涉及将图像分解为具有语义意义的片段，而无需任何标记数据。由于获得密集图像注释的难度和成本，这些任务在无监督环境中特别有趣，但现有的无监督方法难以处理包含多个对象的复杂场景。与纯粹基于深度学习的现有方法不同，我们从传统的光谱分割方法中汲取灵感，将图像分解重新定义为图分割问题。具体来说，我们检查来自自监督网络的特征亲和力矩阵的拉普拉斯特征向量。我们发现这些特征向量已经将图像分解为有意义的片段，并且可以很容易地用于定位场景中的对象。此外，通过对数据集中与这些片段相关的特征进行聚类，我们可以获得明确描绘的、可命名的区域，即语义分割。对复杂数据集（Pascal VOC、MS-COCO）的实验表明，我们的简单谱方法在无监督定位和分割方面明显优于最先进的方法。此外，我们的方法可以轻松用于各种复杂的图像编辑任务，例如背景去除和合成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度谱方法的无监督语义分割和定位方法，通过图划分问题重构图像分解任务。
AI.motivation: 无监督语义分割和定位因缺乏标注数据而面临挑战，现有深度学习方法在复杂场景中表现不足，需探索更有效的替代方案。
AI.method: 利用自监督网络提取的特征亲和矩阵的拉普拉斯矩阵特征向量，将其作为图像分割的基础，并通过跨数据集聚类实现语义分割。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC和MS-COCO等复杂数据集上显著优于现有无监督方法，且适用于背景移除等图像编辑任务。

search_text: Deep Spectral Methods: A Surprisingly Strong Baseline for Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation and Localization 深谱方法：无监督语义分割和定位的令人惊讶的强大基线 Unsupervised localization and segmentation are long-standing computer vision challenges that involve decomposing an image into semantically-meaningful segments without any labeled data. These tasks are particularly interesting in an unsupervised setting due to the difficulty and cost of obtaining dense image annotations, but existing unsupervised approaches struggle with complex scenes containing multiple objects. Differently from existing methods, which are purely based on deep learning, we take inspiration from traditional spectral segmentation methods by reframing image decomposition as a graph partitioning problem. Specifically, we examine the eigenvectors of the Laplacian of a feature affinity matrix from self-supervised networks. We find that these eigenvectors already decompose an image into meaningful segments, and can be readily used to localize objects in a scene. Furthermore, by clustering the features associated with these segments across a dataset, we can obtain well-delineated, nameable regions, i.e. semantic segmentations. Experiments on complex datasets (Pascal VOC, MS-COCO) demonstrate that our simple spectral method outperforms the state-of-the-art in unsupervised localization and segmentation by a significant margin. Furthermore, our method can be readily used for a variety of complex image editing tasks, such as background removal and compositing. 无监督定位和分割是长期存在的计算机视觉挑战，涉及将图像分解为具有语义意义的片段，而无需任何标记数据。由于获得密集图像注释的难度和成本，这些任务在无监督环境中特别有趣，但现有的无监督方法难以处理包含多个对象的复杂场景。与纯粹基于深度学习的现有方法不同，我们从传统的光谱分割方法中汲取灵感，将图像分解重新定义为图分割问题。具体来说，我们检查来自自监督网络的特征亲和力矩阵的拉普拉斯特征向量。我们发现这些特征向量已经将图像分解为有意义的片段，并且可以很容易地用于定位场景中的对象。此外，通过对数据集中与这些片段相关的特征进行聚类，我们可以获得明确描绘的、可命名的区域，即语义分割。对复杂数据集（Pascal VOC、MS-COCO）的实验表明，我们的简单谱方法在无监督定位和分割方面明显优于最先进的方法。此外，我们的方法可以轻松用于各种复杂的图像编辑任务，例如背景去除和合成。 本文提出了一种基于深度谱方法的无监督语义分割和定位方法，通过图划分问题重构图像分解任务。 Luke Melas-Kyriazi,Christian Rupprecht,Iro Laina,Andrea Vedaldi cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Prashanth Ramadoss,Lorenzo Rapetti,Yeshasvi Tirupachuri,Riccardo Grieco,Gianluca Milani,Enrico Valli,Stefano Dafarra,Silvio Traversaro,Daniele Pucci
title: Whole-Body Human Kinematics Estimation using Dynamical Inverse Kinematics and Contact-Aided Lie Group Kalman Filter
title_zh: 使用动态逆运动学和接触辅助李群卡尔曼滤波器进行全身人体运动学估计
abstract: Full-body motion estimation of a human through wearable sensing technologies is challenging in the absence of position sensors. This paper contributes to the development of a model-based whole-body kinematics estimation algorithm using wearable distributed inertial and force-torque sensing. This is done by extending the existing dynamical optimization-based Inverse Kinematics (IK) approach for joint state estimation, in cascade, to include a center of pressure-based contact detector and a contact-aided Kalman filter on Lie groups for floating base pose estimation. The proposed method is tested in an experimental scenario where a human equipped with a sensorized suit and shoes performs walking motions. The proposed method is demonstrated to obtain a reliable reconstruction of the whole-body human motion.
summary: Full-body motion estimation of a human through wearable sensing technologies is challenging in the absence of position sensors. This paper contributes to the development of a model-based whole-body kinematics estimation algorithm using wearable distributed inertial and force-torque sensing. This is done by extending the existing dynamical optimization-based Inverse Kinematics (IK) approach for joint state estimation, in cascade, to include a center of pressure-based contact detector and a contact-aided Kalman filter on Lie groups for floating base pose estimation. The proposed method is tested in an experimental scenario where a human equipped with a sensorized suit and shoes performs walking motions. The proposed method is demonstrated to obtain a reliable reconstruction of the whole-body human motion.
abstract_zh: 在没有位置传感器的情况下，通过可穿戴传感技术对人体进行全身运动估计具有挑战性。本文有助于开发一种使用可穿戴分布式惯性和力扭矩传感的基于模型的全身运动学估计算法。这是通过扩展现有的基于动态优化的逆运动学 (IK) 方法来实现的，该方法用于级联联合状态估计，包括基于压力的接触检测器的中心和用于浮动基础姿态估计的李群上的接触辅助卡尔曼滤波器。所提出的方法在实验场景中进行了测试，其中配备传感服和鞋子的人执行步行动作。所提出的方法被证明可以获得全身人体运动的可靠重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动力学逆运动学和接触辅助李群卡尔曼滤波器的全身人体运动估计方法，利用可穿戴传感器实现无位置传感器的全身运动重建。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏位置传感器的情况下，通过可穿戴传感技术实现人体全身运动估计存在挑战，需开发无需外部定位的模型驱动算法。
AI.method: 扩展动力学优化逆运动学方法，结合基于压力中心的接触检测器与接触辅助李群卡尔曼滤波器，实现浮基姿态估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能可靠重建穿戴传感服和鞋子的人类行走全身运动。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型驱动方法有效解决了无位置传感器下的全身运动估计问题，为可穿戴设备应用提供了新思路。

title: FactPEGASUS: Factuality-Aware Pre-training and Fine-tuning for Abstractive Summarization
title_zh: FactPEGASUS：用于抽象概括的事实感知预训练和微调
abstract: We present FactPEGASUS, an abstractive summarization model that addresses the problem of factuality during pre-training and fine-tuning: (1) We augment the sentence selection strategy of PEGASUS's (Zhang et al., 2020) pre-training objective to create pseudo-summaries that are both important and factual; (2) We introduce three complementary components for fine-tuning. The corrector removes hallucinations present in the reference summary, the contrastor uses contrastive learning to better differentiate nonfactual summaries from factual ones, and the connector bridges the gap between the pre-training and fine-tuning for better transfer of knowledge. Experiments on three downstream tasks demonstrate that FactPEGASUS substantially improves factuality evaluated by multiple automatic metrics and humans. Our thorough analysis suggests that FactPEGASUS is more factual than using the original pre-training objective in zero-shot and few-shot settings, retains factual behavior more robustly than strong baselines, and does not rely entirely on becoming more extractive to improve factuality. Our code and data are publicly available at: https://github.com/meetdavidwan/factpegasus
summary: We present FactPEGASUS, an abstractive summarization model that addresses the problem of factuality during pre-training and fine-tuning: (1) We augment the sentence selection strategy of PEGASUS's (Zhang et al., 2020) pre-training objective to create pseudo-summaries that are both important and factual; (2) We introduce three complementary components for fine-tuning. The corrector removes hallucinations present in the reference summary, the contrastor uses contrastive learning to better differentiate nonfactual summaries from factual ones, and the connector bridges the gap between the pre-training and fine-tuning for better transfer of knowledge. Experiments on three downstream tasks demonstrate that FactPEGASUS substantially improves factuality evaluated by multiple automatic metrics and humans. Our thorough analysis suggests that FactPEGASUS is more factual than using the original pre-training objective in zero-shot and few-shot settings, retains factual behavior more robustly than strong baselines, and does not rely entirely on becoming more extractive to improve factuality. Our code and data are publicly available at: https://github.com/meetdavidwan/factpegasus
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 FactPEGASUS，一种抽象摘要模型，它解决了预训练和微调过程中的事实性问题：（1）我们增强了 PEGASUS（Zhang 等人，2020）预训练目标的句子选择策略，以创建既重要又真实的伪摘要； (2)我们引入了三个互补的组件进行微调。校正器消除了参考摘要中存在的幻觉，对比器使用对比学习来更好地区分非事实摘要与事实摘要，连接器弥合了预训练和微调之间的差距，以更好地传递知识。对三个下游任务的实验表明，FactPEGASUS 极大地提高了多个自动指标和人类评估的真实性。我们的全面分析表明，FactPEGASUS 比在零样本和少样本设置中使用原始预训练目标更加真实，比强基线更稳健地保留事实行为，并且不完全依赖变得更加提取来提高真实性。我们的代码和数据可公开获取：https://github.com/meetdavidwan/factpegasus

AI.tldr: 开发一种事实性感知的预训练和微调方法FactPEGASUS，以提升生成式摘要的事实准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有摘要模型在生成过程中容易出现事实错误（如幻觉），导致摘要可靠性不足。
AI.method: 改进PEGASUS预训练阶段的句子选择策略生成更准确的伪摘要，并在微调阶段引入校正器（去除幻觉）、对比器（区分事实与非事实摘要）和连接器（促进知识迁移）三组件。
AI.result: 在三个下游任务中，FactPEGASUS在自动指标和人类评估中均显著提升事实性，尤其在零样本/少样本场景下优于基线模型，且无需过度依赖提取式方法。
AI.conclusion: FactPEGASUS通过事实性感知的预训练和微调策略，有效提升了生成摘要的事实准确性，且方法具有鲁棒性和可扩展性。

Experiments on three downstream tasks demonstrate that FactPEGASUS substantially improves factuality evaluated by multiple automatic metrics and humans. Our thorough analysis suggests that FactPEGASUS is more factual than using the original pre-training objective in zero-shot and few-shot settings, retains factual behavior more robustly than strong baselines, and does not rely entirely on becoming more extractive to improve factuality. Our code and data are publicly available at: https://github.com/meetdavidwan/factpegasus 我们提出了 FactPEGASUS，一种抽象摘要模型，它解决了预训练和微调过程中的事实性问题：（1）我们增强了 PEGASUS（Zhang 等人，2020）预训练目标的句子选择策略，以创建既重要又真实的伪摘要； (2)我们引入了三个互补的组件进行微调。校正器消除了参考摘要中存在的幻觉，对比器使用对比学习来更好地区分非事实摘要与事实摘要，连接器弥合了预训练和微调之间的差距，以更好地传递知识。对三个下游任务的实验表明，FactPEGASUS 极大地提高了多个自动指标和人类评估的真实性。我们的全面分析表明，FactPEGASUS 比在零样本和少样本设置中使用原始预训练目标更加真实，比强基线更稳健地保留事实行为，并且不完全依赖变得更加提取来提高真实性。我们的代码和数据可公开获取：https://github.com/meetdavidwan/factpegasus 开发一种事实性感知的预训练和微调方法FactPEGASUS，以提升生成式摘要的事实准确性。 David Wan,Mohit Bansal cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Igor Nunes,Mike Heddes,Tony Givargis,Alexandru Nicolau,Alex Veidenbaum
title: GraphHD: Efficient graph classification using hyperdimensional computing
title_zh: GraphHD：使用超维计算进行高效的图分类
abstract: Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) developed by Kanerva is a computational model for machine learning inspired by neuroscience. HDC exploits characteristics of biological neural systems such as high-dimensionality, randomness and a holographic representation of information to achieve a good balance between accuracy, efficiency and robustness. HDC models have already been proven to be useful in different learning applications, especially in resource-limited settings such as the increasingly popular Internet of Things (IoT). One class of learning tasks that is missing from the current body of work on HDC is graph classification. Graphs are among the most important forms of information representation, yet, to this day, HDC algorithms have not been applied to the graph learning problem in a general sense. Moreover, graph learning in IoT and sensor networks, with limited compute capabilities, introduce challenges to the overall design methodology. In this paper, we present GraphHD$-$a baseline approach for graph classification with HDC. We evaluate GraphHD on real-world graph classification problems. Our results show that when compared to the state-of-the-art Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) the proposed model achieves comparable accuracy, while training and inference times are on average 14.6$\times$ and 2.0$\times$ faster, respectively.
summary: Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) developed by Kanerva is a computational model for machine learning inspired by neuroscience. HDC exploits characteristics of biological neural systems such as high-dimensionality, randomness and a holographic representation of information to achieve a good balance between accuracy, efficiency and robustness. HDC models have already been proven to be useful in different learning applications, especially in resource-limited settings such as the increasingly popular Internet of Things (IoT). One class of learning tasks that is missing from the current body of work on HDC is graph classification. Graphs are among the most important forms of information representation, yet, to this day, HDC algorithms have not been applied to the graph learning problem in a general sense. Moreover, graph learning in IoT and sensor networks, with limited compute capabilities, introduce challenges to the overall design methodology. In this paper, we present GraphHD$-$a baseline approach for graph classification with HDC. We evaluate GraphHD on real-world graph classification problems. Our results show that when compared to the state-of-the-art Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) the proposed model achieves comparable accuracy, while training and inference times are on average 14.6$\times$ and 2.0$\times$ faster, respectively.
abstract_zh: Kanerva 开发的超维计算（HDC）是一种受神经科学启发的机器学习计算模型。 HDC利用生物神经系统的高维性、随机性和信息的全息表示等特点，在准确性、效率和鲁棒性之间取得良好的平衡。 HDC 模型已被证明在不同的学习应用中非常有用，尤其是在资源有限的环境中，例如日益流行的物联网 (IoT)。当前 HDC 工作中缺少的一类学习任务是图分类。图是最重要的信息表示形式之一，然而，迄今为止，HDC 算法尚未应用于一般意义上的图学习问题。此外，物联网和传感器网络中的图学习由于计算能力有限，给整体设计方法带来了挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 GraphHD$-$ 一种使用 HDC 进行图分类的基线方法。我们在现实世界的图分类问题上评估 GraphHD。我们的结果表明，与最先进的图神经网络 (GNN) 相比，所提出的模型达到了相当的精度，而训练和推理时间平均分别快了 14.6$\times$ 和 2.0$\times$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GraphHD，一种基于超维计算（HDC）的图分类方法，旨在解决资源受限环境下的图学习问题。
AI.motivation: 当前HDC模型尚未有效应用于图分类任务，而图数据在物联网等资源受限场景中具有重要应用需求，需设计高效且鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过将图结构编码为高维随机向量，并利用HDC的分布式表示特性进行分类，提出GraphHD框架以实现高效计算。
AI.result: 在真实图分类任务中，GraphHD的准确率与先进图神经网络（GNN）相当，但训练和推理速度分别快14.6倍和2.0倍。
AI.conclusion: GraphHD验证了HDC在图分类中的有效性，为资源受限场景提供了高效替代方案，推动HDC在图学习领域的应用发展。

authors_text: Jialiang Sun,Xiaohu Zheng,Wen Yao,Xiaoya Zhang,Weien Zhou,Xiaoqian Chen
title: Heat Source Layout Optimization Using Automatic Deep Learning Surrogate and Multimodal Neighborhood Search Algorithm
title_zh: 使用自动深度学习代理和多模态邻域搜索算法的热源布局优化
abstract: In satellite layout design, heat source layout optimization (HSLO) is an effective technique to decrease the maximum temperature and improve the heat management of the whole system. Recently, deep learning surrogate assisted HSLO has been proposed, which learns the mapping from layout to its corresponding temperature field, so as to substitute the simulation during optimization to decrease the computational cost largely. However, it faces two main challenges: 1) the neural network surrogate for the certain task is often manually designed to be complex and requires rich debugging experience, which is challenging for the designers in the engineering field; 2) existing algorithms for HSLO could only obtain a near optimal solution in single optimization and are easily trapped in local optimum. To address the first challenge, considering reducing the total parameter numbers and ensuring the similar accuracy as well as, a neural architecture search (NAS) method combined with Feature Pyramid Network (FPN) framework is developed to realize the purpose of automatically searching for a small deep learning surrogate model for HSLO. To address the second challenge, a multimodal neighborhood search based layout optimization algorithm (MNSLO) is proposed, which could obtain more and better approximate optimal design schemes simultaneously in single optimization. Finally, two typical two-dimensional heat conduction optimization problems are utilized to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. With the similar accuracy, NAS finds models with 80% fewer parameters, 64% fewer FLOPs and 36% faster inference time than the original FPN. Besides, with the assistance of deep learning surrogate by automatic search, MNSLO could achieve multiple near optimal design schemes simultaneously to provide more design diversities for designers.
summary: In satellite layout design, heat source layout optimization (HSLO) is an effective technique to decrease the maximum temperature and improve the heat management of the whole system. Recently, deep learning surrogate assisted HSLO has been proposed, which learns the mapping from layout to its corresponding temperature field, so as to substitute the simulation during optimization to decrease the computational cost largely. However, it faces two main challenges: 1) the neural network surrogate for the certain task is often manually designed to be complex and requires rich debugging experience, which is challenging for the designers in the engineering field; 2) existing algorithms for HSLO could only obtain a near optimal solution in single optimization and are easily trapped in local optimum. To address the first challenge, considering reducing the total parameter numbers and ensuring the similar accuracy as well as, a neural architecture search (NAS) method combined with Feature Pyramid Network (FPN) framework is developed to realize the purpose of automatically searching for a small deep learning surrogate model for HSLO. To address the second challenge, a multimodal neighborhood search based layout optimization algorithm (MNSLO) is proposed, which could obtain more and better approximate optimal design schemes simultaneously in single optimization. Finally, two typical two-dimensional heat conduction optimization problems are utilized to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. With the similar accuracy, NAS finds models with 80% fewer parameters, 64% fewer FLOPs and 36% faster inference time than the original FPN. Besides, with the assistance of deep learning surrogate by automatic search, MNSLO could achieve multiple near optimal design schemes simultaneously to provide more design diversities for designers.
abstract_zh: 在卫星布局设计中，热源布局优化（HSLO）是降低最高温度并改善整个系统热管理的有效技术。最近，深度学习代理辅助HSLO被提出，它学习从布局到相应温度场的映射，从而在优化过程中替代模拟，从而大大降低计算成本。然而，它面临两个主要挑战：1）特定任务的神经网络代理往往是手工设计的，比较复杂，需要丰富的调试经验，这对工程领域的设计人员来说是一个挑战； 2）现有的HSLO算法只能在单次优化中获得接近最优解，容易陷入局部最优。为了解决第一个挑战，考虑到减少总参数数量并确保相似的精度，开发了一种结合特征金字塔网络（FPN）框架的神经架构搜索（NAS）方法，以实现自动搜索HSLO的小型深度学习代理模型的目的。针对第二个挑战，提出了一种基于多模态邻域搜索的布局优化算法（MNSLO），该算法可以在单次优化中同时获得更多、更好的近似最优设计方案。最后，利用两个典型的二维热传导优化问题来证明该方法的有效性。在相似的精度下，NAS 发现的模型比原始 FPN 的参数少了 80%，FLOP 少了 64%，推理时间快了 36%。此外，借助自动搜索的深度学习代理的帮助，MNSLO可以同时实现多个接近最优的设计方案，为设计者提供更多的设计多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合自动深度学习代理模型和多模态邻域搜索算法的热源布局优化方法，以解决卫星设计中的高温问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习代理模型需人工设计且复杂，优化算法易陷入局部最优，难以满足工程设计需求。
AI.method: 采用神经架构搜索（NAS）结合特征金字塔网络（FPN）自动构建轻量化代理模型，并设计多模态邻域搜索算法（MNSLO）实现多近优解同步求解。
AI.result: NAS模型参数量减少80%，计算速度提升36%；MNSLO在单次优化中生成多个近优方案，显著提升设计多样性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过自动化模型搜索与多模态优化算法，有效降低了计算成本并提升了热源布局设计的灵活性与优化质量。

authors_text: Evgenii Nikishin,Max Schwarzer,Pierluca D'Oro,Pierre-Luc Bacon,Aaron Courville
title: The Primacy Bias in Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习中的首要偏见
abstract: This work identifies a common flaw of deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms: a tendency to rely on early interactions and ignore useful evidence encountered later. Because of training on progressively growing datasets, deep RL agents incur a risk of overfitting to earlier experiences, negatively affecting the rest of the learning process. Inspired by cognitive science, we refer to this effect as the primacy bias. Through a series of experiments, we dissect the algorithmic aspects of deep RL that exacerbate this bias. We then propose a simple yet generally-applicable mechanism that tackles the primacy bias by periodically resetting a part of the agent. We apply this mechanism to algorithms in both discrete (Atari 100k) and continuous action (DeepMind Control Suite) domains, consistently improving their performance.
summary: This work identifies a common flaw of deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms: a tendency to rely on early interactions and ignore useful evidence encountered later. Because of training on progressively growing datasets, deep RL agents incur a risk of overfitting to earlier experiences, negatively affecting the rest of the learning process. Inspired by cognitive science, we refer to this effect as the primacy bias. Through a series of experiments, we dissect the algorithmic aspects of deep RL that exacerbate this bias. We then propose a simple yet generally-applicable mechanism that tackles the primacy bias by periodically resetting a part of the agent. We apply this mechanism to algorithms in both discrete (Atari 100k) and continuous action (DeepMind Control Suite) domains, consistently improving their performance.
abstract_zh: 这项工作发现了深度强化学习（RL）算法的一个常见缺陷：倾向于依赖早期交互而忽略后来遇到的有用证据。由于在逐渐增长的数据集上进行训练，深度强化学习代理存在过度拟合早期经验的风险，从而对学习过程的其余部分产生负面影响。受认知科学的启发，我们将这种效应称为首要偏见。通过一系列实验，我们剖析了深度强化学习的算法方面加剧了这种偏差。然后，我们提出了一种简单但普遍适用的机制，通过定期重置代理的一部分来解决首要偏差。我们将此机制应用于离散 (Atari 100k) 和连续操作 (DeepMind Control Suite) 领域的算法，不断提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文识别了深度强化学习算法中的首因偏差问题，并提出通过定期重置智能体部分组件来缓解该问题的通用机制。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习算法因过度依赖早期经验而产生首因偏差，导致后续学习性能下降，需寻找有效解决方案。
AI.method: 受认知科学启发，设计周期性重置智能体部分参数的机制，应用于离散和连续动作空间任务。
AI.result: 在Atari 100k和DeepMind Control Suite基准测试中，该方法显著提升了算法性能。
AI.conclusion: 首因偏差是深度强化学习的重要挑战，提出的重置机制提供了一种简单有效的通用解决方案。

authors_text: Zenan Zhu,Seyed Mostafa Rezayat Sorkhabadi,Yan Gu,Wenlong Zhang
title: Design and Evaluation of an Invariant Extended Kalman Filter for Trunk Motion Estimation with Sensor Misalignment
title_zh: 用于传感器失准躯干运动估计的不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器的设计和评估
abstract: Understanding human motion is of critical importance for health monitoring and control of assistive robots, yet many human kinematic variables cannot be directly or accurately measured by wearable sensors. In recent years, invariant extended Kalman filtering (InEKF) has shown a great potential in nonlinear state estimation, but its applications to human poses new challenges, including imperfect placement of wearable sensors and inaccurate measurement models. To address these challenges, this paper proposes an augmented InEKF design which considers the misalignment of the inertial sensor at the trunk as part of the states and preserves the group affine property for the process model. Personalized lower-extremity forward kinematic models are built and employed as the measurement model for the augmented InEKF. Observability analysis for the new InEKF design is presented. The filter is evaluated with three subjects in squatting, rolling-foot walking, and ladder-climbing motions. Experimental results validate the superior performance of the proposed InEKF over the state-of-the-art InEKF. Improved accuracy and faster convergence in estimating the velocity and orientation of human, in all three motions, are achieved despite the significant initial estimation errors and the uncertainties associated with the forward kinematic measurement model.
summary: Understanding human motion is of critical importance for health monitoring and control of assistive robots, yet many human kinematic variables cannot be directly or accurately measured by wearable sensors. In recent years, invariant extended Kalman filtering (InEKF) has shown a great potential in nonlinear state estimation, but its applications to human poses new challenges, including imperfect placement of wearable sensors and inaccurate measurement models. To address these challenges, this paper proposes an augmented InEKF design which considers the misalignment of the inertial sensor at the trunk as part of the states and preserves the group affine property for the process model. Personalized lower-extremity forward kinematic models are built and employed as the measurement model for the augmented InEKF. Observability analysis for the new InEKF design is presented. The filter is evaluated with three subjects in squatting, rolling-foot walking, and ladder-climbing motions. Experimental results validate the superior performance of the proposed InEKF over the state-of-the-art InEKF. Improved accuracy and faster convergence in estimating the velocity and orientation of human, in all three motions, are achieved despite the significant initial estimation errors and the uncertainties associated with the forward kinematic measurement model.
abstract_zh: 了解人体运动对于辅助机器人的健康监测和控制至关重要，但许多人体运动学变量无法通过可穿戴传感器直接或准确测量。近年来，不变扩展卡尔曼滤波（InEKF）在非线性状态估计方面显示出巨大潜力，但其在人类中的应用提出了新的挑战，包括可穿戴传感器的不完美放置和不准确的测量模型。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种增强的 InEKF 设计，该设计将躯干惯性传感器的未对准视为状态的一部分，并保留过程模型的群仿射属性。建立了个性化的下肢正向运动学模型，并将其用作增强型 InEKF 的测量模型。提出了新 InEKF 设计的可观测性分析。该过滤器通过三个受试者的蹲下、滚脚行走和爬梯动作进行评估。实验结果验证了所提出的 InEKF 相对于最先进的 InEKF 的优越性能。尽管存在显着的初始估计误差以及与正向运动测量模型相关的不确定性，但在所有三种运动中，在估计人体速度和方向方面都实现了更高的准确性和更快的收敛性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并评估了一种改进的不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器（InEKF），用于在传感器失准情况下估计人体躯干运动。
AI.motivation: 人体运动理解对于健康监测和辅助机器人控制至关重要，但许多运动参数无法通过可穿戴传感器直接准确测量。传统的InEKF在人体姿态估计中面临传感器放置不完美和测量模型不准确等挑战。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种改进的InEKF设计，将躯干惯性传感器的失准作为状态的一部分，并保留过程模型的群仿射特性。同时，构建了个性化的下肢正向运动学模型作为测量模型，并进行了可观测性分析。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了改进的InEKF在估计人体速度和姿态方面优于现有InEKF，即使存在显著的初始估计误差和正向运动学模型的不确定性，也能实现更高的准确性和更快的收敛。
AI.conclusion: 改进的InEKF设计在处理传感器失准和模型不确定性方面表现出优越性能，为人体运动估计提供了有效的方法。

authors_text: Bahareh Banyassady,Mark de Berg,Karl Bringmann,Kevin Buchin,Henning Fernau,Dan Halperin,Irina Kostitsyna,Yoshio Okamoto,Stijn Slot
title: Unlabeled Multi-Robot Motion Planning with Tighter Separation Bounds
title_zh: 具有更紧密分离界限的无标签多机器人运动规划
comment: A shorter version of this paper appeared in the Proceedings of the 38th International Symposium on Computational Geometry (SoCG 2022)
comments: A shorter version of this paper appeared in the Proceedings of the 38th International Symposium on Computational Geometry (SoCG 2022)
abstract: We consider the unlabeled motion-planning problem of $m$ unit-disc robots moving in a simple polygonal workspace of $n$ edges. The goal is to find a motion plan that moves the robots to a given set of $m$ target positions. For the unlabeled variant, it does not matter which robot reaches which target position as long as all target positions are occupied in the end. If the workspace has narrow passages such that the robots cannot fit through them, then the free configuration space, representing all possible unobstructed positions of the robots, will consist of multiple connected components. Even if in each component of the free space the number of targets matches the number of start positions, the motion-planning problem does not always have a solution when the robots and their targets are positioned very densely. In this paper, we prove tight bounds on how much separation between start and target positions is necessary to always guarantee a solution. Moreover, we describe an algorithm that always finds a solution in time $O(n \log n + mn + m^2)$ if the separation bounds are met. Specifically, we prove that the following separation is sufficient: any two start positions are at least distance $4$ apart, any two target positions are at least distance $4$ apart, and any pair of a start and a target positions is at least distance $3$ apart. We further show that when the free space consists of a single connected component, the separation between start and target positions is not necessary.
summary: We consider the unlabeled motion-planning problem of $m$ unit-disc robots moving in a simple polygonal workspace of $n$ edges. The goal is to find a motion plan that moves the robots to a given set of $m$ target positions. For the unlabeled variant, it does not matter which robot reaches which target position as long as all target positions are occupied in the end. If the workspace has narrow passages such that the robots cannot fit through them, then the free configuration space, representing all possible unobstructed positions of the robots, will consist of multiple connected components. Even if in each component of the free space the number of targets matches the number of start positions, the motion-planning problem does not always have a solution when the robots and their targets are positioned very densely. In this paper, we prove tight bounds on how much separation between start and target positions is necessary to always guarantee a solution. Moreover, we describe an algorithm that always finds a solution in time $O(n \log n + mn + m^2)$ if the separation bounds are met. Specifically, we prove that the following separation is sufficient: any two start positions are at least distance $4$ apart, any two target positions are at least distance $4$ apart, and any pair of a start and a target positions is at least distance $3$ apart. We further show that when the free space consists of a single connected component, the separation between start and target positions is not necessary.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑 $m$ 单位圆盘机器人在 $n$ 边的简单多边形工作空间中移动的未标记运动规划问题。目标是找到一个运动计划，将机​​器人移动到一组给定的 $m$ 目标位置。对于未标记的变体，只要最终占据所有目标位置，哪个机器人到达哪个目标位置并不重要。如果工作空间有狭窄的通道，使得机器人无法通过它们，那么代表机器人所有可能的无障碍位置的自由配置空间将由多个连接的组件组成。即使在自由空间的每个组成部分中目标的数量与起始位置的数量相匹配，当机器人及其目标的位置非常密集时，运动规划问题并不总是有解决方案。在本文中，我们证明了起始位置和目标位置之间的距离对于始终保证解决方案所必需的严格限制。此外，我们描述了一种算法，如果满足分离界限，该算法总是在 $O(n \log n + mn + m^2)$ 时间内找到解决方案。具体来说，我们证明以下间隔是足够的：任何两个起始位置至少相距 $4$ 距离，任何两个目标位置至少相距 $4$ 距离，并且任何一对起始位置和目标位置至少相距 $3$ 距离。我们进一步表明，当自由空间由单个连接组件组成时，起始位置和目标位置之间的分离是不必要的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究无标签多机器人运动规划问题，针对狭窄通道导致的自由配置空间多连通分支情况，提出更紧的分离边界条件以保证问题可解性。
AI.motivation: 在存在狭窄通道的工作空间中，机器人密集布局可能导致自由配置空间分割，即使目标与起点数量匹配也可能无解。现有方法缺乏对必要分离距离的理论保证。
AI.method: 通过证明分离距离下界并设计满足条件的算法，当起点/目标间距满足4/3单位时，使用O(n log n + mn + m²)时间复杂度的规划方法。
AI.result: 证明了起点间距≥4、目标间距≥4且起点-目标间距≥3时问题必有解；当自由空间单连通时分离条件可省略。
AI.conclusion: 建立了确保无标签多机器人规划可解的分离边界理论，提出对应算法并证明单连通空间下的例外情况。

search_text: Unlabeled Multi-Robot Motion Planning with Tighter Separation Bounds 具有更紧密分离界限的无标签多机器人运动规划 We consider the unlabeled motion-planning problem of $m$ unit-disc robots moving in a simple polygonal workspace of $n$ edges. The goal is to find a motion plan that moves the robots to a given set of $m$ target positions. For the unlabeled variant, it does not matter which robot reaches which target position as long as all target positions are occupied in the end. If the workspace has narrow passages such that the robots cannot fit through them, then the free configuration space, representing all possible unobstructed positions of the robots, will consist of multiple connected components. Even if in each component of the free space the number of targets matches the number of start positions, the motion-planning problem does not always have a solution when the robots and their targets are positioned very densely. In this paper, we prove tight bounds on how much separation between start and target positions is necessary to always guarantee a solution. Moreover, we describe an algorithm that always finds a solution in time $O(n \log n + mn + m^2)$ if the separation bounds are met. Specifically, we prove that the following separation is sufficient: any two start positions are at least distance $4$ apart, any two target positions are at least distance $4$ apart, and any pair of a start and a target positions is at least distance $3$ apart. We further show that when the free space consists of a single connected component, the separation between start and target positions is not necessary. 我们考虑 $m$ 单位圆盘机器人在 $n$ 边的简单多边形工作空间中移动的未标记运动规划问题。目标是找到一个运动计划，将机​​器人移动到一组给定的 $m$ 目标位置。对于未标记的变体，只要最终占据所有目标位置，哪个机器人到达哪个目标位置并不重要。如果工作空间有狭窄的通道，使得机器人无法通过它们，那么代表机器人所有可能的无障碍位置的自由配置空间将由多个连接的组件组成。即使在自由空间的每个组成部分中目标的数量与起始位置的数量相匹配，当机器人及其目标的位置非常密集时，运动规划问题并不总是有解决方案。在本文中，我们证明了起始位置和目标位置之间的距离对于始终保证解决方案所必需的严格限制。此外，我们描述了一种算法，如果满足分离界限，该算法总是在 $O(n \log n + mn + m^2)$ 时间内找到解决方案。具体来说，我们证明以下间隔是足够的：任何两个起始位置至少相距 $4$ 距离，任何两个目标位置至少相距 $4$ 距离，并且任何一对起始位置和目标位置至少相距 $3$ 距离。我们进一步表明，当自由空间由单个连接组件组成时，起始位置和目标位置之间的分离是不必要的。 本文研究无标签多机器人运动规划问题，针对狭窄通道导致的自由配置空间多连通分支情况，提出更紧的分离边界条件以保证问题可解性。 Bahareh Banyassady,Mark de Berg,Karl Bringmann,Kevin Buchin,Henning Fernau,Dan Halperin,Irina Kostitsyna,Yoshio Okamoto,Stijn Slot cs.CG,cs.RO

title: Gradient-based Counterfactual Explanations using Tractable Probabilistic Models
title_zh: 使用易处理的概率模型进行基于梯度的反事实解释
abstract: Counterfactual examples are an appealing class of post-hoc explanations for machine learning models. Given input $x$ of class $y_1$, its counterfactual is a contrastive example $x^\prime$ of another class $y_0$. Current approaches primarily solve this task by a complex optimization: define an objective function based on the loss of the counterfactual outcome $y_0$ with hard or soft constraints, then optimize this function as a black-box. This "deep learning" approach, however, is rather slow, sometimes tricky, and may result in unrealistic counterfactual examples. In this work, we propose a novel approach to deal with these problems using only two gradient computations based on tractable probabilistic models. First, we compute an unconstrained counterfactual $u$ of $x$ to induce the counterfactual outcome $y_0$. Then, we adapt $u$ to higher density regions, resulting in $x^{\prime}$. Empirical evidence demonstrates the dominant advantages of our approach.
summary: Counterfactual examples are an appealing class of post-hoc explanations for machine learning models. Given input $x$ of class $y_1$, its counterfactual is a contrastive example $x^\prime$ of another class $y_0$. Current approaches primarily solve this task by a complex optimization: define an objective function based on the loss of the counterfactual outcome $y_0$ with hard or soft constraints, then optimize this function as a black-box. This "deep learning" approach, however, is rather slow, sometimes tricky, and may result in unrealistic counterfactual examples. In this work, we propose a novel approach to deal with these problems using only two gradient computations based on tractable probabilistic models. First, we compute an unconstrained counterfactual $u$ of $x$ to induce the counterfactual outcome $y_0$. Then, we adapt $u$ to higher density regions, resulting in $x^{\prime}$. Empirical evidence demonstrates the dominant advantages of our approach.
abstract_zh: 反事实示例是机器学习模型的一类有吸引力的事后解释。给定类 $y_1$ 的输入 $x$，其反事实是另一个类 $y_0$ 的对比示例 $x^\prime$。当前的方法主要通过复杂的优化来解决此任务：根据具有硬约束或软约束的反事实结果 $y_0$ 的损失定义目标函数，然后将该函数优化为黑盒。然而，这种“深度学习”方法相当缓慢，有时很棘手，并且可能会导致不切实际的反事实示例。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来处理这些问题，仅使用基于易于处理的概率模型的两次梯度计算。首先，我们计算 $x$ 的无约束反事实 $u$，以得出反事实结果 $y_0$。然后，我们将 $u$ 适应更高密度的区域，从而得到 $x^{\prime}$。经验证据证明了我们方法的显着优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可解释概率模型的梯度方法，用于生成更高效且现实的反事实解释。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实解释方法依赖复杂优化过程，存在计算速度慢、结果不现实等问题。
AI.method: 通过两次梯度计算：首先生成无约束反事实样本，再将其调整至高密度区域以提升合理性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在效率和生成质量上优于现有深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法利用概率模型梯度计算，有效解决了传统反事实解释的缺陷。

authors_text: Chendi Qu,Jianping He,Jialun Li,Chongrong Fang,Yilin Mo
title: Moving Target Interception Considering Dynamic Environment
title_zh: 考虑动态环境的移动目标拦截
abstract: The interception of moving targets is a widely studied issue. In this paper, we propose an algorithm of intercepting the moving target with a wheeled mobile robot in a dynamic environment. We first predict the future position of the target through polynomial fitting. The algorithm then generates an interception trajectory with path and speed decoupling. We use Hybrid A* search to plan a path and optimize it via gradient decent method. To avoid the dynamic obstacles in the environment, we introduce ST graph for speed planning. The speed curve is represented by piecewise Bézier curves for further optimization. Compared with other interception algorithms, we consider a dynamic environment and plan a safety trajectory which satisfies the kinematic characteristics of the wheeled robot while ensuring the accuracy of interception. Simulation illustrates that the algorithm successfully achieves the interception tasks and has high computational efficiency.
summary: The interception of moving targets is a widely studied issue. In this paper, we propose an algorithm of intercepting the moving target with a wheeled mobile robot in a dynamic environment. We first predict the future position of the target through polynomial fitting. The algorithm then generates an interception trajectory with path and speed decoupling. We use Hybrid A* search to plan a path and optimize it via gradient decent method. To avoid the dynamic obstacles in the environment, we introduce ST graph for speed planning. The speed curve is represented by piecewise Bézier curves for further optimization. Compared with other interception algorithms, we consider a dynamic environment and plan a safety trajectory which satisfies the kinematic characteristics of the wheeled robot while ensuring the accuracy of interception. Simulation illustrates that the algorithm successfully achieves the interception tasks and has high computational efficiency.
abstract_zh: 移动目标的拦截是一个广泛研究的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种在动态环境中用轮式移动机器人拦截运动目标的算法。我们首先通过多项式拟合预测目标的未来位置。然后，该算法生成路径和速度解耦的拦截轨迹。我们使用 Hybrid A* 搜索来规划路径并通过梯度下降法对其进行优化。为了避开环境中的动态障碍物，我们引入ST图进行速度规划。速度曲线采用分段贝塞尔曲线表示，以便进一步优化。与其他拦截算法相比，我们考虑动态环境，在保证拦截精度的同时，规划出满足轮式机器人运动学特性的安全轨迹。仿真结果表明，该算法成功实现了拦截任务，且计算效率较高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在动态环境中利用轮式移动机器人拦截移动目标的算法，通过预测目标位置、路径规划与速度优化实现高效拦截。
AI.motivation: 现有拦截算法在动态环境中的障碍物避让和运动学约束满足方面存在不足，导致拦截安全性与准确性不足。
AI.method: 采用多项式拟合预测目标轨迹，结合Hybrid A*算法与梯度下降法进行路径规划，利用ST图与分段Bézier曲线实现动态避障与速度优化。
AI.result: 仿真验证算法成功完成拦截任务，计算效率高且满足轮式机器人运动学特性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在动态环境中实现了安全、精确的拦截，优于传统方法，在路径规划与速度优化方面具有显著优势。

result: 仿真验证算法成功完成拦截任务，计算效率高且满足轮式机器人运动学特性。
conclusion: 该算法在动态环境中实现了安全、精确的拦截，优于传统方法，在路径规划与速度优化方面具有显著优势。
search_text: Moving Target Interception Considering Dynamic Environment 考虑动态环境的移动目标拦截 The interception of moving targets is a widely studied issue. In this paper, we propose an algorithm of intercepting the moving target with a wheeled mobile robot in a dynamic environment. We first predict the future position of the target through polynomial fitting. The algorithm then generates an interception trajectory with path and speed decoupling. We use Hybrid A* search to plan a path and optimize it via gradient decent method. To avoid the dynamic obstacles in the environment, we introduce ST graph for speed planning. The speed curve is represented by piecewise Bézier curves for further optimization. Compared with other interception algorithms, we consider a dynamic environment and plan a safety trajectory which satisfies the kinematic characteristics of the wheeled robot while ensuring the accuracy of interception. Simulation illustrates that the algorithm successfully achieves the interception tasks and has high computational efficiency. 移动目标的拦截是一个广泛研究的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种在动态环境中用轮式移动机器人拦截运动目标的算法。我们首先通过多项式拟合预测目标的未来位置。然后，该算法生成路径和速度解耦的拦截轨迹。我们使用 Hybrid A* 搜索来规划路径并通过梯度下降法对其进行优化。为了避开环境中的动态障碍物，我们引入ST图进行速度规划。速度曲线采用分段贝塞尔曲线表示，以便进一步优化。与其他拦截算法相比，我们考虑动态环境，在保证拦截精度的同时，规划出满足轮式机器人运动学特性的安全轨迹。仿真结果表明，该算法成功实现了拦截任务，且计算效率较高。 本文提出一种在动态环境中利用轮式移动机器人拦截移动目标的算法，通过预测目标位置、路径规划与速度优化实现高效拦截。 Chendi Qu,Jianping He,Jialun Li,Chongrong Fang,Yilin Mo cs.RO,eess.SY

title: JR2net: A Joint Non-Linear Representation and Recovery Network for Compressive Spectral Imaging
title_zh: JR2net：用于压缩光谱成像的联合非线性表示和恢复网络
abstract: Deep learning models are state-of-the-art in compressive spectral imaging (CSI) recovery. These methods use a deep neural network (DNN) as an image generator to learn non-linear mapping from compressed measurements to the spectral image. For instance, the deep spectral prior approach uses a convolutional autoencoder network (CAE) in the optimization algorithm to recover the spectral image by using a non-linear representation. However, the CAE training is detached from the recovery problem, which does not guarantee optimal representation of the spectral images for the CSI problem. This work proposes a joint non-linear representation and recovery network (JR2net), linking the representation and recovery task into a single optimization problem. JR2net consists of an optimization-inspired network following an ADMM formulation that learns a non-linear low-dimensional representation and simultaneously performs the spectral image recovery, trained via the end-to-end approach. Experimental results show the superiority of the proposed method with improvements up to 2.57 dB in PSNR and performance around 2000 times faster than state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Deep learning models are state-of-the-art in compressive spectral imaging (CSI) recovery. These methods use a deep neural network (DNN) as an image generator to learn non-linear mapping from compressed measurements to the spectral image. For instance, the deep spectral prior approach uses a convolutional autoencoder network (CAE) in the optimization algorithm to recover the spectral image by using a non-linear representation. However, the CAE training is detached from the recovery problem, which does not guarantee optimal representation of the spectral images for the CSI problem. This work proposes a joint non-linear representation and recovery network (JR2net), linking the representation and recovery task into a single optimization problem. JR2net consists of an optimization-inspired network following an ADMM formulation that learns a non-linear low-dimensional representation and simultaneously performs the spectral image recovery, trained via the end-to-end approach. Experimental results show the superiority of the proposed method with improvements up to 2.57 dB in PSNR and performance around 2000 times faster than state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型在压缩光谱成像 (CSI) 恢复方面是最先进的。这些方法使用深度神经网络 (DNN) 作为图像生成器来学习从压缩测量到光谱图像的非线性映射。例如，深度光谱先验方法在优化算法中使用卷积自动编码器网络（CAE），通过非线性表示来恢复光谱图像。然而，CAE 训练与恢复问题分离，这不能保证 CSI 问题的光谱图像的最佳表示。这项工作提出了一种联合非线性表示和恢复网络（JR2net），将表示和恢复任务链接到单个优化问题中。 JR2net 由遵循 ADMM 公式的优化网络组成，该公式学习非线性低维表示并同时执行光谱图像恢复，并通过端到端方法进行训练。实验结果表明，该方法具有优越性，PSNR 提高了 2.57 dB，性能比最先进的方法快了约 2000 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合非线性表示与恢复网络（JR2net），用于压缩光谱成像中的光谱图像恢复任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法中卷积自编码器（CAE）的训练与恢复任务分离，导致无法为压缩光谱成像（CSI）问题提供最优表示。
AI.method: 基于ADMM优化框架设计端到端网络，将非线性低维表示学习与光谱图像恢复整合为单一优化问题。
AI.result: 在PSNR指标上提升最高达2.57 dB，且运行速度较现有方法快约2000倍。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化框架有效提升了压缩光谱成像的恢复质量与计算效率，验证了任务整合的优越性。

title: A BenchCouncil View on Benchmarking Emerging and Future Computing
title_zh: BenchCouncil 对新兴和未来计算基准测试的看法
comment: To appear BenchCouncil Transactions on Benchmarks, Standards and Evaluation (TBench)
comments: To appear BenchCouncil Transactions on Benchmarks, Standards and Evaluation (TBench)
abstract: The measurable properties of the artifacts or objects in the computer, management, or finance disciplines are extrinsic, not inherent -- dependent on their problem definitions and solution instantiations. Only after the instantiation can the solutions to the problem be measured. The processes of definition, instantiation, and measurement are entangled, and they have complex mutual influences. Meanwhile, the technology inertia brings instantiation bias -- trapped into a subspace or even a point at a high-dimension solution space. These daunting challenges, which emerging computing aggravates, make metrology can not work for benchmark communities. It is pressing to establish independent benchmark science and engineering. This article presents a unifying benchmark definition, a conceptual framework, and a traceable and supervised learning-based benchmarking methodology, laying the foundation for benchmark science and engineering. I also discuss BenchCouncil's plans for emerging and future computing. The ongoing projects include defining the challenges of intelligence, instinct, quantum computers, Metaverse, planet-scale computers, and reformulating data centers, artificial intelligence for science, and CPU benchmark suites. Also, BenchCouncil will collaborate with ComputerCouncil on open-source computer systems for planet-scale computing, AI for science systems, and Metaverse.
summary: The measurable properties of the artifacts or objects in the computer, management, or finance disciplines are extrinsic, not inherent -- dependent on their problem definitions and solution instantiations. Only after the instantiation can the solutions to the problem be measured. The processes of definition, instantiation, and measurement are entangled, and they have complex mutual influences. Meanwhile, the technology inertia brings instantiation bias -- trapped into a subspace or even a point at a high-dimension solution space. These daunting challenges, which emerging computing aggravates, make metrology can not work for benchmark communities. It is pressing to establish independent benchmark science and engineering. This article presents a unifying benchmark definition, a conceptual framework, and a traceable and supervised learning-based benchmarking methodology, laying the foundation for benchmark science and engineering. I also discuss BenchCouncil's plans for emerging and future computing. The ongoing projects include defining the challenges of intelligence, instinct, quantum computers, Metaverse, planet-scale computers, and reformulating data centers, artificial intelligence for science, and CPU benchmark suites. Also, BenchCouncil will collaborate with ComputerCouncil on open-source computer systems for planet-scale computing, AI for science systems, and Metaverse.
abstract_zh: 计算机、管理或金融学科中的工件或对象的可测量属性是外在的，而不是固有的——取决于它们的问题定义和解决方案实例。只有实例化之后才能衡量问题的解决方案。定义、实例化和测量的过程是纠缠在一起的，并且它们之间存在着复杂的相互影响。同时，技术惯性带来了实例化偏差——陷入子空间甚至高维解空间中的一个点。新兴计算加剧了这些令人畏惧的挑战，使得计量学无法为基准社区服务。建立独立的科学与工程标杆刻不容缓。本文提出了统一的基准定义、概念框架以及可追溯、基于监督学习的基准测试方法，为基准科学与工程奠定了基础。我还讨论了 BenchCouncil 针对新兴和未来计算的计划。正在进行的项目包括定义智能、本能、量子计算机、Metaverse、行星级计算机的挑战，以及重新制定数据中心、科学人工智能和 CPU 基准套件。此外，BenchCouncil 将与 ComputerCouncil 合作开发用于行星规模计算的开源计算机系统、用于科学系统的人工智能和 Metaverse。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的基准定义和方法论，以应对新兴及未来计算领域的基准测试挑战，并介绍了BenchCouncil的相关计划。
AI.motivation: 传统度量方法难以适应新兴计算技术带来的复杂性，如技术惯性导致的实例化偏差及高维解空间限制，亟需建立独立的基准科学与工程体系。
AI.method: 构建统一基准定义框架，结合可追溯的监督学习方法，形成概念模型与基准测试方法论。
AI.result: 为基准科学与工程奠定理论基础，并规划了智能、量子计算、元宇宙等领域的基准测试项目。
AI.conclusion: 需突破传统基准局限，BenchCouncil将联合多方推动开源系统与科学人工智能等方向的基准研究。

title: Efficient Algorithms for Planning with Participation Constraints
title_zh: 具有参与约束的规划的高效算法
abstract: We consider the problem of planning with participation constraints introduced in [Zhang et al., 2022]. In this problem, a principal chooses actions in a Markov decision process, resulting in separate utilities for the principal and the agent. However, the agent can and will choose to end the process whenever his expected onward utility becomes negative. The principal seeks to compute and commit to a policy that maximizes her expected utility, under the constraint that the agent should always want to continue participating. We provide the first polynomial-time exact algorithm for this problem for finite-horizon settings, where previously only an additive $\varepsilon$-approximation algorithm was known. Our approach can also be extended to the (discounted) infinite-horizon case, for which we give an algorithm that runs in time polynomial in the size of the input and $\log(1/\varepsilon)$, and returns a policy that is optimal up to an additive error of $\varepsilon$.
summary: We consider the problem of planning with participation constraints introduced in [Zhang et al., 2022]. In this problem, a principal chooses actions in a Markov decision process, resulting in separate utilities for the principal and the agent. However, the agent can and will choose to end the process whenever his expected onward utility becomes negative. The principal seeks to compute and commit to a policy that maximizes her expected utility, under the constraint that the agent should always want to continue participating. We provide the first polynomial-time exact algorithm for this problem for finite-horizon settings, where previously only an additive $\varepsilon$-approximation algorithm was known. Our approach can also be extended to the (discounted) infinite-horizon case, for which we give an algorithm that runs in time polynomial in the size of the input and $\log(1/\varepsilon)$, and returns a policy that is optimal up to an additive error of $\varepsilon$.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑[Zhang et al., 2022]中引入的参与约束的规划问题。在此问题中，委托人在马尔可夫决策过程中选择操作，从而为委托人和代理人提供单独的效用。然而，当代理人的预期后续效用变为负值时，代理人可以并且将会选择结束该过程。在代理人应该始终希望继续参与的约束下，委托人寻求计算并承诺最大化其预期效用的政策。我们为有限范围设置的这个问题提供了第一个多项式时间精确算法，以前只知道加法 $\varepsilon$ 近似算法。我们的方法也可以扩展到（折扣）无限范围的情况，对于这种情况，我们给出一个算法，该算法在输入大小和 $\log(1/\varepsilon)$ 的时间多项式中运行，并返回一个在附加误差为 $\varepsilon$ 的情况下最优的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文针对带有参与约束的规划问题，提出高效算法确保代理人在整个过程中持续参与并最大化主体的预期效用。
AI.motivation: 原有方法仅能提供近似解，且缺乏对无限时间范围的有效处理，需设计精确多项式时间算法并扩展至无限时间场景。
AI.method: 提出有限时间范围的多项式时间精确算法，并扩展至无限时间范围，设计时间复杂度与输入规模及log(1/ε)相关的近似算法。
AI.result: 首次实现有限时间的精确多项式算法，无限时间算法误差控制在ε内，且时间复杂度满足多项式要求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为参与约束下的规划问题提供了理论保证与高效解决方案，适用于有限及无限时间场景。

search_text: Efficient Algorithms for Planning with Participation Constraints 具有参与约束的规划的高效算法 We consider the problem of planning with participation constraints introduced in [Zhang et al., 2022]. In this problem, a principal chooses actions in a Markov decision process, resulting in separate utilities for the principal and the agent. However, the agent can and will choose to end the process whenever his expected onward utility becomes negative. The principal seeks to compute and commit to a policy that maximizes her expected utility, under the constraint that the agent should always want to continue participating. We provide the first polynomial-time exact algorithm for this problem for finite-horizon settings, where previously only an additive $\varepsilon$-approximation algorithm was known. Our approach can also be extended to the (discounted) infinite-horizon case, for which we give an algorithm that runs in time polynomial in the size of the input and $\log(1/\varepsilon)$, and returns a policy that is optimal up to an additive error of $\varepsilon$. 我们考虑[Zhang et al., 2022]中引入的参与约束的规划问题。在此问题中，委托人在马尔可夫决策过程中选择操作，从而为委托人和代理人提供单独的效用。然而，当代理人的预期后续效用变为负值时，代理人可以并且将会选择结束该过程。在代理人应该始终希望继续参与的约束下，委托人寻求计算并承诺最大化其预期效用的政策。我们为有限范围设置的这个问题提供了第一个多项式时间精确算法，以前只知道加法 $\varepsilon$ 近似算法。我们的方法也可以扩展到（折扣）无限范围的情况，对于这种情况，我们给出一个算法，该算法在输入大小和 $\log(1/\varepsilon)$ 的时间多项式中运行，并返回一个在附加误差为 $\varepsilon$ 的情况下最优的策略。 本文针对带有参与约束的规划问题，提出高效算法确保代理人在整个过程中持续参与并最大化主体的预期效用。 Hanrui Zhang,Yu Cheng,Vincent Conitzer cs.GT,cs.AI,cs.DS,cs.LG

title: An Experimental Comparison of Floating Base Estimators for Humanoid Robots with Flat Feet
title_zh: 平足仿人机器人浮基估计器的实验比较
abstract: Extended Kalman filtering is a common approach to achieve floating base estimation of a humanoid robot. These filters rely on measurements from an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) and relative forward kinematics for estimating the base position-and-orientation and its linear velocity along with the augmented states of feet position-and-orientation, thus giving them their name, flat-foot filters. However, the availability of only partial measurements often poses the question of consistency in the filter design. In this paper, we perform an experimental comparison of state-of-the-art flat-foot filters based on the representation choice of state, observation, matrix Lie group error and system dynamics evaluated for filter consistency and trajectory errors. The comparison is performed over simulated and real-world experiments conducted on the iCub humanoid platform.
summary: Extended Kalman filtering is a common approach to achieve floating base estimation of a humanoid robot. These filters rely on measurements from an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) and relative forward kinematics for estimating the base position-and-orientation and its linear velocity along with the augmented states of feet position-and-orientation, thus giving them their name, flat-foot filters. However, the availability of only partial measurements often poses the question of consistency in the filter design. In this paper, we perform an experimental comparison of state-of-the-art flat-foot filters based on the representation choice of state, observation, matrix Lie group error and system dynamics evaluated for filter consistency and trajectory errors. The comparison is performed over simulated and real-world experiments conducted on the iCub humanoid platform.
abstract_zh: 扩展卡尔曼滤波是实现人形机器人浮基估计的常用方法。这些滤波器依靠惯性测量单元 (IMU) 的测量和相对正向运动学来估计基础位置和方向及其线速度以及脚位置和方向的增强状态，因此得名“平足滤波器”。然而，仅部分测量的可用性常常会带来滤波器设计的一致性问题。在本文中，我们基于状态、观察、矩阵李群误差的表示选择以及评估滤波器一致性和轨迹误差的系统动力学，对最先进的平脚滤波器进行了实验比较。该比较是在 iCub 人形平台上进行的模拟实验和真实实验中进行的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验比较了用于双足机器人浮动基座估计的先进扁平脚滤波器，评估其一致性及轨迹误差。
AI.motivation: 传统扩展卡尔曼滤波器在部分测量条件下存在一致性问题，需通过不同状态表示和动态模型优化估计性能。
AI.method: 基于矩阵李群误差、状态观测矩阵及系统动力学表示，对多种扁平脚滤波器进行仿真与真实iCub机器人实验对比。
AI.result: 实验表明，特定状态表示和误差模型能显著提升滤波器一致性，减少轨迹估计误差。
AI.conclusion: 选择合适的状态表示和动态模型是提升浮动基座估计精度的关键，为双足机器人控制提供理论支持。

authors_text: Zhenpei Yang,Zhile Ren,Miguel Angel Bautista,Zaiwei Zhang,Qi Shan,Qixing Huang
title: FvOR: Robust Joint Shape and Pose Optimization for Few-view Object Reconstruction
title_zh: FvOR：用于少视图对象重建的鲁棒关节形状和姿势优化
abstract: Reconstructing an accurate 3D object model from a few image observations remains a challenging problem in computer vision. State-of-the-art approaches typically assume accurate camera poses as input, which could be difficult to obtain in realistic settings. In this paper, we present FvOR, a learning-based object reconstruction method that predicts accurate 3D models given a few images with noisy input poses. The core of our approach is a fast and robust multi-view reconstruction algorithm to jointly refine 3D geometry and camera pose estimation using learnable neural network modules. We provide a thorough benchmark of state-of-the-art approaches for this problem on ShapeNet. Our approach achieves best-in-class results. It is also two orders of magnitude faster than the recent optimization-based approach IDR. Our code is released at \url{https://github.com/zhenpeiyang/FvOR/}
summary: Reconstructing an accurate 3D object model from a few image observations remains a challenging problem in computer vision. State-of-the-art approaches typically assume accurate camera poses as input, which could be difficult to obtain in realistic settings. In this paper, we present FvOR, a learning-based object reconstruction method that predicts accurate 3D models given a few images with noisy input poses. The core of our approach is a fast and robust multi-view reconstruction algorithm to jointly refine 3D geometry and camera pose estimation using learnable neural network modules. We provide a thorough benchmark of state-of-the-art approaches for this problem on ShapeNet. Our approach achieves best-in-class results. It is also two orders of magnitude faster than the recent optimization-based approach IDR. Our code is released at \url{https://github.com/zhenpeiyang/FvOR/}
abstract_zh: 从一些图像观察中重建准确的 3D 对象模型仍然是计算机视觉中的一个具有挑战性的问题。最先进的方法通常假设准确的相机姿势作为输入，这在现实环境中可能很难获得。在本文中，我们提出了 FvOR，一种基于学习的对象重建方法，可以在给定一些带有噪声输入姿势的图像的情况下预测准确的 3D 模型。我们方法的核心是一种快速、鲁棒的多视图重建算法，使用可学习的神经网络模块联合细化 3D 几何和相机姿态估计。我们在 ShapeNet 上针对该问题提供了全面的最先进方法基准。我们的方法取得了一流的结果。它也比最近基于优化的方法 IDR 快两个数量级。我们的代码发布于\url{https://github.com/zhenpeiyang/FvOR/}

AI.tldr: 本文提出FvOR方法，通过少量图像和噪声输入姿态重建高精度3D物体模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖精确相机姿态输入，在真实场景中难以获得准确姿态，导致重建效果受限。
AI.method: 设计基于神经网络的多视角联合优化算法，同步精炼3D几何形状与相机姿态估计。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet基准测试中达到最优性能，速度较优化方法IDR快100倍。
AI.conclusion: FvOR实现了鲁棒的少视角重建，适用于真实场景中噪声姿态输入的3D建模任务。

authors_text: Thanassis Drivas,Vasileios Sitokonstantinou,Iason Tsardanidis,Alkiviadis Koukos,Charalampos Kontoes,Vassilia Karathanassi
title: A Data Cube of Big Satellite Image Time-Series for Agriculture Monitoring
title_zh: 农业监测大卫星图像时间序列数据立方体

comments: This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE 14th Image, Video, and Multidimensional Signal Processing Workshop (IVMSP 2022)
abstract: The modernization of the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) requires the large scale and frequent monitoring of agricultural land. Towards this direction, the free and open satellite data (i.e., Sentinel missions) have been extensively used as the sources for the required high spatial and temporal resolution Earth observations. Nevertheless, monitoring the CAP at large scales constitutes a big data problem and puts a strain on CAP paying agencies that need to adapt fast in terms of infrastructure and know-how. Hence, there is a need for efficient and easy-to-use tools for the acquisition, storage, processing and exploitation of big satellite data. In this work, we present the Agriculture monitoring Data Cube (ADC), which is an automated, modular, end-to-end framework for discovering, pre-processing and indexing optical and Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images into a multidimensional cube. We also offer a set of powerful tools on top of the ADC, including i) the generation of analysis-ready feature spaces of big satellite data to feed downstream machine learning tasks and ii) the support of Satellite Image Time-Series (SITS) analysis via services pertinent to the monitoring of the CAP (e.g., detecting trends and events, monitoring the growth status etc.). The knowledge extracted from the SITS analyses and the machine learning tasks returns to the data cube, building scalable country-specific knowledge bases that can efficiently answer complex and multi-faceted geospatial queries.

Towards this direction, the free and open satellite data (i.e., Sentinel missions) have been extensively used as the sources for the required high spatial and temporal resolution Earth observations. We also offer a set of powerful tools on top of the ADC, including i) the generation of analysis-ready feature spaces of big satellite data to feed downstream machine learning tasks and ii) the support of Satellite Image Time-Series (SITS) analysis via services pertinent to the monitoring of the CAP (e.g., detecting trends and events, monitoring the growth status etc.). The knowledge extracted from the SITS analyses and the machine learning tasks returns to the data cube, building scalable country-specific knowledge bases that can efficiently answer complex and multi-faceted geospatial queries.
abstract_zh: 共同农业政策（CAP）的现代化需要对农业土地进行大规模和频繁的监测。朝着这个方向，免费和开放的卫星数据（即哨兵任务）已被广泛用作所需的高空间和时间分辨率地球观测的来源。然而，大规模监测 CAP 会带来大数据问题，并对需要在基础设施和专业知识方面快速适应的 CAP 支付机构造成压力。因此，需要高效且易于使用的工具来获取、存储、处理和利用卫星大数据。在这项工作中，我们提出了农业监测数据立方体（ADC），它是一种自动化、模块化、端到端框架，用于发现、预处理光学和合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像并将其索引到多维立方体中。我们还在 ADC 之上提供了一套强大的工具，包括 i) 生成大卫星数据的分析就绪特征空间，以馈送下游机器学习任务，以及 ii) 通过与 CAP 监控相关的服务（例如，检测趋势和事件、监控增长状态等）支持卫星图像时间序列 (SITS) 分析。从 SITS 分析和机器学习任务中提取的知识返回到数据立方体，构建可扩展的特定国家知识库，可以有效地回答复杂和多方面的地理空间查询。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为农业监测数据立方体（ADC）的框架，用于处理和分析大卫星图像时间序列数据，以支持农业政策监测。
AI.motivation: 欧盟共同农业政策（CAP）现代化需要大规模高频农业用地监测，但现有方法难以应对卫星大数据的存储、处理和分析挑战。
AI.method: 构建自动化、模块化的ADC框架，实现光学和SAR卫星数据的发现、预处理、索引，并提供特征空间生成工具与时间序列分析服务。
AI.result: ADC框架生成可扩展的国家知识库，支持复杂地理查询，并为下游机器学习任务提供分析就绪数据，提升农业监测效率。
AI.conclusion: ADC有效解决了农业监测中的大数据难题，为政策制定者提供了高效、可扩展的卫星数据处理与分析解决方案。

title: What company do words keep? Revisiting the distributional semantics of J.R. Firth & Zellig Harris
title_zh: 言语与什么为伍？重温 J.R. Firth 和 Zellig Harris 的分布语义
abstract: The power of word embeddings is attributed to the linguistic theory that similar words will appear in similar contexts. This idea is specifically invoked by noting that "you shall know a word by the company it keeps," a quote from British linguist J.R. Firth who, along with his American colleague Zellig Harris, is often credited with the invention of "distributional semantics." While both Firth and Harris are cited in all major NLP textbooks and many foundational papers, the content and differences between their theories is seldom discussed. Engaging in a close reading of their work, we discover two distinct and in many ways divergent theories of meaning. One focuses exclusively on the internal workings of linguistic forms, while the other invites us to consider words in new company - not just with other linguistic elements, but also in a broader cultural and situational context. Contrasting these theories from the perspective of current debates in NLP, we discover in Firth a figure who could guide the field towards a more culturally grounded notion of semantics. We consider how an expanded notion of "context" might be modeled in practice through two different strategies: comparative stratification and syntagmatic extension

This idea is specifically invoked by noting that "you shall know a word by the company it keeps," a quote from British linguist J.R. Firth who, along with his American colleague Zellig Harris, is often credited with the invention of "distributional semantics." While both Firth and Harris are cited in all major NLP textbooks and many foundational papers, the content and differences between their theories is seldom discussed. Engaging in a close reading of their work, we discover two distinct and in many ways divergent theories of meaning. One focuses exclusively on the internal workings of linguistic forms, while the other invites us to consider words in new company - not just with other linguistic elements, but also in a broader cultural and situational context. Contrasting these theories from the perspective of current debates in NLP, we discover in Firth a figure who could guide the field towards a more culturally grounded notion of semantics. We consider how an expanded notion of "context" might be modeled in practice through two different strategies: comparative stratification and syntagmatic extension
abstract_zh: 词嵌入的力量归因于语言学理论，即相似的词会出现在相似的上下文中。这个想法被特别引用，指出“你应该通过它所保持的同伴来认识一个单词”，这是英国语言学家 J.R. Firth 的一句话，他和他的美国同事 Zellig Harris 经常被认为是“分布式语义学”的发明者。尽管所有主要 NLP 教科书和许多基础论文中都引用了 Firth 和 Harris，但他们的理论的内容和差异却很少被讨论。仔细阅读他们的作品，我们发现两种截然不同且在许多方面存在分歧的意义理论。一个专门关注语言形式的内部运作，而另一个则邀请我们在新的公司中考虑词语——不仅考虑其他语言元素，而且还要考虑更广泛的文化和情境背景。从当前 NLP 争论的角度来对比这些理论，我们在费斯身上发现了一个可以引导该领域走向更有文化基础的语义概念的人物。我们考虑如何通过两种不同的策略在实践中对“语境”的扩展概念进行建模：比较分层和组合扩展

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视J.R. Firth与Zellig Harris的分布语义理论，探讨其理论差异及对自然语言处理（NLP）的启示。
AI.motivation: 尽管Firth与Harris均被归功于分布语义的创立，但其理论内容与差异鲜少被讨论，本文旨在填补这一空白并关联当前NLP研究。
AI.method: 通过细读两人著作，对比分析其理论差异，并结合当前NLP争论提出两种建模策略：比较分层与句法扩展。
AI.result: 发现Firth侧重语言形式内部机制，而Harris强调更广泛的文化与情境语境，表明Firth理论可引导NLP发展更文化根基的语义模型。
AI.conclusion: 扩展‘语境’概念并通过策略建模，或可推动NLP实现更贴近实际语言使用的语义理解。

authors_text: Albert Wu,Thomas Lew,Kiril Solovey,Edward Schmerling,Marco Pavone
title: Robust-RRT: Probabilistically-Complete Motion Planning for Uncertain Nonlinear Systems
title_zh: Robust-RRT：不确定非线性系统的概率完整运动规划
comment: 16 pages of main text + 5 pages of appendix, 5 figures, submitted to the 2022 International Symposium on Robotics Research
comments: 16 pages of main text + 5 pages of appendix, 5 figures, submitted to the 2022 International Symposium on Robotics Research
abstract: Robust motion planning entails computing a global motion plan that is safe under all possible uncertainty realizations, be it in the system dynamics, the robot's initial position, or with respect to external disturbances. Current approaches for robust motion planning either lack theoretical guarantees, or make restrictive assumptions on the system dynamics and uncertainty distributions. In this paper, we address these limitations by proposing the robust rapidly-exploring random-tree (Robust-RRT) algorithm, which integrates forward reachability analysis directly into sampling-based control trajectory synthesis. We prove that Robust-RRT is probabilistically complete (PC) for nonlinear Lipschitz continuous dynamical systems with bounded uncertainty. In other words, Robust-RRT eventually finds a robust motion plan that is feasible under all possible uncertainty realizations assuming such a plan exists. Our analysis applies even to unstable systems that admit only short-horizon feasible plans; this is because we explicitly consider the time evolution of reachable sets along control trajectories. Thanks to the explicit consideration of time dependency in our analysis, PC applies to unstabilizable systems. To the best of our knowledge, this is the most general PC proof for robust sampling-based motion planning, in terms of the types of uncertainties and dynamical systems it can handle. Considering that an exact computation of reachable sets can be computationally expensive for some dynamical systems, we incorporate sampling-based reachability analysis into Robust-RRT and demonstrate our robust planner on nonlinear, underactuated, and hybrid systems.

To the best of our knowledge, this is the most general PC proof for robust sampling-based motion planning, in terms of the types of uncertainties and dynamical systems it can handle. Considering that an exact computation of reachable sets can be computationally expensive for some dynamical systems, we incorporate sampling-based reachability analysis into Robust-RRT and demonstrate our robust planner on nonlinear, underactuated, and hybrid systems.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒运动规划需要计算在所有可能的不确定性实现下安全的全局运动计划，无论是在系统动力学、机器人的初始位置还是外部干扰方面。当前的鲁棒运动规划方法要么缺乏理论保证，要么对系统动力学和不确定性分布做出限制性假设。在本文中，我们通过提出鲁棒快速探索随机树（Robust-RRT）算法来解决这些局限性，该算法将前向可达性分析直接集成到基于采样的控制轨迹合成中。我们证明，对于具有有限不确定性的非线性 Lipschitz 连续动力系统，Robust-RRT 是概率完备的 (PC)。换句话说，Robust-RRT 最终找到一个鲁棒的运动计划，假设存在这样的计划，该计划在所有可能的不确定性实现下都是可行的。我们的分析甚至适用于只接受短期可行计划的不稳定系统。这是因为我们明确考虑了可达集沿控制轨迹的时间演化。由于我们的分析中明确考虑了时间依赖性，PC 适用于不稳定系统。据我们所知，就其可以处理的不确定性类型和动态系统而言，这是基于采样的稳健运动规划的最通用的 PC 证明。考虑到对于某些动力系统而言，精确计算可达集可能会耗费大量计算资源，因此我们将基于采样的可达性分析纳入 Robust-RRT 中，并在非线性、欠驱动和混合系统上展示了我们的稳健规划器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Robust-RRT的算法，用于在存在不确定性的情况下为非线性系统生成全局安全的运动规划方案。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒运动规划方法或缺乏理论保证，或对系统动态和不确定性分布有严格假设，难以处理不稳定系统和复杂不确定性。
AI.method: 将前向可达性分析直接整合到基于采样的控制轨迹合成中，提出Robust-RRT算法，并结合基于采样的可达性分析以降低计算成本。
AI.result: 证明了Robust-RRT在非线性Lipschitz连续系统中的概率完备性，即使对于仅允许短时可行计划的不稳定系统也适用，并在非线性、欠驱动和混合系统中验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法提供了目前最通用的概率完备性证明，能够处理多种不确定性和动态系统，为复杂场景下的鲁棒运动规划提供了新思路。

search_text: Robust-RRT: Probabilistically-Complete Motion Planning for Uncertain Nonlinear Systems Robust-RRT：不确定非线性系统的概率完整运动规划 Robust motion planning entails computing a global motion plan that is safe under all possible uncertainty realizations, be it in the system dynamics, the robot's initial position, or with respect to external disturbances. Current approaches for robust motion planning either lack theoretical guarantees, or make restrictive assumptions on the system dynamics and uncertainty distributions. In this paper, we address these limitations by proposing the robust rapidly-exploring random-tree (Robust-RRT) algorithm, which integrates forward reachability analysis directly into sampling-based control trajectory synthesis. We prove that Robust-RRT is probabilistically complete (PC) for nonlinear Lipschitz continuous dynamical systems with bounded uncertainty. In other words, Robust-RRT eventually finds a robust motion plan that is feasible under all possible uncertainty realizations assuming such a plan exists. Our analysis applies even to unstable systems that admit only short-horizon feasible plans; this is because we explicitly consider the time evolution of reachable sets along control trajectories. Thanks to the explicit consideration of time dependency in our analysis, PC applies to unstabilizable systems. To the best of our knowledge, this is the most general PC proof for robust sampling-based motion planning, in terms of the types of uncertainties and dynamical systems it can handle. Considering that an exact computation of reachable sets can be computationally expensive for some dynamical systems, we incorporate sampling-based reachability analysis into Robust-RRT and demonstrate our robust planner on nonlinear, underactuated, and hybrid systems. 鲁棒运动规划需要计算在所有可能的不确定性实现下安全的全局运动计划，无论是在系统动力学、机器人的初始位置还是外部干扰方面。当前的鲁棒运动规划方法要么缺乏理论保证，要么对系统动力学和不确定性分布做出限制性假设。在本文中，我们通过提出鲁棒快速探索随机树（Robust-RRT）算法来解决这些局限性，该算法将前向可达性分析直接集成到基于采样的控制轨迹合成中。我们证明，对于具有有限不确定性的非线性 Lipschitz 连续动力系统，Robust-RRT 是概率完备的 (PC)。换句话说，Robust-RRT 最终找到一个鲁棒的运动计划，假设存在这样的计划，该计划在所有可能的不确定性实现下都是可行的。我们的分析甚至适用于只接受短期可行计划的不稳定系统。这是因为我们明确考虑了可达集沿控制轨迹的时间演化。由于我们的分析中明确考虑了时间依赖性，PC 适用于不稳定系统。据我们所知，就其可以处理的不确定性类型和动态系统而言，这是基于采样的稳健运动规划的最通用的 PC 证明。考虑到对于某些动力系统而言，精确计算可达集可能会耗费大量计算资源，因此我们将基于采样的可达性分析纳入 Robust-RRT 中，并在非线性、欠驱动和混合系统上展示了我们的稳健规划器。 本文提出了一种名为Robust-RRT的算法，用于在存在不确定性的情况下为非线性系统生成全局安全的运动规划方案。 Albert Wu,Thomas Lew,Kiril Solovey,Edward Schmerling,Marco Pavone cs.RO

title: Pest presence prediction using interpretable machine learning
title_zh: 使用可解释的机器学习预测害虫存在
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE 14th Image, Video, and Multidimensional Signal Processing Workshop (IVMSP 2022)
comments: This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE 14th Image, Video, and Multidimensional Signal Processing Workshop (IVMSP 2022)
abstract: Helicoverpa Armigera, or cotton bollworm, is a serious insect pest of cotton crops that threatens the yield and the quality of lint. The timely knowledge of the presence of the insects in the field is crucial for effective farm interventions. Meteo-climatic and vegetation conditions have been identified as key drivers of crop pest abundance. In this work, we applied an interpretable classifier, i.e., Explainable Boosting Machine, which uses earth observation vegetation indices, numerical weather predictions and insect trap catches to predict the onset of bollworm harmfulness in cotton fields in Greece. The glass-box nature of our approach provides significant insight on the main drivers of the model and the interactions among them. Model interpretability adds to the trustworthiness of our approach and therefore its potential for rapid uptake and context-based implementation in operational farm management scenarios. Our results are satisfactory and the importance of drivers, through our analysis on global and local explainability, is in accordance with the literature.
summary: Helicoverpa Armigera, or cotton bollworm, is a serious insect pest of cotton crops that threatens the yield and the quality of lint. The timely knowledge of the presence of the insects in the field is crucial for effective farm interventions. Meteo-climatic and vegetation conditions have been identified as key drivers of crop pest abundance. In this work, we applied an interpretable classifier, i.e., Explainable Boosting Machine, which uses earth observation vegetation indices, numerical weather predictions and insect trap catches to predict the onset of bollworm harmfulness in cotton fields in Greece. The glass-box nature of our approach provides significant insight on the main drivers of the model and the interactions among them. Model interpretability adds to the trustworthiness of our approach and therefore its potential for rapid uptake and context-based implementation in operational farm management scenarios. Our results are satisfactory and the importance of drivers, through our analysis on global and local explainability, is in accordance with the literature.
abstract_zh: 棉铃虫（Helicoverpa Armigera）是一种严重的棉花作物害虫，威胁着皮棉的产量和质量。及时了解田间昆虫的存在对于有效的农场干预至关重要。气象气候和植被条件已被确定为作物害虫丰度的关键驱动因素。在这项工作中，我们应用了可解释的分类器，即可解释的Boosting Machine，它使用地球观测植被指数、数值天气预报和昆虫陷阱捕获量来预测希腊棉田中棉铃虫危害的发生。我们方法的玻璃盒性质提供了对模型的主要驱动因素以及它们之间的相互作用的重要见解。模型的可解释性增加了我们方法的可信度，因此其在农场运营管理场景中快速采用和基于上下文实施的潜力。我们的结果是令人满意的，并且通过我们对全球和局部可解释性的分析，驱动因素的重要性与文献一致。

AI.tldr: 本文利用可解释机器学习模型预测棉铃虫在希腊棉田中的出现，以辅助农业管理决策。
AI.motivation: 棉铃虫危害棉花产量和品质，及时预测其出现对农业干预至关重要。传统方法缺乏对气象、植被等驱动因素的可解释性分析，需结合可解释模型提升可信度。
AI.method: 采用可解释增强机（EBM）模型，整合遥感植被指数、数值天气预测及害虫诱捕数据，分析驱动因素及其交互作用。
AI.result: 模型预测效果良好，驱动因素的重要性分析与文献一致，验证了气象和植被条件对棉铃虫危害的关键影响。
AI.conclusion: 可解释机器学习方法通过透明化驱动因素，增强了模型可信度，为农业场景下的精准害虫管理提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文利用可解释机器学习模型预测棉铃虫在希腊棉田中的出现，以辅助农业管理决策。

title: How Different Groups Prioritize Ethical Values for Responsible AI
title_zh: 不同群体如何优先考虑负责任人工智能的道德价值观
comment: ef:2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '22), June 21-24, 2022, Seoul, Republic of Korea
comments: ef:2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '22), June 21-24, 2022, Seoul, Republic of Korea
abstract: Private companies, public sector organizations, and academic groups have outlined ethical values they consider important for responsible artificial intelligence technologies. While their recommendations converge on a set of central values, little is known about the values a more representative public would find important for the AI technologies they interact with and might be affected by. We conducted a survey examining how individuals perceive and prioritize responsible AI values across three groups: a representative sample of the US population (N=743), a sample of crowdworkers (N=755), and a sample of AI practitioners (N=175). Our results empirically confirm a common concern: AI practitioners' value priorities differ from those of the general public. Compared to the US-representative sample, AI practitioners appear to consider responsible AI values as less important and emphasize a different set of values. In contrast, self-identified women and black respondents found responsible AI values more important than other groups. Surprisingly, more liberal-leaning participants, rather than participants reporting experiences with discrimination, were more likely to prioritize fairness than other groups. Our findings highlight the importance of paying attention to who gets to define responsible AI.
summary: Private companies, public sector organizations, and academic groups have outlined ethical values they consider important for responsible artificial intelligence technologies. While their recommendations converge on a set of central values, little is known about the values a more representative public would find important for the AI technologies they interact with and might be affected by. We conducted a survey examining how individuals perceive and prioritize responsible AI values across three groups: a representative sample of the US population (N=743), a sample of crowdworkers (N=755), and a sample of AI practitioners (N=175). Our results empirically confirm a common concern: AI practitioners' value priorities differ from those of the general public. Compared to the US-representative sample, AI practitioners appear to consider responsible AI values as less important and emphasize a different set of values. In contrast, self-identified women and black respondents found responsible AI values more important than other groups. Surprisingly, more liberal-leaning participants, rather than participants reporting experiences with discrimination, were more likely to prioritize fairness than other groups. Our findings highlight the importance of paying attention to who gets to define responsible AI.
abstract_zh: 私营公司、公共部门组织和学术团体概述了他们认为对负责任的人工智能技术很重要的道德价值观。虽然他们的建议集中在一组核心价值观上，但对于更具代表性的公众认为哪些价值观对于他们与之互动并可能受到影响的人工智能技术很重要，人们知之甚少。我们进行了一项调查，研究了三个群体中个人如何看待和优先考虑负责任的人工智能价值观：美国人口的代表性样本 (N=743)、众包工作者样本 (N=755) 和人工智能从业者样本 (N=175)。我们的结果从经验上证实了一个共同的担忧：人工智能从业者的价值优先顺序与公众的价值优先顺序不同。与美国代表性样本相比，人工智能从业者似乎认为负责任的人工智能价值观不太重要，并强调一组不同的价值观。相比之下，自我认同的女性和黑人受访者发现负责任的人工智能价值观比其他群体更重要。令人惊讶的是，更多倾向于自由主义的参与者，而不是报告遭受歧视经历的参与者，比其他群体更有可能优先考虑公平。我们的研究结果强调了关注谁来定义负责任的人工智能的重要性。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过调查不同群体对负责任AI伦理价值观的优先级差异，探讨公众与AI从业者之间的认知差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有机构已提出负责任AI的核心价值观，但缺乏对更广泛公众意见的研究，需了解不同群体对AI伦理的优先级差异。
