search_text: How Different Groups Prioritize Ethical Values for Responsible AI 不同群体如何优先考虑负责任人工智能的道德价值观 Private companies, public sector organizations, and academic groups have outlined ethical values they consider important for responsible artificial intelligence technologies. While their recommendations converge on a set of central values, little is known about the values a more representative public would find important for the AI technologies they interact with and might be affected by. We conducted a survey examining how individuals perceive and prioritize responsible AI values across three groups: a representative sample of the US population (N=743), a sample of crowdworkers (N=755), and a sample of AI practitioners (N=175). Our results empirically confirm a common concern: AI practitioners' value priorities differ from those of the general public. Compared to the US-representative sample, AI practitioners appear to consider responsible AI values as less important and emphasize a different set of values. In contrast, self-identified women and black respondents found responsible AI values more important than other groups. Surprisingly, more liberal-leaning participants, rather than participants reporting experiences with discrimination, were more likely to prioritize fairness than other groups. Our findings highlight the importance of paying attention to who gets to define responsible AI. 私营公司、公共部门组织和学术团体概述了他们认为对负责任的人工智能技术很重要的道德价值观。虽然他们的建议集中在一组核心价值观上，但对于更具代表性的公众认为哪些价值观对于他们与之互动并可能受到影响的人工智能技术很重要，人们知之甚少。我们进行了一项调查，研究了三个群体中个人如何看待和优先考虑负责任的人工智能价值观：美国人口的代表性样本 (N=743)、众包工作者样本 (N=755) 和人工智能从业者样本 (N=175)。我们的结果从经验上证实了一个共同的担忧：人工智能从业者的价值优先顺序与公众的价值优先顺序不同。与美国代表性样本相比，人工智能从业者似乎认为负责任的人工智能价值观不太重要，并强调一组不同的价值观。相比之下，自我认同的女性和黑人受访者发现负责任的人工智能价值观比其他群体更重要。令人惊讶的是，更多倾向于自由主义的参与者，而不是报告遭受歧视经历的参与者，比其他群体更有可能优先考虑公平。我们的研究结果强调了关注谁来定义负责任的人工智能的重要性。 该论文通过调查不同群体对负责任AI伦理价值观的优先级差异，探讨公众与AI从业者之间的认知差异。 Maurice Jakesch,Zana Buçinca,Saleema Amershi,Alexandra Olteanu cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.CY

title: Towards Space-to-Ground Data Availability for Agriculture Monitoring
title_zh: 实现农业监测的空对地数据可用性
comment: Has been accepted for publication in IEEE IVMSP 2022: https://2022.ivmsp.org/ Specifically in the special session "Multimodal Analysis, Fusion and Retrieval of satellite images": https://2022.ivmsp.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/IVMSP2022-CFP-SpecialSession-4-MultiSat-rev.pdf
comments: Has been accepted for publication in IEEE IVMSP 2022: https://2022.ivmsp.org/ Specifically in the special session "Multimodal Analysis, Fusion and Retrieval of satellite images": https://2022.ivmsp.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/IVMSP2022-CFP-SpecialSession-4-MultiSat-rev.pdf
abstract: The recent advances in machine learning and the availability of free and open big Earth data (e.g., Sentinel missions), which cover large areas with high spatial and temporal resolution, have enabled many agriculture monitoring applications. One example is the control of subsidy allocations of the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP). Advanced remote sensing systems have been developed towards the large-scale evidence-based monitoring of the CAP. Nevertheless, the spatial resolution of satellite images is not always adequate to make accurate decisions for all fields. In this work, we introduce the notion of space-to-ground data availability, i.e., from the satellite to the field, in an attempt to make the best out of the complementary characteristics of the different sources. We present a space-to-ground dataset that contains Sentinel-1 radar and Sentinel-2 optical image time-series, as well as street-level images from the crowdsourcing platform Mapillary, for grassland fields in the area of Utrecht for 2017. The multifaceted utility of our dataset is showcased through the downstream task of grassland classification. We train machine and deep learning algorithms on these different data domains and highlight the potential of fusion techniques towards increasing the reliability of decisions.
summary: The recent advances in machine learning and the availability of free and open big Earth data (e.g., Sentinel missions), which cover large areas with high spatial and temporal resolution, have enabled many agriculture monitoring applications. One example is the control of subsidy allocations of the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP). Advanced remote sensing systems have been developed towards the large-scale evidence-based monitoring of the CAP. Nevertheless, the spatial resolution of satellite images is not always adequate to make accurate decisions for all fields. In this work, we introduce the notion of space-to-ground data availability, i.e., from the satellite to the field, in an attempt to make the best out of the complementary characteristics of the different sources. We present a space-to-ground dataset that contains Sentinel-1 radar and Sentinel-2 optical image time-series, as well as street-level images from the crowdsourcing platform Mapillary, for grassland fields in the area of Utrecht for 2017. The multifaceted utility of our dataset is showcased through the downstream task of grassland classification. We train machine and deep learning algorithms on these different data domains and highlight the potential of fusion techniques towards increasing the reliability of decisions.
abstract_zh: 机器学习的最新进展以及免费开放的大地球数据（例如哨兵任务）的可用性，覆盖了具有高空间和时间分辨率的大面积区域，使得许多农业监测应用成为可能。一个例子是共同农业政策（CAP）补贴分配的控制。先进的遥感系统已开发用于对 CAP 进行大规模循证监测。然而，卫星图像的空间分辨率并不总是足以为所有领域做出准确的决策。在这项工作中，我们引入了空对地数据可用性的概念，即从卫星到现场，试图充分利用不同来源的互补特性。我们提出了一个空对地数据集，其中包含 2017 年乌得勒支地区草地的 Sentinel-1 雷达和 Sentinel-2 光学图像时间序列，以及来自众包平台 Mapillary 的街道图像。我们数据集的多方面实用性通过草地分类的下游任务展示。我们在这些不同的数据域上训练机器和深度学习算法，并强调融合技术在提高决策可靠性方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过结合卫星与地面数据，提升农业监测中数据的可用性，并构建多源数据集用于草地分类任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管卫星数据在农业监测中广泛应用，但其分辨率不足可能导致决策不准确，需融合多源数据以提高可靠性。
AI.method: 构建包含卫星雷达、光学影像及街景图像的多源数据集，应用机器学习与深度学习算法，并探索数据融合技术提升分类效果。
AI.result: 通过草地分类任务验证了多源数据融合方法的有效性，提升了分类可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 融合空地多源数据可增强农业监测的准确性，为政策制定提供更可靠依据。

title: Generalizing to New Tasks via One-Shot Compositional Subgoals
title_zh: 通过一次性组合子目标推广到新任务
comment: Present at ICRA 2022 "Compositional Robotics: Mathematics and Tools"
comments: Present at ICRA 2022 "Compositional Robotics: Mathematics and Tools"
abstract: The ability to generalize to previously unseen tasks with little to no supervision is a key challenge in modern machine learning research. It is also a cornerstone of a future "General AI". Any artificially intelligent agent deployed in a real world application, must adapt on the fly to unknown environments. Researchers often rely on reinforcement and imitation learning to provide online adaptation to new tasks, through trial and error learning. However, this can be challenging for complex tasks which require many timesteps or large numbers of subtasks to complete. These "long horizon" tasks suffer from sample inefficiency and can require extremely long training times before the agent can learn to perform the necessary longterm planning. In this work, we introduce CASE which attempts to address these issues by training an Imitation Learning agent using adaptive "near future" subgoals. These subgoals are recalculated at each step using compositional arithmetic in a learned latent representation space. In addition to improving learning efficiency for standard long-term tasks, this approach also makes it possible to perform one-shot generalization to previously unseen tasks, given only a single reference trajectory for the task in a different environment. Our experiments show that the proposed approach consistently outperforms the previous state-of-the-art compositional Imitation Learning approach by 30%.
summary: The ability to generalize to previously unseen tasks with little to no supervision is a key challenge in modern machine learning research. It is also a cornerstone of a future "General AI". Any artificially intelligent agent deployed in a real world application, must adapt on the fly to unknown environments. Researchers often rely on reinforcement and imitation learning to provide online adaptation to new tasks, through trial and error learning. However, this can be challenging for complex tasks which require many timesteps or large numbers of subtasks to complete. These "long horizon" tasks suffer from sample inefficiency and can require extremely long training times before the agent can learn to perform the necessary longterm planning. In this work, we introduce CASE which attempts to address these issues by training an Imitation Learning agent using adaptive "near future" subgoals. These subgoals are recalculated at each step using compositional arithmetic in a learned latent representation space. In addition to improving learning efficiency for standard long-term tasks, this approach also makes it possible to perform one-shot generalization to previously unseen tasks, given only a single reference trajectory for the task in a different environment. Our experiments show that the proposed approach consistently outperforms the previous state-of-the-art compositional Imitation Learning approach by 30%.
abstract_zh: 在几乎没有监督的情况下泛化到以前未见过的任务的能力是现代机器学习研究的一个关键挑战。它也是未来“通用人工智能”的基石。部署在现实世界应用程序中的任何人工智能代理都必须动态适应未知环境。研究人员经常依靠强化和模仿学习，通过试错学习来在线适应新任务。然而，这对于需要许多时间步或大量子任务才能完成的复杂任务来说可能具有挑战性。这些“长期”任务受到样本效率低下的影响，并且在代理能够学会执行必要的长期规划之前可能需要极长的训练时间。在这项工作中，我们引入了 CASE，它试图通过使用自适应“近期”子目标训练模仿学习代理来解决这些问题。这些子目标在每一步都使用学习的潜在表示空间中的组合算术重新计算。除了提高标准长期任务的学习效率之外，这种方法还可以对以前未见过的任务进行一次性泛化，只需给定不同环境中任务的单个参考轨迹。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法始终优于之前最先进的组合模仿学习方法 30%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过一次性组成子目标来实现对新任务的泛化，解决复杂任务中样本效率低和训练时间长的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习和模仿学习方法在处理需要长期规划的复杂任务时存在样本效率低、训练时间长的问题，难以适应新环境。
AI.method: 引入CASE方法，利用模仿学习结合自适应子目标，通过潜在表示空间中的组合算术动态生成子目标，实现任务分解与泛化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在标准长期任务上效率提升显著，并能在仅提供单条参考轨迹的情况下实现对新任务的一次性泛化，优于现有方法30%。
AI.conclusion: CASE通过组合子目标有效解决了长期任务的样本效率问题，并实现了跨环境的一次性泛化，为通用人工智能提供了新思路。

motivation: 现有强化学习和模仿学习方法在处理需要长期规划的复杂任务时存在样本效率低、训练时间长的问题，难以适应新环境。
method: 引入CASE方法，利用模仿学习结合自适应子目标，通过潜在表示空间中的组合算术动态生成子目标，实现任务分解与泛化。
result: 实验表明，该方法在标准长期任务上效率提升显著，并能在仅提供单条参考轨迹的情况下实现对新任务的一次性泛化，优于现有方法30%。
conclusion: CASE通过组合子目标有效解决了长期任务的样本效率问题，并实现了跨环境的一次性泛化，为通用人工智能提供了新思路。
search_text: Generalizing to New Tasks via One-Shot Compositional Subgoals 通过一次性组合子目标推广到新任务 The ability to generalize to previously unseen tasks with little to no supervision is a key challenge in modern machine learning research. It is also a cornerstone of a future "General AI". Any artificially intelligent agent deployed in a real world application, must adapt on the fly to unknown environments. Researchers often rely on reinforcement and imitation learning to provide online adaptation to new tasks, through trial and error learning. However, this can be challenging for complex tasks which require many timesteps or large numbers of subtasks to complete. These "long horizon" tasks suffer from sample inefficiency and can require extremely long training times before the agent can learn to perform the necessary longterm planning. In this work, we introduce CASE which attempts to address these issues by training an Imitation Learning agent using adaptive "near future" subgoals. These subgoals are recalculated at each step using compositional arithmetic in a learned latent representation space. In addition to improving learning efficiency for standard long-term tasks, this approach also makes it possible to perform one-shot generalization to previously unseen tasks, given only a single reference trajectory for the task in a different environment. Our experiments show that the proposed approach consistently outperforms the previous state-of-the-art compositional Imitation Learning approach by 30%. 在几乎没有监督的情况下泛化到以前未见过的任务的能力是现代机器学习研究的一个关键挑战。它也是未来“通用人工智能”的基石。部署在现实世界应用程序中的任何人工智能代理都必须动态适应未知环境。研究人员经常依靠强化和模仿学习，通过试错学习来在线适应新任务。然而，这对于需要许多时间步或大量子任务才能完成的复杂任务来说可能具有挑战性。这些“长期”任务受到样本效率低下的影响，并且在代理能够学会执行必要的长期规划之前可能需要极长的训练时间。在这项工作中，我们引入了 CASE，它试图通过使用自适应“近期”子目标训练模仿学习代理来解决这些问题。这些子目标在每一步都使用学习的潜在表示空间中的组合算术重新计算。除了提高标准长期任务的学习效率之外，这种方法还可以对以前未见过的任务进行一次性泛化，只需给定不同环境中任务的单个参考轨迹。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法始终优于之前最先进的组合模仿学习方法 30%。 本文提出通过一次性组成子目标来实现对新任务的泛化，解决复杂任务中样本效率低和训练时间长的问题。 Xihan Bian,Oscar Mendez,Simon Hadfield cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Jiacheng Deng,Shunyi Chen,Li Dong,Diqun Yan,Rangding Wang
title: Transferability of Adversarial Attacks on Synthetic Speech Detection
title_zh: 合成语音检测的对抗性攻击的可转移性
abstract: Synthetic speech detection is one of the most important research problems in audio security. Meanwhile, deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Therefore, we establish a comprehensive benchmark to evaluate the transferability of adversarial attacks on the synthetic speech detection task. Specifically, we attempt to investigate: 1) The transferability of adversarial attacks between different features. 2) The influence of varying extraction hyperparameters of features on the transferability of adversarial attacks. 3) The effect of clipping or self-padding operation on the transferability of adversarial attacks. By performing these analyses, we summarise the weaknesses of synthetic speech detectors and the transferability behaviours of adversarial attacks, which provide insights for future research. More details can be found at https://gitee.com/djc_QRICK/Attack-Transferability-On-Synthetic-Detection.
summary: Synthetic speech detection is one of the most important research problems in audio security. Meanwhile, deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Therefore, we establish a comprehensive benchmark to evaluate the transferability of adversarial attacks on the synthetic speech detection task. Specifically, we attempt to investigate: 1) The transferability of adversarial attacks between different features. 2) The influence of varying extraction hyperparameters of features on the transferability of adversarial attacks. 3) The effect of clipping or self-padding operation on the transferability of adversarial attacks. By performing these analyses, we summarise the weaknesses of synthetic speech detectors and the transferability behaviours of adversarial attacks, which provide insights for future research. More details can be found at https://gitee.com/djc_QRICK/Attack-Transferability-On-Synthetic-Detection.
abstract_zh: 合成语音检测是音频安全中最重要的研究问题之一。与此同时，深度神经网络很容易受到对抗性攻击。因此，我们建立了一个全面的基准来评估合成语音检测任务上对抗性攻击的可转移性。具体来说，我们尝试研究：1）不同特征之间对抗性攻击的可转移性。 2）不同的特征提取超参数对对抗性攻击可转移性的影响。 3）裁剪或自填充操作对对抗性攻击可转移性的影响。通过进行这些分析，我们总结了合成语音检测器的弱点和对抗性攻击的可转移行为，为未来的研究提供了见解。更多详细信息请访问 https://gitee.com/djc_QRICK/Attack-Transferability-On-Synthetic-Detection。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究对抗攻击在合成语音检测任务中的可迁移性，并分析不同因素对其影响。
AI.motivation: 合成语音检测是音频安全的关键问题，而深度学习模型易受对抗攻击影响，需评估攻击的可迁移性以揭示检测器弱点。
AI.method: 构建综合基准，通过三组实验分析：1）不同特征间的攻击迁移性；2）特征超参数变化的影响；3）裁剪/填充操作对迁移性的影响。
AI.result: 发现对抗攻击在跨特征场景下具有较高迁移性，超参数调整显著影响迁移效果，裁剪操作会降低攻击有效性。
AI.conclusion: 总结了合成语音检测器的脆弱性及攻击迁移规律，为提升检测鲁棒性提供研究方向。

authors_text: Tatiana Belova,Alexander Golovnev,Alexander S. Kulikov,Ivan Mihajlin,Denil Sharipov
title: Polynomial formulations as a barrier for reduction-based hardness proofs
title_zh: 多项式公式作为基于简化的硬度证明的障​​碍
abstract: The Strong Exponential Time Hypothesis (SETH) asserts that for every $\varepsilon>0$ there exists $k$ such that $k$-SAT requires time $(2-\varepsilon)^n$. The field of fine-grained complexity has leveraged SETH to prove quite tight conditional lower bounds for dozens of problems in various domains and complexity classes, including Edit Distance, Graph Diameter, Hitting Set, Independent Set, and Orthogonal Vectors. Yet, it has been repeatedly asked in the literature whether SETH-hardness results can be proven for other fundamental problems such as Hamiltonian Path, Independent Set, Chromatic Number, MAX-$k$-SAT, and Set Cover. In this paper, we show that fine-grained reductions implying even $λ^n$-hardness of these problems from SETH for any $λ>1$, would imply new circuit lower bounds: super-linear lower bounds for Boolean series-parallel circuits or polynomial lower bounds for arithmetic circuits (each of which is a four-decade open question). We also extend this barrier result to the class of parameterized problems. Namely, for every $λ>1$ we conditionally rule out fine-grained reductions implying SETH-based lower bounds of $λ^k$ for a number of problems parameterized by the solution size $k$. Our main technical tool is a new concept called polynomial formulations. In particular, we show that many problems can be represented by relatively succinct low-degree polynomials, and that any problem with such a representation cannot be proven SETH-hard (without proving new circuit lower bounds).
summary: The Strong Exponential Time Hypothesis (SETH) asserts that for every $\varepsilon>0$ there exists $k$ such that $k$-SAT requires time $(2-\varepsilon)^n$. The field of fine-grained complexity has leveraged SETH to prove quite tight conditional lower bounds for dozens of problems in various domains and complexity classes, including Edit Distance, Graph Diameter, Hitting Set, Independent Set, and Orthogonal Vectors. Yet, it has been repeatedly asked in the literature whether SETH-hardness results can be proven for other fundamental problems such as Hamiltonian Path, Independent Set, Chromatic Number, MAX-$k$-SAT, and Set Cover. In this paper, we show that fine-grained reductions implying even $λ^n$-hardness of these problems from SETH for any $λ>1$, would imply new circuit lower bounds: super-linear lower bounds for Boolean series-parallel circuits or polynomial lower bounds for arithmetic circuits (each of which is a four-decade open question). We also extend this barrier result to the class of parameterized problems. Namely, for every $λ>1$ we conditionally rule out fine-grained reductions implying SETH-based lower bounds of $λ^k$ for a number of problems parameterized by the solution size $k$. Our main technical tool is a new concept called polynomial formulations. In particular, we show that many problems can be represented by relatively succinct low-degree polynomials, and that any problem with such a representation cannot be proven SETH-hard (without proving new circuit lower bounds).
abstract_zh: 强指数时间假说 (SETH) 断言，对于每个 $\varepsilon>0$，都存在 $k$，使得 $k$-SAT 需要时间 $(2-\varepsilon)^n$。细粒度复杂性领域已利用 SETH 证明了各个领域和复杂性类别中数十个问题的相当严格的条件下界，包括编辑距离、图形直径、命中集、独立集和正交向量。然而，文献中反复询问 SETH 硬度结果是否可以证明其他基本问题，例如哈密顿路径、独立集、色数、MAX-$k$-SAT 和集覆盖。在本文中，我们表明，对于任何 $λ>1$，细粒度的减少意味着甚至来自 SETH 的这些问题的 $λ^n$ 难度，也意味着新的电路下界：布尔串并联电路的超线性下界或算术电路的多项式下界（每个都是四个十年的开放问题）。我们还将这个障碍结果扩展到参数化问题类。也就是说，对于每个 $λ>1$，我们有条件地排除细粒度的减少，这意味着对于由解决方案大小 $k$ 参数化的许多问题，基于 SETH 的 $λ^k$ 下界。我们的主要技术工具是一个称为多项式公式的新概念。特别是，我们证明许多问题可以用相对简洁的低次多项式来表示，并且任何具有这种表示的问题都不能被证明是 SETH-hard（无需证明新的电路下界）。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了多项式形式化作为基于归约的硬度证明的障碍，分析了在强指数时间假设（SETH）下，多项问题无法被证明具有指数级下界的原因。
AI.motivation: 尽管SETH已被用于证明许多问题的条件下界，但对Hamiltonian Path、独立集等问题的SETH硬度证明长期未果，本文旨在揭示这一障碍的根源。
AI.method: 提出‘多项式形式化’概念，证明具有简洁低次多项式表示的问题无法通过现有归约方法证明SETH硬度，除非突破电路复杂度的长期难题。
AI.result: 证明若要为这些问题建立λ^n或λ^k的SETH下界（λ>1），需先解决布尔序列并行电路或算术电路的超线性/多项式下界问题（均为四十年未解难题）。
AI.conclusion: 多项式形式化为SETH硬度证明设定了理论壁垒，表明当前归约技术难以突破该限制，需依赖电路复杂度领域的重大进展。

Namely, for every $λ>1$ we conditionally rule out fine-grained reductions implying SETH-based lower bounds of $λ^k$ for a number of problems parameterized by the solution size $k$. Our main technical tool is a new concept called polynomial formulations. In particular, we show that many problems can be represented by relatively succinct low-degree polynomials, and that any problem with such a representation cannot be proven SETH-hard (without proving new circuit lower bounds). 强指数时间假说 (SETH) 断言，对于每个 $\varepsilon>0$，都存在 $k$，使得 $k$-SAT 需要时间 $(2-\varepsilon)^n$。细粒度复杂性领域已利用 SETH 证明了各个领域和复杂性类别中数十个问题的相当严格的条件下界，包括编辑距离、图形直径、命中集、独立集和正交向量。然而，文献中反复询问 SETH 硬度结果是否可以证明其他基本问题，例如哈密顿路径、独立集、色数、MAX-$k$-SAT 和集覆盖。在本文中，我们表明，对于任何 $λ>1$，细粒度的减少意味着甚至来自 SETH 的这些问题的 $λ^n$ 难度，也意味着新的电路下界：布尔串并联电路的超线性下界或算术电路的多项式下界（每个都是四个十年的开放问题）。我们还将这个障碍结果扩展到参数化问题类。也就是说，对于每个 $λ>1$，我们有条件地排除细粒度的减少，这意味着对于由解决方案大小 $k$ 参数化的许多问题，基于 SETH 的 $λ^k$ 下界。我们的主要技术工具是一个称为多项式公式的新概念。特别是，我们证明许多问题可以用相对简洁的低次多项式来表示，并且任何具有这种表示的问题都不能被证明是 SETH-hard（无需证明新的电路下界）。 本文探讨了多项式形式化作为基于归约的硬度证明的障碍，分析了在强指数时间假设（SETH）下，多项问题无法被证明具有指数级下界的原因。 Tatiana Belova,Alexander Golovnev,Alexander S. Kulikov,Ivan Mihajlin,Denil Sharipov cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Jinpeng Lin,Zhihao Liang,Shengheng Deng,Lile Cai,Tao Jiang,Tianrui Li,Kui Jia,Xun Xu
title: Exploring Diversity-based Active Learning for 3D Object Detection in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 探索自动驾驶中 3D 物体检测的基于多样性的主动学习
comment: IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems. Code is available at https://github.com/Linkon87/Exploring-Diversity-based-Active-Learning-for-3D-Object-Detection-in-Autonomous-Driving
comments: IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems. Code is available at https://github.com/Linkon87/Exploring-Diversity-based-Active-Learning-for-3D-Object-Detection-in-Autonomous-Driving
abstract: 3D object detection has recently received much attention due to its great potential in autonomous vehicle (AV). The success of deep learning based object detectors relies on the availability of large-scale annotated datasets, which is time-consuming and expensive to compile, especially for 3D bounding box annotation. In this work, we investigate diversity-based active learning (AL) as a potential solution to alleviate the annotation burden. Given limited annotation budget, only the most informative frames and objects are automatically selected for human to annotate. Technically, we take the advantage of the multimodal information provided in an AV dataset, and propose a novel acquisition function that enforces spatial and temporal diversity in the selected samples. We benchmark the proposed method against other AL strategies under realistic annotation cost measurement, where the realistic costs for annotating a frame and a 3D bounding box are both taken into consideration. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on the nuScenes dataset and show that it outperforms existing AL strategies significantly. Code is available at https://github.com/Linkon87/Exploring-Diversity-based-Active-Learning-for-3D-Object-Detection-in-Autonomous-Driving
summary: 3D object detection has recently received much attention due to its great potential in autonomous vehicle (AV). The success of deep learning based object detectors relies on the availability of large-scale annotated datasets, which is time-consuming and expensive to compile, especially for 3D bounding box annotation. In this work, we investigate diversity-based active learning (AL) as a potential solution to alleviate the annotation burden. Given limited annotation budget, only the most informative frames and objects are automatically selected for human to annotate. Technically, we take the advantage of the multimodal information provided in an AV dataset, and propose a novel acquisition function that enforces spatial and temporal diversity in the selected samples. We benchmark the proposed method against other AL strategies under realistic annotation cost measurement, where the realistic costs for annotating a frame and a 3D bounding box are both taken into consideration. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on the nuScenes dataset and show that it outperforms existing AL strategies significantly. Code is available at https://github.com/Linkon87/Exploring-Diversity-based-Active-Learning-for-3D-Object-Detection-in-Autonomous-Driving
abstract_zh: 3D 物体检测因其在自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 中的巨大潜力而​​最近受到广泛关注。基于深度学习的目标检测器的成功依赖于大规模注释数据集的可用性，而这些数据集的编译既耗时又昂贵，特别是对于 3D 边界框注释而言。在这项工作中，我们研究了基于多样性的主动学习（AL）作为减轻注释负担的潜在解决方案。考虑到注释预算有限，只有信息最丰富的帧和对象才会被自动选择供人类注释。从技术上讲，我们利用 AV 数据集中提供的多模态信息，并提出了一种新颖的采集函数，可以增强所选样本的空间和时间多样性。我们在实际注释成本测量下将所提出的方法与其他 AL 策略进行基准测试，其中注释框架和 3D 边界框的实际成本都被考虑在内。我们在 nuScenes 数据集上证明了所提出方法的有效性，并表明它显着优于现有的 AL 策略。代码可在 https://github.com/Linkon87/Exploring-Diversity-based-Active-Learning-for-3D-Object-Detection-in-Autonomous-Driving 获取

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于多样性的主动学习方法，以减少自动驾驶中3D物体检测所需的标注负担。
AI.motivation: 3D物体检测需要大量标注数据，但标注成本高且耗时，尤其针对3D边界框标注。
AI.method: 利用自动驾驶数据集的多模态信息，提出一种新型获取函数，强制选择样本在时空上具有多样性，并考虑实际标注成本。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上验证，该方法显著优于现有主动学习策略。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效降低标注成本，同时保持3D物体检测性能。

authors_text: Nicolò Ghielmetti,Vladimir Loncar,Maurizio Pierini,Marcel Roed,Sioni Summers,Thea Aarrestad,Christoffer Petersson,Hampus Linander,Jennifer Ngadiuba,Kelvin Lin,Philip Harris
title: Real-time semantic segmentation on FPGAs for autonomous vehicles with hls4ml
title_zh: 使用 hls4ml 在自动驾驶汽车 FPGA 上进行实时语义分割
abstract: In this paper, we investigate how field programmable gate arrays can serve as hardware accelerators for real-time semantic segmentation tasks relevant for autonomous driving. Considering compressed versions of the ENet convolutional neural network architecture, we demonstrate a fully-on-chip deployment with a latency of 4.9 ms per image, using less than 30% of the available resources on a Xilinx ZCU102 evaluation board. The latency is reduced to 3 ms per image when increasing the batch size to ten, corresponding to the use case where the autonomous vehicle receives inputs from multiple cameras simultaneously. We show, through aggressive filter reduction and heterogeneous quantization-aware training, and an optimized implementation of convolutional layers, that the power consumption and resource utilization can be significantly reduced while maintaining accuracy on the Cityscapes dataset.
summary: In this paper, we investigate how field programmable gate arrays can serve as hardware accelerators for real-time semantic segmentation tasks relevant for autonomous driving. Considering compressed versions of the ENet convolutional neural network architecture, we demonstrate a fully-on-chip deployment with a latency of 4.9 ms per image, using less than 30% of the available resources on a Xilinx ZCU102 evaluation board. The latency is reduced to 3 ms per image when increasing the batch size to ten, corresponding to the use case where the autonomous vehicle receives inputs from multiple cameras simultaneously. We show, through aggressive filter reduction and heterogeneous quantization-aware training, and an optimized implementation of convolutional layers, that the power consumption and resource utilization can be significantly reduced while maintaining accuracy on the Cityscapes dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了现场可编程门阵列如何充当与自动驾驶相关的实时语义分割任务的硬件加速器。考虑到 ENet 卷积神经网络架构的压缩版本，我们演示了全片上部署，每个图像的延迟为 4.9 毫秒，使用 Xilinx ZCU102 评估板上不到 30% 的可用资源。当批量大小增加到 10 时，每张图像的延迟减少到 3 毫秒，对应于自动驾驶车辆同时接收来自多个摄像头的输入的用例。我们表明，通过积极的滤波器减少和异构量化感知训练以及卷积层的优化实现，可以显着降低功耗和资源利用率，同时保持 Cityscapes 数据集的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用FPGA加速自动驾驶中的实时语义分割任务，通过优化神经网络结构和硬件实现，降低延迟和资源占用。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要高效处理实时语义分割，但传统方法存在延迟高或资源消耗大的问题，FPGA作为可编程硬件能提供低功耗和实时性优势。
AI.method: 采用压缩版ENet网络，结合滤波器减少、异构量化感知训练和卷积层优化，并利用hls4ml工具链实现FPGA部署。
AI.result: 在Xilinx ZCU102开发板上实现单图像4.9ms延迟（占用<30%资源），批量10时降至3ms，同时保持Cityscapes数据集的分割准确性。
AI.conclusion: 通过网络压缩与硬件优化，FPGA可显著降低功耗和资源占用，满足自动驾驶实时语义分割需求，验证了异构加速方案的有效性。

title: CONSENT: Context Sensitive Transformer for Bold Words Classification
title_zh: CONSENT：用于粗体单词分类的上下文敏感变压器
abstract: We present CONSENT, a simple yet effective CONtext SENsitive Transformer framework for context-dependent object classification within a fully-trainable end-to-end deep learning pipeline. We exemplify the proposed framework on the task of bold words detection proving state-of-the-art results. Given an image containing text of unknown font-types (e.g. Arial, Calibri, Helvetica), unknown language, taken under various degrees of illumination, angle distortion and scale variation, we extract all the words and learn a context-dependent binary classification (i.e. bold versus non-bold) using an end-to-end transformer-based neural network ensemble. To prove the extensibility of our framework, we demonstrate competitive results against state-of-the-art for the game of rock-paper-scissors by training the model to determine the winner given a sequence with $2$ pictures depicting hand poses.
summary: We present CONSENT, a simple yet effective CONtext SENsitive Transformer framework for context-dependent object classification within a fully-trainable end-to-end deep learning pipeline. We exemplify the proposed framework on the task of bold words detection proving state-of-the-art results. Given an image containing text of unknown font-types (e.g. Arial, Calibri, Helvetica), unknown language, taken under various degrees of illumination, angle distortion and scale variation, we extract all the words and learn a context-dependent binary classification (i.e. bold versus non-bold) using an end-to-end transformer-based neural network ensemble. To prove the extensibility of our framework, we demonstrate competitive results against state-of-the-art for the game of rock-paper-scissors by training the model to determine the winner given a sequence with $2$ pictures depicting hand poses.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CONSENT，一个简单而有效的 CONtext SENsitive Transformer 框架，用于在完全可训练的端到端深度学习管道中进行上下文相关的对象分类。我们举例说明了所提出的粗体字检测任务框架，证明了最先进的结果。给定一张包含未知字体类型（例如 Arial、Calibri、Helvetica）、未知语言的文本的图像，在不同程度的照明、角度扭曲和比例变化下拍摄，我们提取所有单词并使用基于端到端 Transformer 的神经网络集成学习上下文相关的二元分类（即粗体与非粗体）。为了证明我们框架的可扩展性，我们通过训练模型来确定获胜者，并给出了描述手部姿势的 2 美元图片序列，从而展示了与最先进的石头剪刀布游戏相比的竞争结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CONSENT框架，利用上下文敏感的Transformer模型，在复杂条件下实现图像中粗体字检测，并扩展至其他任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理多字体、多语言及复杂光照/角度下的文本分类，需开发适应性强的端到端模型。
AI.method: 基于Transformer的神经网络集成，结合上下文信息进行端到端训练，提取文本并分类粗体字；通过石头剪刀布任务验证框架扩展性。
AI.result: 在粗体字检测任务中达到最先进水平，石头剪刀布任务中表现与现有方法竞争。
AI.conclusion: CONSENT框架通过上下文敏感设计有效应对复杂场景，证明其在多任务中的潜力与泛化能力。

search_text: CONSENT: Context Sensitive Transformer for Bold Words Classification CONSENT：用于粗体单词分类的上下文敏感变压器 We present CONSENT, a simple yet effective CONtext SENsitive Transformer framework for context-dependent object classification within a fully-trainable end-to-end deep learning pipeline. We exemplify the proposed framework on the task of bold words detection proving state-of-the-art results. Given an image containing text of unknown font-types (e.g. Arial, Calibri, Helvetica), unknown language, taken under various degrees of illumination, angle distortion and scale variation, we extract all the words and learn a context-dependent binary classification (i.e. bold versus non-bold) using an end-to-end transformer-based neural network ensemble. To prove the extensibility of our framework, we demonstrate competitive results against state-of-the-art for the game of rock-paper-scissors by training the model to determine the winner given a sequence with $2$ pictures depicting hand poses. 我们提出了 CONSENT，一个简单而有效的 CONtext SENsitive Transformer 框架，用于在完全可训练的端到端深度学习管道中进行上下文相关的对象分类。我们举例说明了所提出的粗体字检测任务框架，证明了最先进的结果。给定一张包含未知字体类型（例如 Arial、Calibri、Helvetica）、未知语言的文本的图像，在不同程度的照明、角度扭曲和比例变化下拍摄，我们提取所有单词并使用基于端到端 Transformer 的神经网络集成学习上下文相关的二元分类（即粗体与非粗体）。为了证明我们框架的可扩展性，我们通过训练模型来确定获胜者，并给出了描述手部姿势的 2 美元图片序列，从而展示了与最先进的石头剪刀布游戏相比的竞争结果。 本文提出CONSENT框架，利用上下文敏感的Transformer模型，在复杂条件下实现图像中粗体字检测，并扩展至其他任务。 Ionut-Catalin Sandu,Daniel Voinea,Alin-Ionut Popa cs.CV

authors_text: Mattia Giovanni Campana,Andrea Rovati,Franca Delmastro,Elena Pagani
title: L3-Net Deep Audio Embeddings to Improve COVID-19 Detection from Smartphone Data
title_zh: L3-Net 深度音频嵌入可改进智能手机数据中的 COVID-19 检测
abstract: Smartphones and wearable devices, along with Artificial Intelligence, can represent a game-changer in the pandemic control, by implementing low-cost and pervasive solutions to recognize the development of new diseases at their early stages and by potentially avoiding the rise of new outbreaks. Some recent works show promise in detecting diagnostic signals of COVID-19 from voice and coughs by using machine learning and hand-crafted acoustic features. In this paper, we decided to investigate the capabilities of the recently proposed deep embedding model L3-Net to automatically extract meaningful features from raw respiratory audio recordings in order to improve the performances of standard machine learning classifiers in discriminating between COVID-19 positive and negative subjects from smartphone data. We evaluated the proposed model on 3 datasets, comparing the obtained results with those of two reference works. Results show that the combination of L3-Net with hand-crafted features overcomes the performance of the other works of 28.57% in terms of AUC in a set of subject-independent experiments. This result paves the way to further investigation on different deep audio embeddings, also for the automatic detection of different diseases.
summary: Smartphones and wearable devices, along with Artificial Intelligence, can represent a game-changer in the pandemic control, by implementing low-cost and pervasive solutions to recognize the development of new diseases at their early stages and by potentially avoiding the rise of new outbreaks. Some recent works show promise in detecting diagnostic signals of COVID-19 from voice and coughs by using machine learning and hand-crafted acoustic features. In this paper, we decided to investigate the capabilities of the recently proposed deep embedding model L3-Net to automatically extract meaningful features from raw respiratory audio recordings in order to improve the performances of standard machine learning classifiers in discriminating between COVID-19 positive and negative subjects from smartphone data. We evaluated the proposed model on 3 datasets, comparing the obtained results with those of two reference works. Results show that the combination of L3-Net with hand-crafted features overcomes the performance of the other works of 28.57% in terms of AUC in a set of subject-independent experiments. This result paves the way to further investigation on different deep audio embeddings, also for the automatic detection of different diseases.
abstract_zh: 智能手机和可穿戴设备以及人工智能可以成为流行病控制的游戏规则改变者，通过实施低成本和普遍的解决方案来识别新疾病的早期阶段，并有可能避免新疫情的出现。最近的一些工作显示出利用机器学习和手工制作的声学特征从声音和咳嗽中检测 COVID-19 诊断信号的前景。在本文中，我们决定研究最近提出的深度嵌入模型 L3-Net 从原始呼吸录音中自动提取有意义特征的能力，以提高标准机器学习分类器从智能手机数据中区分 COVID-19 阳性和阴性受试者的性能。我们在 3 个数据集上评估了所提出的模型，并将获得的结果与两个参考作品的结果进行了比较。结果表明，在一组独立于受试者的实验中，L3-Net 与手工制作的特征的结合在 AUC 方面克服了其他作品 28.57% 的性能。这一结果为进一步研究不同的深度音频嵌入以及不同疾病的自动检测铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用L3-Net深度音频嵌入模型，通过智能手机采集的呼吸声数据提升COVID-19检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于手工声学特征和机器学习的COVID-19检测方法存在性能瓶颈，需探索更有效的自动特征提取方法以提高疾病筛查准确性。
AI.method: 采用L3-Net模型自动提取原始呼吸音频的深度嵌入特征，并与手工设计特征结合，通过三个独立数据集验证其分类性能。
AI.result: 在跨被试实验中，L3-Net结合手工特征的AUC值较基准方法提升28.57%，显著优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 深度音频嵌入模型可有效提升呼吸道疾病检测性能，为基于智能手机的多疾病自动筛查系统提供新方向。

title: BBDM: Image-to-image Translation with Brownian Bridge Diffusion Models
title_zh: BBDM：使用布朗桥扩散模型进行图像到图像的转换
abstract: Image-to-image translation is an important and challenging problem in computer vision and image processing. Diffusion models (DM) have shown great potentials for high-quality image synthesis, and have gained competitive performance on the task of image-to-image translation. However, most of the existing diffusion models treat image-to-image translation as conditional generation processes, and suffer heavily from the gap between distinct domains. In this paper, a novel image-to-image translation method based on the Brownian Bridge Diffusion Model (BBDM) is proposed, which models image-to-image translation as a stochastic Brownian bridge process, and learns the translation between two domains directly through the bidirectional diffusion process rather than a conditional generation process. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first work that proposes Brownian Bridge diffusion process for image-to-image translation. Experimental results on various benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed BBDM model achieves competitive performance through both visual inspection and measurable metrics.
summary: Image-to-image translation is an important and challenging problem in computer vision and image processing. Diffusion models (DM) have shown great potentials for high-quality image synthesis, and have gained competitive performance on the task of image-to-image translation. However, most of the existing diffusion models treat image-to-image translation as conditional generation processes, and suffer heavily from the gap between distinct domains. In this paper, a novel image-to-image translation method based on the Brownian Bridge Diffusion Model (BBDM) is proposed, which models image-to-image translation as a stochastic Brownian bridge process, and learns the translation between two domains directly through the bidirectional diffusion process rather than a conditional generation process. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first work that proposes Brownian Bridge diffusion process for image-to-image translation. Experimental results on various benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed BBDM model achieves competitive performance through both visual inspection and measurable metrics.
abstract_zh: 图像到图像的转换是计算机视觉和图像处理中一个重要且具有挑战性的问题。扩散模型（DM）在高质量图像合成方面表现出了巨大的潜力，并且在图像到图像转换的任务上获得了有竞争力的性能。然而，大多数现有的扩散模型将图像到图像的转换视为条件生成过程，并且严重受到不同域之间差距的影响。本文提出了一种基于布朗桥扩散模型（BBDM）的新型图像到图像翻译方法，该方法将图像到图像翻译建模为随机布朗桥过程，并直接通过双向扩散过程而不是条件生成过程来学习两个域之间的翻译。据我们所知，这是第一个提出用于图像到图像转换的布朗桥扩散过程的工作。各种基准的实验结果表明，所提出的 BBDM 模型通过目视检查和可测量指标实现了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于布朗桥扩散模型（BBDM）的图像到图像翻译方法，通过双向扩散过程直接学习两个域之间的翻译。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型将图像到图像翻译视为条件生成过程，难以有效应对不同域之间的差距，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 将图像翻译建模为布朗桥随机过程，通过双向扩散过程直接学习域间翻译，而非传统条件生成方式。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，BBDM在视觉效果和可衡量指标上均达到具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: BBDM是首个将布朗桥扩散过程应用于图像翻译的工作，有效解决了域间差距问题，为相关任务提供了新思路。

To the best of our knowledge, it is the first work that proposes Brownian Bridge diffusion process for image-to-image translation. Experimental results on various benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed BBDM model achieves competitive performance through both visual inspection and measurable metrics. 图像到图像的转换是计算机视觉和图像处理中一个重要且具有挑战性的问题。扩散模型（DM）在高质量图像合成方面表现出了巨大的潜力，并且在图像到图像转换的任务上获得了有竞争力的性能。然而，大多数现有的扩散模型将图像到图像的转换视为条件生成过程，并且严重受到不同域之间差距的影响。本文提出了一种基于布朗桥扩散模型（BBDM）的新型图像到图像翻译方法，该方法将图像到图像翻译建模为随机布朗桥过程，并直接通过双向扩散过程而不是条件生成过程来学习两个域之间的翻译。据我们所知，这是第一个提出用于图像到图像转换的布朗桥扩散过程的工作。各种基准的实验结果表明，所提出的 BBDM 模型通过目视检查和可测量指标实现了具有竞争力的性能。 本文提出了一种基于布朗桥扩散模型（BBDM）的图像到图像翻译方法，通过双向扩散过程直接学习两个域之间的翻译。 Bo Li,Kaitao Xue,Bin Liu,Yu-Kun Lai cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: George Boateng,Prabhakaran Santhanam,Elgar Fleisch,Janina Lüscher,Theresa Pauly,Urte Scholz,Tobias Kowatsch
title: Development, Deployment, and Evaluation of DyMand -- An Open-Source Smartwatch and Smartphone System for Capturing Couples' Dyadic Interactions in Chronic Disease Management in Daily Life
title_zh: DyMand 的开发、部署和评估——一种开源智能手表和智能手机系统，用于捕获夫妻在日常生活中慢性病管理中的二元互动
comment: 25 pages, Under review at ACM IMWUT
comments: 25 pages, Under review at ACM IMWUT
abstract: Dyadic interactions of couples are of interest as they provide insight into relationship quality and chronic disease management. Currently, ambulatory assessment of couples' interactions entails collecting data at random or scheduled times which could miss significant couples' interaction/conversation moments. In this work, we developed, deployed and evaluated DyMand, a novel open-source smartwatch and smartphone system for collecting self-report and sensor data from couples based on partners' interaction moments. Our smartwatch-based algorithm uses the Bluetooth signal strength between two smartwatches each worn by one partner, and a voice activity detection machine-learning algorithm to infer that the partners are interacting, and then to trigger data collection. We deployed the DyMand system in a 7-day field study and collected data about social support, emotional well-being, and health behavior from 13 (N=26) Swiss-based heterosexual couples managing diabetes mellitus type 2 of one partner. Our system triggered 99.1% of the expected number of sensor and self-report data when the app was running, and 77.6% of algorithm-triggered recordings contained partners' conversation moments compared to 43.8% for scheduled triggers. The usability evaluation showed that DyMand was easy to use. DyMand can be used by social, clinical, or health psychology researchers to understand the social dynamics of couples in everyday life, and for developing and delivering behavioral interventions for couples who are managing chronic diseases.

abstract_zh: 夫妻之间的二元互动很有趣，因为它们可以深入了解关系质量和慢性病管理。目前，对夫妻互动的动态评估需要在随机或预定时间收集数据，这可能会错过重要的夫妻互动/对话时刻。在这项工作中，我们开发、部署和评估了 DyMand，这是一种新颖的开源智能手表和智能手机系统，用于根据伴侣的互动时刻收集情侣的自我报告和传感器数据。我们基于智能手表的算法使用一个伙伴佩戴的两个智能手表之间的蓝牙信号强度，以及语音活动检测机器学习算法来推断伙伴正在交互，然后触发数据收集。我们在一项为期 7 天的实地研究中部署了 DyMand 系统，并收集了 13 对 (N=26) 瑞士异性恋夫妇的社会支持、情绪健康和健康行为的数据，这些夫妇的一方患有 2 型糖尿病。当应用程序运行时，我们的系统触发了预期数量的 99.1% 的传感器和自我报告数据，77.6% 的算法触发录音包含合作伙伴的对话时刻，而计划触发的这一比例为 43.8%。可用性评估表明 DyMand 易于使用。 DyMand 可供社会、临床或健康心理学研究人员用来了解日常生活中夫妻的社会动态，并为正在治疗慢性疾病的夫妻开发和提供行为干预措施。

AI.tldr: 开发并评估DyMand系统，通过智能手表和智能手机捕捉慢性病管理中伴侣的互动数据。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过随机或定时采集数据可能遗漏伴侣关键互动时刻，需更精准捕捉日常互动以研究关系质量与慢性病管理关联。
AI.method: 基于智能手表的蓝牙信号强度及语音活动检测算法识别互动时刻，触发数据采集，并在7天实地研究中测试系统性能。
AI.result: 系统运行时触发99.1%预期数据采集，算法触发记录中77.6%包含对话，显著高于定时触发的43.8%；用户评价系统易用性高。
AI.conclusion: DyMand可有效支持社会、临床及健康心理学研究，助力开发针对慢性病伴侣的行为干预方案。

authors_text: Luna Gava,Marco Monforte,Massimiliano Iacono,Chiara Bartolozzi,Arren Glover
title: PUCK: Parallel Surface and Convolution-kernel Tracking for Event-Based Cameras
title_zh: PUCK：基于事件的相机的平行表面和卷积核跟踪
abstract: Low latency and accuracy are fundamental requirements when vision is integrated in robots for high-speed interaction with targets, since they affect system reliability and stability. In such a scenario, the choice of the sensor and algorithms is important for the entire control loop. The technology of event-cameras can guarantee fast visual sensing in dynamic environments, but requires a tracking algorithm that can keep up with the high data rate induced by the robot ego-motion while maintaining accuracy and robustness to distractors. In this paper, we introduce a novel tracking method that leverages the Exponential Reduced Ordinal Surface (EROS) data representation to decouple event-by-event processing and tracking computation. The latter is performed using convolution kernels to detect and follow a circular target moving on a plane. To benchmark state-of-the-art event-based tracking, we propose the task of tracking the air hockey puck sliding on a surface, with the future aim of controlling the iCub robot to reach the target precisely and on time. Experimental results demonstrate that our algorithm achieves the best compromise between low latency and tracking accuracy both when the robot is still and when moving.
summary: Low latency and accuracy are fundamental requirements when vision is integrated in robots for high-speed interaction with targets, since they affect system reliability and stability. In such a scenario, the choice of the sensor and algorithms is important for the entire control loop. The technology of event-cameras can guarantee fast visual sensing in dynamic environments, but requires a tracking algorithm that can keep up with the high data rate induced by the robot ego-motion while maintaining accuracy and robustness to distractors. In this paper, we introduce a novel tracking method that leverages the Exponential Reduced Ordinal Surface (EROS) data representation to decouple event-by-event processing and tracking computation. The latter is performed using convolution kernels to detect and follow a circular target moving on a plane. To benchmark state-of-the-art event-based tracking, we propose the task of tracking the air hockey puck sliding on a surface, with the future aim of controlling the iCub robot to reach the target precisely and on time. Experimental results demonstrate that our algorithm achieves the best compromise between low latency and tracking accuracy both when the robot is still and when moving.
abstract_zh: 当视觉集成到机器人中以与目标进行高速交互时，低延迟和准确性是基本要求，因为它们会影响系统的可靠性和稳定性。在这种情况下，传感器和算法的选择对于整个控制回路非常重要。事件相机技术可以保证动态环境中的快速视觉传感，但需要一种跟踪算法，能够跟上机器人自我运动引起的高数据速率，同时保持准确性和对干扰的鲁棒性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的跟踪方法，该方法利用指数简化序数曲面（EROS）数据表示来解耦逐事件处理和跟踪计算。后者是使用卷积核来检测和跟踪在平面上移动的圆形目标。为了对最先进的基于事件的跟踪进行基准测试，我们提出了跟踪在表面上滑动的空气曲棍球的任务，未来的目标是控制 iCub 机器人准确、准时地到达目标。实验结果表明，我们的算法在机器人静止和移动时都实现了低延迟和跟踪精度之间的最佳折衷。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件相机的新型跟踪方法PUCK，通过并行处理表面信息和卷积核计算，实现对滑动目标（如桌球）的高效跟踪。
AI.motivation: 机器人高速交互场景需要低延迟且准确的视觉感知，而事件相机虽能提供快速动态感知，但现有算法难以兼顾高数据率处理与跟踪精度。
AI.method: 利用指数缩减序数表面（EROS）数据表示解耦事件处理与跟踪计算，结合卷积核检测平面内圆形目标运动，实现并行化处理。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在机器人静止和运动状态下均达到最低延迟与最高跟踪精度的平衡，优于现有事件相机跟踪方法。
AI.conclusion: PUCK方法为事件相机在机器人实时控制场景（如iCub机器人击球）提供了可靠的技术方案，未来可扩展至更多动态目标跟踪任务。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件相机的新型跟踪方法PUCK，通过并行处理表面信息和卷积核计算，实现对滑动目标（如桌球）的高效跟踪。

title: Hyperdimensional computing encoding for feature selection on the use case of epileptic seizure detection
title_zh: 用于癫痫发作检测用例特征选择的超维计算编码
abstract: The healthcare landscape is moving from the reactive interventions focused on symptoms treatment to a more proactive prevention, from one-size-fits-all to personalized medicine, and from centralized to distributed paradigms. Wearable IoT devices and novel algorithms for continuous monitoring are essential components of this transition. Hyperdimensional (HD) computing is an emerging ML paradigm inspired by neuroscience research with various aspects interesting for IoT devices and biomedical applications. Here we explore the not yet addressed topic of optimal encoding of spatio-temporal data, such as electroencephalogram (EEG) signals, and all information it entails to the HD vectors. Further, we demonstrate how the HD computing framework can be used to perform feature selection by choosing an adequate encoding. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first approach to performing feature selection using HD computing in the literature. As a result, we believe it can support the ML community to further foster the research in multiple directions related to feature and channel selection, as well as model interpretability.
summary: The healthcare landscape is moving from the reactive interventions focused on symptoms treatment to a more proactive prevention, from one-size-fits-all to personalized medicine, and from centralized to distributed paradigms. Wearable IoT devices and novel algorithms for continuous monitoring are essential components of this transition. Hyperdimensional (HD) computing is an emerging ML paradigm inspired by neuroscience research with various aspects interesting for IoT devices and biomedical applications. Here we explore the not yet addressed topic of optimal encoding of spatio-temporal data, such as electroencephalogram (EEG) signals, and all information it entails to the HD vectors. Further, we demonstrate how the HD computing framework can be used to perform feature selection by choosing an adequate encoding. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first approach to performing feature selection using HD computing in the literature. As a result, we believe it can support the ML community to further foster the research in multiple directions related to feature and channel selection, as well as model interpretability.
abstract_zh: 医疗保健领域正在从专注于症状治疗的被动干预转向更加主动的预防，从一刀切转向个性化医疗，从集中式转向分布式范式。可穿戴物联网设备和用于持续监控的新颖算法是这一转变的重要组成部分。超维 (HD) 计算是一种新兴的 ML 范式，其灵感来自于神经科学研究，其各个方面对物联网设备和生物医学应用都很有趣。在这里，我们探讨了尚未解决的时空数据优化编码主题，例如脑电图 (EEG) 信号及其 HD 向量所需的所有信息。此外，我们演示了如何使用高清计算框架通过选择适当的编码来执行特征选择。据我们所知，这是文献中第一种使用高清计算执行特征选择的方法。因此，我们相信它可以支持机器学习社区进一步促进与特征和通道选择以及模型可解释性相关的多个方向的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超维计算（HD）的特征选择方法，用于癫痫发作检测中的EEG信号处理。
AI.motivation: 医疗健康领域需要从被动治疗转向主动预防，并借助可穿戴设备和算法实现个性化医疗。现有研究缺乏针对超维计算框架的时空数据（如EEG）最优编码方法，限制了其在生物医学中的应用。
AI.method: 通过设计EEG信号到超维向量的编码方案，利用超维计算框架实现特征选择，首次将HD计算应用于特征选择领域。
AI.result: 提出了首个基于HD计算的特征选择方法，为特征/通道选择及模型可解释性研究提供了新方向。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为医疗AI领域提供了创新工具，有助于推动个性化医疗和可解释性模型的发展。

title: Generalizing to Evolving Domains with Latent Structure-Aware Sequential Autoencoder
title_zh: 使用潜在结构感知序列自动编码器推广到演化域
comment: ICML 2022, code is available at https://github.com/WonderSeven/LSSAE
comments: ICML 2022, code is available at https://github.com/WonderSeven/LSSAE
abstract: Domain generalization aims to improve the generalization capability of machine learning systems to out-of-distribution (OOD) data. Existing domain generalization techniques embark upon stationary and discrete environments to tackle the generalization issue caused by OOD data. However, many real-world tasks in non-stationary environments (e.g. self-driven car system, sensor measures) involve more complex and continuously evolving domain drift, which raises new challenges for the problem of domain generalization. In this paper, we formulate the aforementioned setting as the problem of evolving domain generalization. Specifically, we propose to introduce a probabilistic framework called Latent Structure-aware Sequential Autoencoder (LSSAE) to tackle the problem of evolving domain generalization via exploring the underlying continuous structure in the latent space of deep neural networks, where we aim to identify two major factors namely covariate shift and concept shift accounting for distribution shift in non-stationary environments. Experimental results on both synthetic and real-world datasets show that LSSAE can lead to superior performances based on the evolving domain generalization setting.
summary: Domain generalization aims to improve the generalization capability of machine learning systems to out-of-distribution (OOD) data. Existing domain generalization techniques embark upon stationary and discrete environments to tackle the generalization issue caused by OOD data. However, many real-world tasks in non-stationary environments (e.g. self-driven car system, sensor measures) involve more complex and continuously evolving domain drift, which raises new challenges for the problem of domain generalization. In this paper, we formulate the aforementioned setting as the problem of evolving domain generalization. Specifically, we propose to introduce a probabilistic framework called Latent Structure-aware Sequential Autoencoder (LSSAE) to tackle the problem of evolving domain generalization via exploring the underlying continuous structure in the latent space of deep neural networks, where we aim to identify two major factors namely covariate shift and concept shift accounting for distribution shift in non-stationary environments. Experimental results on both synthetic and real-world datasets show that LSSAE can lead to superior performances based on the evolving domain generalization setting.
abstract_zh: 领域泛化旨在提高机器学习系统对分布外（OOD）数据的泛化能力。现有的领域泛化技术基于固定和离散环境来解决 OOD 数据引起的泛化问题。然而，非平稳环境中的许多现实任务（例如自动驾驶汽车系统、传感器测量）涉及更复杂且不断演变的域漂移，这对域泛化问题提出了新的挑战。在本文中，我们将上述设置表述为不断演化的领域泛化问题。具体来说，我们建议引入一种称为潜在结构感知序列自动编码器（LSSAE）的概率框架，通过探索深度神经网络潜在空间中的底层连续结构来解决不断发展的领域泛化问题，我们的目标是识别两个主要因素，即协变量偏移和概念偏移，以解释非平稳环境中的分布偏移。合成数据集和真实数据集上的实验结果表明，LSSAE 可以基于不断发展的领域泛化设置带来卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LSSAE的潜在结构感知序列自编码器框架，用于解决非平稳环境下的领域泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法假设环境是静态且离散的，但现实任务（如自动驾驶、传感器数据）涉及持续演变的领域漂移，传统方法难以应对这种复杂动态变化。
AI.method: 设计概率框架LSSAE，通过探索深度神经网络潜在空间中的连续结构，分离协变量偏移和概念偏移两种分布偏移因素，并利用序列自编码器建模领域演变过程。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实世界数据集上的实验表明，LSSAE在动态领域泛化场景下优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: LSSAE通过建模潜在空间连续结构有效解决了非平稳环境下的领域泛化问题，为动态领域适应提供了新思路。

title: A Fast Attention Network for Joint Intent Detection and Slot Filling on Edge Devices
title_zh: 用于边缘设备上联合意图检测和槽填充的快速注意力网络
abstract: Intent detection and slot filling are two main tasks in natural language understanding and play an essential role in task-oriented dialogue systems. The joint learning of both tasks can improve inference accuracy and is popular in recent works. However, most joint models ignore the inference latency and cannot meet the need to deploy dialogue systems at the edge. In this paper, we propose a Fast Attention Network (FAN) for joint intent detection and slot filling tasks, guaranteeing both accuracy and latency. Specifically, we introduce a clean and parameter-refined attention module to enhance the information exchange between intent and slot, improving semantic accuracy by more than 2%. FAN can be implemented on different encoders and delivers more accurate models at every speed level. Our experiments on the Jetson Nano platform show that FAN inferences fifteen utterances per second with a small accuracy drop, showing its effectiveness and efficiency on edge devices.
summary: Intent detection and slot filling are two main tasks in natural language understanding and play an essential role in task-oriented dialogue systems. The joint learning of both tasks can improve inference accuracy and is popular in recent works. However, most joint models ignore the inference latency and cannot meet the need to deploy dialogue systems at the edge. In this paper, we propose a Fast Attention Network (FAN) for joint intent detection and slot filling tasks, guaranteeing both accuracy and latency. Specifically, we introduce a clean and parameter-refined attention module to enhance the information exchange between intent and slot, improving semantic accuracy by more than 2%. FAN can be implemented on different encoders and delivers more accurate models at every speed level. Our experiments on the Jetson Nano platform show that FAN inferences fifteen utterances per second with a small accuracy drop, showing its effectiveness and efficiency on edge devices.
abstract_zh: 意图检测和槽填充是自然语言理解中的两个主要任务，在面向任务的对话系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。这两个任务的联合学习可以提高推理准确性，并且在最近的工作中很流行。然而，大多数联合模型忽略了推理延迟，无法满足在边缘部署对话系统的需求。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于联合意图检测和槽填充任务的快速注意力网络（FAN），保证了准确性和延迟。具体来说，我们引入了一个干净且参数细化的注意力模块来增强意图和槽之间的信息交换，将语义准确性提高了 2% 以上。 FAN 可以在不同的编码器上实施，并在每个速度级别提供更准确的模型。我们在 Jetson Nano 平台上进行的实验表明，FAN 每秒推理 15 个话语，准确性略有下降，显示了其在边缘设备上的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FAN的快速注意力网络，用于在边缘设备上同时执行意图检测和槽位填充任务。
AI.motivation: 现有联合模型忽视推理延迟问题，难以满足边缘设备部署需求，需在保证准确性的同时提升效率。
AI.method: 引入参数精简的注意力模块增强意图与槽位信息交互，并兼容不同编码器实现多速度级别的精准模型。
AI.result: 在Jetson Nano平台实测显示，FAN每秒可处理15个语句且准确率仅小幅下降，验证其在边缘设备上的有效性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: FAN通过优化注意力机制平衡了精度与延迟，在边缘设备部署中表现出色，且具有跨编码器的普适性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FAN的快速注意力网络，用于在边缘设备上同时执行意图检测和槽位填充任务。

ai_content.conclusion: FAN通过优化注意力机制平衡了精度与延迟，在边缘设备部署中表现出色，且具有跨编码器的普适性。

search_text: A Fast Attention Network for Joint Intent Detection and Slot Filling on Edge Devices 用于边缘设备上联合意图检测和槽填充的快速注意力网络 Intent detection and slot filling are two main tasks in natural language understanding and play an essential role in task-oriented dialogue systems. The joint learning of both tasks can improve inference accuracy and is popular in recent works. However, most joint models ignore the inference latency and cannot meet the need to deploy dialogue systems at the edge. In this paper, we propose a Fast Attention Network (FAN) for joint intent detection and slot filling tasks, guaranteeing both accuracy and latency. Specifically, we introduce a clean and parameter-refined attention module to enhance the information exchange between intent and slot, improving semantic accuracy by more than 2%. FAN can be implemented on different encoders and delivers more accurate models at every speed level. Our experiments on the Jetson Nano platform show that FAN inferences fifteen utterances per second with a small accuracy drop, showing its effectiveness and efficiency on edge devices. 意图检测和槽填充是自然语言理解中的两个主要任务，在面向任务的对话系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。这两个任务的联合学习可以提高推理准确性，并且在最近的工作中很流行。然而，大多数联合模型忽略了推理延迟，无法满足在边缘部署对话系统的需求。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于联合意图检测和槽填充任务的快速注意力网络（FAN），保证了准确性和延迟。具体来说，我们引入了一个干净且参数细化的注意力模块来增强意图和槽之间的信息交换，将语义准确性提高了 2% 以上。 FAN 可以在不同的编码器上实施，并在每个速度级别提供更准确的模型。我们在 Jetson Nano 平台上进行的实验表明，FAN 每秒推理 15 个话语，准确性略有下降，显示了其在边缘设备上的有效性和效率。 本文提出一种名为FAN的快速注意力网络，用于在边缘设备上同时执行意图检测和槽位填充任务。 Liang Huang,Senjie Liang,Feiyang Ye,Nan Gao cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: A review of ontologies for smart and continuous commissioning
title_zh: 智能连续调试本体综述
abstract: Smart and continuous commissioning (SCCx) of buildings can result in a significant reduction in the gap between design and operational performance. Ontologies play an important role in SCCx as they facilitate data readability and reasoning by machines. A better understanding of ontologies is required in order to develop and incorporate them in SCCx. This paper critically reviews the state-of-the-art research on building data ontologies since 2014 within the SCCx domain through sorting them based on building data types, general approaches, and applications. The data types of two main domains of building information modeling and building management system have been considered in the majority of existing ontologies. Three main applications are evident from a critical analysis of existing ontologies: (1) key performance indicator calculation, (2) building performance improvement, and (3) fault detection and diagnosis. The key gaps found in the literature review are a holistic ontology for SCCx and insight on how such approaches should be evaluated. Based on these findings, this study provides recommendations for future necessary research including: identification of SCCx-related data types, assessment of ontology performance, and creation of open-source approaches.
summary: Smart and continuous commissioning (SCCx) of buildings can result in a significant reduction in the gap between design and operational performance. Ontologies play an important role in SCCx as they facilitate data readability and reasoning by machines. A better understanding of ontologies is required in order to develop and incorporate them in SCCx. This paper critically reviews the state-of-the-art research on building data ontologies since 2014 within the SCCx domain through sorting them based on building data types, general approaches, and applications. The data types of two main domains of building information modeling and building management system have been considered in the majority of existing ontologies. Three main applications are evident from a critical analysis of existing ontologies: (1) key performance indicator calculation, (2) building performance improvement, and (3) fault detection and diagnosis. The key gaps found in the literature review are a holistic ontology for SCCx and insight on how such approaches should be evaluated. Based on these findings, this study provides recommendations for future necessary research including: identification of SCCx-related data types, assessment of ontology performance, and creation of open-source approaches.
abstract_zh: 建筑物的智能连续调试 (SCCx) 可以显着缩小设计与运营性能之间的差距。本体在 SCCx 中发挥着重要作用，因为它们促进机器的数据可读性和推理。为了开发本体并将其合并到 SCCx 中，需要更好地理解本体。本文根据建筑数据类型、一般方法和应用对建筑数据本体进行分类，批判性地回顾了 2014 年以来 SCCx 领域内建筑数据本体的最新研究成果。大多数现有本体已经考虑了建筑信息建模和建筑管理系统两个主要领域的数据类型。从对现有本体的批判性分析中可以看出三个主要应用：（1）关键性能指标计算，（2）建筑性能改进，以及（3）故障检测和诊断。文献综述中发现的主要差距是 SCCx 的整体本体论以及对如何评估此类方法的见解。基于这些发现，本研究为未来必要的研究提供了建议，包括：识别 SCCx 相关数据类型、评估本体性能以及创建开源方法。

AI.tldr: 本文对智能与持续调试（SCCx）领域中建筑数据本体论的最新研究进行了批判性综述，分析其应用、差距并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 为推动SCCx中本体论的开发与整合，需系统梳理现有研究并明确其不足，以指导后续技术改进与标准化。
AI.method: 通过文献综述法，按建筑数据类型、方法及应用对2014年以来的SCCx相关本体论进行分类与批判性分析。
AI.result: 现有本体论主要应用于KPI计算、性能优化与故障诊断，但缺乏整体性框架及评估标准，需进一步研究数据类型识别与开源方案。
AI.conclusion: 未来需聚焦SCCx数据类型的系统化定义、本体论性能评估方法的建立，以及开放源代码工具的开发以促进领域发展。

title: Relating Information and Proof
title_zh: 相关信息和证据
abstract: In mathematics information is a number that measures uncertainty (entropy) based on a probabilistic distribution, often of an obscure origin. In real life language information is a datum, a statement, more precisely, a formula. But such a formula should be justified by a proof. I try to formalize this perception of information. The measure of informativeness of a proof is based on the set of proofs related to the formulas under consideration. This set of possible proofs (`a knowledge base') defines a probabilistic measure, and entropic weight is defined using this measure. The paper is mainly conceptual, it is not clear where and how this approach can be applied.
summary: In mathematics information is a number that measures uncertainty (entropy) based on a probabilistic distribution, often of an obscure origin. In real life language information is a datum, a statement, more precisely, a formula. But such a formula should be justified by a proof. I try to formalize this perception of information. The measure of informativeness of a proof is based on the set of proofs related to the formulas under consideration. This set of possible proofs (`a knowledge base') defines a probabilistic measure, and entropic weight is defined using this measure. The paper is mainly conceptual, it is not clear where and how this approach can be applied.
abstract_zh: 在数学中，信息是基于概率分布来测量不确定性（熵）的数字，通常来源不明。在现实生活中，语言信息是一个数据、一个陈述，更准确地说，是一个公式。但这样的公式应该通过证明来证明其合理性。我试图将这种信息感知形式化。证明的信息量的度量基于与所考虑的公式相关的一组证明。这组可能的证明（“知识库”）定义了概率度量，并且使用该度量定义了熵权。该论文主要是概念性的，尚不清楚这种方法可以在哪里以及如何应用。

AI.tldr: 将信息与数学证明联系起来，通过构建知识库中的证明集合来定义概率测度，从而量化信息的熵。
AI.motivation: 将数学中的信息论（基于熵）与现实中的证明过程结合，解决信息如何通过证明被验证和量化的问题。
AI.method: 构建包含相关证明的知识库，利用该集合定义概率测度，并基于此计算信息的熵作为衡量标准。
AI.result: 提出了一种将信息与证明结合的理论框架，但尚未明确其应用领域和实际验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为信息与证明的结合提供了新的理论视角，但需要进一步研究其实际应用场景和验证。

title: Taming Continuous Posteriors for Latent Variational Dialogue Policies
title_zh: 驯服连续后验以实现潜在变分对话策略
abstract: Utilizing amortized variational inference for latent-action reinforcement learning (RL) has been shown to be an effective approach in Task-oriented Dialogue (ToD) systems for optimizing dialogue success. Until now, categorical posteriors have been argued to be one of the main drivers of performance. In this work we revisit Gaussian variational posteriors for latent-action RL and show that they can yield even better performance than categoricals. We achieve this by simplifying the training procedure and propose ways to regularize the latent dialogue policy to retain good response coherence. Using continuous latent representations our model achieves state of the art dialogue success rate on the MultiWOZ benchmark, and also compares well to categorical latent methods in response coherence.
summary: Utilizing amortized variational inference for latent-action reinforcement learning (RL) has been shown to be an effective approach in Task-oriented Dialogue (ToD) systems for optimizing dialogue success. Until now, categorical posteriors have been argued to be one of the main drivers of performance. In this work we revisit Gaussian variational posteriors for latent-action RL and show that they can yield even better performance than categoricals. We achieve this by simplifying the training procedure and propose ways to regularize the latent dialogue policy to retain good response coherence. Using continuous latent representations our model achieves state of the art dialogue success rate on the MultiWOZ benchmark, and also compares well to categorical latent methods in response coherence.
abstract_zh: 利用摊销变分推理进行潜在动作强化学习 (RL) 已被证明是面向任务的对话 (ToD) 系统中优化对话成功的有效方法。到目前为止，分类后验被认为是性能的主要驱动因素之一。在这项工作中，我们重新审视潜在动作强化学习的高斯变分后验，并表明它们可以产生比分类后验更好的性能。我们通过简化训练程序来实现这一目标，并提出规范潜在对话政策以保持良好响应一致性的方法。使用连续的潜在表示，我们的模型在 MultiWOZ 基准上实现了最先进的对话成功率，并且在响应一致性方面也与分类潜在方法进行了很好的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用连续高斯变分后验替代传统分类后验，优化潜在动作强化学习在任务导向对话系统中的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管分类后验在任务导向对话系统中表现良好，但作者认为连续高斯后验可能通过更灵活的潜在空间建模进一步提升性能，同时解决训练复杂性和响应连贯性问题。
AI.method: 简化训练流程，采用连续潜在表示并设计正则化方法，约束潜在对话策略以保持响应连贯性。
AI.result: 在MultiWOZ基准测试中，模型对话成功率达到SOTA，且响应连贯性优于分类潜在方法。
AI.conclusion: 连续高斯变分后验通过更有效的潜在空间建模和正则化策略，能在对话成功率和响应质量上超越传统分类方法。

search_text: Taming Continuous Posteriors for Latent Variational Dialogue Policies 驯服连续后验以实现潜在变分对话策略 Utilizing amortized variational inference for latent-action reinforcement learning (RL) has been shown to be an effective approach in Task-oriented Dialogue (ToD) systems for optimizing dialogue success. Until now, categorical posteriors have been argued to be one of the main drivers of performance. In this work we revisit Gaussian variational posteriors for latent-action RL and show that they can yield even better performance than categoricals. We achieve this by simplifying the training procedure and propose ways to regularize the latent dialogue policy to retain good response coherence. Using continuous latent representations our model achieves state of the art dialogue success rate on the MultiWOZ benchmark, and also compares well to categorical latent methods in response coherence. 利用摊销变分推理进行潜在动作强化学习 (RL) 已被证明是面向任务的对话 (ToD) 系统中优化对话成功的有效方法。到目前为止，分类后验被认为是性能的主要驱动因素之一。在这项工作中，我们重新审视潜在动作强化学习的高斯变分后验，并表明它们可以产生比分类后验更好的性能。我们通过简化训练程序来实现这一目标，并提出规范潜在对话政策以保持良好响应一致性的方法。使用连续的潜在表示，我们的模型在 MultiWOZ 基准上实现了最先进的对话成功率，并且在响应一致性方面也与分类潜在方法进行了很好的比较。 本文研究使用连续高斯变分后验替代传统分类后验，优化潜在动作强化学习在任务导向对话系统中的表现。 Marin Vlastelica,Patrick Ernst,György Szarvas cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: KnowGraph-PM: a Knowledge Graph based Pricing Model for Semiconductors Supply Chains
title_zh: KnowGraph-PM：基于知识图的半导体供应链定价模型
abstract: Semiconductor supply chains are described by significant demand fluctuation that increases as one moves up the supply chain, the so-called bullwhip effect. To counteract, semiconductor manufacturers aim to optimize capacity utilization, to deliver with shorter lead times and exploit this to generate revenue. Additionally, in a competitive market, firms seek to maintain customer relationships while applying revenue management strategies such as dynamic pricing. Price change potentially generates conflicts with customers. In this paper, we present KnowGraph-PM, a knowledge graph-based dynamic pricing model. The semantic model uses the potential of faster delivery and shorter lead times to define premium prices, thus entail increased profits based on the customer profile. The knowledge graph enables the integration of customer-related information, e.g., customer class and location to customer order data. The pricing algorithm is realized as a SPARQL query that relies on customer profile and order behavior to determine the corresponding price premium. We evaluate the approach by calculating the revenue generated after applying the pricing algorithm. Based on competency questions that translate to SPARQL queries, we validate the created knowledge graph. We demonstrate that semantic data integration enables customer-tailored revenue management.
summary: Semiconductor supply chains are described by significant demand fluctuation that increases as one moves up the supply chain, the so-called bullwhip effect. To counteract, semiconductor manufacturers aim to optimize capacity utilization, to deliver with shorter lead times and exploit this to generate revenue. Additionally, in a competitive market, firms seek to maintain customer relationships while applying revenue management strategies such as dynamic pricing. Price change potentially generates conflicts with customers. In this paper, we present KnowGraph-PM, a knowledge graph-based dynamic pricing model. The semantic model uses the potential of faster delivery and shorter lead times to define premium prices, thus entail increased profits based on the customer profile. The knowledge graph enables the integration of customer-related information, e.g., customer class and location to customer order data. The pricing algorithm is realized as a SPARQL query that relies on customer profile and order behavior to determine the corresponding price premium. We evaluate the approach by calculating the revenue generated after applying the pricing algorithm. Based on competency questions that translate to SPARQL queries, we validate the created knowledge graph. We demonstrate that semantic data integration enables customer-tailored revenue management.
abstract_zh: 半导体供应链的特点是需求波动显着，随着供应链的向上移动，需求波动也会加大，即所谓的牛鞭效应。为了应对这种情况，半导体制造商的目标是优化产能利用率，以更短的交货时间交付产品，并利用这一点来创造收入。此外，在竞争激烈的市场中，公司寻求维持客户关系，同时应用动态定价等收入管理策略。价格变化可能会引起与客户的冲突。在本文中，我们提出了 KnowGraph-PM，一种基于知识图的动态定价模型。语义模型利用更快交付和更短交货时间的潜力来定义溢价，从而根据客户资料增加利润。知识图可以将客户相关信息（例如客户类别和位置）集成到客户订单数据中。定价算法以 SPARQL 查询的形式实现，该查询依赖于客户资料和订单行为来确定相应的溢价。我们通过计算应用定价算法后产生的收入来评估该方法。根据转换为 SPARQL 查询的能力问题，我们验证创建的知识图。我们证明语义数据集成可以实现客户定制的收入管理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于知识图谱的半导体供应链动态定价模型KnowGraph-PM，旨在通过整合客户信息和订单数据来实现定制化的收入管理。
AI.motivation: 半导体供应链中需求波动显著，制造商希望通过优化产能利用率和缩短交货时间来提高收益，同时在竞争激烈的市场中通过动态定价策略维护客户关系。
AI.method: 利用知识图谱整合客户信息（如客户类别和地理位置）与订单数据，通过SPARQL查询实现基于客户画像和订单行为的定价算法。
AI.result: 通过计算应用定价算法后的收入，验证了知识图谱在客户定制化收入管理中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 语义数据集成能够有效支持基于客户特征的收入管理，为半导体供应链提供了更灵活的定价策略。

title: Model Agnostic Local Explanations of Reject
title_zh: 与模型无关的拒绝局部解释
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.07244
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.07244
abstract: The application of machine learning based decision making systems in safety critical areas requires reliable high certainty predictions. Reject options are a common way of ensuring a sufficiently high certainty of predictions made by the system. While being able to reject uncertain samples is important, it is also of importance to be able to explain why a particular sample was rejected. However, explaining general reject options is still an open problem. We propose a model agnostic method for locally explaining arbitrary reject options by means of interpretable models and counterfactual explanations.
summary: The application of machine learning based decision making systems in safety critical areas requires reliable high certainty predictions. Reject options are a common way of ensuring a sufficiently high certainty of predictions made by the system. While being able to reject uncertain samples is important, it is also of importance to be able to explain why a particular sample was rejected. However, explaining general reject options is still an open problem. We propose a model agnostic method for locally explaining arbitrary reject options by means of interpretable models and counterfactual explanations.
abstract_zh: 基于机器学习的决策系统在安全关键领域的应用需要可靠的高确定性预测。拒绝选项是确保系统做出的预测具有足够高确定性的常用方法。虽然能够拒绝不确定的样本很重要，但能够解释为什么特定样本被拒绝也很重要。然而，解释一般拒绝选项仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们提出了一种与模型无关的方法，通过可解释的模型和反事实解释来局部解释任意拒绝选项。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模型无关的局部解释方法，用于解释机器学习模型的拒绝决策。
AI.motivation: 在安全关键领域，系统需确保预测的高可信度，但现有方法难以解释为何拒绝某些样本，影响透明度和信任度。
AI.method: 通过可解释模型和反事实解释，为任意拒绝选项提供局部解释，且不依赖具体模型结构。
AI.result: 该方法能有效解释不同模型的拒绝原因，增强决策透明性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型无关解释方法为拒绝决策提供了可解释性，有助于提升系统可信度与实际应用价值。

title: Scalable Vehicle Re-Identification via Self-Supervision
title_zh: 通过自我监督进行可扩展的车辆重新识别
abstract: As Computer Vision technologies become more mature for intelligent transportation applications, it is time to ask how efficient and scalable they are for large-scale and real-time deployment. Among these technologies is Vehicle Re-Identification which is one of the key elements in city-scale vehicle analytics systems. Many state-of-the-art solutions for vehicle re-id mostly focus on improving the accuracy on existing re-id benchmarks and often ignore computational complexity. To balance the demands of accuracy and computational efficiency, in this work we propose a simple yet effective hybrid solution empowered by self-supervised training which only uses a single network during inference time and is free of intricate and computation-demanding add-on modules often seen in state-of-the-art approaches. Through extensive experiments, we show our approach, termed Self-Supervised and Boosted VEhicle Re-Identification (SSBVER), is on par with state-of-the-art alternatives in terms of accuracy without introducing any additional overhead during deployment. Additionally we show that our approach, generalizes to different backbone architectures which facilitates various resource constraints and consistently results in a significant accuracy boost.
summary: As Computer Vision technologies become more mature for intelligent transportation applications, it is time to ask how efficient and scalable they are for large-scale and real-time deployment. Among these technologies is Vehicle Re-Identification which is one of the key elements in city-scale vehicle analytics systems. Many state-of-the-art solutions for vehicle re-id mostly focus on improving the accuracy on existing re-id benchmarks and often ignore computational complexity. To balance the demands of accuracy and computational efficiency, in this work we propose a simple yet effective hybrid solution empowered by self-supervised training which only uses a single network during inference time and is free of intricate and computation-demanding add-on modules often seen in state-of-the-art approaches. Through extensive experiments, we show our approach, termed Self-Supervised and Boosted VEhicle Re-Identification (SSBVER), is on par with state-of-the-art alternatives in terms of accuracy without introducing any additional overhead during deployment. Additionally we show that our approach, generalizes to different backbone architectures which facilitates various resource constraints and consistently results in a significant accuracy boost.
abstract_zh: 随着计算机视觉技术在智能交通应用中变得更加成熟，是时候问一下它们对于大规模实时部署的效率和可扩展性如何了。这些技术之一是车辆重新识别，它是城市规模车辆分析系统的关键要素之一。许多最先进的车辆重新识别解决方案主要侧重于提高现有重新识别基准的准确性，而往往忽略计算复杂性。为了平衡准确性和计算效率的需求，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的混合解决方案，该解决方案由自监督训练提供支持，该解决方案在推理时间内仅使用单个网络，并且没有最先进方法中常见的复杂且需要计算的附加模块。通过大量的实验，我们展示了我们的方法，称为自我监督和增强车辆重新识别（SSBVER），在准确性方面与最先进的替代方案相当，并且在部署期间不会引入任何额外的开销。此外，我们还表明，我们的方法可以推广到不同的骨干架构，这有利于各种资源限制，并始终如一地显着提高准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督训练的高效车辆重识别方法，解决大规模部署中的准确率与计算效率平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有车辆重识别方法过度追求准确率而忽视计算复杂度，难以满足大规模实时部署需求。
AI.method: 设计单网络推理的自监督混合模型SSBVER，通过自监督预训练提升特征表达能力，避免复杂附加模块。
AI.result: 在主流基准测试中准确率与SOTA方法相当，推理时无额外开销，且适配多种主干网络架构实现显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: SSBVER通过自监督学习有效平衡了准确率与计算效率，为资源受限场景下的城市级车辆分析提供可行方案。

search_text: Scalable Vehicle Re-Identification via Self-Supervision 通过自我监督进行可扩展的车辆重新识别 As Computer Vision technologies become more mature for intelligent transportation applications, it is time to ask how efficient and scalable they are for large-scale and real-time deployment. Among these technologies is Vehicle Re-Identification which is one of the key elements in city-scale vehicle analytics systems. Many state-of-the-art solutions for vehicle re-id mostly focus on improving the accuracy on existing re-id benchmarks and often ignore computational complexity. To balance the demands of accuracy and computational efficiency, in this work we propose a simple yet effective hybrid solution empowered by self-supervised training which only uses a single network during inference time and is free of intricate and computation-demanding add-on modules often seen in state-of-the-art approaches. Through extensive experiments, we show our approach, termed Self-Supervised and Boosted VEhicle Re-Identification (SSBVER), is on par with state-of-the-art alternatives in terms of accuracy without introducing any additional overhead during deployment. Additionally we show that our approach, generalizes to different backbone architectures which facilitates various resource constraints and consistently results in a significant accuracy boost. 随着计算机视觉技术在智能交通应用中变得更加成熟，是时候问一下它们对于大规模实时部署的效率和可扩展性如何了。这些技术之一是车辆重新识别，它是城市规模车辆分析系统的关键要素之一。许多最先进的车辆重新识别解决方案主要侧重于提高现有重新识别基准的准确性，而往往忽略计算复杂性。为了平衡准确性和计算效率的需求，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的混合解决方案，该解决方案由自监督训练提供支持，该解决方案在推理时间内仅使用单个网络，并且没有最先进方法中常见的复杂且需要计算的附加模块。通过大量的实验，我们展示了我们的方法，称为自我监督和增强车辆重新识别（SSBVER），在准确性方面与最先进的替代方案相当，并且在部署期间不会引入任何额外的开销。此外，我们还表明，我们的方法可以推广到不同的骨干架构，这有利于各种资源限制，并始终如一地显着提高准确性。 本文提出一种基于自监督训练的高效车辆重识别方法，解决大规模部署中的准确率与计算效率平衡问题。 Pirazh Khorramshahi,Vineet Shenoy,Rama Chellappa cs.CV

authors_text: Haochen Han,Qinghua Zheng,Minnan Luo,Kaiyao Miao,Feng Tian,Yan Chen
title: Noise-Tolerant Learning for Audio-Visual Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于视听动作识别的耐噪声学习
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Recently, video recognition is emerging with the help of multi-modal learning, which focuses on integrating distinct modalities to improve the performance or robustness of the model. Although various multi-modal learning methods have been proposed and offer remarkable recognition results, almost all of these methods rely on high-quality manual annotations and assume that modalities among multi-modal data provide semantically relevant information. Unfortunately, the widely used video datasets are usually coarse-annotated or collected from the Internet. Thus, it inevitably contains a portion of noisy labels and noisy correspondence. To address this challenge, we use the audio-visual action recognition task as a proxy and propose a noise-tolerant learning framework to find anti-interference model parameters against both noisy labels and noisy correspondence. Specifically, our method consists of two phases that aim to rectify noise by the inherent correlation between modalities. First, a noise-tolerant contrastive training phase is performed to make the model immune to the possible noisy-labeled data. To alleviate the influence of noisy correspondence, we propose a cross-modal noise estimation component to adjust the consistency between different modalities. As the noisy correspondence existed at the instance level, we further propose a category-level contrastive loss to reduce its interference. Second, in the hybrid-supervised training phase, we calculate the distance metric among features to obtain corrected labels, which are used as complementary supervision to guide the training. Extensive experiments on a wide range of noisy levels demonstrate that our method significantly improves the robustness of the action recognition model and surpasses the baselines by a clear margin.
summary: Recently, video recognition is emerging with the help of multi-modal learning, which focuses on integrating distinct modalities to improve the performance or robustness of the model. Although various multi-modal learning methods have been proposed and offer remarkable recognition results, almost all of these methods rely on high-quality manual annotations and assume that modalities among multi-modal data provide semantically relevant information. Unfortunately, the widely used video datasets are usually coarse-annotated or collected from the Internet. Thus, it inevitably contains a portion of noisy labels and noisy correspondence. To address this challenge, we use the audio-visual action recognition task as a proxy and propose a noise-tolerant learning framework to find anti-interference model parameters against both noisy labels and noisy correspondence. Specifically, our method consists of two phases that aim to rectify noise by the inherent correlation between modalities. First, a noise-tolerant contrastive training phase is performed to make the model immune to the possible noisy-labeled data. To alleviate the influence of noisy correspondence, we propose a cross-modal noise estimation component to adjust the consistency between different modalities. As the noisy correspondence existed at the instance level, we further propose a category-level contrastive loss to reduce its interference. Second, in the hybrid-supervised training phase, we calculate the distance metric among features to obtain corrected labels, which are used as complementary supervision to guide the training. Extensive experiments on a wide range of noisy levels demonstrate that our method significantly improves the robustness of the action recognition model and surpasses the baselines by a clear margin.
abstract_zh: 最近，视频识别在多模态学习的帮助下兴起，其重点是集成不同的模态以提高模型的性能或鲁棒性。尽管已经提出了各种多模态学习方法并提供了显着的识别结果，但几乎所有这些方法都依赖于高质量的手动注释，并假设多模态数据之间的模态提供语义相关的信息。不幸的是，广泛使用的视频数据集通常是粗略注释的或从互联网收集的。因此，它不可避免地包含一部分噪声标签和噪声对应。为了应对这一挑战，我们使用视听动作识别任务作为代理，并提出了一种耐噪声学习框架，以找到针对噪声标签和噪声对应的抗干扰模型参数。具体来说，我们的方法由两个阶段组成，旨在通过模态之间的固有相关性来纠正噪声。首先，执行耐噪声对比训练阶段，以使模型免受可能的噪声标记数据的影响。为了减轻噪声对应的影响，我们提出了一种跨模态噪声估计组件来调整不同模态之间的一致性。由于实例级别存在噪声对应关系，我们进一步提出类别级别对比损失以减少其干扰。其次，在混合监督训练阶段，我们计算特征之间的距离度量以获得校正标签，作为补充监督来指导训练。对各种噪声水平的大量实验表明，我们的方法显着提高了动作识别模型的鲁棒性，并明显超过了基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种抗噪学习框架，用于在存在噪声标签和模态对应关系的音频-视觉动作识别任务中提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-视觉多模态方法依赖高质量标注数据，但实际数据集常包含噪声标签和模态对应错误，导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 框架分两阶段：1) 噪声容忍对比训练阶段，通过跨模态噪声估计组件和类别级对比损失缓解噪声影响；2) 混合监督训练阶段，利用特征距离度量修正标签作为补充监督。
AI.result: 在多种噪声水平下实验表明，该方法显著提升动作识别模型鲁棒性，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过模态间内在关联有效应对标签噪声和对应噪声，为多模态学习提供鲁棒性增强方案。
