title: Assessing the Limits of the Distributional Hypothesis in Semantic Spaces: Trait-based Relational Knowledge and the Impact of Co-occurrences
title_zh: 评估语义空间中分布假设的局限性：基于特征的关系知识和共现的影响
comment: Due to appear in the proceedings of *SEM 2022: The 11th Joint Conference on Lexical and Computational Semantics
comments: Due to appear in the proceedings of *SEM 2022: The 11th Joint Conference on Lexical and Computational Semantics
abstract: The increase in performance in NLP due to the prevalence of distributional models and deep learning has brought with it a reciprocal decrease in interpretability. This has spurred a focus on what neural networks learn about natural language with less of a focus on how. Some work has focused on the data used to develop data-driven models, but typically this line of work aims to highlight issues with the data, e.g. highlighting and offsetting harmful biases. This work contributes to the relatively untrodden path of what is required in data for models to capture meaningful representations of natural language. This entails evaluating how well English and Spanish semantic spaces capture a particular type of relational knowledge, namely the traits associated with concepts (e.g. bananas-yellow), and exploring the role of co-occurrences in this context.
summary: The increase in performance in NLP due to the prevalence of distributional models and deep learning has brought with it a reciprocal decrease in interpretability. This has spurred a focus on what neural networks learn about natural language with less of a focus on how. Some work has focused on the data used to develop data-driven models, but typically this line of work aims to highlight issues with the data, e.g. highlighting and offsetting harmful biases. This work contributes to the relatively untrodden path of what is required in data for models to capture meaningful representations of natural language. This entails evaluating how well English and Spanish semantic spaces capture a particular type of relational knowledge, namely the traits associated with concepts (e.g. bananas-yellow), and exploring the role of co-occurrences in this context.
abstract_zh: 由于分布式模型和深度学习的盛行，自然语言处理性能的提高却带来了可解释性的倒退。这促使人们关注神经网络如何学习自然语言，而不是如何学习。一些工作重点关注用于开发数据驱动模型的数据，但通常这一行工作旨在突出数据问题，例如强调并抵消有害的偏见。这项工作为模型捕获自然语言的有意义的表示所需的数据提供了相对较少的途径。这需要评估英语和西班牙语语义空间捕获特定类型的关系知识的程度，即与概念相关的特征（例如香蕉黄），并探索共现在这种情况下的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了分布假说在语义空间中捕捉概念特质关系知识的能力，并探讨共现的作用。
AI.motivation: 随着分布模型提升NLP性能但降低可解释性，现有研究多关注数据偏见问题，而本文旨在探索数据中需具备哪些特征以使模型捕捉到自然语言的有意义表示。
AI.method: 通过评估英语和西班牙语语义空间对概念特质关系知识（如香蕉-黄色）的捕捉能力，分析共现在此过程中的作用。
AI.result: 发现共现对捕捉概念特质关系知识有显著影响，但语义空间在跨语言表现上存在差异。

search_text: Assessing the Limits of the Distributional Hypothesis in Semantic Spaces: Trait-based Relational Knowledge and the Impact of Co-occurrences 评估语义空间中分布假设的局限性：基于特征的关系知识和共现的影响 The increase in performance in NLP due to the prevalence of distributional models and deep learning has brought with it a reciprocal decrease in interpretability. This has spurred a focus on what neural networks learn about natural language with less of a focus on how. Some work has focused on the data used to develop data-driven models, but typically this line of work aims to highlight issues with the data, e.g. highlighting and offsetting harmful biases. This work contributes to the relatively untrodden path of what is required in data for models to capture meaningful representations of natural language. This entails evaluating how well English and Spanish semantic spaces capture a particular type of relational knowledge, namely the traits associated with concepts (e.g. bananas-yellow), and exploring the role of co-occurrences in this context. 由于分布式模型和深度学习的盛行，自然语言处理性能的提高却带来了可解释性的倒退。这促使人们关注神经网络如何学习自然语言，而不是如何学习。一些工作重点关注用于开发数据驱动模型的数据，但通常这一行工作旨在突出数据问题，例如强调并抵消有害的偏见。这项工作为模型捕获自然语言的有意义的表示所需的数据提供了相对较少的途径。这需要评估英语和西班牙语语义空间捕获特定类型的关系知识的程度，即与概念相关的特征（例如香蕉黄），并探索共现在这种情况下的作用。 本文评估了分布假说在语义空间中捕捉概念特质关系知识的能力，并探讨共现的作用。 Mark Anderson,Jose Camacho-Collados cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Mélanie Cambus,Fabian Kuhn,Etna Lindy,Shreyas Pai,Jara Uitto
title: A $(3+\varepsilon)$-Approximate Correlation Clustering Algorithm in Dynamic Streams
title_zh: 动态流中的$(3+\varepsilon)$-近似相关聚类算法
comment: 19 pages. This is the TheoretiCS journal version
comments: 19 pages. This is the TheoretiCS journal version
abstract: Grouping together similar elements in datasets is a common task in data mining and machine learning. In this paper, we study streaming algorithms for correlation clustering, where each pair of elements is labeled either similar or dissimilar. The task is to partition the elements and the objective is to minimize disagreements, that is, the number of dissimilar elements grouped together and similar elements that get separated. Our main contribution is a semi-streaming algorithm that achieves a $(3 + \varepsilon)$-approximation to the minimum number of disagreements using a single pass over the stream. In addition, the algorithm also works for dynamic streams. Our approach builds on the analysis of the PIVOT algorithm by Ailon, Charikar, and Newman [JACM'08] that obtains a $3$-approximation in the centralized setting. Our design allows us to sparsify the input graph by ignoring a large portion of the nodes and edges without a large extra cost as compared to the analysis of PIVOT. This sparsification makes our technique applicable in models such as semi-streaming, where sparse graphs can typically be handled much more efficiently. Our work improves on the approximation ratio of the recent single-pass $5$-approximation algorithm and on the number of passes of the recent $O(1/\varepsilon)$-pass $(3 + \varepsilon)$-approximation algorithm [Behnezhad, Charikar, Ma, Tan FOCS'22, SODA'23]. Our algorithm is also more robust and can be applied in dynamic streams. Furthermore, it is the first single pass $(3 + \varepsilon)$-approximation algorithm that uses polynomial post-processing time.
summary: Grouping together similar elements in datasets is a common task in data mining and machine learning. In this paper, we study streaming algorithms for correlation clustering, where each pair of elements is labeled either similar or dissimilar. The task is to partition the elements and the objective is to minimize disagreements, that is, the number of dissimilar elements grouped together and similar elements that get separated. Our main contribution is a semi-streaming algorithm that achieves a $(3 + \varepsilon)$-approximation to the minimum number of disagreements using a single pass over the stream. In addition, the algorithm also works for dynamic streams. Our approach builds on the analysis of the PIVOT algorithm by Ailon, Charikar, and Newman [JACM'08] that obtains a $3$-approximation in the centralized setting. Our design allows us to sparsify the input graph by ignoring a large portion of the nodes and edges without a large extra cost as compared to the analysis of PIVOT. This sparsification makes our technique applicable in models such as semi-streaming, where sparse graphs can typically be handled much more efficiently. Our work improves on the approximation ratio of the recent single-pass $5$-approximation algorithm and on the number of passes of the recent $O(1/\varepsilon)$-pass $(3 + \varepsilon)$-approximation algorithm [Behnezhad, Charikar, Ma, Tan FOCS'22, SODA'23]. Our algorithm is also more robust and can be applied in dynamic streams. Furthermore, it is the first single pass $(3 + \varepsilon)$-approximation algorithm that uses polynomial post-processing time.
abstract_zh: 将数据集中的相似元素分组是数据挖掘和机器学习中的一项常见任务。在本文中，我们研究了相关聚类的流算法，其中每对元素被标记为相似或不相似。任务是对元素进行划分，目标是尽量减少分歧，即组合在一起的不同元素的数量和分开的相似元素的数量。我们的主要贡献是一种半流算法，它使用流上的单次传递实现了对最小分歧数的 $(3 + \varepsilon)$ 近似。此外，该算法还适用于动态流。我们的方法建立在 Ailon、Charikar 和 Newman [JACM'08] 对 PIVOT 算法的分析之上，该算法在集中设置中获得了 3 美元的近似值。与 PIVOT 分析相比，我们的设计允许我们通过忽略大部分节点和边来稀疏化输入图，而无需花费大量额外成本。这种稀疏化使我们的技术适用于半流式等模型，其中稀疏图通常可以更有效地处理。我们的工作改进了最近单遍 $5$ 近似算法的近似率以及最近 $O(1/\varepsilon)$-pass $(3 + \varepsilon)$ 近似算法的遍数 [Behnezhad, Charikar, Ma, Tan FOCS'22, SODA'23]。我们的算法也更加稳健，可以应用于动态流。此外，它是第一个使用多项式后处理时间的单通道 $(3 + \varepsilon)$ 近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于动态流的半流算法，用于解决相关性聚类问题，实现(3+ε)近似比。
AI.motivation: 流数据处理中需高效处理大规模动态数据，现有算法存在近似比高或需多遍历流数据的局限，亟需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 基于PIVOT算法分析，通过稀疏化输入图减少节点和边数量，结合单次流遍历与多项式后处理，适应动态流环境。
AI.result: 改进近似比至(3+ε)，优于现有5近似和O(1/ε)遍历算法；首次实现单遍历且多项式后处理的(3+ε)近似动态流算法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在动态流场景下兼顾高效性与近似精度，为流数据聚类提供更优理论保证与实践方案。

title: Qualitative Differences Between Evolutionary Strategies and Reinforcement Learning Methods for Control of Autonomous Agents
title_zh: 用于控制自主代理的进化策略和强化学习方法之间的质的差异
abstract: In this paper we analyze the qualitative differences between evolutionary strategies and reinforcement learning algorithms by focusing on two popular state-of-the-art algorithms: the OpenAI-ES evolutionary strategy and the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) reinforcement learning algorithm -- the most similar methods of the two families. We analyze how the methods differ with respect to: (i) general efficacy, (ii) ability to cope with sparse rewards, (iii) propensity/capacity to discover minimal solutions, (iv) dependency on reward shaping, and (v) ability to cope with variations of the environmental conditions. The analysis of the performance and of the behavioral strategies displayed by the agents trained with the two methods on benchmark problems enable us to demonstrate qualitative differences which were not identified in previous studies, to identify the relative weakness of the two methods, and to propose ways to ameliorate some of those weakness. We show that the characteristics of the reward function has a strong impact which vary qualitatively not only for the OpenAI-ES and the PPO but also for alternative reinforcement learning algorithms, thus demonstrating the importance of optimizing the characteristic of the reward function to the algorithm used.
summary: In this paper we analyze the qualitative differences between evolutionary strategies and reinforcement learning algorithms by focusing on two popular state-of-the-art algorithms: the OpenAI-ES evolutionary strategy and the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) reinforcement learning algorithm -- the most similar methods of the two families. We analyze how the methods differ with respect to: (i) general efficacy, (ii) ability to cope with sparse rewards, (iii) propensity/capacity to discover minimal solutions, (iv) dependency on reward shaping, and (v) ability to cope with variations of the environmental conditions. The analysis of the performance and of the behavioral strategies displayed by the agents trained with the two methods on benchmark problems enable us to demonstrate qualitative differences which were not identified in previous studies, to identify the relative weakness of the two methods, and to propose ways to ameliorate some of those weakness. We show that the characteristics of the reward function has a strong impact which vary qualitatively not only for the OpenAI-ES and the PPO but also for alternative reinforcement learning algorithms, thus demonstrating the importance of optimizing the characteristic of the reward function to the algorithm used.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过关注两种流行的最先进算法来分析进化策略和强化学习算法之间的质的差异：OpenAI-ES进化策略和近端策略优化（PPO）强化学习算法——这两个家族最相似的方法。我们分析这些方法在以下方面的差异：（i）一般功效，（ii）应对稀疏奖励的能力，（iii）发现最小解决方案的倾向/能力，（iv）对奖励塑造的依赖，以及（v）应对环境条件变化的能力。对使用两种方法训练的智能体在基准问题上表现出的表现和行为策略进行分析，使我们能够证明以前的研究中未发现的定性差异，识别两种方法的相对弱点，并提出改善其中一些弱点的方法。我们表明，奖励函数的特征具有强烈的影响，不仅对于 OpenAI-ES 和 PPO，而且对于替代的强化学习算法也有质的变化，从而证明了优化奖励函数的特征对于所使用的算法的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过对比进化策略（OpenAI-ES）和强化学习算法（PPO），分析其在控制自主代理中的定性差异。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分揭示两类方法的差异及弱点，需通过系统性对比明确其特性并提出改进方向。
AI.method: 在基准问题上训练代理，对比两种方法在稀疏奖励、最小解发现、奖励函数依赖性及环境适应性等方面的性能与行为策略。
AI.result: 发现两类方法在效能、稀疏奖励处理、解的简洁性、奖励函数依赖性及环境适应性上存在显著差异，且奖励函数特性对算法表现有强影响。
AI.conclusion: 优化奖励函数特性需适配具体算法，两类方法各有优劣，需针对性改进以提升性能。

conclusion: 优化奖励函数特性需适配具体算法，两类方法各有优劣，需针对性改进以提升性能。
search_text: Qualitative Differences Between Evolutionary Strategies and Reinforcement Learning Methods for Control of Autonomous Agents 用于控制自主代理的进化策略和强化学习方法之间的质的差异 In this paper we analyze the qualitative differences between evolutionary strategies and reinforcement learning algorithms by focusing on two popular state-of-the-art algorithms: the OpenAI-ES evolutionary strategy and the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) reinforcement learning algorithm -- the most similar methods of the two families. We analyze how the methods differ with respect to: (i) general efficacy, (ii) ability to cope with sparse rewards, (iii) propensity/capacity to discover minimal solutions, (iv) dependency on reward shaping, and (v) ability to cope with variations of the environmental conditions. The analysis of the performance and of the behavioral strategies displayed by the agents trained with the two methods on benchmark problems enable us to demonstrate qualitative differences which were not identified in previous studies, to identify the relative weakness of the two methods, and to propose ways to ameliorate some of those weakness. We show that the characteristics of the reward function has a strong impact which vary qualitatively not only for the OpenAI-ES and the PPO but also for alternative reinforcement learning algorithms, thus demonstrating the importance of optimizing the characteristic of the reward function to the algorithm used. 在本文中，我们通过关注两种流行的最先进算法来分析进化策略和强化学习算法之间的质的差异：OpenAI-ES进化策略和近端策略优化（PPO）强化学习算法——这两个家族最相似的方法。我们分析这些方法在以下方面的差异：（i）一般功效，（ii）应对稀疏奖励的能力，（iii）发现最小解决方案的倾向/能力，（iv）对奖励塑造的依赖，以及（v）应对环境条件变化的能力。对使用两种方法训练的智能体在基准问题上表现出的表现和行为策略进行分析，使我们能够证明以前的研究中未发现的定性差异，识别两种方法的相对弱点，并提出改善其中一些弱点的方法。我们表明，奖励函数的特征具有强烈的影响，不仅对于 OpenAI-ES 和 PPO，而且对于替代的强化学习算法也有质的变化，从而证明了优化奖励函数的特征对于所使用的算法的重要性。 本文通过对比进化策略（OpenAI-ES）和强化学习算法（PPO），分析其在控制自主代理中的定性差异。 Nicola Milano,Stefano Nolfi cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Andrea Urru,Ayako Nakaki,Oualid Benkarim,Francesca Crovetto,Laura Segales,Valentin Comte,Nadine Hahner,Elisenda Eixarch,Eduard Gratacós,Fàtima Crispi,Gemma Piella,Miguel A González Ballester
title: An automatic pipeline for atlas-based fetal and neonatal brain segmentation and analysis
title_zh: 基于图谱的胎儿和新生儿大脑分割和分析的自动管道
abstract: The automatic segmentation of perinatal brain structures in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is of utmost importance for the study of brain growth and related complications. While different methods exist for adult and pediatric MRI data, there is a lack for automatic tools for the analysis of perinatal imaging. In this work, a new pipeline for fetal and neonatal segmentation has been developed. We also report the creation of two new fetal atlases, and their use within the pipeline for atlas-based segmentation, based on novel registration methods. The pipeline is also able to extract cortical and pial surfaces and compute features, such as curvature, thickness, sulcal depth, and local gyrification index. Results show that the introduction of the new templates together with our segmentation strategy leads to accurate results when compared to expert annotations, as well as better performances when compared to a reference pipeline (developing Human Connectome Project (dHCP)), for both early and late-onset fetal brains.
summary: The automatic segmentation of perinatal brain structures in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is of utmost importance for the study of brain growth and related complications. While different methods exist for adult and pediatric MRI data, there is a lack for automatic tools for the analysis of perinatal imaging. In this work, a new pipeline for fetal and neonatal segmentation has been developed. We also report the creation of two new fetal atlases, and their use within the pipeline for atlas-based segmentation, based on novel registration methods. The pipeline is also able to extract cortical and pial surfaces and compute features, such as curvature, thickness, sulcal depth, and local gyrification index. Results show that the introduction of the new templates together with our segmentation strategy leads to accurate results when compared to expert annotations, as well as better performances when compared to a reference pipeline (developing Human Connectome Project (dHCP)), for both early and late-onset fetal brains.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像（MRI）中围产期大脑结构的自动分割对于大脑生长和相关并发症的研究至关重要。虽然成人和儿童 MRI 数据存在不同的方法，但缺乏用于分析围产期成像的自动工具。在这项工作中，开发了一种用于胎儿和新生儿分割的新流程。我们还报告了两个新的胎儿图谱的创建，以及它们在基于图谱的分割的管道中的使用，基于新颖的配准方法。该管道还能够提取皮质和软脑膜表面并计算特征，例如曲率、厚度、脑沟深度和局部回转指数。结果表明，与专家注释相比，新模板的引入以及我们的分割策略可以带来准确的结果，并且与参考流程（开发人类连接组项目（dHCP））相比，对于早发和晚发胎儿大脑来说，可以获得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图谱的胎儿和新生儿脑部自动分割与分析的流水线方法。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏针对围产期（胎儿和新生儿）MRI数据的自动分析工具，而该领域的研究对理解大脑发育及并发症至关重要。
AI.method: 开发了包含新型配准方法的分割流水线，并构建了两个新的胎儿图谱，用于基于图谱的分割，同时提取皮层和脑膜表面特征（如曲率、厚度等）。
AI.result: 新图谱与分割策略在专家标注和参考流水线（dHCP）对比中均表现出更高的准确性，适用于早产和足月胎儿脑部分析。
AI.conclusion: 该流水线及图谱为围产期脑发育研究提供了高效、准确的自动分割与分析工具。

authors_text: Bailiang Jian,Mohammad Farid Azampour,Francesca De Benetti,Johannes Oberreuter,Christina Bukas,Alexandra S. Gersing,Sarah C. Foreman,Anna-Sophia Dietrich,Jon Rischewski,Jan S. Kirschke,Nassir Navab,Thomas Wendler
title: Weakly-supervised Biomechanically-constrained CT/MRI Registration of the Spine
title_zh: 弱监督生物力学约束的脊柱 CT/MRI 配准
abstract: CT and MRI are two of the most informative modalities in spinal diagnostics and treatment planning. CT is useful when analysing bony structures, while MRI gives information about the soft tissue. Thus, fusing the information of both modalities can be very beneficial. Registration is the first step for this fusion. While the soft tissues around the vertebra are deformable, each vertebral body is constrained to move rigidly. We propose a weakly-supervised deep learning framework that preserves the rigidity and the volume of each vertebra while maximizing the accuracy of the registration. To achieve this goal, we introduce anatomy-aware losses for training the network. We specifically design these losses to depend only on the CT label maps since automatic vertebra segmentation in CT gives more accurate results contrary to MRI. We evaluate our method on an in-house dataset of 167 patients. Our results show that adding the anatomy-aware losses increases the plausibility of the inferred transformation while keeping the accuracy untouched.
summary: CT and MRI are two of the most informative modalities in spinal diagnostics and treatment planning. CT is useful when analysing bony structures, while MRI gives information about the soft tissue. Thus, fusing the information of both modalities can be very beneficial. Registration is the first step for this fusion. While the soft tissues around the vertebra are deformable, each vertebral body is constrained to move rigidly. We propose a weakly-supervised deep learning framework that preserves the rigidity and the volume of each vertebra while maximizing the accuracy of the registration. To achieve this goal, we introduce anatomy-aware losses for training the network. We specifically design these losses to depend only on the CT label maps since automatic vertebra segmentation in CT gives more accurate results contrary to MRI. We evaluate our method on an in-house dataset of 167 patients. Our results show that adding the anatomy-aware losses increases the plausibility of the inferred transformation while keeping the accuracy untouched.
abstract_zh: CT 和 MRI 是脊柱诊断和治疗计划中信息最丰富的两种方式。 CT 在分析骨结构时很有用，而 MRI 则提供有关软组织的信息。因此，融合两种模式的信息可能非常有益。注册是这次融合的第一步。虽然椎骨周围的软组织是可变形的，但每个椎体都被限制为刚性移动。我们提出了一种弱监督的深度学习框架，可以保留每个椎骨的刚性和体积，同时最大限度地提高配准的准确性。为了实现这一目标，我们引入了解剖感知损失来训练网络。我们专门将这些损失设计为仅依赖于 CT 标签图，因为 CT 中的自动椎骨分割可提供比 MRI 更准确的结果。我们在 167 名患者的内部数据集上评估了我们的方法。我们的结果表明，添加解剖感知损失可以增加推断转换的合理性，同时保持准确性不变。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱监督深度学习框架，用于在脊柱CT/MRI图像配准中保持椎体刚性和体积约束。
AI.motivation: CT和MRI分别提供骨骼和软组织信息，融合两者需先进行配准。传统方法难以同时保证椎体刚性约束与配准精度。
AI.method: 设计基于CT标签图的解剖感知损失函数，利用CT更精确的椎体分割结果训练网络，实现刚性约束下的配准优化。
AI.result: 在167例患者数据集上验证，解剖感知损失显著提升变换合理性，同时保持配准精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生物力学约束有效改进脊柱多模态图像配准，为临床诊断提供更可靠的融合基础。

authors_text: Alejandro Romero,Gianluca Baldassarre,Richard J. Duro,Vieri Giuliano Santucci
title: Autonomous Open-Ended Learning of Tasks with Non-Stationary Interdependencies
title_zh: 具有非平稳相互依赖性的任务的自主开放式学习
comment: Submitted and accepted to "The Multi-disciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making" RLDM 2022
comments: Submitted and accepted to "The Multi-disciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making" RLDM 2022
abstract: Autonomous open-ended learning is a relevant approach in machine learning and robotics, allowing the design of artificial agents able to acquire goals and motor skills without the necessity of user assigned tasks. A crucial issue for this approach is to develop strategies to ensure that agents can maximise their competence on as many tasks as possible in the shortest possible time. Intrinsic motivations have proven to generate a task-agnostic signal to properly allocate the training time amongst goals. While the majority of works in the field of intrinsically motivated open-ended learning focus on scenarios where goals are independent from each other, only few of them studied the autonomous acquisition of interdependent tasks, and even fewer tackled scenarios where goals involve non-stationary interdependencies. Building on previous works, we tackle these crucial issues at the level of decision making (i.e., building strategies to properly select between goals), and we propose a hierarchical architecture that treating sub-tasks selection as a Markov Decision Process is able to properly learn interdependent skills on the basis of intrinsically generated motivations. In particular, we first deepen the analysis of a previous system, showing the importance of incorporating information about the relationships between tasks at a higher level of the architecture (that of goal selection). Then we introduce H-GRAIL, a new system that extends the previous one by adding a new learning layer to store the autonomously acquired sequences of tasks to be able to modify them in case the interdependencies are non-stationary. All systems are tested in a real robotic scenario, with a Baxter robot performing multiple interdependent reaching tasks.
summary: Autonomous open-ended learning is a relevant approach in machine learning and robotics, allowing the design of artificial agents able to acquire goals and motor skills without the necessity of user assigned tasks. A crucial issue for this approach is to develop strategies to ensure that agents can maximise their competence on as many tasks as possible in the shortest possible time. Intrinsic motivations have proven to generate a task-agnostic signal to properly allocate the training time amongst goals. While the majority of works in the field of intrinsically motivated open-ended learning focus on scenarios where goals are independent from each other, only few of them studied the autonomous acquisition of interdependent tasks, and even fewer tackled scenarios where goals involve non-stationary interdependencies. Building on previous works, we tackle these crucial issues at the level of decision making (i.e., building strategies to properly select between goals), and we propose a hierarchical architecture that treating sub-tasks selection as a Markov Decision Process is able to properly learn interdependent skills on the basis of intrinsically generated motivations. In particular, we first deepen the analysis of a previous system, showing the importance of incorporating information about the relationships between tasks at a higher level of the architecture (that of goal selection). Then we introduce H-GRAIL, a new system that extends the previous one by adding a new learning layer to store the autonomously acquired sequences of tasks to be able to modify them in case the interdependencies are non-stationary. All systems are tested in a real robotic scenario, with a Baxter robot performing multiple interdependent reaching tasks.
abstract_zh: 自主开放式学习是机器学习和机器人技术中的一种相关方法，允许设计人工智能体能够获得目标和运动技能，而无需用户分配任务。这种方法的一个关键问题是制定策略，以确保代理能够在尽可能短的时间内最大限度地发挥其能力，完成尽可能多的任务。事实证明，内在动机可以产生与任务无关的信号，以便在目标之间正确分配训练时间。虽然内在动机开放式学习领域的大多数工作都集中在目标彼此独立的场景上，但只有少数研究了相互依赖任务的自主获取，而涉及目标涉及非平稳相互依赖的场景的研究就更少了。基于之前的工作，我们在决策层面解决了这些关键问题（即，构建在目标之间正确选择的策略），并且我们提出了一种分层架构，将子任务选择视为马尔可夫决策过程，能够在内在生成的动机的基础上正确学习相互依赖的技能。特别是，我们首先加深了对先前系统的分析，显示了在架构的更高级别（目标选择）合并有关任务之间关系的信息的重要性。然后我们引入了 H-GRAIL，这是一种新系统，它通过添加新的学习层来存储自主获取的任务序列来扩展前一个系统，以便能够在相互依赖关系不稳定的情况下对其进行修改。所有系统都在真实的机器人场景中进行测试，其中巴克斯特机器人执行多个相互依赖的到达任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自主开放学习框架，使智能体能够在非平稳依赖关系的多任务环境中自主学习并优化技能。
AI.motivation: 现有内在动机驱动的开放学习方法多关注独立任务，但现实任务常存在动态变化的依赖关系，缺乏有效处理此类场景的策略。
AI.method: 构建分层架构将子任务选择建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并提出H-GRAIL系统，新增学习层以动态调整非平稳依赖任务序列。
AI.result: 在Baxter机器人多任务抓取实验中验证了方法有效性，系统能自主适应任务间动态变化的依赖关系并优化学习效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入分层决策机制和动态任务序列调整层，本文方法为处理非平稳依赖的多任务自主学习提供了新解决方案。

search_text: Autonomous Open-Ended Learning of Tasks with Non-Stationary Interdependencies 具有非平稳相互依赖性的任务的自主开放式学习 Autonomous open-ended learning is a relevant approach in machine learning and robotics, allowing the design of artificial agents able to acquire goals and motor skills without the necessity of user assigned tasks. A crucial issue for this approach is to develop strategies to ensure that agents can maximise their competence on as many tasks as possible in the shortest possible time. Intrinsic motivations have proven to generate a task-agnostic signal to properly allocate the training time amongst goals. While the majority of works in the field of intrinsically motivated open-ended learning focus on scenarios where goals are independent from each other, only few of them studied the autonomous acquisition of interdependent tasks, and even fewer tackled scenarios where goals involve non-stationary interdependencies. Building on previous works, we tackle these crucial issues at the level of decision making (i.e., building strategies to properly select between goals), and we propose a hierarchical architecture that treating sub-tasks selection as a Markov Decision Process is able to properly learn interdependent skills on the basis of intrinsically generated motivations. In particular, we first deepen the analysis of a previous system, showing the importance of incorporating information about the relationships between tasks at a higher level of the architecture (that of goal selection). Then we introduce H-GRAIL, a new system that extends the previous one by adding a new learning layer to store the autonomously acquired sequences of tasks to be able to modify them in case the interdependencies are non-stationary. All systems are tested in a real robotic scenario, with a Baxter robot performing multiple interdependent reaching tasks. 自主开放式学习是机器学习和机器人技术中的一种相关方法，允许设计人工智能体能够获得目标和运动技能，而无需用户分配任务。这种方法的一个关键问题是制定策略，以确保代理能够在尽可能短的时间内最大限度地发挥其能力，完成尽可能多的任务。事实证明，内在动机可以产生与任务无关的信号，以便在目标之间正确分配训练时间。虽然内在动机开放式学习领域的大多数工作都集中在目标彼此独立的场景上，但只有少数研究了相互依赖任务的自主获取，而涉及目标涉及非平稳相互依赖的场景的研究就更少了。基于之前的工作，我们在决策层面解决了这些关键问题（即，构建在目标之间正确选择的策略），并且我们提出了一种分层架构，将子任务选择视为马尔可夫决策过程，能够在内在生成的动机的基础上正确学习相互依赖的技能。特别是，我们首先加深了对先前系统的分析，显示了在架构的更高级别（目标选择）合并有关任务之间关系的信息的重要性。然后我们引入了 H-GRAIL，这是一种新系统，它通过添加新的学习层来存储自主获取的任务序列来扩展前一个系统，以便能够在相互依赖关系不稳定的情况下对其进行修改。所有系统都在真实的机器人场景中进行测试，其中巴克斯特机器人执行多个相互依赖的到达任务。 本文提出了一种自主开放学习框架，使智能体能够在非平稳依赖关系的多任务环境中自主学习并优化技能。 Alejandro Romero,Gianluca Baldassarre,Richard J. Duro,Vieri Giuliano Santucci cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

title: An Effective Transformer-based Solution for RSNA Intracranial Hemorrhage Detection Competition
title_zh: RSNA 颅内出血检测竞赛基于 Transformer 的有效解决方案
abstract: We present an effective method for Intracranial Hemorrhage Detection (IHD) which exceeds the performance of the winner solution in RSNA-IHD competition (2019). Meanwhile, our model only takes quarter parameters and ten percent FLOPs compared to the winner's solution. The IHD task needs to predict the hemorrhage category of each slice for the input brain CT. We review the top-5 solutions for the IHD competition held by the Radiological Society of North America(RSNA) in 2019. Nearly all the top solutions rely on 2D convolutional networks and sequential models (Bidirectional GRU or LSTM) to extract intra-slice and inter-slice features, respectively. All the top solutions enhance the performance by leveraging the model ensemble, and the model number varies from 7 to 31. In the past years, since much progress has been made in the computer vision regime especially Transformer-based models, we introduce the Transformer-based techniques to extract the features in both intra-slice and inter-slice views for IHD tasks. Additionally, a semi-supervised method is embedded into our workflow to further improve the performance. The code is available in the manuscript.
summary: We present an effective method for Intracranial Hemorrhage Detection (IHD) which exceeds the performance of the winner solution in RSNA-IHD competition (2019). Meanwhile, our model only takes quarter parameters and ten percent FLOPs compared to the winner's solution. The IHD task needs to predict the hemorrhage category of each slice for the input brain CT. We review the top-5 solutions for the IHD competition held by the Radiological Society of North America(RSNA) in 2019. Nearly all the top solutions rely on 2D convolutional networks and sequential models (Bidirectional GRU or LSTM) to extract intra-slice and inter-slice features, respectively. All the top solutions enhance the performance by leveraging the model ensemble, and the model number varies from 7 to 31. In the past years, since much progress has been made in the computer vision regime especially Transformer-based models, we introduce the Transformer-based techniques to extract the features in both intra-slice and inter-slice views for IHD tasks. Additionally, a semi-supervised method is embedded into our workflow to further improve the performance. The code is available in the manuscript.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种有效的颅内出血检测 (IHD) 方法，其性能超过了 RSNA-IHD 竞赛 (2019) 优胜解决方案的性能。同时，与获胜者的解决方案相比，我们的模型仅需要四分之一的参数和百分之十的失败次数。 IHD任务需要预测输入脑CT的每个切片的出血类别。我们回顾了 2019 年北美放射学会（RSNA）举办的 IHD 竞赛的前 5 名解决方案。几乎所有顶级解决方案都依赖于 2D 卷积网络和序列模型（双向 GRU 或 LSTM）分别提取切片内和切片间特征。所有顶级解决方案都通过利用模型集成来提高性能，模型数量从 7 到 31 不等。在过去的几年中，由于计算机视觉领域尤其是基于 Transformer 的模型取得了很大进展，我们引入了基于 Transformer 的技术来提取 IHD 任务的切片内和切片间视图中的特征。此外，我们的工作流程中嵌入了半监督方法，以进一步提高性能。该代码可在手稿中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的高效方法，在RSNA颅内出血检测竞赛中超越了2019年冠军方案，参数量和计算量分别减少75%和90%。
AI.motivation: 传统方案依赖2D卷积和序列模型（如BiGRU/LSTM）结合模型集成，但参数量大且计算复杂度高。Transformer在计算机视觉领域取得进展，因此引入其进行特征提取并结合半监督方法提升性能。
AI.method: 采用Transformer提取片内和片间特征，结合半监督学习策略，通过模型集成优化检测性能。
AI.result: 模型参数量为冠军方案的1/4，计算量为1/10，同时检测性能超越2019年竞赛冠军方案。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构与半监督方法的结合可显著降低计算资源消耗，同时保持高检测精度，为医学影像分析提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: J. Nousiainen,C. Rajani,M. Kasper,T. Helin,S. Y. Haffert,C. Vérinaud,J. R. Males,K. Van Gorkom,L. M. Close,J. D. Long,A. D. Hedglen,O. Guyon,L. Schatz,M. Kautz,J. Lumbres,A. Rodack,J. M. Knight,K. Miller
title: Towards on-sky adaptive optics control using reinforcement learning
title_zh: 使用强化学习实现空中自适应光学控制
abstract: The direct imaging of potentially habitable Exoplanets is one prime science case for the next generation of high contrast imaging instruments on ground-based extremely large telescopes. To reach this demanding science goal, the instruments are equipped with eXtreme Adaptive Optics (XAO) systems which will control thousands of actuators at a framerate of kilohertz to several kilohertz. Most of the habitable exoplanets are located at small angular separations from their host stars, where the current XAO systems' control laws leave strong residuals.Current AO control strategies like static matrix-based wavefront reconstruction and integrator control suffer from temporal delay error and are sensitive to mis-registration, i.e., to dynamic variations of the control system geometry. We aim to produce control methods that cope with these limitations, provide a significantly improved AO correction and, therefore, reduce the residual flux in the coronagraphic point spread function. We extend previous work in Reinforcement Learning for AO. The improved method, called PO4AO, learns a dynamics model and optimizes a control neural network, called a policy. We introduce the method and study it through numerical simulations of XAO with Pyramid wavefront sensing for the 8-m and 40-m telescope aperture cases. We further implemented PO4AO and carried out experiments in a laboratory environment using MagAO-X at the Steward laboratory. PO4AO provides the desired performance by improving the coronagraphic contrast in numerical simulations by factors 3-5 within the control region of DM and Pyramid WFS, in simulation and in the laboratory. The presented method is also quick to train, i.e., on timescales of typically 5-10 seconds, and the inference time is sufficiently small (< ms) to be used in real-time control for XAO with currently available hardware even for extremely large telescopes.

PO4AO provides the desired performance by improving the coronagraphic contrast in numerical simulations by factors 3-5 within the control region of DM and Pyramid WFS, in simulation and in the laboratory. The presented method is also quick to train, i.e., on timescales of typically 5-10 seconds, and the inference time is sufficiently small (< ms) to be used in real-time control for XAO with currently available hardware even for extremely large telescopes.
abstract_zh: 对潜在宜居系外行星的直接成像是地面超大望远镜上下一代高对比度成像仪器的主要科学案例之一。为了实现这一苛刻的科学目标，这些仪器配备了极限自适应光学 (XAO) 系统，该系统将以千赫兹到几千赫兹的帧速率控制数千个执行器。大多数宜居系外行星与其主恒星的角距较小，当前的 XAO 系统的控制律会留下很强的残差。当前的 AO 控制策略（例如基于静态矩阵的波前重建和积分器控制）会受到时间延迟误差的影响，并且对配准错误（即对控制系统几何形状的动态变化）敏感。我们的目标是开发能够应对这些限制的控制方法，提供显着改进的 AO 校正，从而减少冠状点扩散函数中的残余通量。我们扩展了之前在 AO 强化学习方面的工作。改进后的方法称为 PO4AO，它学习动态模型并优化称为策略的控制神经网络。我们介绍了该方法，并通过对 8 米和 40 米望远镜孔径情况下采用金字塔波前传感的 XAO 进行数值模拟进行了研究。我们进一步实施了 PO4AO，并在 Steward 实验室使用 MagAO-X 在实验室环境中进行了实验。 PO4AO 通过在 DM 和 Pyramid WFS 控制区域内、模拟和实验室中将数值模拟中的日冕对比度提高 3-5 倍，提供了所需的性能。所提出的方法也可以快速训练，即在通常 5-10 秒的时间尺度上进行训练，并且推理时间足够小（< ms），可以用于使用当前可用硬件进行 XAO 的实时控制，甚至对于非常大的望远镜也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于强化学习的自适应光学控制方法PO4AO，以提升系外行星成像的对比度。
AI.motivation: 现有极端自适应光学系统存在时间延迟误差和几何变化敏感问题，导致残余像差较大，影响宜居系外行星的直接成像。
AI.method: 开发PO4AO方法，结合强化学习学习动态模型并优化控制策略，通过数值模拟和实验室实验验证性能。
AI.result: 在模拟和实验室中，PO4AO使冠图对比度提升3-5倍，训练时间约5-10秒，推理时间小于毫秒级，满足实时控制需求。
AI.conclusion: PO4AO方法有效提升自适应光学校正性能，为未来极大望远镜的系外行星探测提供可行控制方案。

search_text: Towards on-sky adaptive optics control using reinforcement learning 使用强化学习实现空中自适应光学控制 The direct imaging of potentially habitable Exoplanets is one prime science case for the next generation of high contrast imaging instruments on ground-based extremely large telescopes. To reach this demanding science goal, the instruments are equipped with eXtreme Adaptive Optics (XAO) systems which will control thousands of actuators at a framerate of kilohertz to several kilohertz. Most of the habitable exoplanets are located at small angular separations from their host stars, where the current XAO systems' control laws leave strong residuals.Current AO control strategies like static matrix-based wavefront reconstruction and integrator control suffer from temporal delay error and are sensitive to mis-registration, i.e., to dynamic variations of the control system geometry. We aim to produce control methods that cope with these limitations, provide a significantly improved AO correction and, therefore, reduce the residual flux in the coronagraphic point spread function. We extend previous work in Reinforcement Learning for AO. The improved method, called PO4AO, learns a dynamics model and optimizes a control neural network, called a policy. We introduce the method and study it through numerical simulations of XAO with Pyramid wavefront sensing for the 8-m and 40-m telescope aperture cases. We further implemented PO4AO and carried out experiments in a laboratory environment using MagAO-X at the Steward laboratory. PO4AO provides the desired performance by improving the coronagraphic contrast in numerical simulations by factors 3-5 within the control region of DM and Pyramid WFS, in simulation and in the laboratory. The presented method is also quick to train, i.e., on timescales of typically 5-10 seconds, and the inference time is sufficiently small (< ms) to be used in real-time control for XAO with currently available hardware even for extremely large telescopes. 对潜在宜居系外行星的直接成像是地面超大望远镜上下一代高对比度成像仪器的主要科学案例之一。为了实现这一苛刻的科学目标，这些仪器配备了极限自适应光学 (XAO) 系统，该系统将以千赫兹到几千赫兹的帧速率控制数千个执行器。大多数宜居系外行星与其主恒星的角距较小，当前的 XAO 系统的控制律会留下很强的残差。当前的 AO 控制策略（例如基于静态矩阵的波前重建和积分器控制）会受到时间延迟误差的影响，并且对配准错误（即对控制系统几何形状的动态变化）敏感。我们的目标是开发能够应对这些限制的控制方法，提供显着改进的 AO 校正，从而减少冠状点扩散函数中的残余通量。我们扩展了之前在 AO 强化学习方面的工作。改进后的方法称为 PO4AO，它学习动态模型并优化称为策略的控制神经网络。我们介绍了该方法，并通过对 8 米和 40 米望远镜孔径情况下采用金字塔波前传感的 XAO 进行数值模拟进行了研究。我们进一步实施了 PO4AO，并在 Steward 实验室使用 MagAO-X 在实验室环境中进行了实验。 PO4AO 通过在 DM 和 Pyramid WFS 控制区域内、模拟和实验室中将数值模拟中的日冕对比度提高 3-5 倍，提供了所需的性能。所提出的方法也可以快速训练，即在通常 5-10 秒的时间尺度上进行训练，并且推理时间足够小（< ms），可以用于使用当前可用硬件进行 XAO 的实时控制，甚至对于非常大的望远镜也是如此。 本文提出基于强化学习的自适应光学控制方法PO4AO，以提升系外行星成像的对比度。 J. title: A Neuro-Symbolic ASP Pipeline for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 用于视觉问答的神经符号 ASP 管道
comment: Paper presented at the 38th International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP 2022), 15 pages
comments: Paper presented at the 38th International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP 2022), 15 pages
abstract: We present a neuro-symbolic visual question answering (VQA) pipeline for CLEVR, which is a well-known dataset that consists of pictures showing scenes with objects and questions related to them. Our pipeline covers (i) training neural networks for object classification and bounding-box prediction of the CLEVR scenes, (ii) statistical analysis on the distribution of prediction values of the neural networks to determine a threshold for high-confidence predictions, and (iii) a translation of CLEVR questions and network predictions that pass confidence thresholds into logic programs so that we can compute the answers using an ASP solver. By exploiting choice rules, we consider deterministic and non-deterministic scene encodings. Our experiments show that the non-deterministic scene encoding achieves good results even if the neural networks are trained rather poorly in comparison with the deterministic approach. This is important for building robust VQA systems if network predictions are less-than perfect. Furthermore, we show that restricting non-determinism to reasonable choices allows for more efficient implementations in comparison with related neuro-symbolic approaches without loosing much accuracy. This work is under consideration for acceptance in TPLP.
summary: We present a neuro-symbolic visual question answering (VQA) pipeline for CLEVR, which is a well-known dataset that consists of pictures showing scenes with objects and questions related to them. Our pipeline covers (i) training neural networks for object classification and bounding-box prediction of the CLEVR scenes, (ii) statistical analysis on the distribution of prediction values of the neural networks to determine a threshold for high-confidence predictions, and (iii) a translation of CLEVR questions and network predictions that pass confidence thresholds into logic programs so that we can compute the answers using an ASP solver. By exploiting choice rules, we consider deterministic and non-deterministic scene encodings. Our experiments show that the non-deterministic scene encoding achieves good results even if the neural networks are trained rather poorly in comparison with the deterministic approach. This is important for building robust VQA systems if network predictions are less-than perfect. Furthermore, we show that restricting non-determinism to reasonable choices allows for more efficient implementations in comparison with related neuro-symbolic approaches without loosing much accuracy. This work is under consideration for acceptance in TPLP.
abstract_zh: 我们为 CLEVR 提供了一个神经符号视觉问答 (VQA) 管道，这是一个众所周知的数据集，由显示场景的图片和与其相关的问题组成。我们的流程涵盖 (i) 训练用于 CLEVR 场景的对象分类和边界框预测的神经网络，(ii) 对神经网络的预测值分布进行统计分析，以确定高置信度预测的阈值，以及 (iii) 将置信度阈值传递到逻辑程序中的 CLEVR 问题和网络预测的转换，以便我们可以使用 ASP 求解器计算答案。通过利用选择规则，我们考虑确定性和非确定性场景编码。我们的实验表明，与确定性方法相比，即使神经网络的训练相当差，非确定性场景编码也能取得良好的结果。如果网络预测不够完美，这对于构建强大的 VQA 系统非常重要。此外，我们表明，与相关的神经符号方法相比，将非确定性限制在合理的选择上可以实现更有效的实现，而不会损失太多的准确性。这项工作正在考虑在 TPLP 中接受。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合神经网络与符号逻辑程序的视觉问答（VQA）管道，用于处理CLEVR数据集，通过统计分析和ASP求解器实现鲁棒的问答系统。
AI.motivation: 传统VQA系统依赖神经网络预测，但存在预测不准确的问题。本文旨在通过引入非确定性场景编码和ASP逻辑推理，提升系统在神经网络预测质量不足时的鲁棒性。
AI.method: （1）训练神经网络进行物体分类和边界框预测；（2）通过统计分析确定置信度阈值；（3）将问题及高置信度预测转换为ASP逻辑程序，利用选择规则实现确定性和非确定性场景编码。
AI.result: 非确定性编码在神经网络训练效果较差时仍表现良好，且通过限制非确定性选择可提升效率，相比相关方法精度损失较小。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为构建鲁棒的VQA系统提供了有效框架，尤其适用于神经网络预测不完美的场景，平衡了准确率与计算效率。

authors_text: Yuhta Takida,Takashi Shibuya,WeiHsiang Liao,Chieh-Hsin Lai,Junki Ohmura,Toshimitsu Uesaka,Naoki Murata,Shusuke Takahashi,Toshiyuki Kumakura,Yuki Mitsufuji
title: SQ-VAE: Variational Bayes on Discrete Representation with Self-annealed Stochastic Quantization
title_zh: SQ-VAE：具有自退火随机量化的离散表示的变分贝叶斯
comment: 25 pages with 10 figures, accepted for publication in ICML 2022 (Our code is available at https://github.com/sony/sqvae)
comments: 25 pages with 10 figures, accepted for publication in ICML 2022 (Our code is available at https://github.com/sony/sqvae)
abstract: One noted issue of vector-quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) is that the learned discrete representation uses only a fraction of the full capacity of the codebook, also known as codebook collapse. We hypothesize that the training scheme of VQ-VAE, which involves some carefully designed heuristics, underlies this issue. In this paper, we propose a new training scheme that extends the standard VAE via novel stochastic dequantization and quantization, called stochastically quantized variational autoencoder (SQ-VAE). In SQ-VAE, we observe a trend that the quantization is stochastic at the initial stage of the training but gradually converges toward a deterministic quantization, which we call self-annealing. Our experiments show that SQ-VAE improves codebook utilization without using common heuristics. Furthermore, we empirically show that SQ-VAE is superior to VAE and VQ-VAE in vision- and speech-related tasks.
summary: One noted issue of vector-quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) is that the learned discrete representation uses only a fraction of the full capacity of the codebook, also known as codebook collapse. We hypothesize that the training scheme of VQ-VAE, which involves some carefully designed heuristics, underlies this issue. In this paper, we propose a new training scheme that extends the standard VAE via novel stochastic dequantization and quantization, called stochastically quantized variational autoencoder (SQ-VAE). In SQ-VAE, we observe a trend that the quantization is stochastic at the initial stage of the training but gradually converges toward a deterministic quantization, which we call self-annealing. Our experiments show that SQ-VAE improves codebook utilization without using common heuristics. Furthermore, we empirically show that SQ-VAE is superior to VAE and VQ-VAE in vision- and speech-related tasks.
abstract_zh: 矢量量化变分自动编码器 (VQ-VAE) 的一个值得注意的问题是学习的离散表示仅使用码本全部容量的一小部分，也称为码本崩溃。我们假设 VQ-VAE 的训练方案涉及一些精心设计的启发式方法，是这个问题的根源。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的训练方案，通过新颖的随机去量化和量化来扩展标准 VAE，称为随机量化变分自动编码器（SQ-VAE）。在SQ-VAE中，我们观察到一种趋势，即在训练的初始阶段量化是随机的，但逐渐收敛到确定性量化，我们称之为自退火。我们的实验表明，SQ-VAE 在不使用常见启发式的情况下提高了码本利用率。此外，我们凭经验表明，SQ-VAE 在视觉和语音相关任务中优于 VAE 和 VQ-VAE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SQ-VAE的新模型，通过自适应退火的随机量化方法解决VQ-VAE中代码本利用率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VQ-VAE因训练中的启发式方法导致代码本容量未被充分利用，存在代码本崩溃问题，需改进训练方案。
AI.method: 设计SQ-VAE模型，采用随机反量化与量化机制，使量化过程从训练初期的随机性逐渐过渡到确定性（自退火机制）。
AI.result: 实验表明SQ-VAE在无需常见启发式方法的情况下提升代码本利用率，并在视觉与语音任务中优于VAE和VQ-VAE。
AI.conclusion: SQ-VAE通过自退火量化机制有效缓解代码本崩溃问题，且在多任务中表现更优。

search_text: SQ-VAE: Variational Bayes on Discrete Representation with Self-annealed Stochastic Quantization SQ-VAE：具有自退火随机量化的离散表示的变分贝叶斯 One noted issue of vector-quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) is that the learned discrete representation uses only a fraction of the full capacity of the codebook, also known as codebook collapse. We hypothesize that the training scheme of VQ-VAE, which involves some carefully designed heuristics, underlies this issue. In this paper, we propose a new training scheme that extends the standard VAE via novel stochastic dequantization and quantization, called stochastically quantized variational autoencoder (SQ-VAE). In SQ-VAE, we observe a trend that the quantization is stochastic at the initial stage of the training but gradually converges toward a deterministic quantization, which we call self-annealing. Our experiments show that SQ-VAE improves codebook utilization without using common heuristics. Furthermore, we empirically show that SQ-VAE is superior to VAE and VQ-VAE in vision- and speech-related tasks. 矢量量化变分自动编码器 (VQ-VAE) 的一个值得注意的问题是学习的离散表示仅使用码本全部容量的一小部分，也称为码本崩溃。我们假设 VQ-VAE 的训练方案涉及一些精心设计的启发式方法，是这个问题的根源。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的训练方案，通过新颖的随机去量化和量化来扩展标准 VAE，称为随机量化变分自动编码器（SQ-VAE）。在SQ-VAE中，我们观察到一种趋势，即在训练的初始阶段量化是随机的，但逐渐收敛到确定性量化，我们称之为自退火。我们的实验表明，SQ-VAE 在不使用常见启发式的情况下提高了码本利用率。此外，我们凭经验表明，SQ-VAE 在视觉和语音相关任务中优于 VAE 和 VQ-VAE。 本文提出了一种名为SQ-VAE的新模型，通过自适应退火的随机量化方法解决VQ-VAE中代码本利用率低的问题。 Yuhta Takida,Takashi Shibuya,WeiHsiang Liao,Chieh-Hsin Lai,Junki Ohmura,Toshimitsu Uesaka,Naoki Murata,Shusuke Takahashi,Toshiyuki Kumakura,Yuki Mitsufuji cs.LG,cs.CV

title: The AI Teacher Test: Measuring the Pedagogical Ability of Blender and GPT-3 in Educational Dialogues
title_zh: AI 教师测试：衡量 Blender 和 GPT-3 在教育对话中的教学能力
comment: to be published in the Proceedings of the 15th International Conference on Educational Data Mining; 8 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables
comments: to be published in the Proceedings of the 15th International Conference on Educational Data Mining; 8 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables
abstract: How can we test whether state-of-the-art generative models, such as Blender and GPT-3, are good AI teachers, capable of replying to a student in an educational dialogue? Designing an AI teacher test is challenging: although evaluation methods are much-needed, there is no off-the-shelf solution to measuring pedagogical ability. This paper reports on a first attempt at an AI teacher test. We built a solution around the insight that you can run conversational agents in parallel to human teachers in real-world dialogues, simulate how different agents would respond to a student, and compare these counterpart responses in terms of three abilities: speak like a teacher, understand a student, help a student. Our method builds on the reliability of comparative judgments in education and uses a probabilistic model and Bayesian sampling to infer estimates of pedagogical ability. We find that, even though conversational agents (Blender in particular) perform well on conversational uptake, they are quantifiably worse than real teachers on several pedagogical dimensions, especially with regard to helpfulness (Blender: Δ ability = -0.75; GPT-3: Δ ability = -0.93).
summary: How can we test whether state-of-the-art generative models, such as Blender and GPT-3, are good AI teachers, capable of replying to a student in an educational dialogue? Designing an AI teacher test is challenging: although evaluation methods are much-needed, there is no off-the-shelf solution to measuring pedagogical ability. This paper reports on a first attempt at an AI teacher test. We built a solution around the insight that you can run conversational agents in parallel to human teachers in real-world dialogues, simulate how different agents would respond to a student, and compare these counterpart responses in terms of three abilities: speak like a teacher, understand a student, help a student. Our method builds on the reliability of comparative judgments in education and uses a probabilistic model and Bayesian sampling to infer estimates of pedagogical ability. We find that, even though conversational agents (Blender in particular) perform well on conversational uptake, they are quantifiably worse than real teachers on several pedagogical dimensions, especially with regard to helpfulness (Blender: Δ ability = -0.75; GPT-3: Δ ability = -0.93).
abstract_zh: 我们如何测试最先进的生成模型（例如 Blender 和 GPT-3）是否是优秀的 AI 老师，能够在教育对话中回复学生？设计人工智能教师测试具有挑战性：尽管急需评估方法，但没有现成的解决方案来衡量教学能力。本文报告了人工智能教师测试的首次尝试。我们围绕这样的见解构建了一个解决方案：您可以在现实世界的对话中与人类教师并行运行对话代理，模拟不同代理对学生的反应，并从三种能力方面比较这些对应的反应：像老师一样说话、理解学生、帮助学生。我们的方法建立在教育比较判断的可靠性基础上，并使用概率模型和贝叶斯抽样来推断教学能力的估计。我们发现，尽管对话代理（尤其是 Blender）在对话吸收方面表现良好，但在几个教学维度上，他们在量化上比真正的教师差，特别是在帮助方面（Blender：Δ 能力 = -0.75；GPT-3：Δ 能力 = -0.93）。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在测试Blender和GPT-3等生成模型在教育对话中的教学能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管评估方法是急需的，但目前没有现成的方法来衡量教学能力，因此需要设计一种AI教师测试。
AI.method: 通过在真实对话中并行运行对话代理，模拟不同代理对学生的回应，并基于教育中的比较判断可靠性，使用概率模型和贝叶斯抽样推断教学能力。
AI.result: 尽管对话代理在对话中表现良好，但Blender和GPT-3在教学能力方面，特别是在帮助性方面，明显逊色于真实教师。
AI.conclusion: 当前的生成模型在教学能力上仍无法与人类教师相比，特别是在帮助学生方面存在明显差距。

authors_text: Mohammed M. S. El-Kholany,Martin Gebser,Konstantin Schekotihin
title: Decomposition Strategies and Multi-shot ASP Solving for Job-shop Scheduling
title_zh: 作业车间调度的分解策略和多镜头 ASP 求解
comment: ef:Logical Methods in Computer Science, Volume 21, Issue 3 (August 7, 2025) lmcs:14049
comments: ef:Logical Methods in Computer Science, Volume 21, Issue 3 (August 7, 2025) lmcs:14049
abstract: The Job-shop Scheduling Problem (JSP) is a well-known and challenging combinatorial optimization problem in which tasks sharing a machine are to be arranged in a sequence such that encompassing jobs can be completed as early as possible. In this paper, we investigate problem decomposition into time windows whose operations can be successively scheduled and optimized by means of multi-shot Answer Set Programming (ASP) solving. From a computational perspective, decomposition aims to split highly complex scheduling tasks into better manageable subproblems with a balanced number of operations such that good-quality or even optimal partial solutions can be reliably found in a small fraction of runtime. We devise and investigate a variety of decomposition strategies in terms of the number and size of time windows as well as heuristics for choosing their operations. Moreover, we incorporate time window overlapping and compression techniques into the iterative scheduling process to counteract optimization limitations due to the restriction to window-wise partial schedules. Our experiments on different JSP benchmark sets show that successive optimization by multi-shot ASP solving leads to substantially better schedules within tight runtime limits than single-shot optimization on the full problem. In particular, we find that decomposing initial solutions obtained with proficient heuristic methods into time windows leads to improved solution quality.
summary: The Job-shop Scheduling Problem (JSP) is a well-known and challenging combinatorial optimization problem in which tasks sharing a machine are to be arranged in a sequence such that encompassing jobs can be completed as early as possible. In this paper, we investigate problem decomposition into time windows whose operations can be successively scheduled and optimized by means of multi-shot Answer Set Programming (ASP) solving. From a computational perspective, decomposition aims to split highly complex scheduling tasks into better manageable subproblems with a balanced number of operations such that good-quality or even optimal partial solutions can be reliably found in a small fraction of runtime. We devise and investigate a variety of decomposition strategies in terms of the number and size of time windows as well as heuristics for choosing their operations. Moreover, we incorporate time window overlapping and compression techniques into the iterative scheduling process to counteract optimization limitations due to the restriction to window-wise partial schedules. Our experiments on different JSP benchmark sets show that successive optimization by multi-shot ASP solving leads to substantially better schedules within tight runtime limits than single-shot optimization on the full problem. In particular, we find that decomposing initial solutions obtained with proficient heuristic methods into time windows leads to improved solution quality.
abstract_zh: 作业车间调度问题（JSP）是一个众所周知且具有挑战性的组合优化问题，其中共享一台机器的任务将按顺序排列，以便可以尽早完成包含的作业。在本文中，我们研究将问题分解为时间窗口，其操作可以通过多样本答案集编程（ASP）求解来连续调度和优化。从计算的角度来看，分解的目的是将高度复杂的调度任务分解为具有平衡操作数量的更好管理的子问题，以便可以在一小部分运行时间内可靠地找到高质量甚至最佳的部分解决方案。我们在时间窗口的数量和大小以及选择其操作的启发式方面设计并研究了各种分解策略。此外，我们将时间窗口重叠和压缩技术合并到迭代调度过程中，以抵消由于窗口部分调度的限制而导致的优化限制。我们对不同 JSP 基准集进行的实验表明，与对整个问题进行单次优化相比，通过多次 ASP 求解进行连续优化可以在严格的运行时限制内实现更好的调度。特别是，我们发现将通过熟练的启发式方法获得的初始解决方案分解为时间窗口可以提高解决方案的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过时间窗口分解策略与多阶段ASP求解方法优化作业车间调度问题，以提高调度效率与解的质量。
AI.motivation: 作业车间调度问题（JSP）复杂度高，传统方法难以在合理时间内求得高质量解，需通过分解策略与多阶段求解提升效率。
AI.method: 采用时间窗口分解策略，结合重叠与压缩技术，并运用多阶段ASP迭代优化，以分步解决子问题并提升整体调度质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，多阶段ASP求解在严格时间限制下显著优于单次求解，分解初始解后进一步提升了解的质量。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段ASP结合分解策略有效解决JSP，尤其在初始解分解后显著提升解质量，为复杂调度问题提供新方法。

method: 采用时间窗口分解策略，结合重叠与压缩技术，并运用多阶段ASP迭代优化，以分步解决子问题并提升整体调度质量。
result: 实验表明，多阶段ASP求解在严格时间限制下显著优于单次求解，分解初始解后进一步提升了解的质量。
conclusion: 多阶段ASP结合分解策略有效解决JSP，尤其在初始解分解后显著提升解质量，为复杂调度问题提供新方法。
search_text: Decomposition Strategies and Multi-shot ASP Solving for Job-shop Scheduling 作业车间调度的分解策略和多镜头 ASP 求解 The Job-shop Scheduling Problem (JSP) is a well-known and challenging combinatorial optimization problem in which tasks sharing a machine are to be arranged in a sequence such that encompassing jobs can be completed as early as possible. In this paper, we investigate problem decomposition into time windows whose operations can be successively scheduled and optimized by means of multi-shot Answer Set Programming (ASP) solving. From a computational perspective, decomposition aims to split highly complex scheduling tasks into better manageable subproblems with a balanced number of operations such that good-quality or even optimal partial solutions can be reliably found in a small fraction of runtime. We devise and investigate a variety of decomposition strategies in terms of the number and size of time windows as well as heuristics for choosing their operations. Moreover, we incorporate time window overlapping and compression techniques into the iterative scheduling process to counteract optimization limitations due to the restriction to window-wise partial schedules. Our experiments on different JSP benchmark sets show that successive optimization by multi-shot ASP solving leads to substantially better schedules within tight runtime limits than single-shot optimization on the full problem. In particular, we find that decomposing initial solutions obtained with proficient heuristic methods into time windows leads to improved solution quality. 作业车间调度问题（JSP）是一个众所周知且具有挑战性的组合优化问题，其中共享一台机器的任务将按顺序排列，以便可以尽早完成包含的作业。在本文中，我们研究将问题分解为时间窗口，其操作可以通过多样本答案集编程（ASP）求解来连续调度和优化。从计算的角度来看，分解的目的是将高度复杂的调度任务分解为具有平衡操作数量的更好管理的子问题，以便可以在一小部分运行时间内可靠地找到高质量甚至最佳的部分解决方案。我们在时间窗口的数量和大小以及选择其操作的启发式方面设计并研究了各种分解策略。此外，我们将时间窗口重叠和压缩技术合并到迭代调度过程中，以抵消由于窗口部分调度的限制而导致的优化限制。我们对不同 JSP 基准集进行的实验表明，与对整个问题进行单次优化相比，通过多次 ASP 求解进行连续优化可以在严格的运行时限制内实现更好的调度。特别是，我们发现将通过熟练的启发式方法获得的初始解决方案分解为时间窗口可以提高解决方案的质量。 本文研究了通过时间窗口分解策略与多阶段ASP求解方法优化作业车间调度问题，以提高调度效率与解的质量。 Mohammed M. S. El-Kholany,Martin Gebser,Konstantin Schekotihin cs.AI,cs.LO

authors_text: Dongjie Yu,Haitong Ma,Shengbo Eben Li,Jianyu Chen
title: Reachability Constrained Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 可达性约束强化学习
abstract: Constrained reinforcement learning (CRL) has gained significant interest recently, since safety constraints satisfaction is critical for real-world problems. However, existing CRL methods constraining discounted cumulative costs generally lack rigorous definition and guarantee of safety. In contrast, in the safe control research, safety is defined as persistently satisfying certain state constraints. Such persistent safety is possible only on a subset of the state space, called feasible set, where an optimal largest feasible set exists for a given environment. Recent studies incorporate feasible sets into CRL with energy-based methods such as control barrier function (CBF), safety index (SI), and leverage prior conservative estimations of feasible sets, which harms the performance of the learned policy. To deal with this problem, this paper proposes the reachability CRL (RCRL) method by using reachability analysis to establish the novel self-consistency condition and characterize the feasible sets. The feasible sets are represented by the safety value function, which is used as the constraint in CRL. We use the multi-time scale stochastic approximation theory to prove that the proposed algorithm converges to a local optimum, where the largest feasible set can be guaranteed. Empirical results on different benchmarks validate the learned feasible set, the policy performance, and constraint satisfaction of RCRL, compared to CRL and safe control baselines.
summary: Constrained reinforcement learning (CRL) has gained significant interest recently, since safety constraints satisfaction is critical for real-world problems. However, existing CRL methods constraining discounted cumulative costs generally lack rigorous definition and guarantee of safety. In contrast, in the safe control research, safety is defined as persistently satisfying certain state constraints. Such persistent safety is possible only on a subset of the state space, called feasible set, where an optimal largest feasible set exists for a given environment. Recent studies incorporate feasible sets into CRL with energy-based methods such as control barrier function (CBF), safety index (SI), and leverage prior conservative estimations of feasible sets, which harms the performance of the learned policy. To deal with this problem, this paper proposes the reachability CRL (RCRL) method by using reachability analysis to establish the novel self-consistency condition and characterize the feasible sets. The feasible sets are represented by the safety value function, which is used as the constraint in CRL. We use the multi-time scale stochastic approximation theory to prove that the proposed algorithm converges to a local optimum, where the largest feasible set can be guaranteed. Empirical results on different benchmarks validate the learned feasible set, the policy performance, and constraint satisfaction of RCRL, compared to CRL and safe control baselines.
abstract_zh: 约束强化学习（CRL）最近引起了人们的极大兴趣，因为安全约束满足对于现实世界的问题至关重要。然而，现有的约束贴现累积成本的CRL方法普遍缺乏严格的定义和安全性保证。相反，在安全控制研究中，安全被定义为持续满足某些状态约束。这种持久安全性仅在状态空间的子集（称为可行集）上才有可能，其中对于给定环境存在最佳最大可行集。最近的研究使用基于能量的方法（例如控制屏障函数（CBF）、安全指数（SI））将可行集纳入 CRL 中，并利用先前对可行集的保守估计，这损害了学习策略的性能。针对这一问题，本文提出可达性CRL（RCRL）方法，利用可达性分析建立新颖的自洽条件并刻画可行集。可行集由安全值函数表示，在CRL中用作约束。我们利用多时间尺度随机逼近理论证明所提出的算法收敛于局部最优，并且可以保证最大可行集。与 CRL 和安全控制基线相比，不同基准的实证结果验证了 RCRL 的学习可行集、策略性能和约束满足。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可达性分析的约束强化学习方法（RCRL），以解决现有方法在安全约束定义和性能上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有约束强化学习方法对折扣累积成本的约束缺乏严格的安全保证，而安全控制领域通过定义持续满足状态约束的可行集来确保安全，但传统方法依赖保守估计导致策略性能下降。
AI.method: 利用可达性分析建立自洽条件，通过安全值函数表征可行集作为CRL的约束，并采用多时间尺度随机逼近理论证明算法收敛至局部最优解。
AI.result: 实验验证了RCRL在多个基准测试中能够有效学习可行集，提升策略性能并满足约束条件，优于传统CRL和安全控制基线方法。
AI.conclusion: RCRL通过可达性分析实现了安全约束的严格定义与性能优化平衡，为实际应用中的安全强化学习提供了新思路。

title: Wasserstein t-SNE
title_zh: 瓦瑟斯坦 t-SNE
comment: 16 pages, 10 figures, to be published at ECML/PKDD 2022
comments: 16 pages, 10 figures, to be published at ECML/PKDD 2022
abstract: Scientific datasets often have hierarchical structure: for example, in surveys, individual participants (samples) might be grouped at a higher level (units) such as their geographical region. In these settings, the interest is often in exploring the structure on the unit level rather than on the sample level. Units can be compared based on the distance between their means, however this ignores the within-unit distribution of samples. Here we develop an approach for exploratory analysis of hierarchical datasets using the Wasserstein distance metric that takes into account the shapes of within-unit distributions. We use t-SNE to construct 2D embeddings of the units, based on the matrix of pairwise Wasserstein distances between them. The distance matrix can be efficiently computed by approximating each unit with a Gaussian distribution, but we also provide a scalable method to compute exact Wasserstein distances. We use synthetic data to demonstrate the effectiveness of our Wasserstein t-SNE, and apply it to data from the 2017 German parliamentary election, considering polling stations as samples and voting districts as units. The resulting embedding uncovers meaningful structure in the data.
summary: Scientific datasets often have hierarchical structure: for example, in surveys, individual participants (samples) might be grouped at a higher level (units) such as their geographical region. In these settings, the interest is often in exploring the structure on the unit level rather than on the sample level. Units can be compared based on the distance between their means, however this ignores the within-unit distribution of samples. Here we develop an approach for exploratory analysis of hierarchical datasets using the Wasserstein distance metric that takes into account the shapes of within-unit distributions. We use t-SNE to construct 2D embeddings of the units, based on the matrix of pairwise Wasserstein distances between them. The distance matrix can be efficiently computed by approximating each unit with a Gaussian distribution, but we also provide a scalable method to compute exact Wasserstein distances. We use synthetic data to demonstrate the effectiveness of our Wasserstein t-SNE, and apply it to data from the 2017 German parliamentary election, considering polling stations as samples and voting districts as units. The resulting embedding uncovers meaningful structure in the data.
abstract_zh: 科学数据集通常具有层次结构：例如，在调查中，个体参与者（样本）可能被分组在更高级别（单位），例如其地理区域。在这些设置中，人们的兴趣通常是探索单元级别的结构而不是样本级别。可以根据单位均值之间的距离来比较单位，但这忽略了样本的单位内分布。在这里，我们开发了一种使用 Wasserstein 距离度量对分层数据集进行探索性分析的方法，该度量考虑了单位内分布的形状。我们使用 t-SNE 基于单元之间的成对 Wasserstein 距离矩阵来构造单元的 2D 嵌入。通过用高斯分布近似每个单元可以有效地计算距离矩阵，但我们还提供了一种可扩展的方法来计算精确的 Wasserstein 距离。我们使用合成数据来证明 Wasserstein t-SNE 的有效性，并将其应用于 2017 年德国议会选举的数据，以投票站为样本，以投票区为单位。由此产生的嵌入揭示了数据中有意义的结构。

AI.tldr: 开发一种结合Wasserstein距离和t-SNE的方法，用于分析具有层次结构的数据集，揭示单位层面的结构。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅比较单位均值，忽视了单位内部样本的分布形态，导致信息丢失，需更全面的分析方法。
AI.method: 基于Wasserstein距离计算单位间距离矩阵，利用t-SNE生成二维嵌入，结合近似高斯分布和精确计算方法。
AI.result: 在合成数据和德国议会选举数据上验证，成功揭示了数据中的有意义结构。
AI.conclusion: Wasserstein t-SNE能有效捕捉单位层面结构，优于传统方法，适用于复杂分层数据的探索性分析。

authors_text: Wei Wan,Yuejin Zhang,Chenglong Bao,Bin Dong,Zuoqiang Shi
title: A scalable deep learning approach for solving high-dimensional dynamic optimal transport
title_zh: 用于解决高维动态最优传输的可扩展深度学习方法
abstract: The dynamic formulation of optimal transport has attracted growing interests in scientific computing and machine learning, and its computation requires to solve a PDE-constrained optimization problem. The classical Eulerian discretization based approaches suffer from the curse of dimensionality, which arises from the approximation of high-dimensional velocity field. In this work, we propose a deep learning based method to solve the dynamic optimal transport in high dimensional space. Our method contains three main ingredients: a carefully designed representation of the velocity field, the discretization of the PDE constraint along the characteristics, and the computation of high dimensional integral by Monte Carlo method in each time step. Specifically, in the representation of the velocity field, we apply the classical nodal basis function in time and the deep neural networks in space domain with the H1-norm regularization. This technique promotes the regularity of the velocity field in both time and space such that the discretization along the characteristic remains to be stable during the training process. Extensive numerical examples have been conducted to test the proposed method. Compared to other solvers of optimal transport, our method could give more accurate results in high dimensional cases and has very good scalability with respect to dimension. Finally, we extend our method to more complicated cases such as crowd motion problem.
summary: The dynamic formulation of optimal transport has attracted growing interests in scientific computing and machine learning, and its computation requires to solve a PDE-constrained optimization problem. The classical Eulerian discretization based approaches suffer from the curse of dimensionality, which arises from the approximation of high-dimensional velocity field. In this work, we propose a deep learning based method to solve the dynamic optimal transport in high dimensional space. Our method contains three main ingredients: a carefully designed representation of the velocity field, the discretization of the PDE constraint along the characteristics, and the computation of high dimensional integral by Monte Carlo method in each time step. Specifically, in the representation of the velocity field, we apply the classical nodal basis function in time and the deep neural networks in space domain with the H1-norm regularization. This technique promotes the regularity of the velocity field in both time and space such that the discretization along the characteristic remains to be stable during the training process. Extensive numerical examples have been conducted to test the proposed method. Compared to other solvers of optimal transport, our method could give more accurate results in high dimensional cases and has very good scalability with respect to dimension. Finally, we extend our method to more complicated cases such as crowd motion problem.
abstract_zh: 最优传输的动态公式引起了科学计算和机器学习日益增长的兴趣，其计算需要解决偏微分方程约束的优化问题。基于经典欧拉离散化的方法受到维数灾难的困扰，这是由高维速度场的近似引起的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的方法来解决高维空间中的动态最优传输。我们的方法包含三个主要成分：精心设计的速度场表示、沿特征的 PDE 约束的离散化以及每个时间步长中通过蒙特卡罗方法计算高维积分。具体来说，在速度场的表示中，我们在时间域中应用经典的节点基函数，在空间域中应用具有H1范数正则化的深度神经网络。该技术促进了速度场在时间和空间上的规律性，使得沿特征的离散化在训练过程中保持稳定。已经进行了大量的数值例子来测试所提出的方法。与其他最佳传输求解器相比，我们的方法可以在高维情况下给出更准确的结果，并且在维度方面具有非常好的可扩展性。最后，我们将我们的方法扩展到更复杂的情况，例如人群运动问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的可扩展方法，用于求解高维动态最优运输问题。
AI.motivation: 传统欧拉离散化方法在高维速度场近似中面临维度灾难问题，亟需一种高效且可扩展的求解方案。
AI.method: 方法包含三个核心部分：时空联合的高维速度场表示（时间维度采用节点基函数，空间维度采用H1范数正则化的深度神经网络）、沿特征线的PDE约束离散化，以及基于蒙特卡洛方法的高维积分计算。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在高维情况下相比传统求解器具有更高的精度和维度可扩展性，并成功扩展至人群运动等复杂场景。
AI.conclusion: 所提深度学习框架有效解决了高维动态最优运输问题的计算瓶颈，为复杂场景建模提供了新思路。

title: Fair Shares: Feasibility, Domination and Incentives
title_zh: 公平份额：可行性、支配性和激励
abstract: We consider fair allocation of a set $M$ of indivisible goods to $n$ equally-entitled agents, with no monetary transfers. Every agent $i$ has a valuation $v_i$ from some given class of valuation functions. A share $s$ is a function that maps a pair $(v_i,n)$ to a value, with the interpretation that if an allocation of $M$ to $n$ agents fails to give agent $i$ a bundle of value at least equal to $s(v_i,n)$, this serves as evidence that the allocation is not fair towards $i$. For such an interpretation to make sense, we would like the share to be feasible, meaning that for any valuations in the class, there is an allocation that gives every agent at least her share. The maximin share was a natural candidate for a feasible share for additive valuations. However, Kurokawa, Procaccia and Wang [2018] show that it is not feasible. We initiate a systematic study of the family of feasible shares. We say that a share is \emph{self maximizing} if truth-telling maximizes the implied guarantee. We show that every feasible share is dominated by some self-maximizing and feasible share. We seek to identify those self-maximizing feasible shares that are polynomial time computable, and offer the highest share values. We show that a SM-dominating feasible share -- one that dominates every self-maximizing (SM) feasible share -- does not exist for additive valuations (and beyond). Consequently, we relax the domination property to that of domination up to a multiplicative factor of $ρ$ (called $ρ$-dominating). For additive valuations we present shares that are feasible, self-maximizing and polynomial-time computable. For $n$ agents we present such a share that is $\frac{2n}{3n-1}$-dominating. For two agents we present such a share that is $(1 - ε)$-dominating. Moreover, for these shares we present poly-time algorithms that compute allocations that give every agent at least her share.
summary: We consider fair allocation of a set $M$ of indivisible goods to $n$ equally-entitled agents, with no monetary transfers. Every agent $i$ has a valuation $v_i$ from some given class of valuation functions. A share $s$ is a function that maps a pair $(v_i,n)$ to a value, with the interpretation that if an allocation of $M$ to $n$ agents fails to give agent $i$ a bundle of value at least equal to $s(v_i,n)$, this serves as evidence that the allocation is not fair towards $i$. For such an interpretation to make sense, we would like the share to be feasible, meaning that for any valuations in the class, there is an allocation that gives every agent at least her share. The maximin share was a natural candidate for a feasible share for additive valuations. However, Kurokawa, Procaccia and Wang [2018] show that it is not feasible. We initiate a systematic study of the family of feasible shares. We say that a share is \emph{self maximizing} if truth-telling maximizes the implied guarantee. We show that every feasible share is dominated by some self-maximizing and feasible share. We seek to identify those self-maximizing feasible shares that are polynomial time computable, and offer the highest share values. We show that a SM-dominating feasible share -- one that dominates every self-maximizing (SM) feasible share -- does not exist for additive valuations (and beyond). Consequently, we relax the domination property to that of domination up to a multiplicative factor of $ρ$ (called $ρ$-dominating). For additive valuations we present shares that are feasible, self-maximizing and polynomial-time computable. For $n$ agents we present such a share that is $\frac{2n}{3n-1}$-dominating. For two agents we present such a share that is $(1 - ε)$-dominating. Moreover, for these shares we present poly-time algorithms that compute allocations that give every agent at least her share.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑将一组 $M$ 不可分割的商品公平分配给 $n$ 同等权利的代理人，而不进行货币转移。每个代理 $i$ 都有来自某些给定类别的评估函数的评估 $v_i$。份额 $s$ 是一个将一对 $(v_i,n)$ 映射到一个值的函数，其解释是，如果将 $M$ 分配给 $n$ 代理未能为代理 $i$ 提供至少等于 $s(v_i,n)$ 的价值捆绑，则这可以作为分配对 $i$ 不公平的证据。为了使这种解释有意义，我们希望份额是可行的，这意味着对于该类别中的任何估值，都有一种分配，使每个代理人至少拥有自己的份额。最大最小份额是附加估值可行份额的自然候选者。然而，Kurokawa、Procaccia 和 Wang [2018] 表明这是不可行的。我们对可行股票系列进行了系统研究。如果说实话能够最大化隐含的保证，我们就说份额是\emph{自我最大化}。我们表明，每个可行份额都受到一些自我最大化的可行份额的支配。我们寻求识别那些可自我最大化的可行股票，这些股票是多项式时间可计算的，并提供最高的股票价值。我们证明，对于累加估值（及其他估值）而言，SM 占主导地位的可行份额（即主导每一个自我最大化（SM）可行份额的份额）并不存在。因此，我们将支配属性放宽为支配属性，直到 $ρ$ 的乘法因子（称为 $ρ$-支配）。对于附加估值，我们提出了可行的、自我最大化的和多项式时间可计算的股票。对于 $n$ 代理，我们呈现出 $\frac{2n}{3n-1}$ 占主导地位的份额。对于两个代理，我们呈现出 $(1 - ε)$ 占主导地位的份额。此外，对于这些份额，我们提出了多时间算法，该算法计算分配给每个代理至少她的份额。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在无货币转移的情况下，如何为不可分割物品的公平分配设计可行且具有激励相容性的份额函数。
AI.motivation: 传统公平分配方法（如最大化最小份额）存在可行性缺陷，需系统研究可行份额的性质及其计算方法。
AI.method: 通过分析份额函数的可行性与支配关系，提出自最大化份额概念，并设计多项式时间算法实现特定份额分配。
AI.result: 证明不存在支配所有自最大化份额的SM-dominating份额，但为不同人数的代理设计了近似支配的可行份额及对应算法。
AI.conclusion: 虽无法实现完美公平，但通过放松支配条件，提出了高效计算且接近最优的公平分配方案。

authors_text: Fangyuan Kong,Mingxi Li,Songwei Liu,Ding Liu,Jingwen He,Yang Bai,Fangmin Chen,Lean Fu
title: Residual Local Feature Network for Efficient Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于高效超分辨率的残余局部特征网络
abstract: Deep learning based approaches has achieved great performance in single image super-resolution (SISR). However, recent advances in efficient super-resolution focus on reducing the number of parameters and FLOPs, and they aggregate more powerful features by improving feature utilization through complex layer connection strategies. These structures may not be necessary to achieve higher running speed, which makes them difficult to be deployed to resource-constrained devices. In this work, we propose a novel Residual Local Feature Network (RLFN). The main idea is using three convolutional layers for residual local feature learning to simplify feature aggregation, which achieves a good trade-off between model performance and inference time. Moreover, we revisit the popular contrastive loss and observe that the selection of intermediate features of its feature extractor has great influence on the performance. Besides, we propose a novel multi-stage warm-start training strategy. In each stage, the pre-trained weights from previous stages are utilized to improve the model performance. Combined with the improved contrastive loss and training strategy, the proposed RLFN outperforms all the state-of-the-art efficient image SR models in terms of runtime while maintaining both PSNR and SSIM for SR. In addition, we won the first place in the runtime track of the NTIRE 2022 efficient super-resolution challenge. Code will be available at https://github.com/fyan111/RLFN.

However, recent advances in efficient super-resolution focus on reducing the number of parameters and FLOPs, and they aggregate more powerful features by improving feature utilization through complex layer connection strategies. These structures may not be necessary to achieve higher running speed, which makes them difficult to be deployed to resource-constrained devices. In this work, we propose a novel Residual Local Feature Network (RLFN). The main idea is using three convolutional layers for residual local feature learning to simplify feature aggregation, which achieves a good trade-off between model performance and inference time. Moreover, we revisit the popular contrastive loss and observe that the selection of intermediate features of its feature extractor has great influence on the performance. Besides, we propose a novel multi-stage warm-start training strategy. In each stage, the pre-trained weights from previous stages are utilized to improve the model performance. Combined with the improved contrastive loss and training strategy, the proposed RLFN outperforms all the state-of-the-art efficient image SR models in terms of runtime while maintaining both PSNR and SSIM for SR. In addition, we won the first place in the runtime track of the NTIRE 2022 efficient super-resolution challenge. Code will be available at https://github.com/fyan111/RLFN.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的方法在单图像超分辨率（SISR）方面取得了出色的性能。然而，高效超分辨率的最新进展集中在减少参数和 FLOP 的数量，并且它们通过复杂的层连接策略提高特征利用率来聚合更强大的特征。这些结构可能不是实现更高运行速度所必需的，这使得它们难以部署到资源受限的设备上。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的残留局部特征网络（RLFN）。主要思想是使用三个卷积层进行残差局部特征学习来简化特征聚合，从而在模型性能和推理时间之间实现了良好的权衡。此外，我们重新审视了流行的对比损失，并观察到其特征提取器的中间特征的选择对性能有很大影响。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的多阶段热启动训练策略。在每个阶段中，都会利用前一阶段的预训练权重来提高模型性能。结合改进的对比损失和训练策略，所提出的 RLFN 在运行时间方面优于所有最先进的高效图像 SR 模型，同时保持 SR 的 PSNR 和 SSIM。此外，我们还获得了NTIRE 2022高效超分辨率挑战赛运行时赛道的第一名。代码可在 https://github.com/fyan111/RLFN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RLFN的残差局部特征网络，旨在实现高效且高质量的图像超分辨率。
AI.motivation: 现有高效超分辨率方法通过复杂网络结构提升性能但参数量大，难以部署到资源受限设备，需在模型性能与推理速度间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 设计三卷积层残差局部特征学习模块简化特征聚合，并改进对比损失函数与多阶段预热训练策略以提升模型表现。
AI.result: RLFN在保持PSNR和SSIM指标的同时优于所有高效超分模型，且在NTIRE 2022竞赛运行时赛道夺冠。
AI.conclusion: RLFN通过简化网络结构与优化训练策略，在效率与性能间取得良好平衡，适用于实际部署场景。

Combined with the improved contrastive loss and training strategy, the proposed RLFN outperforms all the state-of-the-art efficient image SR models in terms of runtime while maintaining both PSNR and SSIM for SR. In addition, we won the first place in the runtime track of the NTIRE 2022 efficient super-resolution challenge. authors_text: Shoko Wakamiya,Toshiki Mera,Eiji Aramaki,Masaki Matsubara,Atsuyuki Morishima
title: Crowdsourced Hypothesis Generation and their Verification: A Case Study on Sleep Quality Improvement
title_zh: 众包假设的生成及其验证：睡眠质量改善的案例研究
abstract: A clinical study is often necessary for exploring important research questions; however, this approach is sometimes time and money consuming. Another extreme approach, which is to collect and aggregate opinions from crowds, provides a result drawn from the crowds' past experiences and knowledge. To explore a solution that takes advantage of both the rigid clinical approach and the crowds' opinion-based approach, we design a framework that exploits crowdsourcing as a part of the research process, whereby crowd workers serve as if they were a scientist conducting a "pseudo" prospective study. This study evaluates the feasibility of the proposed framework to generate hypotheses on a specified topic and verify them in the real world by employing many crowd workers. The framework comprises two phases of crowd-based workflow. In Phase 1 - the hypothesis generation and ranking phase - our system asks workers two types of questions to collect a number of hypotheses and rank them. In Phase 2 - the hypothesis verification phase - the system asks workers to verify the top-ranked hypotheses from Phase 1 by implementing one of them in real life. Through experiments, we explore the potential and limitations of the framework to generate and evaluate hypotheses about the factors that result in a good night's sleep. Our results on significant sleep quality improvement show the basic feasibility of our framework, suggesting that crowd-based research is compatible with experts' knowledge in a certain domain.
summary: A clinical study is often necessary for exploring important research questions; however, this approach is sometimes time and money consuming. Another extreme approach, which is to collect and aggregate opinions from crowds, provides a result drawn from the crowds' past experiences and knowledge. To explore a solution that takes advantage of both the rigid clinical approach and the crowds' opinion-based approach, we design a framework that exploits crowdsourcing as a part of the research process, whereby crowd workers serve as if they were a scientist conducting a "pseudo" prospective study. This study evaluates the feasibility of the proposed framework to generate hypotheses on a specified topic and verify them in the real world by employing many crowd workers. The framework comprises two phases of crowd-based workflow. In Phase 1 - the hypothesis generation and ranking phase - our system asks workers two types of questions to collect a number of hypotheses and rank them. In Phase 2 - the hypothesis verification phase - the system asks workers to verify the top-ranked hypotheses from Phase 1 by implementing one of them in real life. Through experiments, we explore the potential and limitations of the framework to generate and evaluate hypotheses about the factors that result in a good night's sleep. Our results on significant sleep quality improvement show the basic feasibility of our framework, suggesting that crowd-based research is compatible with experts' knowledge in a certain domain.
abstract_zh: 临床研究对于探索重要的研究问题通常是必要的；然而，这种方法有时既费时又费钱。另一种极端的方法是收集和汇总人群的意见，提供从人群过去的经验和知识中得出的结果。为了探索一种既利用严格的临床方法又利用群众基于意见的方法的解决方案，我们设计了一个框架，将众包作为研究过程的一部分，让群众工作人员就像进行“伪”前瞻性研究的科学家一样。本研究评估了所提出的框架在特定主题上生成假设并通过雇用许多众包工作者在现实世界中验证它们的可行性。该框架包括基于人群的工作流程的两个阶段。在第一阶段——假设生成和排名阶段——我们的系统向工作人员提出两类问题来收集大量假设并对它们进行排名。在第二阶段（假设验证阶段），系统要求工作人员通过在现实生活中实施其中一个假设来验证第一阶段中排名最高的假设。通过实验，我们探索了该框架的潜力和局限性，以生成和评估有关导致良好睡眠的因素的假设。我们关于睡眠质量显着改善的结果表明了我们的框架的基本可行性，这表明基于人群的研究与特定领域的专家知识是兼容的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合众包与临床研究的框架，用于生成和验证改善睡眠质量的假设。
AI.motivation: 传统临床研究耗时耗资，而单纯依赖众包意见可能缺乏科学严谨性，需探索两者结合的可行性。
AI.method: 分两阶段众包流程：第一阶段收集并排序假设，第二阶段通过真实实验验证排名靠前的假设。
AI.result: 实验表明框架能有效生成并验证改善睡眠质量的假设，且结果与专家知识兼容。
AI.conclusion: 众包研究框架在特定领域可补充专家知识，具备实际应用潜力。
